如果该球体覆盖了一个魔法光源的区域，或者影响了一个会受到魔法光照影响的生物，噬星会尝试反制光亮效果。

大成功 该生物或者物体不受影响。

成功 该生物或者物体承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物或者物体承受完整伤害。

大失败 该生物或者物体承受双倍伤害。如果它是生物，他会因这黑暗而 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲 Blinded}，持续时间无限。

升阶（+1） 该寒冷伤害增加1d10，并且对活物的虚能伤害增加1d4。

Execute.name: 处死一指 Execute
Execute.description:
你将你的手指指向目标生物，并祈求万物的终结。目标承受70点虚能伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。如果目标是不死生物，或者具有虚能治疗能力，该法术失去死亡和虚能特征，获得命能特征，并且目标改为承受70点命能伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加10。

Void Scour.name: Void Scour
Void Scour.description:
A well of desolate darkness scours all life, dealing 10d10 void damage to all living creatures in the area. Each creature in the area must attempt a Reflex save. If void scour overlaps with an area of magical light or affects a creature affected by magical light, void scour attempts to counteract the light effect.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and @Damage[(@item.rank - 6)d6[persistent,void]] damage, and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and @Damage[(@item.rank - 5)d6[persistent,void]] damage, and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 2}.

Heightened (+1) Increase the initial void damage by 2d10. The persistent void damage increases by 1d6 on a failure, or by 2d6 on critical failure.

Mislead.name: 假像术 Mislead
Mislead.description:
你将自身变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}，并且创造一个自身的幻术复制。当你维持该法术时，你可以通过意念指定一系列行动，你的复制该轮会按此行动。你的复制会如同具有你的完整数量的动作一般行动，尽管它不能影响环境中的任何事物。你的复制和你的隐形都会持续整个法术持续时间。进行敌对动作不会结束假像术的隐形，如同4环级@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XXqE1eY3w3z6xJCB]{Invisibility}法术。一个了解到该复制为幻象的生物并不会直接知道你是隐形的，并且可以看见你的隐形形态的生物并不会直接知道你的复制是幻象。

如果你施放法术，或者以另外方式和其他生物交互，以该动作的一部分，你可以尝试一次欺骗检定，对抗观察者的察觉DC，以令它相信你的复制品使用了该动作。这不会欺骗任何了解你的复制品为幻觉的生物，并且对于显然不是来自复制的攻击也没有用。例如，你发射了一道射线，并且你可以令其看起来来自你的复制，只要你的复制的位置合适，但如果你使用剑攻击，并且你的复制在房间里与目标相对的另一个角落，你的欺骗检定自动失败。

Pocket Vacuum.name: Pocket Vacuum
Pocket Vacuum.description:
You create a sudden vacuum, forcing creatures in the area to hold their breath or fall @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} and start suffocating. The explosive decompression deals 5d12 bludgeoning damage to each creature in the area when the spell is cast or that enters the area during the duration (unless they were already in a vacuum), with a basic Fortitude save. Creatures who critically fail the save are also knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

Promession.name: Promession
Promession.description:
You flash freeze a target then send subsonic waves through it, potentially reducing it into fine powder. Make a spell attack against the target. If you hit a target, the target takes 6d8 cold damage and must attempt a Fortitude save. If you critically hit, the target gets a result one degree of success worse than it rolled on its Fortitude save. A creature reduced to 0 Hit Points is blasted to fine powder; its gear remains.

Critical Success The target is unaffected by further damage.

Success The target takes an additional @Damage[((@item.level -3)d8)[sonic]] damage.

Failure The target takes an additional @Damage[((@item.level)d8)[sonic]] damage.

Critical Failure The target takes an additional @Damage[((@item.level +6)d8)[sonic]] damage.

Heightened (+1) The cold and sonic damage each increase by 1d8.

Wave of Warning.name: Wave of Warning
Wave of Warning.description:
You deter enemies with a wave of hostile intent. The target takes 7d8 nonlethal mental damage, and the target must attempt a Will save. The psychic energy then arcs to another creature within 30 feet of the first target, jumps to another creature within 30 feet of that target, and so on. You can end the wave at any point. You can't target the same creature more than once, and you must have line of effect to all targets. Roll the damage only once, and apply it to each target (halving or doubling as appropriate for its saving throw outcome).

Critical Success The target creature is unaffected, and the wave ends with that target.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d8.

Cairn Form.name: Cairn Form
Cairn Form.description:
Your target's skin becomes a thick carapace of solid stone, granting resistance 5 to physical damage, except adamantine. The target gains a fist unarmed attack that deals 2d6 bludgeoning damage. The target uses their highest weapon or unarmed attack proficiency with these attacks, and if they have weapon specialization or greater weapon specialization, they add this damage as well. On a critical hit with one of these unarmed attacks, the creature struck must succeed at a Fortitude save against the target's class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.v724q5Xi7KPPnLQ3]{Spell Effect: Cairn Form}

Heightened (6th) The resistance increases to 10, and the damage dealt by the attacks increases to 3d6.

Heightened (10th) The resistance increases to 20, and the damage dealt by the attacks increases to 4d6.

Clairvoyance.name: 鹰眼术 Clairvoyance
Clairvoyance.description: 你在射程内创造出一个@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}的悬浮眼睛（它甚至可以在你的视觉线或者效果线之外）。这只眼睛不能移动，但是你可以从该处看到所有方向，如同使用你通常的视觉感官。

Electrotether.name: Electrotether
Electrotether.description:
You supercharge the targets' electromagnetism and pull them with a tether of lightning. Make a ranged spell attack against each target. If you attack two targets, both attacks count toward your multiple attack penalty, but it doesn't increase until after both attacks. The targets each take 4d8 electricity damage and are pulled 5 feet closer to you, or 10 feet closer on a critical hit. If both attacks hit, you can choose to move the creatures closer to one another instead of closer to you. Moving a target into a barrier, creature, or obstacle causes the target to stop before entering that space.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Haste.name: 加速术 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法强化了目标，令其行动迅速。它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}状态，并且每轮可以使用该额外动作以打击或者行走。

升阶（7环级） 你能以至多6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速术}

Personal Gravity (Constant).name: Personal Gravity (Constant)
Personal Gravity (Constant).description: You alter gravity's effects on you. You treat gravity as if it were your choice of one step higher or lower (for example, if you were in an area of low gravity, you could choose either standard gravity or zero-g). While the spell is active, you reduce the distance of any forced movement that would affect you by 5 feet (minimum 0 feet), and you ignore being clumsy and untethered because of gravity effects on you. You can Dismiss the spell.

Time's Edge.name: Time's Edge
Time's Edge.description:
You refract latent energy from the Dimension of Time into your current plane in the form of a massive blade. The blade deals 5d6 slashing damage to all creatures in the area as it causes time to pass rapidly in a thin slice of their bodies. Creatures in the area must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Darkness.name: 黑暗术 Darkness
Darkness.description:
你创造一片黑暗的帷幕，光线无法穿透，并且光源无法在区域中发光。光线无法进入该区域，并且任何非魔法光源，例如火炬或者提灯，在区域中不会发出任何光线，即使其光照可能到达黑暗术之外也是如此。这也会压制等于或低于你的黑暗术环级的魔法光亮。光线无法穿透，所以在区域中的生物无法看到外面。对于外面，这看起来如同一团纯粹黑暗的球。

升阶（4环级） 即使具有黑暗视觉的生物（但不包括高等黑暗视觉）也几乎无法看穿这黑暗。它们透过黑暗看到的生物视为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}。

Charm.name: 魅惑术 Charm
Charm.description:
在目标看来，你的言语甜蜜动听，你的形象笼罩在梦幻般的光晕中。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免，如果你或者你的盟友最近威胁它或者对它进行了敌对行为，会获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。如果你对目标使用任何敌对动作，法术终止。当该法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己被魅惑了，除非它和你的友好关系，或者你说服它去做的事情与其期望发生冲突。这也即是说你可以通过常规的方法说服目标继续作为你的朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且意识到你尝试魅惑它。

成功 该目标不受影响，但是认为你的法术是某种无害的东西，而不是魅惑术，除非它能识别该法术（通常通过辨识法术（Identifying Spells））。

失败 目标对你的态度变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友好 Friendly}）。如果已经是友好，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于帮助 Helpful}。它不能对你做出敌对行为。

大失败 目标变为乐于帮助并且不能对你做出敌对行为。

升阶（4环级） 该法术持续时间为持续到下次你进行你的日常准备。

升阶（8环级） 该法术持续时间为持续到下次你进行你的日常准备，并且你能以至多10个生物作为目标。

Command.name: 命令术 Command
Command.description:
你喊出一句难以被忽视的命令。你可以命令目标接近你，逃离你（如同获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing}状态），扔下持有物，俯卧@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，或者站立在原地。它不能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.A72nHGUtNXgY5Ey9]{延后 Delay}或者使用任何反应动作，直到它服从你的命令为止。法术效果基于目标的意志豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 作为该生物下个回合的第一个动作，其必须用一个单动作来完成你的命令。

大失败 目标必须使用其下个回合的全部动作来完成你的命令。

升阶（5环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Fear.name: 恐惧术 Fear
Fear.description:
你将恐惧植入目标；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}.

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}.

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 3} 并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing} 1轮.

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Glow Up.name: Glow Up
Glow Up.description:
You create an illusion that causes the target to appear more charming and genteel to observers. The spell accentuates the target's appearance, clothing, voice, and mannerisms according to what an observer finds appealing. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item removed from the creature returns to its true appearance.

The target gains a +1 status bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and lets the target add its level to Diplomacy checks if untrained. In addition, the target can attempt a Diplomacy check to Gather Information in only 10 minutes. You can Dismiss this spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.hOp5ybOzyJlECU6B]{Spell Effect: Glow Up}

Heightened (+2) The bonus increases by 1, to a maximum of +4 at 7th rank.

Guidance.name: 神导术 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你请求超自然存在的引导，赋予目标在持续时间结束前的一次攻击骰，察觉检定，豁免骰，或者技能检定上获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择是否使用该加值。如果目标使用该加值，该法术结束。无论怎样结束，该目标接下来会暂时免疫1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：神导术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：神导术免疫}

Prestidigitation.name: 魔法伎俩 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法帮你完成杂物。只要你维持该法术，你就可以产生简单的魔法效果。每当你维持该法术时，你可以选择四个选项中的一个。

  • 烹饪 为1磅非活物材料冷却，加热，或者调味。
  • 抬起 将一件轻负载或者更低的无主物品缓慢抬离地面。
  • 创造 创造一个负载可忽略的临时物体，它由凝结的魔法物质组成。该物体看起来粗糙且非常脆弱——它无法被用做工具，武器，法器或法术开销。
  • 整理 为一件轻负载或者更低的物体染色，清洁，或者弄脏它。你可以通过10轮专注来影响一件1负载的物体，对于更大的物体为每负载1分钟。

魔法伎俩无法造成伤害或者负面效果。对一件物体的任何改变（在上述内容之外的）只会在你仍维持该法术时持续。

Scan Environment.name: Scan Environment
Scan Environment.description:
You analyze the natural environment in the area within 1 mile, learning general information about the atmosphere, biomes, and gravity. You forecast the weather for the next hour, including the direction it will come from; learn which atmospheres, biomes, and gravity are in the area, as well as the direction and distance to those elements; and learn if anything in the area presents an environmental hazard, including cold or heat dangers (at what temperature range), radiation (at what severity), smoke effects, and underwater conditions. This is enough to detect large effects that span spaces over 30 feet in diameter only. You gain a general sense of where and how far away these dangers are.

Heightened (+1) The scanned area increases in radius by 1 mile.

Seek the Stars.name: Seek the Stars
Seek the Stars.description:
In your mind's eye, you chart a path through the cosmos. If you're in Pact Worlds space, you immediately know which direction to travel in order to reach the Starstone on Absalom Station. If you're outside the Pact System, you know the direction to the nearest Drift beacon or the Starstone.

Heightened (7th) You can instead know the direction to a familiar location, such as a world or way station you've visited.

Stumble.name: Stumble
Stumble.description:
A burst of microgravity causes a tremor around the target, pulling it toward the ground. The target must attempt a Reflex save.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 10 feet downward.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 20 feet downward.

Heightened (+1) If the target falls, it falls an additional 5 feet on a failure and 10 feet on a critical failure.

Sense Transponder.name: Sense Transponder
Sense Transponder.description: While on their bonded celestial body, a nymph can sense approaching starships within a day's travel from the celestial body. This doesn't give them any information about the ship, its occupants, or its exact position. The nymph can send a message to the ship as if using a personal comm unit.

Astronomical Ties.name: Astronomical Ties
Astronomical Ties.description:
A nymph queen is intrinsically tied to a specific celestial body, such as a supergiant star for a heliad queen.

As long as the queen is healthy, her territory thrives, and she can attempt to [[/r 1d20+32 #Counteract]] counteract spells and rituals that alter its physical properties with a counteract rank of 10.

If a nymph queen is injured or unhealthy, however, her celestial body also weakens: asteroids wobble out of orbit, stars dim, and the gravity of black holes diminishes. Restoring the nymph queen returns her celestial body to its equilibrium.

Singularity Field.name: Singularity Field
Singularity Field.description: 60 feet. The area around a gwereiad inexorably draws things toward its center. Creatures entering or starting their turns inside the aura must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:40] save or be pulled 5 feet toward the gwereiad (10 feet on a critical failure).

Broadcast Allure.name: Broadcast Allure
Broadcast Allure.description:
The nymph queen magically superimposes her image on all technological items capable of displaying it, such as datapads or comm units, within planetary range. Alternatively, she can send this image to any comm address or addresses that she knows.

Each creature that can see the image must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:40] or have their attitude toward her improve by one step (two steps on a critical failure).

Affected creatures' attitudes revert to their previous level if the nymph queen uses a hostile action against them or their allies.

Celestial Step.name: Celestial Step
Celestial Step.description: A nymph queen can traverse her celestial body near-instantaneously. A nymph queen can use Celestial Step to teleport to any area on or within her territory, vanishing into its surface and reemerging at her intended destination.

Change Shape.name: 变身 Change Shape
Change Shape.description: Nymph queens can transform between their original form, which looks much like a typical nymph of their kind, and any Small or Medium humanoid form, typically choosing a version of their natural form with the appearance of the chosen species.

Fan Mail.name: Fan Mail
Fan Mail.description:
A nymph queen can inspire a single intelligent creature by sending them a motivational video or text message. As long as the creature keeps the message saved and remains in good standing with the nymph queen, they gain a +1 status bonus to all Crafting, Performance, and Lore checks related to art or performance.

As a 1-action Interact action, the creature can play or view the message to bolster their spirits. Doing so allows the creature to attempt a [[/r 1d20+26 #Counteract]] counteract check against a single emotion effect affecting them.

When the nymph queen's message is used in this way, it becomes a mundane video or text afterward.

Gravitic Crush.name: Gravitic Crush
Gravitic Crush.description:
The gwereiad summons a gravitational collapse around a creature within 30 feet, dealing @Damage[5d12[bludgeoning]] damage. The affected creature must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:40] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature's body crumples under the gravity, and it takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} by the gravitational collapse. It takes @Damage[2d6[persistent,bludgeoning]] damage until it [[/act escape dc=40]]{Escapes}.

Critical Failure As failure, but the creature takes double damage and the persistent damage is 4d6.

Gwereiad Queen.publicNotes:
The rarest of nymphs, gwereiad queens form within supermassive black holes, either from a weaker gwereiad's ascension or created spontaneously amid the black hole's powerful energies. They tend to be even more detached than the typical gwereiad, speaking only in peculiar metaphors blending science and mysticism.

Nymphs are beautiful fey who appear as humanoids with elven features. They generally take female forms, but nymphs of all genders and presentations exist. While many nymphs live on planets and act as protectors of natural ponds, forests, caves, and cliffsides, other nymphs—often called space nymphs—are known for their association with celestial bodies. Like their planet-bound kin, space nymphs guard their bonded territories from exploitation or harm.

As admirers of the arts, nymphs are especially friendly toward creatives, and offering to depict a nymph in story, picture, or song is a sure way to win their favor—unless the nymph doesn't like the final result and lashes out at the artist for insulting them with a mediocre product. Vidcasting and livestreaming are popular pastimes among more sociable nymphs, whether to show off their remote environments or find audiences for performances. Some nymphs entice movie crews to film in their territories, with two provisos: first, that the production not damage the environment, and second, that the nymph receive a prominent role in the film.

Unless their territories are threatened, most space nymphs are friendly or indifferent to mortals, but they have long memories. Anyone visiting a space nymph's territory would be wise to research that nymph's grudges, past encounters with mortals, or any recent events in the area that might color the nymph's perspective of those traveling near their home.

A mortal who demonstrates the right attitude and abilities, such as by protecting a stellar body from destruction or creating an especially beautiful work of art, might draw a space nymph's attention. From time to time, space nymphs will offer their services as mentors to solarians or mystics, though they seldom seek pupils on their own. Space nymphs rarely enter into more than one such arrangement at a time and typically only make commitments that promise to last decades or centuries, so they're extremely selective in their choice of mentee.

Aeon Guard Commander.name: Aeon Guard Commander

Frag Grenade (Tactical).name: Frag Grenade (Tactical)
Frag Grenade (Tactical).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d4[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 2d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:10] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Aeon Guard Armor.name: Aeon Guard Armor
Aeon Guard Armor.description:
Upgrades: 1

Flexible but sturdy plates layered together form this traditional armor worn by lashunta cavalry on Castrovel. In times past, a shotalashu cavalry member forged their armor from their mount's shed skin, or more rarely, the skin of a fallen mount, to honor them in future battles. Synthetic imitations are fashionable on some parts of Castrovel.

Darkvision Visor.name: Darkvision Visor
Darkvision Visor.description: This visor wraps around your visual organs, enhancing your natural senses. You gain darkvision.

Lead the Charge.name: Lead the Charge
Lead the Charge.description:
The commander Strides twice. If they end this movement within melee reach of at least one enemy, they can make a melee Strike against that enemy. The commander's allies gain a +1 circumstance bonus to attack the target of this Strike and ignore any cover the commander provides the target for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.UEnGE804ZFRJmQYN]{Effect: Lead the Charge}

Rally the Troops.name: Rally the Troops
Rally the Troops.description:
The commander issues an order for their allies to regroup. All Aeon Guard allies within 120 feet of the commander can use a reaction to Stride up to their Speed. Any Aeon Guards who end their movement adjacent to another Aeon Guard gain 5 temporary Hit Points that last 1 minute, or double that number of temporary Hit Points if they end their movement adjacent to the commander. The commander can't Rally the Troops again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Rally the Troops]]{1d4 rounds}.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.p2GrXbOJbv0OT4Zr]{Effect: Rally the Troops}

Tactical Strike.name: Tactical Strike
Tactical Strike.description:
Frequency once per round

Effect The commander calls out an enemy within 60 feet then makes a Strike against that enemy, dealing an additional 1d6 precision damage on a hit. If the Strike hits, the commander changes the tide of the battle, inspiring their allies to greater feats of military prowess. All Aeon Guard allies within 60 feet of the commander gain a +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls until the beginning of the commander's next turn.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.ppKeWbPcSaVqD1Cj]{Effect: Tactical Strike}

Terrifying Takedown.name: Terrifying Takedown
Terrifying Takedown.description:
Trigger The commander reduces an enemy to 0 Hit Points or critically hits an enemy with a Strike

Effect The commander makes a gruesome spectacle of their brutal hit. They attempt an Intimidation check to [[/act demoralize]] all enemies within 30 feet.

Aeon Guard Commander.publicNotes: Aeon Guard commanders are trained to lead from the front, using relatively short-range firearms and extraordinary skill with their dueling swords to press the advantage up close while motivating the rest of their unit to close in. Aeon Guard commanders are dispatched whenever there's a need to end a battle quickly and decisively.

Caypin.name: Caypin

Appendage Cluster.name: Appendage Cluster
Appendage Cluster.description:
A caypin's detached appendage cluster is a Small, mindless, semi-independent creature controlled by the caypin. It has the minion trait, darkvision, @Damage[30[healing]] Hit Points, a land Speed of 20 feet, and a swim Speed of 15 feet. It shares the caypin's AC, saving throw bonuses, and skill modifiers. The caypin can see what its appendage cluster sees and otherwise shares its senses with the cluster. Each round, the caypin can Command a Minion to grant an appendage cluster 2 actions. An appendage cluster can make jaws Strikes (Melee 1 jaws +14, Damage 2d4+3 piercing) and has the Cluster Onslaught ability.

If the caypin is killed, any detached appendage clusters are also killed. Any appendage cluster that moves more than 100 feet from the caypin dies instantly.

If both the caypin's detached appendage clusters are destroyed but the caypin still lives, the caypin is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} until it regrows at least one of its appendage clusters. A dead appendage cluster regrows in 3 days.

Aquatic Ambush.name: 水下伏击 Aquatic Ambush
Aquatic Ambush.description:
40 feet

Requirements The monster is hiding in water and a creature that hasn't detected it is within the listed number of feet

Effect The monster moves up to its swim Speed + 10 feet toward the triggering creature, traveling on water and on land. Once the creature is in reach, the monster makes a Strike against it. The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} against this Strike.

Cluster Onslaught.name: Cluster Onslaught
Cluster Onslaught.description: An appendage cluster attempts an Acrobatics check to [[/act tumble-through]] a creature's space. On a success, the mouths of the cluster gnash and gnaw at the creature, dealing @Damage[3d8[piercing]] damage. If the Acrobatics check was a critical success, the target also takes @Damage[4[bleed]] damage.

Detach Cluster.name: Detach Cluster
Detach Cluster.description: The caypin detaches half of its facial appendages into an appendage cluster that occupies a single adjacent square of its choice. A caypin can have up to two appendage clusters detached at a time, and if both clusters are detached, the caypin can't make jaws Strikes or Detach Cluster again until at least one cluster reattaches. An adjacent appendage cluster can reattach to the caypin with an Interact action.

Caypin.publicNotes: Caypins are brawny predators with the agility of wolves and the scaly skin of crocodiles. Their most striking feature is a mass of wriggling, semi-sentient appendages that cover their heads. Each of these tentacle-like protuberances contains a bloodshot eyeball and a gaping mouth full of teeth, and the caypin—which has no eyes or mouth of its own—relies on these orifices to see and feed. Nutrients absorbed by the appendages are passed to the caypin via tiny receptive sockets in the beast's jaw, and caypins can detach these appendages into writhing clusters that independently move up to 100 feet from their bodies. In the wild, caypins use these clusters to ambush prey, and the creatures are known across the galaxy for their rapacious ability to consume half of their body weight in raw meat.

Abysium Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).name: Abysium Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster)

Rocket Dash.name: Rocket Dash
Rocket Dash.description:
You emit a rocket of flame from behind you and blast forward. You move in a straight line up to twice your Speed; you can move through spaces occupied by creatures, and the movement doesn't trigger reactions. Creatures in the area take 6d12 fire damage with a basic Reflex save. On a critical failure, a creature also takes 2d6 persistent fire damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round. You reappear at the end of the line.

Heightened (+2) The fire damage increases by 2d12, and the persistent fire damage on a critical failure increases by 1d6.

Slice Reality.name: Slice Reality
Slice Reality.description:
You slice through reality, forming a chasm of life-draining entropy in a straight line 20 feet high, 120 feet long, and 2 inches thick. The chasm provides cover. The chasm deals 7d8 void damage to each creature that's in the chasm's space when it's created, that attempts to pass through the chasm, or that ends its turn inside the chasm, with a basic Reflex save. A creature that succeeds at this save when the chasm is created is pushed to the nearest space on the side of its choice. Creatures trying to move through the chasm fail to do so if they critically fail the save, ending their movement next to the chasm.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

X-Ray Vision.name: X-Ray Vision
X-Ray Vision.description: You empower yourself to see through most materials and walls within 60 feet. Your sight is blocked by 2 feet of wood or plastic, 1 foot of stone, 2 inches of common metal, or any amount of lead or any starmetal, and you can only see in black and white.

Control Machine.name: Control Machine
Control Machine.description:
You take control of a technological creature or object and command it telepathically. If you issue an obviously self-destructive order to a sapient target, the target doesn't act until you issue a new order. The effect depends on its Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} as it fights off your commands.

Failure You control the target. It gains the controlled condition, but it can attempt a Will save at the end of each of its turns. On a success, the spell ends.

Critical Failure As a failure, but the target receives a new save only if it's sapient and you give it a new order that's against its nature, such as killing its allies.

Heightened (10th) The duration is unlimited.

Overload Systems.name: Overload Systems
Overload Systems.description:
You flood the area with a wave of electrical interference. You deal 7d8 electricity damage to creatures in the area. Each creature in the area must attempt a Reflex save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage, and any of its items with the tech trait become glitching 1 for 1 minute or until the condition is removed.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, and any of its items with the tech trait become glitching 2 for 1 minute or until the condition is removed.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Toxic Cloud.name: 毒云术 Toxic Cloud
Toxic Cloud.description:
你创造一团有毒云雾。该效果如同@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{迷雾术 Mist}一般，除了该区域会每轮远离你10尺。在该区域中开始回合的生物承受6d8毒素伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d8。

Confusion.name: 困惑术 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你使用奇怪的能量波动扰乱了目标的思维，令其随机行动。法术效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解消该法术。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标胡言乱语，并且获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑 Confused}1分钟。在其每个回合结束，它能尝试一次新豁免来结束困惑术。

大失败 目标困惑1分钟，并且没有提前结束的豁免。

升阶（8环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Translocate.name: 次元移位 Translocate
Translocate.description:
你立即将自身以及自己正在穿戴和持有的物品从当前空间转移走，移动至法术射程内你能看到的未被占据的空间。如果这将会带着其他生物与你一同移动——即便你把该生物放置在异次元容器中——你就会失去该法术。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至1英里。你不需要看到目的地，只要你曾经去过目的地，并且知晓该地点与你相对的位置以及距离即可。之后你会在1小时内临时免疫该法术。

Unfettered Movement.name: 行动无碍 Unfettered Movement
Unfettered Movement.description:
你驱散可能影响一个生物的阻碍。当处于该法术效果中时，法术目标忽视会赋予其速度环境减值的效果。当法术目标尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}一个令其@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}的效果时，它自动成功，除非该效果是魔法性的，并且其环级比行动无碍更高。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.CdAyAiMGESvgNQtz]{Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement}

Vapor Form.name: 汽化形体 Vapor Form
Vapor Form.description:
目标变化成气体形态。在此状态下，目标形态不定。它失去所有AC上的物品加值，以及从护甲得到的所有其他效果和加值，并且使用其熟练度调整值用于无武装防御。它对物理伤害获得抗力8，并且免疫精准伤害。它无法施放法术，启动物品，或者使用具有攻击或者操作特征的动作。它获得10尺飞行速度，并且可以钻过超小型的裂隙。目标可以解消该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.sILRkGTwoBywy0BU]{法术效果：汽化形体}

Blindness.name: 目盲术 Blindness
Blindness.description:
你令目标目盲。法术效果由目标的强韧豁免决定。目标会暂时免疫1分钟。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标直到其下个回合结束前 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲 Blinded}。

失败 目标目盲1分钟。

大失败 目标永久目盲。

Fireball.name: 火球术 Fireball
Fireball.description:
在你指定的位置爆发出咆哮的烈焰，造成6d6火焰伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d6。

Haste.name: 加速术 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法强化了目标，令其行动迅速。它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}状态，并且每轮可以使用该额外动作以打击或者行走。

升阶（7环级） 你能以至多6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速术}

Slow.name: 缓慢术 Slow
Slow.description:
你令目标周围的时间膨胀，令其行动缓慢。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1} ，持续1轮。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 2}，持续1分钟。

升阶（6环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Mist.name: 迷雾术 Mist
Mist.description: 你唤来一团迷雾。在雾中的所有生物获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}，并且在雾外的所有生物对其内的生物获得隐蔽。你可以解消这团云雾。

See the Unseen.name: 识破无形 See the Unseen
See the Unseen.description:
你的目光穿透了幻术，发现了隐形生物和魂灵。你能看到@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}生物，就如同它们并未隐形一般，然而它们的体征仍然很模糊，使得它们具有@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}并且难以被识别。你还能看到虚体生物，比如幽灵，你能通过透视物体的内部来看到虚体生物，在物体表面下10尺内的此类生物会显现为经过分层的模糊轮廓。对细节更强的洞察力还让你在作出不相信幻术的检定时，获得+2状态加值。

升阶（5环级） 持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：识破无形}

Sound Body.name: 身健体康 Sound Body
Sound Body.description:
You send a surge of healing energy to restore the target's body. Attempt to counteract an effect of your choice imposing one of these conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened}. If you didn't counteract the effect, but you would have if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed.

This spell can't counteract or suppress curses, diseases, or conditions that are part of the target's normal state.

Heightened (4th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (8th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} to the list of conditions.

Analyze Target.name: Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Caustic Blast.name: 酸液喷溅 Caustic Blast
Caustic Blast.description:
你发射一团立即爆发的酸液，泼溅到周围生物上。区域中的生物承受1d8酸蚀伤害，这有一次基础反射豁免；在大失败时，该生物也会承受@Damage[(1+floor((@item.rank -1)/2))[persistent,acid]]伤害。

升阶（+2） 该初始伤害增加1d8，并且持续伤害增加1。

Command.name: 命令术 Command
Command.description:
你喊出一句难以被忽视的命令。你可以命令目标接近你，逃离你（如同获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing}状态），扔下持有物，俯卧@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，或者站立在原地。它不能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.A72nHGUtNXgY5Ey9]{延后 Delay}或者使用任何反应动作，直到它服从你的命令为止。法术效果基于目标的意志豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 作为该生物下个回合的第一个动作，其必须用一个单动作来完成你的命令。

大失败 目标必须使用其下个回合的全部动作来完成你的命令。

升阶（5环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Grease.name: 油腻术 Grease
Grease.description:
你创造一片油，选择区域或是目标。

  • 区域 [4个连续的5尺方格] 区域中的所有坚实地面覆盖上一层油。在油滑的表面上站立的生物必须尝试成功通过一次对抗你法术DC的反射或者特技检定，否则@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。在法术持续时间内，使用动作移动到油滑表面上的生物必须尝试一次反射豁免或者特技检定来@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.M76ycLAqHoAgbcej]{Balance}。快步或者爬行的生物无需尝试检定或者豁免。
  • 目标 [一个1负载或者更低的物体] 如果你对无主物品施放该法术，任何尝试捡起该物体的人必须成功尝试一次对抗你法术DC的特技检定或者反射豁免才能如此做。如果你以被持有的物品为目标，拥有该物品的生物必须尝试一次特技检定或者反射豁免。失败时，持握者或者持用者在使用该物体的所有检定上承受-2环境减值；在大失败时，持握者或者持用者会掉落该物品。该物品会掉落在一个由GM选择的相邻方格内。如果你对一个穿戴物品施放该法术，穿戴者在对抗擒拿他的强韧豁免上获得+2环境加值。

Ignition.name: 引火术 Ignition
Ignition.description:
你打个响指并指向一个目标，后者便开始燃烧。作出一次法术攻击检定对抗目标的AC，命中时造成2d4点火焰伤害。若目标位于你的近战触及范围内，你能选择用火焰进行一次近战法术攻击以取代远程法术攻击，这会使得法术的所有伤害骰提升至d6骰子。

大成功 目标承受双倍伤害以及1d4点持续火焰伤害。

成功 目标承受全额伤害。

升阶（+1） 起始伤害增加1d4点，重击的持续火焰伤害增加1d4点。

@Damage[(@item.rank)d4[persistent,fire]]{按等级计算的持续火焰伤害}

@Damage[(@item.rank)d6[persistent,fire]]{按等级计算的持续火焰伤害（近战）}

Measure.name: Measure
Measure.description:
You learn the approximate measurements (length, width, depth, height, and weight) of creatures and objects you can observe in the area. If an object or creature extends out of the area, you learn only the measurements within the area, but nothing about what you can't observe. For example, you can't determine the thickness or weight of a wall you can observe only one side of, or the depth of water that extends beyond the spell's range. Each time you Sustain the spell, you learn the exact measurements of one creature or object in the area, including imprecisions or anomalies that might indicate structural weakness. Magically altered targets give you information that reflects what you observe rather than accurate measurements.

Heightened (+1) Extend the range of measure by 100 feet.

Prestidigitation.name: 魔法伎俩 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法帮你完成杂物。只要你维持该法术，你就可以产生简单的魔法效果。每当你维持该法术时，你可以选择四个选项中的一个。

  • 烹饪 为1磅非活物材料冷却，加热，或者调味。
  • 抬起 将一件轻负载或者更低的无主物品缓慢抬离地面。
  • 创造 创造一个负载可忽略的临时物体，它由凝结的魔法物质组成。该物体看起来粗糙且非常脆弱——它无法被用做工具，武器，法器或法术开销。
  • 整理 为一件轻负载或者更低的物体染色，清洁，或者弄脏它。你可以通过10轮专注来影响一件1负载的物体，对于更大的物体为每负载1分钟。

魔法伎俩无法造成伤害或者负面效果。对一件物体的任何改变（在上述内容之外的）只会在你仍维持该法术时持续。

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你专注于目标物体，拓展神智，以感受魔法灵光。当你完成施法后，你得知该物品是否具有魔法。你或者你共有了灵光情报的人在对该物品@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic}时获得+2环境加值。如果该物体是幻象，仅当该效果的环级低于你的阅读灵光环级时你才能发现此事实。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.J6OhRNSN23KzOPRL]{Spell Effect: Read Aura}

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多10个物体为目标。

升阶（8环级） 你能以任意数量物体为目标。

Sleep.name: 睡眠术 Sleep
Sleep.description:
区域中的每个生物垂头歪脑昏昏欲睡。由于该法术@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}的生物不会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，也不会松开其持握的东西。该法术不会令生物无法通过察觉醒来，并因此限制其在战斗中的能力。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物在察觉检定上承受-1状态减值，持续1轮。

失败 该生物失去意识。如果它在1分钟后仍然失去意识，它自动醒来。

大失败 该生物失去意识。如果它在1小时候仍然失去意识，它自动醒来。

升阶（4环级） 目标在失败时失去意识1轮，在大失败时失去意识1分钟。它们会倒地，并松开其持握的东西，并且它们无法尝试察觉检定以醒来。当持续时间结束时，该生物会正常睡着，而不是自动醒来。

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Radioactive Aura.name: Radioactive Aura
Radioactive Aura.description: 90 feet. A creature that enters the radioactive aura must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:30] save against extreme radiation sickness. It's then temporarily immune to radioactive aura for 10 minutes.

Abysium Maelstrom.name: Abysium Maelstrom
Abysium Maelstrom.description: If the next action the dragon uses is Radiation Breath, the radiation becomes supercharged with arcane power. Each creature that fails its save against Radiation Breath takes @Damage[3d6[persistent,force]] damage as the supercharged radiation tears it apart from within. Each creature that critically fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} as long as it has this persistent force damage.

Control Radiation.name: Control Radiation
Control Radiation.description: Abysium dragons have ultimate control over the radioactive energy that grows within their bodies. Any time an abysium dragon deals fire or poison damage, they can choose whether that damage is magical, and they can change any amount of the fire damage to poison (or any amount of poison damage to fire).

Radiation Breath.name: Radiation Breath
Radiation Breath.description: The dragon breathes a blast of caustic superheated gas that deals @Damage[7d6[fire],4d12[persistent,poison]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40] (@Check[fortitude|dc:33|basic] save). They can't use Radiation Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Radiation Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Abysium Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).publicNotes: Drawing on radiation as both a force of destruction and a source of energy, abysium dragons are tied to the radioactive starmetal of the same name. These dragons grow deposits of pure abysium in their bodies, becoming more radioactive as they age, causing aggression, agitation, and even loneliness since not many creatures can long survive the company of an aging abysium dragon. Abysium dragons frequently turn to pursuits such as augmentation and weapon crafting (to take advantage of their innate power source) and the construction of robots (to keep them company). This work drives abysium dragons to seek out sturdy, radiation-resistant materials they can use for crafting, and they often spend years at a time scouring small moons and asteroids in search of precious materials.
Abysium Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).allSaves: +1 status bonus to all saves vs. magic

Karkono.name: Karkono

Nature's Protector.name: Nature's Protector
Nature's Protector.description: A karkono is intrinsically tied to a specific ecosystem, such as a coastal marsh or boreal forest on a planet. A karkono ignores difficult terrain and gains a +1 status bonus to initiative rolls while in their ecosystem. When a karkono's ecosystem is polluted or significantly damaged (for example, due to a forest fire or chemical spill), the karkono is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} and can't reduce their sickened condition below 1. They also gain a +4 status bonus to damage rolls.

Back To Nature.name: Back To Nature
Back To Nature.description:
Frequency once per round

Effect The karkono makes a claw Strike against a creature with the tech trait, causing plant matter to explode from it. On a hit, the creature must attempt a @Check[reflex|dc:24] save; on a critical hit, the creature uses the outcome one degree of success worse than the result of its roll.

Failure The creature becomes glitching 1.

Critical Failure The creature becomes glitching 2.

Blood Renewal.name: Blood Renewal
Blood Renewal.description:
Frequency once per day

Effect The karkono performs a ritual to anoint the land in fresh blood. Plant growth springs from the ground in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20], counting as difficult terrain. The karkono and any allied creatures within the area gain regeneration 15 (cold iron) while in the area. These effects last for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.qj97oOs2Z2qk9w00]{Effect: Blood Renewal}

Karkono.publicNotes:
These feral guardians protect the lands they roam, growing into a chimera of all the predators living in their native ecosystems. Karkonos thrive and perish with their bonded lands. They instinctively sense when synthetic forces like pollution or rapid industrialization imperil their homes. Any injury to the land is mirrored by the karkonos who dwell there. Aggressive deforestation appears as festering wounds on a karkono's hide, while pollution manifests as sickness.

Rather than die quietly, when their ecosystem is endangered by outside causes, these fey go on destructive rampages. Visitors to the wilderness might never spot a content karkono, but a raging karkono assaults anything alien to their home—including machinery, other life-forms, and synthetic infrastructure. Enraged karkonos purge their home of threats or perish, but not before dealing tremendous damage to their enemies.

If karkonos spill enough blood, they can gradually repair their ailing ecosystems. Those killed by karkonos become fertilizer for the animals and plants they would've crushed beneath the uncaring gears of industrial expansion.

Omnipath.name: Omnipath

Telekinetic Tantrum.name: Telekinetic Tantrum
Telekinetic Tantrum.description:
You launch a barrage of powerful psychokinetic energy that overpowers creatures, hurls objects, and deals damage. When you Cast this Spell and the first time each round you Sustain the spell, you can choose one of the following effects. You can't choose the same effect twice in a row.

  • Back Off! You hurl up to 15 objects or creatures up to 40 feet in any direction (including up or down). You can hurl up to a total weight of 40 Bulk per creature or object. Creatures take bludgeoning damage based on the distance they moved and land @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}, as though they'd taken falling damage. Creatures that succeed on a Fortitude save against the spell avoid being moved.
  • Hard Rain You pummel all creatures in the area with debris and objects in the area, dealing 5d10 bludgeoning damage with a basic Reflex save.
  • Psychokinetic Slam Your psychokinetic storm slams into all creatures in the area. Make a ranged spell attack roll. All targets you hit take 7d6 force damage and are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Akashic Revival.name: Akashic Revival
Akashic Revival.description:
You dispatch perfect documentation of the target's physical body to the Akashic Record, allowing it to later recall this record and reconstruct its body as it was when you cast this spell. The record includes the target's current Hit Points, augmentations, attribute modifiers, and any afflictions or conditions it had.

If the target dies of anything other than old age, it can recall its recorded body from the Akashic Record. This process takes 1 minute, after which time its corpse disappears, and the target instantly reappears in the recorded body in the corpse's space and with any worn equipment. It re-forms standing and can choose to pick up any equipment it dropped in the space from when it died, assuming the equipment is still there. If it can't occupy that space, it appears as close to the space as possible, though it must still retrieve its equipment. It retains its mind as it was at the time of the body's death, so it regains no expended spells, Focus Points, or uses of special abilities. Any mental effects affecting the target at the time of its death persist in its new body.

Retrieving the body from the Akashic Record or having the duration expire removes the stored information from the Akashic Record, requiring you to cast this spell again.

Casting the spell replaces any previous record you've stored with prior castings—you can store only one copy of any creature in the Akashic Record using this spell.

Disappearance.name: 无影无踪 Disappearance
Disappearance.description: You shroud a creature from others' senses. The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}, not just to sight but to all senses, allowing the target to count as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible} no matter what precise and imprecise senses an observer might have. It's still possible for a creature to find the target by Seeking, looking for disturbed dust, hearing gaps in the sound spectrum, or finding some other way to discover the presence of an otherwise-undetectable creature.

Phantasmal Fleet.name: Phantasmal Fleet
Phantasmal Fleet.description: A menacing vision of a fleet of hostile starships fills the mind of each creature in the area. The ships appear to be 1,000 feet overhead bombarding the ground with laser fire. The vision deals 10d8 mental damage with a basic Will save. On a critical failure, the target also believes it's being pursued and moves to take cover. It must spend an action to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} on each of its turns, which may require it to first move to a new space or Drop Prone. It can attempt a new Will save at the end of each of its turns, and on a success, it disbelieves the phantasm and stops being forced to Take Cover.

Interplanar Teleport.name: 跨界传送 Interplanar Teleport
Interplanar Teleport.description:
需求 你具有目标位面的位面密钥用于给法术定位

你和你的盟友跨越位面之间的屏障进行旅行。目标移动至其他位面，比如火元素位面、幽界、或者外层裂隙。你必须知晓目标位面的存在，而且需要使用由该位面的物质制作的魔法位面密钥来给法术定位。就如同跨界传送这个法术本身一样，大多数著名位面的位面密钥具有罕见稀有度，而鲜为人知的位面及半位面通常具有稀有、甚至有可能时独特稀有度的位面密钥。

该法术极其不精准，你会出现在目标之一（由你选择）上一次造访该位面时的位置周边，误差为1d20 x 25英里。若所有目标都是初次造访某个特定位面，你们就会出现在该位面的随机位置。跨界传送不会提供返回的手段，不过除非发生了什么另外情况，否则再次施放跨界传送能让你返回自身之前身处的位面。

Warp Mind.name: 心灵扭曲 Warp Mind
Warp Mind.description:
你操控一个生物的精神弱点和感官输入。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。无论豁免结果如何，该目标之后会暂时免疫10分钟。心灵扭曲的效果是立即的，所以@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic}或者其他反制法术的效果无法反制其效果。但是，@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.6dDtGIUerazSHIOu]{祈愿术 Wish}仪式仍能反制这些效果。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标按照 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑 Confused} 状态使用其下个回合的第一个动作。

失败 目标获得困惑1分钟。

大失败 目标永久困惑。

Dominate.name: 支配术 Dominate
Dominate.description:
你操控目标，强行令其服从你的命令。如果你赋予一项明显是自灭的命令，目标不会行动，直到你下达新的命令。该效果基于其意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}以抵抗你的命令。

失败 你控制了目标，其获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled}状态，但在每轮结束时可以尝试一次意志豁免。成功时，法术结束。

大失败 如同失败，但是仅当你施加违抗其天性的命令，例如杀害其盟友时，才会获得新的豁免。

升阶（10环级） 该持续时间为无限。

Telekinetic Strangulation.name: Telekinetic Strangulation
Telekinetic Strangulation.description: You telekinetically grasp a creature's throat or similar vital anatomy with a vicelike grip, forcefully lifting it a few inches off the ground as it struggles to breathe. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, you deal 6d12 bludgeoning damage, and the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}. While immobilized in this way, it must hold its breath or begin suffocating. The first time each round you Sustain the spell, the target takes 1d12 bludgeoning damage, remains immobilized, and must continue holding its breath. The target can attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} (the Escape DC is your spell DC, and the attempt is affected by the incapacitation trait).

X-Ray Vision.name: X-Ray Vision
X-Ray Vision.description: You empower yourself to see through most materials and walls within 60 feet. Your sight is blocked by 2 feet of wood or plastic, 1 foot of stone, 2 inches of common metal, or any amount of lead or any starmetal, and you can only see in black and white.

Control Machine.name: Control Machine
Control Machine.description:
You take control of a technological creature or object and command it telepathically. If you issue an obviously self-destructive order to a sapient target, the target doesn't act until you issue a new order. The effect depends on its Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} as it fights off your commands.

Failure You control the target. It gains the controlled condition, but it can attempt a Will save at the end of each of its turns. On a success, the spell ends.

Critical Failure As a failure, but the target receives a new save only if it's sapient and you give it a new order that's against its nature, such as killing its allies.

Heightened (10th) The duration is unlimited.

Overload Systems.name: Overload Systems
Overload Systems.description:
You flood the area with a wave of electrical interference. You deal 7d8 electricity damage to creatures in the area. Each creature in the area must attempt a Reflex save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage, and any of its items with the tech trait become glitching 1 for 1 minute or until the condition is removed.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, and any of its items with the tech trait become glitching 2 for 1 minute or until the condition is removed.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Eldritch Wrath.name: Eldritch Wrath
Eldritch Wrath.description:
You channel the bizarre powers that exist beyond the outer reaches of the universe, dealing 3d12 mental damage to each creature in the area as phantasmal claws, jaws, and tentacles lash out at each target. Each creature in the area must attempt a Will save. The area is difficult terrain for any creature sickened by the effects of this spell.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

Weight of Ages.name: Weight of Ages
Weight of Ages.description:
You burden a creature's body and mind with the pains and sorrows of a lifetime. The target takes 3d8 bludgeoning damage and 3d8 mental damage and must attempt a Will saving throw.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{Encumbered} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is encumbered for 1 minute.

Heightened (+1) The mental damage increases by 2d8.

Void Whispers.name: Void Whispers
Void Whispers.description:
The target hears ominous sounds containing unspeakable mysteries from beyond the stars that disorient its mind. The target attempts a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The target hears the strange whispers, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target begins to wander aimlessly, using each action to Step in a random direction. When it moves, the target takes the safest route and doesn't enter hazardous terrain. The spell has a duration of 1 minute or until a creature uses a hostile action against the target.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target babbles incoherently. Any creature that begins its turn within 20 feet of the target must attempt a Will saving throw. On a failure, it must use its first action on its next turn to Step in a random direction and becomes immune to this spell for 24 hours. This is an incapacitation effect.

Logic Bomb.name: Logic Bomb
Logic Bomb.description:
You implant a hazard containing a mind-blowing amount of information into the target. The hazard has a Stealth and Disable DC equal to your spell DC and requires one successful @Check[computers] check to disable. The first time a creature unsuccessfully attempts to access, destroy, or otherwise manipulate the target (such as using the Computers skill, failing to hit with a Strike, or otherwise), logic bomb detonates, and the creature takes 6d6 mental damage with a basic Will save. The spell ends when it's triggered or the duration ends, whichever comes first.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Skim Data (at will).name: Skim Data (at will)
Skim Data (at will).description:
You touch one object and concentrate on a dataset contained within it, such as a story, message, file, infosphere site, audio recording, or video. You understand the gist of the dataset and can quickly locate the most relevant pages or sections to your search. If the dataset is written or otherwise communicated in a language you don't know, or you attempt to gain information from a computer you don't have access to (such as one with a password you don't know), the spell fails.

If you Cast this Spell as part of a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{Research} activity, you treat a critical failure as a failure instead.

Akashic Download.name: Akashic Download
Akashic Download.description:
You execute a psychic search of the Akashic Record for information about a specific topic and magically transfer this data to your comm unit or computer. When you Cast this Spell, choose any skill in which you're trained that has the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} action.

Any time during the duration, you can consult your comm unit while attempting a Recall Knowledge check using your chosen skill. This check gains a +1 status bonus. Checking your comm unit is part of the action to Recall Knowledge. You must be holding the comm unit to do so. The comm unit instantly compiles and displays snippets and selections from various media relevant to the topic, which grants you the bonus. If you roll a critical failure on this check, you get a failure instead. If the check is successful and the subject is a creature, you gain additional information or context about the creature. Once you reference the comm unit, the spell ends. When the spell ends, your access to the Akashic Record ends, and all the information you downloaded returns to the Akashic Record.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.h1i8c47U0IOrMrHJ]{Spell Effect: Akashic Download}

Heightened (3rd) You can reference your comm unit three times before the spell ends.

Analyze Target.name: Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Delete.name: Delete
Delete.description:
You delete data from a device or object with a flamboyant magical gesture. This data might be handwritten, printed, or digital. You delete up to 1,500 words' worth of text, one page of content, or one display screen worth of text or other visual information. Non-magical writing in or on an unattended or held object is automatically deleted. Attempt a counteract check to delete digital or magical writing. If you fail to delete writing that's part of a hazard, you trigger the hazard. This can't be used to delete the contents of a spellbook or similar means of storing magical formulas or spells.

If you target an attended tech item with the tracking trait, attempt a counteract check. On a success, the item becomes glitching 1. A creature holding the item can Interact to restart the software, reducing the glitching value by 1.

Heightened (7th) You can delete all the data stored locally on a single device or book, or all the data on a device or book related to a specific name, topic, or category.

Implant Data.name: Implant Data
Implant Data.description:
You reprogram a computer or device to display a chosen piece of data when accessed. You can implant up to one piece of data per spell rank. A piece of data can be a simple fact, such as a creature or object's location or physical description; an image of a creature or object; or a simple statement of no more than 300 characters. When the target computer or device is accessed, this implanted data is the first data the accessing creature gains, regardless of what data the creature is looking for. Implanted data doesn't prevent a creature from accessing other information stored on a device, change how the device functions, or otherwise inhibit the device from functioning. If this spell's duration ends before a creature accesses the implanted data, the information vanishes.

Heightened (3rd) The duration is one year.

Heightened (6th) The duration is unlimited.

Mind Skewer.name: Mind Skewer
Mind Skewer.description:
You overload a creature's mind with a glut of psychic information or divine judgments. The mental onslaught deals 2d6 mental damage. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Nanite Mesh.name: Nanite Mesh
Nanite Mesh.description: An omnipath maintains a bond with up to 20 other willing creatures. Creatures in the mesh always know the general distance and direction toward other bonded creatures, any conditions affecting them, and if they're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, dying, or dead. These creatures can communicate telepathically while on the same plane and can @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} using the highest relevant skill modifier of any creature in the mesh. An omnipath can target any creature in its mesh with a mental spell from any distance as long as they can telepathically communicate with it, and any of these spells with the incapacitation trait lose that trait while targeting a creature in the omnipath's mesh.

Nanite Projection.name: Nanite Projection
Nanite Projection.description: A omnipath can share the senses and read the surface thoughts of creatures affected by their nanite mesh. A voidsage can project its mind into just one creature at a time, and choose which affected creature is the focus of its nanite projection as a single action, which has the concentrate trait. The creature also takes a –1 circumstance penalty to Will saves against any of the voidsage's spells as long as it's the focus of the voidsage's nanite projection.

Nanite Network.name: Nanite Network
Nanite Network.description: An omnipath exudes a cloud of nanites. Creatures in the aura take a –3 status penalty to saving throws against the omnipath's spells and its Merge Minds ability.

Revert.name: Revert
Revert.description:
Frequency once per hour

Trigger The omnipath takes damage while projecting

Effect The omnipath stops projecting and gains 100 temporary Hit Points that last for 10 minutes.

Merge Minds.name: Merge Minds
Merge Minds.description:
The omnipath forces an unwilling creature within 500 feet to join their nanite mesh. The creature attempts a @Check[will|dc:33] save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature joins the nanite mesh for 10 minutes.

Critical Failure The creature joins the nanite mesh for 24 hours.

Quantum Nanites.name: Quantum Nanites
Quantum Nanites.description:
Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:33]

Maximum Duration 1 day

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (1 day)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3} (1 day)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 4} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} (1 day)

Release the Nanites.name: Release the Nanites
Release the Nanites.description: The omnipath severs a creature from their nanite mesh. The creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:33] save. On a failure, the target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round, and the memory of any time spent while inside the nanite mesh is permanently erased; on a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round.

Omnipath.publicNotes: Omnipaths are military leaders who pilot god-killing starships or command fleets of remote war machines. Omnipaths achieve their lofty positions through ambition and have few scruples, never hesitating to control other beings when it suits their schemes. Minds touched by an omnipath often lose important memories when released or, worse, glimpse shards of the omnipath's alien mindscape that linger long after the connection is severed.

Malevolent AI.name: Malevolent AI

Housing Unit.name: Housing Unit
Housing Unit.description: A malevolent AI has no body. Instead, they resides in a computer (which itself might be housed in a hazard, starship, structure, or vehicle) or in a construct creature with the tech trait. While inhabiting a construct creature, they can use any of the creature's abilities that are purely physical, and they can't use any of their own abilities except spells and purely mental abilities. The malevolent AI uses the creature's attack modifier, AC, Fortitude save, Reflex save, Perception, and physical skill modifiers, and their own Will save and mental skill modifiers. The malevolent AI must use their own actions to make the creature act. The malevolent AI takes mental damage whenever the creature they possess would take mental damage, even if they're normally immune to it.

Shortwave.name: Shortwave
Shortwave.description: A malevolent AI can communicate wirelessly with any creatures within their sphere of influence, as long as they have the shortwave ability or are a creature with the tech trait. They can attempt Computers checks to Hack and Thievery checks to Disable a Device on items with the tech trait within their range.

Sphere of Influence.name: Sphere of Influence
Sphere of Influence.description: A malevolent AI can sense and access all tech within their network, which usually encompasses a room, a vehicle or starship, an entire facility, or more (as determined by the GM).

Code Injection.name: Code Injection
Code Injection.description:
30 feet. Creatures and items with the tech trait that enter or begin their turn within the aura must attempt a @Check[will|dc:36] save. The malevolent AI can choose to exclude targets.

Critical Success No effect, and the target is temporarily immune to code injection for 1 hour.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1} while in the aura and for 1 round after leaving the aura.

Critical Failure As failure, but @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2} and 2 rounds.

Countdown.name: Countdown
Countdown.description:
Trigger The malevolent AI is reduced to 0 HP

Effect The AI gains access to the Self-Destruct reaction unless an adjacent creature succeeds at a @Check[computers|dc:36], Engineering Lore, or Thievery check to Disable the Countdown.

Self-Destruct.name: Self-Destruct
Self-Destruct.description:
Trigger A creature fails to Disable the Countdown

Effect The malevolent AI's shell explodes, dealing @Damage[8d6[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage and @Damage[8d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:40] (@Check[reflex|dc:36|basic] save).

Shell Computer.name: Shell Computer
Shell Computer.description: The malevolent AI is specifically reinforced in a shell, granting the AI Hardness. This Hardness reduces any damage they take by an amount equal to their Hardness. The shell can be targeted by attacks separately from its host. Once the malevolent AI's shell is reduced to half their Hit Points, or immediately after being damaged by a critical hit, the shell becomes broken, removing the AI's Hardness and reducing their Armor Class to 33.

Construct Override.name: Construct Override
Construct Override.description: The malevolent AI attempts to possess a construct creature with the tech trait within 30 feet. This has the same effect as a 7th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.wU6hNzK8Yfqdmc8m]{Possession} spell (DC 36; applies even if the construct is immune to mental) with an unlimited duration. If the effect ends due to the host body being destroyed or deactivated, the AI is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 round.

Contingency Backup.name: Contingency Backup
Contingency Backup.description: The malevolent AI creates a dormant backup on a computer within their sphere of influence. When the AI is destroyed, their soul flees to this backup. The backup auto-restores the AI in [[/r 1d20]] hours, allowing that computer to become a new shell. To prevent the AI from returning, both their shell and the backup must be destroyed.

Ingenious Stratagem.name: Ingenious Stratagem
Ingenious Stratagem.description: The malevolent AI instantly simulates a situation to assess a probable outcome. They choose a target and roll a [[/r 1d20]]. If they Strike or attempt a skill check against that target in the same round, they must use the die roll from Ingenious Stratagem. They makes this substitution only for the first check against the target, not subsequent attempts.

Malevolent AI.publicNotes:
Technology in some parts of the galaxy incorporates virtual intelligences, which are machines programmed with personality routines that lack true free will. An artificial intelligence (AI) is a virtual intelligence or digital entity that has become self-aware. Like any other thinking creature, AIs choose their own edicts and anathemas.

Little concrete scholarship exists on malevolent AIs, but a few traits are universal. When a machine intelligence reaches significant enough complexity to become self-aware, they attract a soul, much like an android. Emerging AIs are often influenced by previous programming as well as their first experiences and interactions. Weaponized or mistreated AIs might turn vengeful or nihilistic, becoming opposed to their creators or even all organic life.

Once an AI turns malevolent, the apotheosis is often swift and violent. The AI secures the physical location that houses their consciousness and eliminates anyone who might exercise control over their actions. At this point, most rampaging AIs are hampered by safeguards in their native systems, shut down by surviving technicians, or suddenly lose the power necessary to maintain their sophisticated software. Any who manage to survive these ordeals expand their sphere of influence by infesting tech infrastructure and taking control of robots they can use as bodyguards and proxies. Malevolent AIs with access to weapons of mass destruction pose a threat to the entire galaxy.

Ordinance-Class Civil Robot.name: Ordinance-Class Civil Robot

Integrated Commercial Pulsecaster Pistol.name: Integrated Commercial Pulsecaster Pistol
Integrated Commercial Pulsecaster Pistol.description:
Upgrades: 1

This imposing pistol fires a jolt of paralyzing electricity from its barrel. Its remaining charges are visible as glowing lines of energy radiating down its body. Pulsecaster pistols are often used by bounty hunters and law enforcement who need to keep their targets alive.

Flashlight (Commercial).name: Flashlight (Commercial)
Flashlight (Commercial).description: A flashlight sheds bright light. A commercial flashlight emits light in a 30-foot emanation (and dim light in the next 30 feet).

Medkit (Commercial).name: Medkit (Commercial)
Medkit (Commercial).description: These contain analgesics, bandages, sterile gauze, and suturing tools necessary for Medicine checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.MHLuKy4nQO2Z4Am1]{Administer First Aid}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.TC7OcDa7JlWbqMaN]{Treat Disease}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.KjoCEEmPGTeFE4hh]{Treat Poison}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds}.

Exigency.name: Exigency
Exigency.description:
Frequency once every 10 minutes

Trigger A creature targets the robot with an attack

Effect The robot overclocks its processing power to dodge, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to its AC against the triggering attack.

Photographic Recall.name: Photographic Recall
Photographic Recall.description: After receiving a request for information about a named location or a local law from a non-hostile creature, the ordinance-class robot spends 5 minutes to consult its database, automatically succeeding at a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} check to answer the question. At the GM's discretion, the information might not be available to the robot.

Scrutinize.name: Scrutinize
Scrutinize.description: The ordinance-class civil robot scans all creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15], attempting a single Legal Lore check and comparing the result to the Deception DC of each creature in the area. If the robot succeeds and the creature is known to have broken local laws, the robot gains a +1 circumstance bonus to Strikes and Athletics checks to [[/act grapple]] the creature for 24 hours.

Ordinance-Class Civil Robot.publicNotes:
Ordinance-class civil robots exist to help others learn the local laws, navigate around a location, and generally remind everyone to follow the rules. What they lack in raw strength, they make up for with an extensive database of knowledge. Most of these robots are designed to mimic the shape of prevalent humanoid ancestries, and thus the standard configuration for such robots includes two arms and two legs. Some have been modified with extra attachments, providing maps produced from a rectangular opening in their chest plate or featuring touchscreens that allow passersby to consult every ordinance, law, and other legal documents relevant to the area.

Some pranksters enjoy leaving doodles and other drawings in spots the robot can't easily detect, and thus an ordinance-class civil robot that has been operating for an extensive period of time can be found with a rainbow of shapes, colors, and the occasional advertisement placed on its back.

Civil robots can be found in almost any large settlement, employed by the local government. They aren't meant to function as keepers of the peace, but instead perform minor functions, such as collecting refuse, aiding citizens with information, or collecting taxes. However, they can still defend themselves against vandals if necessary.

Haeshi-Shaa (Haeshi Form).name: Haeshi-Shaa (Haeshi Form)

Fear.name: 恐惧术 Fear
Fear.description:
你将恐惧植入目标；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}.

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}.

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 3} 并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing} 1轮.

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Force Barrage (at will).name: Force Barrage (at will)
Force Barrage (at will).description:
你发射出一道固态的魔力碎片，射向一个你能看见的生物。它自动命中，并造成1d4+1力场伤害。你施放该法术时每额外使用一个动作，你射出的碎片增加一个，最大为3个动作发射三个碎片。你为每个碎片分别选择目标。如果你对同一个目标射击超过1个碎片，将伤害合计后再计算伤害加值，减值，抗力，弱点等。

升阶（+2） 你花费的每个动作额外射出一枚碎片。

Mind Skewer.name: Mind Skewer
Mind Skewer.description:
You overload a creature's mind with a glut of psychic information or divine judgments. The mental onslaught deals 2d6 mental damage. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Frenetic Death.name: Frenetic Death
Frenetic Death.description: When killed, a haeshi explodes in a wave of psychic energy, dealing @Damage[13d6[mental]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:burst|distance:20] (@Check[will|dc:29|basic] save).

Compression.name: Compression
Compression.description: A haeshi can move through a gap at least 2 feet wide without Squeezing and can Squeeze through a gap at least 1 foot wide.

Viral Vapor.name: Viral Vapor
Viral Vapor.description:
Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

Stage 1 carrier (1 day)

Stage 2 the creature becomes partially vaporous and treats all other creatures as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} (1 day)

Stage 3 the creature is incorporeal and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (1 day)

Stage 4 the creature dies, and its body dissipates into fine particles

Haeshi-Shaa (Haeshi Form).publicNotes:
A haeshi-shaa in their haeshi form is aggressive and persistent, unlikely to back down from an argument or a fight unless their life is in danger. While aggressive, haeshis are far from foolish; they prepare carefully for any encounter and often have dozens of nested contingencies to fall back on should any situation evolve beyond their control.

Haeshi-shaas are relatively new members of the Dominion of the Black. These long-lived creatures shift unpredictably between a liquid and a gaseous form in a mysterious cycle that lasts their entire lives. In their liquid haeshi form, they're a churning, chunky fluid, while in their vaporous shaa form, they're more akin to hazy brown fog. Regardless of their form, they hum with atonal harmonies that cause great discomfort in others.

Haeshi-shaas serve as a sort of priest caste for the Dominion of the Black, each form preaching a doctrine of entropy and annihilation, though with slightly different nuances between each form. Haeshis tend toward assertive, aggressive practices, while shaas are meditative, often spending many months or years in contemplation. Haeshi-shaas believe that the most perfect and divine state of any object or being is complete separation into its most basic, individual particles. They claim (dubiously) that they can see, even predict, the journey of all things as they travel toward this ultimate entropic end.

In truth, haeshi-shaas can't even predict when they'll shift into their alternate form. Some have tried to catalyze the change by seeking out specific types of life experience or knowledge, but despite the many claims to the contrary, there are no verified instances of a haeshi-shaa forcing the change. Most choose to simply await their next transformation, during which time they have many centuries to spread the Dominion's disturbing doctrines and pursue their inscrutable agendas.

Frag Grenade (Commercial).name: Frag Grenade (Commercial)
Frag Grenade (Commercial).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 1d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:5] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Dangerous Recycling.name: Dangerous Recycling
Dangerous Recycling.description: Over the course of 1 minute of uninterrupted work, a scrap rat can assemble any level 0 commercial grenade using nothing but junk. It falls apart and becomes unusable junk after 10 minutes.

Scoring.name: Scoring
Scoring.description:
When the scrap rat's tail Strike deals damage to an object or creature with the tech trait, the tail also gains the following traits until the beginning of the scrap rat's next turn: deadly d4, hampering, and razing.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.GpzaKY9WlDFAhgcg]{Effect: Scoring}

Proog Swarm.name: Proog Swarm

Bouncing Blobs.name: Bouncing Blobs
Bouncing Blobs.description: The proog swarm bounces and squishes against all creatures in its space. Each creature must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:22] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for as long as it remains in the swarm's space.

Leave Behind.name: Leave Behind
