Leave Behind.description: The proog swarm Strides twice, dropping [[/r 1d4]] @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.alien-core-bestiary.Actor.4Ne5pnML3LV9xYYU]{proogs} in the original space it occupied before taking this action.

Mimic Object.name: Mimic Object
Mimic Object.description: A proog can spend 1 minute altering its appearance to imitate any solid object of 1 Bulk or less, though it can't duplicate moving parts or specialized functions. A mimicking proog gains a +2 Circumstance bonus to Deception checks to conceal its true nature. Touching the proog negates this bonus.

Schlorp.name: Schlorp
Schlorp.description: Each enemy in the proog swarm's space takes @Damage[3d8[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:22|basic] save).

Proog Swarm.publicNotes:
While individually cute and relatively harmless, when proogs gather in greater numbers, they become quite dangerous.

Oozes of many types lurk in dark and abandoned places across the galaxy, emerging only to satiate their appetites and threaten adventurers, explorers, and hapless workers alike.

Emissary-Class Infiltrator Robot.name: Emissary-Class Infiltrator Robot

进阶 Puzzleblade.name: 进阶 Puzzleblade
进阶 Puzzleblade.description:
Upgrades: 1

This kasathan sword breaks down into interlocking pieces for storage and transport. Traditionalists practice the art of ritually assembling puzzleblades, with different pieces symbolizing the kasathan virtues of conviction, dedication, moderation, and tradition. Criminals and smugglers value the puzzleblade for its discreet design.

Hacking Toolkit (Advanced).name: Hacking Toolkit (Advanced)
Hacking Toolkit (Advanced).description: A hacking toolkit is required for Computers checks to Hack computers. You can use a hacking toolkit to access a computer without using a user interface, but this requires physical contact with the computer or contact via an infosphere or a similar linked network. An advanced hacking toolkit adds a +1 item bonus to checks made with it and allows you to access computers at a range of 30 feet, unless you're in a radioactive environment.

Infiltrator's Toolkit (Tactical).name: Infiltrator's Toolkit (Tactical)
Infiltrator's Toolkit (Tactical).description: You need an infiltrator's toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill. A tactical infiltrator's toolkit adds a +1 item bonus to checks to Pick Locks or Disable Devices.

Adaptive Disguise.name: Adaptive Disguise
Adaptive Disguise.description: An emissary-class infiltrator robot is covered in a layer of synthetic programmable skin that counts as a disguise kit. The robot can alter the skin over the course of a minute to Impersonate a Medium humanoid ancestry or specific person (if it has information about that person or has previously interacted with them). If the robot makes a retractable spike Strike or uses Morphing Visage, it takes a –4 circumstance penalty to its Deception DCs and skill checks to Impersonate against any who witnessed the action

Exploit Nausea.name: Exploit Nausea
Exploit Nausea.description: An emissary-class infiltrator robot's Strikes deal an additional 3d6 precision damage to sickened creatures.

Morphing Visage.name: Morphing Visage
Morphing Visage.description:
By sending ripples through its synthetic skin, the emissary-class infiltration robot creates a nauseating display that affects all creatures within 20 feet that can see it. Each creature in the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:30] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and becomes immune to the robot's Morphing Visage for 10 minutes.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Emissary-Class Infiltrator Robot.publicNotes:
While many of the earliest infiltrator robots were designed for more direct stealth missions, the emissary-class infiltrator robots were created for more insidious tasks. These include planting evidence, spreading rumors and propaganda, and generally creating unrest or fomenting open rebellion.

Programmed with a sophisticated virtual intelligence and constructed with the ability to disguise itself as a creature of flesh and blood, an emissary-class infiltrator robot can wreak havoc on an organization or settlement without ever having to engage in combat. They are considered the ultimate tool in corporate or governmental espionage and fetch a high price on most illegal markets.

Brought to the forefront during the war against the Veskarium, and further perfected by various corporate interests within the Pact Worlds, infiltrator robots are known for being able to get into places where no one else could. Generally small and agile, infiltrator robots sneak into enemy territory and either download precious data or record incriminating evidence.

Sterieid.name: Sterieid

Speak with Stones.name: 岩石交谈 Speak with Stones
Speak with Stones.description:
你能向自然或人造的石材提出问题和得到回答。尽管石材并不具有智能，但你会与石材之中的自然之灵沟通，它们的性格受到石材种类的影响，而对于人造石材来说，则是受石材自身所属的建筑类别影响。石材看待事物的视角、感知能力、以及知识赋予了它与人类截然不同的世界观，以至于它会认为相同的细节并不重要。石材大多都能够回答曾经碰触过它们的生物的相关内容、以及它们下方或后方究竟隐藏着什么。

升阶（6环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Cairn Form.name: Cairn Form
Cairn Form.description:
Your target's skin becomes a thick carapace of solid stone, granting resistance 5 to physical damage, except adamantine. The target gains a fist unarmed attack that deals 2d6 bludgeoning damage. The target uses their highest weapon or unarmed attack proficiency with these attacks, and if they have weapon specialization or greater weapon specialization, they add this damage as well. On a critical hit with one of these unarmed attacks, the creature struck must succeed at a Fortitude save against the target's class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.v724q5Xi7KPPnLQ3]{Spell Effect: Cairn Form}

Heightened (6th) The resistance increases to 10, and the damage dealt by the attacks increases to 3d6.

Heightened (10th) The resistance increases to 20, and the damage dealt by the attacks increases to 4d6.

One with Stone.name: 融身化石 One with Stone
One with Stone.description:
你能选择变化为一块石头或者与石头融合。在变形后，你不能移动，也不能影响任何石头之外的任何事物，但你能够施法，前提是这些法术不需要石头外侧的效果线。你能解消该法术。

  • 与石头融合 法术持续时间为10分钟。当你施法时，你必须碰触一块体积足够容纳你和你的随身物品的石头，否则法术会被打断。在融入之后，你能听到、但不能看到这块石头外侧发生的事情。当你身处石头之内时，若石头承受伤害，你就会被驱逐至石头之外，并且承受10d6点伤害。魔法持续时间结束也会把你驱逐出去，但是不会造成伤害。当你离开石头之时，法术便会结束。
  • 变为石头 法术持续时间为8小时。你变为一块大型石头——通常是一颗树。察觉检定无法揭示出你的真实本质，但是成功通过自然或生存检定对抗你的法术DC，能够揭示出你化身的石头对于该地区来说是一种怪异的新出现的存在。当你处于该形态时，能够使用正常的感官观察自身周遭的一切事物。作为一块石头，你的AC为23，只有状态加值、状态减值、环境加值和环境减值影响你。你在反射豁免中投掷出的任何成功和大成功都被视同为失败。

Resist Energy.name: 抵抗能量伤害 Resist Energy
Resist Energy.description:
元素护盾保护一个生物免受某一种类型能量的伤害。选择酸蚀，寒冷，电击，火焰或者音波伤害。目标和其装备获得对你所选择伤害类型的抗力5。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.con2Hzt47JjpuUej]{法术效果：抵抗能量伤害}

升阶（4环级） 该抗力增加到10，并且你能以至多两个生物为目标。

升阶（7环级） 该抗力增加到15，并且你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Sure Footing.name: 稳固脚步 Sure Footing
Sure Footing.description:
You free the target's limbs from ailments that impede mobility. Attempt to counteract an effect of your choice imposing one of these conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}. If you didn't counteract the effect, but you would have if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed.

This spell can't counteract or suppress curses, diseases, or conditions that are part of the target's normal state.

Heightened (4th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (6th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dTwPJuKgBQCMxixg]{Petrified} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (8th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} to the list of conditions.

Glow Up.name: Glow Up
Glow Up.description:
You create an illusion that causes the target to appear more charming and genteel to observers. The spell accentuates the target's appearance, clothing, voice, and mannerisms according to what an observer finds appealing. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item removed from the creature returns to its true appearance.

The target gains a +1 status bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and lets the target add its level to Diplomacy checks if untrained. In addition, the target can attempt a Diplomacy check to Gather Information in only 10 minutes. You can Dismiss this spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.hOp5ybOzyJlECU6B]{Spell Effect: Glow Up}

Heightened (+2) The bonus increases by 1, to a maximum of +4 at 7th rank.

Pummeling Rubble.name: 碎石猛击 Pummeling Rubble
Pummeling Rubble.description:
一排大石头从你前方的空中飞过。该碎石对区域中每个生物造成2d4钝击伤害 。每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受完整伤害，并且被推离你5尺。

大失败 该生物承受双倍伤害，并且被推离你10尺。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d4。

Scan Environment.name: Scan Environment
Scan Environment.description:
You analyze the natural environment in the area within 1 mile, learning general information about the atmosphere, biomes, and gravity. You forecast the weather for the next hour, including the direction it will come from; learn which atmospheres, biomes, and gravity are in the area, as well as the direction and distance to those elements; and learn if anything in the area presents an environmental hazard, including cold or heat dangers (at what temperature range), radiation (at what severity), smoke effects, and underwater conditions. This is enough to detect large effects that span spaces over 30 feet in diameter only. You gain a general sense of where and how far away these dangers are.

Heightened (+1) The scanned area increases in radius by 1 mile.

Seek the Stars.name: Seek the Stars
Seek the Stars.description:
In your mind's eye, you chart a path through the cosmos. If you're in Pact Worlds space, you immediately know which direction to travel in order to reach the Starstone on Absalom Station. If you're outside the Pact System, you know the direction to the nearest Drift beacon or the Starstone.

Heightened (7th) You can instead know the direction to a familiar location, such as a world or way station you've visited.

Sense Transponder.name: Sense Transponder
Sense Transponder.description: While on their bonded celestial body, a nymph can sense approaching starships within a day's travel from the celestial body. This doesn't give them any information about the ship, its occupants, or its exact position. The nymph can send a message to the ship as if using a personal comm unit.

Asteroid-Dependent.name: Asteroid-Dependent
Asteroid-Dependent.description: A sterieid is mystically bonded to a small asteroid, no more than 1 mile across. If they're away from their bonded asteroid for more than 24 hours, they become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} and must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:21] save each additional 24 hours or increase their drained value by 1. A sterieid can perform a 24-hour ritual to bond themself to a new asteroid.

Debris Field.name: Debris Field
Debris Field.description:
Trigger The sterieid takes physical damage

Effect Shards of rocky debris fly off the sterieid's body, dealing @Damage[2d12[bludgeoning]] damage to all adjacent creatures (@Check[reflex|dc:21|basic] save) and giving the sterieid the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition until the end of their next turn.

Icy Nimbus.name: Icy Nimbus
Icy Nimbus.description: 10 feet. A sterieid's body radiates an icy chill. Creatures entering or starting their turns in the aura take @Damage[2d6[cold]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:21|basic] save); a creature that critically fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until the start of its next turn as it grows sluggish from the cold.

Sterieid.publicNotes:
Sterieids reside on asteroids, relishing the beauty of their rocky, icy surfaces. Due to the ubiquity of asteroids, sterieids are the most common type of space nymph. Since many asteroids exist near one another in asteroid belts, sterieids are more likely to form communities among their own kind than other nymphs. Conversely, they tend to be wary of outsiders, despite visitors being less of a novelty. Those sterieids who desire company, however, build way stations on their asteroids for passing starships, offering food, amenities, and information about the local system.

Mining is a contentious issue for sterieids, who usually react with hostility to such operations. Most mining corporations will survey an asteroid to ensure it isn't protected by a sterieid before setting up shop, though less ethical companies have been known to pay mercenaries to "relocate" sterieid guardians of asteroids that contain valuable resources.

Nymphs are beautiful fey who appear as humanoids with elven features. They generally take female forms, but nymphs of all genders and presentations exist. While many nymphs live on planets and act as protectors of natural ponds, forests, caves, and cliffsides, other nymphs—often called space nymphs—are known for their association with celestial bodies. Like their planet-bound kin, space nymphs guard their bonded territories from exploitation or harm.

As admirers of the arts, nymphs are especially friendly toward creatives, and offering to depict a nymph in story, picture, or song is a sure way to win their favor—unless the nymph doesn't like the final result and lashes out at the artist for insulting them with a mediocre product. Vidcasting and livestreaming are popular pastimes among more sociable nymphs, whether to show off their remote environments or find audiences for performances. Some nymphs entice movie crews to film in their territories, with two provisos: first, that the production not damage the environment, and second, that the nymph receive a prominent role in the film.

Unless their territories are threatened, most space nymphs are friendly or indifferent to mortals, but they have long memories. Anyone visiting a space nymph's territory would be wise to research that nymph's grudges, past encounters with mortals, or any recent events in the area that might color the nymph's perspective of those traveling near their home.

A mortal who demonstrates the right attitude and abilities, such as by protecting a stellar body from destruction or creating an especially beautiful work of art, might draw a space nymph's attention. From time to time, space nymphs will offer their services as mentors to solarians or mystics, though they seldom seek pupils on their own. Space nymphs rarely enter into more than one such arrangement at a time and typically only make commitments that promise to last decades or centuries, so they're extremely selective in their choice of mentee.

Squox.name: Squox

Squox Tricks.name: Squox Tricks
Squox Tricks.description: A squox can [[/act disarm skill=acrobatics]] and [[/act trip skill=acrobatics]] creatures with its tail using Acrobatics instead of Athletics, even if it doesn't have a free hand. A squox can attempt to Disarm or Trip @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} creatures up to two sizes larger than it and gains a +2 circumstance bonus to Disarm or Trip an off-guard target

Squox.publicNotes:
The tiny vulkarikis are a common animal in the Pact Worlds, originating from the planet Castrovel. Human explorers from Lost Golarion gave them the name "squox," as they interpreted the creatures as being a mix of fox and squirrel. Squoxes are cunning to the point of being devious and employ scare tactics to routinely abscond with shiny items they uncover on their travels. They exhibit complex social behaviors, including a distinct hierarchy between individuals in a skulk, and have a vast vocal repertoire used to assign signature sounds to different individual squoxes.

Having long since been exported from the Pact Worlds, squoxes are found throughout the galaxy, with many civilizations in Near Space maintaining growing communities of these tiny furry creatures, much to the growing consternation of the Xenowardens who worry that the highly adaptable squox has become an invasive species in several biomes. While some advocate for culling these populations, the popularity of the animal as a pet has made this view an incredibly unpopular stance.

Young squoxes are referred to as kits and can be purchased from the open market on most Pact Worlds. Squoxes tend to live for about 10 years. A typical squox weighs about 10 pounds and is about 3 feet long, with much of its length being its tail. Squoxes come in all colorations, and many even take on unique environmental adaptations to specific climates, such as desert-dwelling squoxes growing longer ears to help disperse heat.

Cosmic Dragon (Ancient).name: Cosmic Dragon (Ancient)

Call Cosmos.name: Call Cosmos
Call Cosmos.description:
You reach into the void and call down a vertical column of dangerous cosmic material that rains destruction upon creatures in the area and shrouds the terrain around it in a swirl of stardust. This matter is made up of bits of burning stars and chunks of frozen comets, and it deals 5d12 cold damage and 5d12 fire damage to every creature in the area when you Cast the Spell. For the spell's duration, the cosmic material reduces visibility and mobility, making the area greater difficult terrain and making everything seen within or through the area @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Heightened (10th) The cold and fire damage each increase by 2d12.

Eclipse Burst.name: 噬星爆发 Eclipse Burst
Eclipse Burst.description:
一个冰寒漆黑的球体在区域中爆炸，对区域中的生物造成8d10寒冷伤害，以及对活物8d4额外虚能伤害。在区域中的每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。

如果该球体覆盖了一个魔法光源的区域，或者影响了一个会受到魔法光照影响的生物，噬星会尝试反制光亮效果。

大成功 该生物或者物体不受影响。

成功 该生物或者物体承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物或者物体承受完整伤害。

大失败 该生物或者物体承受双倍伤害。如果它是生物，他会因这黑暗而 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲 Blinded}，持续时间无限。

升阶（+1） 该寒冷伤害增加1d10，并且对活物的虚能伤害增加1d4。

Sunburst.name: 阳炎爆 Sunburst
Sunburst.description:
强力而耀眼的球状日光在区域中爆开，对该区域中的生物造成8d10火焰伤害，以及对不死生物造成额外@Damage[(@item.level+1)d10[vitality]]伤害。在该区域中的每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受完整伤害。

大失败 该生物承受完整伤害，并且永久 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲 Blinded} 。

如果阳炎爆的球状区域与魔法黑暗的区域部分重叠，则会尝试反制该黑暗效果。

升阶（+1） 该火焰伤害增加1d10，并且对不死生物的命能伤害增加1d10。

Sending.name: 短讯术 Sending
Sending.description: 你向该生物发送一段25词或者更短的精神信息，并且它能够立即回复一段由他所编纂的25词或者更短的信息。

Truespeech (constant).name: Truespeech (constant)
Truespeech (constant).description:
无论什么语言，目标都可以理解其所有的词语，并且向其他生物用该语言交流。当处于一群各异的生物中时，每次目标将要说话，他可以选择一个生物，并使用一种该生物理解的语言来讲述，即使该目标不知道这语言具体是什么。

升阶（7环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Life Seal (at will).name: Life Seal (at will)
Life Seal (at will).description:
Trigger A creature within range enters an environment that would be harmful to it.

A shimmering bubble envelops the target's body, allowing it to breathe normally in a vacuum or other unsafe environment and protecting it from severe temperatures and radiation.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 5 additional creatures to gain protection against the environment the triggering creature entered. The spell lasts for 8 hours and also protects against extreme temperatures and radiation.

Heightened (10th) You can target up to 10 additional creatures to gain protection against the environment the triggering creature entered. The spell lasts until your next daily preparations and also protects against incredible temperatures and radiation.

+2 status to all saves vs. divine.name: +2 status to all saves vs. divine

Attunement Aura.name: Attunement Aura
Attunement Aura.description: 60 feet. All allied creatures in the aura gain a +5-foot status bonus to Speeds (if the dragon is photon-attuned), or all enemies take a –5-foot status penalty to Speeds (if the dragon is graviton-attuned).

Cosmic Attunement.name: Cosmic Attunement
Cosmic Attunement.description:
The cosmic dragon is always attuned to an underlying stellar force: either photons or gravitons. They can swap attunement as a free action once at the start of their turn in combat and is otherwise attuned to whichever force they choose at any time outside of combat. The dragon's melee Strikes deal an additional @Damage[2d6[fire]] damage while they're photon-attuned and an additional @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage plus Knockdown while they're graviton-attuned. The damage of their cosmic blast Strike is likewise determined by their current attunement, as are the effects of some of their other abilities. The dragon can choose to exclude any creatures from any effect of the aura or action that uses the aura.

The dragon can always sense the distance and direction to the nearest Drift beacon and to the Starstone on Absalom Station.

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description: The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one tail Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description: The dragon recharges their Stellar Breath whenever they score a critical hit with a Strike.

Stellar Breath.name: Stellar Breath
Stellar Breath.description: The dragon unleashes divine power like that from the core of a star or black hole, dealing @Damage[13d10[spirit]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] (@Check[will|dc:41|basic] save). The dragon can't use Stellar Breath for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Stellar Mote.name: Stellar Mote
Stellar Mote.description: The dragon conjures a mote of stellar energy that shares their current attunement. They direct the mote to a square within 90 feet. While the mote is deployed, the dragon's attunement aura also emanates from that square, with the same emanation radius. The dragon can Sustain to move the mote up to 90 feet or to recall the mote from any distance. The mote is made of cosmic energy, doesn't occupy a space, and can't be targeted or destroyed by any effect.

Stellar Pulse.name: Stellar Pulse
Stellar Pulse.description:
The dragon imposes an effect on creatures within their attunement aura. The dragon can choose either option for each creature, regardless of their current attunement. The dragon can't use Stellar Pulse again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Stellar Pulse]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Graviton Each creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:41] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round.

  • Photon Each creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} and can use the extra action only to Stride or Strike.

Cosmic Dragon (Ancient).publicNotes: These majestic dragons embody the stellar forces that underly and balance all that exists in the universe. Cosmic dragons are wise, social, and patient beings, accepting of all whom they come across; they see all creatures as equal components of the universe and are just as likely to be found discussing astrophysics in the company of scholars as they are to be found lamenting the twists and turns of fate in the company of the downtrodden. Most cosmic dragons can change their shape, though they usually only do so to make other creatures comfortable. They detest deception and always introduce themselves as dragons even while in another form.

Gubbin.name: Gubbin

Instant Virus.name: Instant Virus
Instant Virus.description:
Your touch installs a dangerous self-replicating virus that disrupts a technological creature's programming. The target must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}.

Failure The target is glitching 1 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Delete (at will).name: Delete (at will)
Delete (at will).description:
You delete data from a device or object with a flamboyant magical gesture. This data might be handwritten, printed, or digital. You delete up to 1,500 words' worth of text, one page of content, or one display screen worth of text or other visual information. Non-magical writing in or on an unattended or held object is automatically deleted. Attempt a counteract check to delete digital or magical writing. If you fail to delete writing that's part of a hazard, you trigger the hazard. This can't be used to delete the contents of a spellbook or similar means of storing magical formulas or spells.

If you target an attended tech item with the tracking trait, attempt a counteract check. On a success, the item becomes glitching 1. A creature holding the item can Interact to restart the software, reducing the glitching value by 1.

Heightened (7th) You can delete all the data stored locally on a single device or book, or all the data on a device or book related to a specific name, topic, or category.

Implant Data.name: Implant Data
Implant Data.description:
You reprogram a computer or device to display a chosen piece of data when accessed. You can implant up to one piece of data per spell rank. A piece of data can be a simple fact, such as a creature or object's location or physical description; an image of a creature or object; or a simple statement of no more than 300 characters. When the target computer or device is accessed, this implanted data is the first data the accessing creature gains, regardless of what data the creature is looking for. Implanted data doesn't prevent a creature from accessing other information stored on a device, change how the device functions, or otherwise inhibit the device from functioning. If this spell's duration ends before a creature accesses the implanted data, the information vanishes.

Heightened (3rd) The duration is one year.

Heightened (6th) The duration is unlimited.

Unsettling Appearance.name: Unsettling Appearance
Unsettling Appearance.description: 20 feet. A non-gremlin creature that enters the aura must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:17] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} on a critical failure) and is then temporarily immune to unsettling appearance for 1 minute. If the gubbin used any action with the manipulate trait, an Interact action, or a claw Strike since the start of their last turn, creatures take a –4 status penalty to their saves against this effect.

Not Really There.name: Not Really There
Not Really There.description:
Trigger A creature targets the gubbin with an attack or area effect, and the gubbin is aware of the attacker

Effect The gubbin teleports 10 feet. If this puts the gubbin out of the range or area of the attack, the attack misses. If not, the gubbin gains a +2 circumstance bonus to AC and Reflex saves against the attack.

Scramble.name: Scramble
Scramble.description: Gubbins can spread their glitchiness to others. Creatures damaged by the gubbin's claw or glitchy beam Strikes must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:17] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical hit). If the target has the tech trait, it becomes glitching instead of sickened.

Gubbin.publicNotes:
Gubbins—also known as data gremlins—are spontaneously born from corrupted data, especially as a result of errors in artificial intelligence programs. While gubbins aren't particularly powerful, they're notoriously hard to hit due to the way their bodies flicker and jolt through space as if slightly out of sync with the rest of the world. Gubbins are most easily set apart from other gremlins by their fingers, which vary in number from moment to moment and sprout from illogical locations on their hands, such as the backs or palms. While lacking in fine mobility, their warped hands are disturbing to observe in motion, a fact they delightfully use to their advantage.

Due to being weaponized in corporate espionage efforts and later multiplying out of control, gubbins are one of the most ubiquitous types of gremlin on heavily computerized planets. While not as malevolent as other gremlins, gubbins delight in irrevocably corrupting computer data, which they do for their own amusement as well as to create more gubbins. Gubbins are often found where large amounts of data are stored, accompanied by corrupted technological constructs such as hardlight life-forms or robots.

Gremlins have plagued the Universe with cruel tricks since long before the Gap, and they've fully adapted to a galaxy filled with technology. Whether meddling with a comm unit, a starship, or an entire space station, gremlins delight in ruination and chaos.

Sihedron Guard Specialist.name: Sihedron Guard Specialist

Slice Reality.name: Slice Reality
Slice Reality.description:
You slice through reality, forming a chasm of life-draining entropy in a straight line 20 feet high, 120 feet long, and 2 inches thick. The chasm provides cover. The chasm deals 7d8 void damage to each creature that's in the chasm's space when it's created, that attempts to pass through the chasm, or that ends its turn inside the chasm, with a basic Reflex save. A creature that succeeds at this save when the chasm is created is pushed to the nearest space on the side of its choice. Creatures trying to move through the chasm fail to do so if they critically fail the save, ending their movement next to the chasm.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Spirit Blast.name: 灵魂冲击 Spirit Blast
Spirit Blast.description:
你集中以太能量，攻击目标的灵魂，造成16d6精魂伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d6。

Shadow Blast.name: 幽影爆破 Shadow Blast
Shadow Blast.description:
You shape the shadow substance of the Netherworld into a blast. Choose acid, bludgeoning, cold, electricity, fire, force, piercing, slashing, sonic, or spirit damage, and choose a @Template[cone|distance:30], a @Template[burst|distance:15] within 120 feet, or a @Template[line|distance:50]. The blast deals 6d8 damage of the type you chose to each creature in the area (@Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[acid]], @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[bludgeoning]], @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[cold]], @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[electricity]], @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[fire]], @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[force]], @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[piercing]], @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[slashing]], @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[sonic]], or @Damage[(@item.rank+1)d8[spirit]]).

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Wave of Warning.name: Wave of Warning
Wave of Warning.description:
You deter enemies with a wave of hostile intent. The target takes 7d8 nonlethal mental damage, and the target must attempt a Will save. The psychic energy then arcs to another creature within 30 feet of the first target, jumps to another creature within 30 feet of that target, and so on. You can end the wave at any point. You can't target the same creature more than once, and you must have line of effect to all targets. Roll the damage only once, and apply it to each target (halving or doubling as appropriate for its saving throw outcome).

Critical Success The target creature is unaffected, and the wave ends with that target.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d8.

Dispelling Globe.name: 法术解除结界 Dispelling Globe
Dispelling Globe.description:
你创造一个围绕自身的不可动的法球。它会尝试反制任何来自外界的，区域或者目标在球体内的法术，视球体为比其实际法术环级低1级的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9HpwDN4MYQJnW0LG]{Dispel Magic}法术。

如果该反制尝试成功，它只会阻止进入球体的那一部分法术（所以如果该法术目标也有一些在球体外面，或者其区域超过球体区域，这些目标或者区域如常受到影响）。

你必须在一个连续开放空间中创造该球体，所以其边界无法穿过任何生物或者物体，否则你会失去该法术（尽管生物可以在法术施放后进入球体）。

Divine Wrath.name: 神圣狂怒 Divine Wrath
Divine Wrath.description:
你引导你的神祇的怒火攻击你的敌人。你对区域内敌人造成4d10精魂伤害，基于它们的强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受完整伤害，并且@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 Sickened 1}。

大失败 该生物承受全部伤害，并且@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{恶心 Sickened 2}；当其恶心时，也会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d10。

Weight of Ages.name: Weight of Ages
Weight of Ages.description:
You burden a creature's body and mind with the pains and sorrows of a lifetime. The target takes 3d8 bludgeoning damage and 3d8 mental damage and must attempt a Will saving throw.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{Encumbered} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is encumbered for 1 minute.

Heightened (+1) The mental damage increases by 2d8.

Analyze Target.name: Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Divine Lance.name: 圣枪术 Divine Lance
Divine Lance.description:
你施放一道神圣能量的射线。对目标尝试一次远程法术攻击，对抗目标的AC。命中时，该目标承受2d4精魂伤害（在重击时造成双倍伤害）。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d4。

Recharge Weapon.name: Recharge Weapon
Recharge Weapon.description:
You touch a weapon with no remaining ammunition and recharge it with magical energy. The target gains ammunition or charges equal to its expend until the end of your next turn, allowing anyone holding the target to make one Strike with the weapon. This spell only recharges weapons that use ammunition with a cost of 10 credits or less.

Heightened (3rd) The target gains ammunition or charges equal to double its expend.

Heightened (6th) The target gains ammunition or charges equal to triple its expend.

Heightened (9th) The target gains ammunition or charges equal to quadruple its expend.

Sigil.name: 魔法印记 Sigil
Sigil.description:
你无害地在目标生物或者物体上设置你独有的魔法印记，它有1平方英寸大。该印记可以是可见的或者隐形的，并且你可以使用一个交互动作，接触该目标来令其从隐形转化为可见或从可见转化为隐形。该印记可以通过花费5分钟时间刷洗或者刮擦来除去。如果印记位于一个生物上，它会经过一周自然消去。该印记自然消去前的时间根据你升阶到的环级而改变。

升阶（3环级） 该印记在一个月后自然消去。

升阶（5环级） 该印记在1年后自然消去。

升阶（7环级） 该印记永不消去。

Electromag Grenade (Advanced).name: Electromag Grenade (Advanced)
Electromag Grenade (Advanced).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}

These grenades discharge a shocking field that deals 3d8 electricity damage in a @Template[burst|distance:10] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save. If you have access to the critical specialization effect of grenades, tech creatures and unattended tech items that critically fail their saving throw against electromag grenades become glitching.

Advanced Sihedron Guard Armor.name: Advanced Sihedron Guard Armor
Advanced Sihedron Guard Armor.description:
Upgrades: 0

These decorative suits of medium armor feature exaggerated shoulder guards, stylized dragon wings, and draconic emblems across the breastplate's back and chest. Skyfire armor is often plated with gold or other attractive metals, sacrificing upgrade space for style.

Shock Module (Commercial).name: Shock Module (Commercial)
Shock Module (Commercial).description: This circuit safely courses electricity through your weapon. It deals an extra 1d6 electricity damage. On a critical hit, electricity arcs out to deal an equal amount of electricity damage to up to two other creatures of your choice within 10 feet of the target.

Aeon Stone (Uplifting).name: Aeon Stone (Uplifting)
Aeon Stone (Uplifting).description:
Staple items within the Azlanti Star Empire, these gemstones are popular status symbols for adventurers and wealthy collectors. Despite their myriad forms and functions, these stones are purportedly all fragments of crystal tools used by otherworldly entities to build the Universe in ancient times.

When you invest one of these precisely shaped crystals, the stone orbits your head (or another visible part of your anatomy if you don't have a head) instead of being worn on your body. You can stow an aeon stone with an Interact action, and an orbiting stone can be snatched out of the air with a successful @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{Disarm} action against you. A stowed or removed stone remains invested, but its effects are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.enA7BxAjBb7ns1iF]{Suppressed} until you return it to orbit your head again.

There are various types of aeon stones, each with a different appearance and magical effect. Each aeon stone also gains a resonant power when slotted into specific items, such as weapons with the aeon trait or antique magical devices called wayfinders.

This deep-blue prism with cloudy inclusions is light as a feather. Its resonant power gives you a +1 item bonus to Acrobatics checks.

Activate—Fly Free 1 (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect You gain a fly Speed for 1 minute equal to your Speed or 20 feet, whichever is greater.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment-effects.Item.xZ5XMY55S42aGyjg]{Effect: Aeon Stone (Uplifting)}

Darkvision Visor.name: Darkvision Visor
Darkvision Visor.description: This visor wraps around your visual organs, enhancing your natural senses. You gain darkvision.

Punishment For Failure.name: Punishment For Failure
Punishment For Failure.description:
Trigger The Sihedron Guard specialist is reduced to 0 Hit Points and has used their Reward of Obedience reaction in the last year. A Sihedron Guard must use this ability when the trigger is met

Effect The Sihedron Guard specialist is utterly destroyed, leaving behind only equipment. Their soul can't be restored, and no magical means can contact their soul.

Reward of Obedience.name: Reward of Obedience
Reward of Obedience.description:
Frequency once per year

Trigger The Sihedron Guard specialist is reduced to 0 Hit Points, but not from an effect that leaves no remains (like the promession spell)

Effect The Sihedron Guard specialist regains @Damage[5d8[healing]] Hit Points and doesn't fall @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} or drop their equipment.

Battle Casting.name: Battle Casting
Battle Casting.description: The Sihedron Guard specialist makes a ranged Strike with their aeon rifle or a melee strike with their battleglove, then Casts a Spell requiring 2 actions or fewer against the same target. If the spell requires an attack roll, don't count the ranged or melee Strike toward the multiple attack penalty.

Virtue in Service.name: Virtue in Service
Virtue in Service.description: A Sihedron Guard specialist who makes a Strike while adjacent to another member of the Sihedron Guard gains a +4 circumstance bonus to damage rolls for that attack.

Sihedron Guard Specialist.publicNotes: While all Aeon Guards swear an oath of allegiance to the Aeon Throne, Sihedron Guard specialists are conditioned from a young age to be utterly devoted to Lissala—and thus to high priest Ishmerai Ophir. Such is their devotion that, the first time they die each year, a brilliant display of green lightning forms the Sihedron symbol in the air above them, preventing their death and allowing them to continue to fight in Lissala's name. Whether this boon is granted by Ishmerai or a direct gift from Lissala is unknown, but no one dares to question a Sihedron Guard specialist's devotion or deadly skill.

Asteray.name: Asteray

Confusion.name: 困惑术 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你使用奇怪的能量波动扰乱了目标的思维，令其随机行动。法术效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解消该法术。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标胡言乱语，并且获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑 Confused}1分钟。在其每个回合结束，它能尝试一次新豁免来结束困惑术。

大失败 目标困惑1分钟，并且没有提前结束的豁免。

升阶（8环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Discharge.name: Discharge
Discharge.description:
You ignite a sudden spark of electricity that surges into a technological creature or object. You de-energize an item with the tech trait or disrupt a creature with the tech trait, with effects based on the target being a creature or object.

  • Creature If your target is a creature with the tech trait, it attempts a Will save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}; on a critical failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}.
  • Object If you target an attended object, the creature with the object attempts a Will save. On a success, the object loses half of its maximum charges. On a failure, or if you target an unattended object, the object loses all its remaining charges.

Veil of Privacy.name: 回避帷幕 Veil of Privacy
Veil of Privacy.description: 你创造防护结界，令目标难以被魔法侦测。在持续时间内，回避帷幕会尝试反制所有对目标和目标装备的侦测，揭示，以及探知效果。此处戏法视为1环级法术。成功反制以区域为目标或者具有数个目标的预言法术时，仅取消对回避帷幕目标的效果。

Illusory Creature.name: 幻象生物 Illusory Creature
Illusory Creature.description:
你创造一个大型或者更小的生物的幻象。它发出适当的声音，气味，触摸起来也非常可信。如果你和幻象相距超过500尺，法术结束。

幻象不能说话，但是你可以使用你的动作来通过该生物说话，法术会适当地掩饰你的声音。你可能要尝试欺骗或者表演检定来模仿该生物，由GM决定。如果你想表现一个特定的人，并与一个知晓该人的人交互时，很可能会如此。

在战斗中，该幻象每回合能使用2动作，它在你维持该法术时使用这些动作。它使用你的法术攻击调整值为其攻击骰，使用你的法术DC为其AC。其豁免骰调整值等于你的法术DC-10。它足够结实，以至于可以夹击其他生物。如果幻象被攻击命中，或者在豁免中失败，法术结束。

该幻术可以通过令目标相信来造成伤害，但它不能直接影响现实世界。如果幻象生物的打击命中，目标承受@Damage[3d4[mental]]伤害。这是一个心灵效果。幻象的打击是非致命的。如果伤害与怪物的幻象不对应——举例而言，如果幻象巨型龙只造成了5点伤害——GM可以允许目标通过一个自由动作尝试一次察觉检定来不相信法术。只要目标认为能，任何有关的抗力和弱点都会生效，这由GM判定。举例而言，如果幻影持用一把战锤，攻击一个具有钝击抗力的生物，该生物承受的心灵伤害会变少。但是，幻觉伤害不会抑制再生，或者触发其他需要特定伤害类型的能力。GM应当记录幻像造成的幻觉伤害。

当生物触摸幻像，或者使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索 Seek}动作来检查它时，该生物可以尝试不相信你的幻术。当生物不相信幻术时，它回复从该幻术承受的伤害的一半（如果有），并且不会再因该幻术而承受伤害。

升阶（+1） 幻像的打击伤害增加1d4，你可以创造的生物最大体型增大一级（最大为巨型）。

Charm.name: 魅惑术 Charm
Charm.description:
在目标看来，你的言语甜蜜动听，你的形象笼罩在梦幻般的光晕中。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免，如果你或者你的盟友最近威胁它或者对它进行了敌对行为，会获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。如果你对目标使用任何敌对动作，法术终止。当该法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己被魅惑了，除非它和你的友好关系，或者你说服它去做的事情与其期望发生冲突。这也即是说你可以通过常规的方法说服目标继续作为你的朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且意识到你尝试魅惑它。

成功 该目标不受影响，但是认为你的法术是某种无害的东西，而不是魅惑术，除非它能识别该法术（通常通过辨识法术（Identifying Spells））。

失败 目标对你的态度变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友好 Friendly}）。如果已经是友好，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于帮助 Helpful}。它不能对你做出敌对行为。

大失败 目标变为乐于帮助并且不能对你做出敌对行为。

升阶（4环级） 该法术持续时间为持续到下次你进行你的日常准备。

升阶（8环级） 该法术持续时间为持续到下次你进行你的日常准备，并且你能以至多10个生物作为目标。

Illusory Object (At Will).name: Illusory Object (At Will)
Illusory Object (At Will).description:
你创造一个固定物体的视觉幻象。该幻象必须能完全处于法术区域中。该物体会自然活动，但是不会发出声音或者产生气味。举例而言，幻象瀑布中会出现水并流下，但是它会是安静的。

当生物触摸幻像，或者使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索 Seek}动作来检查它时，该生物可以尝试不相信你的幻术。

升阶（2环级） 你的幻象也会发出合适的声音，产生正常气味，并且摸起来也很正常。该法术获得听觉和嗅觉特征。持续时间增加到1小时。

升阶（5环级） 如2环级，但是持续时间为无限。

Wake Rider.name: Wake Rider
Wake Rider.description: By touching a starship, an asteray can bond to the energy wake it leaves as it travels. The asteray can match speeds with the starship and ride along with it, treating the ship as if it were the "ground" so long as they remain within 100 feet. If the starship enters the Drift, the asteray can choose to accompany it into the Drift, or they can disengage as a reaction and remain behind.

Matter Consumption.name: Matter Consumption
Matter Consumption.description: The asteray opens their mouth to suck in the molecules of an adjacent organic creature or object of Small size or larger. If the target is an object (including a corpse), then the asteray regains @Damage[30[healing]] Hit Points and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} 1 for the next minute, and they can use the extra action only to Climb, Fly, or Stride. If the target is a creature, then the target takes @Damage[10d8[void]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:32|basic] save).

Sensor Song.name: Sensor Song
Sensor Song.description: An asteray can "sing" electronic signals that mask or mimic sensor readings. The asteray creates a false image of an object, as a 5th-rank @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.2oH5IufzdESuYxat]{Illusory Object} spell. This false reading affects only electronic sensors, but creatures hear odd echoes in the area so long as the effect persists. Multiple asterays can sing together, doubling the range and area of illusory object for each asteray casting the spell in sync.

Asteray.publicNotes:
Thought to be merely mischievous tricksters, asterays are in fact fey born where the Void and First World overlap. Gifted with the innate ability to survive in space, asterays suffer from extreme wanderlust and an overwhelming desire to stave off boredom, with a desperate thirst for amusement being the prime motivation of most of their kind. They find themselves attracted to interesting stellar phenomena, from the swirls in gas giants to the interplay of stellar debris in an asteroid field. By floating through space, asterays gather enough sustenance to survive from their innate ability to consume latent cosmic radiation. However, asterays have one simple nutritional need that makes them a terror of the space lanes: organic matter. As space is all but devoid of organic elements for consumption, asterays resort to trailing starships, often by riding in their wake and tormenting the crew until they either abandon their posts or descend into chaos. Once an asteray has sufficiently driven a crew to despair, they enter the vessel and consume the corpses of the fallen.

Luckily—or perhaps not—for travelers, asterays typically find the consumption of living creatures distasteful, though their alien mindsets open them to using their vacuous ability to consume matter on active foes when threatened. Most asterays hibernate for months or even years at a time, floating in the wrecks of abandoned ships until the cosmic eddies of a passing ship stirs them from their torpor.

Whiptail Renkroda.name: Whiptail Renkroda

Twisting Tail.name: Twisting Tail
Twisting Tail.description:
Trigger A creature within reach of the whiptail renkroda's tail uses a move action or leaves a square during a move action it's using

Effect The whiptail renkroda Strikes the target with its tail. If it hits, the whiptail renkroda disrupts the creature's action.

Aerial Predator.name: Aerial Predator
Aerial Predator.description: When a whiptail renkroda has a Medium or smaller creature @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, its Grab doesn't end if it moves away. Instead, when it moves, it carries the grabbed creature with it.

Fling.name: Fling
Fling.description:
Requirements A creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} in the whiptail renkroda's tail

Effect The whiptail renkroda flings the creature through the air, launching the creature up to 10 feet up from its tail and 30 feet away. The creature takes falling damage accordingly. If the flung creature lands on another creature, the creature it lands on takes the same amount of bludgeoning damage (@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic] save).

Terrifying Roar.name: Terrifying Roar
Terrifying Roar.description:
The whiptail renkroda bellows ferociously. Each non-renkroda creature within 60 feet must attempt a @Check[will|dc:29] save. The creature is then temporarily immune for 10 minutes.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Whiptail Renkroda.publicNotes:
Whiptail renkrodas live along mountain slopes and rocky foothills, nesting in dark caves and rocky crags. They soar through the skies on powerful wings and attack with their long, lashing tails, which can coil around their prey like a whip. Many an unlucky traveler has been lashed by a whiptail renkroda's tail, hauled up into the air, and dropped to their death.

Renkrodas are a family of large dinosaur-like predators native to the planet Castrovel. They've spread beyond the jungle planet's boundaries thanks to smugglers, poachers, and ultra-wealthy big-game hunters. Bipedal and strong with long necks and decorative spines, renkrodas are best known for their terrifying roars, which they bellow frequently as a form of long-range communication and to scare away other predators and scavengers. Over a dozen species of renkrodas exist, each specially adapted to their environment or ecological niche.

Ichor Lord.name: Ichor Lord

Read Omens.name: 阅读机运 Read Omens
Read Omens.description: 你窥视未来。选择一个会在1周内发生的特定目的，事件，或者活动。你会获得一段晦涩的线索或者建议，它通常是诗歌或者预言，并且会在选择的事件中帮助到你。

Entropy Strike.name: Entropy Strike
Entropy Strike.description:
You unleash a ray of entropy that rapidly and indiscriminately decays matter. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes 5d8 void damage, or it takes 2d6 persistent acid damage and is glitching 1 if it has the tech trait. On a critical hit, double the damage, and if the creature has the tech trait, it's glitching 2 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1 die.

Personal Gravity.name: Personal Gravity
Personal Gravity.description: You alter gravity's effects on you. You treat gravity as if it were your choice of one step higher or lower (for example, if you were in an area of low gravity, you could choose either standard gravity or zero-g). While the spell is active, you reduce the distance of any forced movement that would affect you by 5 feet (minimum 0 feet), and you ignore being clumsy and untethered because of gravity effects on you. You can Dismiss the spell.

Share Pain.name: Share Pain
Share Pain.description:
You telepathically share the sensation of agonizing pain with a creature. The target takes 3d12 mental damage and attempts a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 minute.

Heightened (6th) The spell targets up to four creatures and deals 6d12 mental damage.

Void Whispers.name: Void Whispers
Void Whispers.description:
The target hears ominous sounds containing unspeakable mysteries from beyond the stars that disorient its mind. The target attempts a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The target hears the strange whispers, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target begins to wander aimlessly, using each action to Step in a random direction. When it moves, the target takes the safest route and doesn't enter hazardous terrain. The spell has a duration of 1 minute or until a creature uses a hostile action against the target.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target babbles incoherently. Any creature that begins its turn within 20 feet of the target must attempt a Will saving throw. On a failure, it must use its first action on its next turn to Step in a random direction and becomes immune to this spell for 24 hours. This is an incapacitation effect.

Augury.name: 卜筮术 Augury
Augury.description:
你能够粗略地窥见未来。在施放该法术期间，询问特定行动方式的结果。法术能够至多未来30分钟内的结果，并使用后述结果揭示出GM得出的最有可能的猜想：吉、凶、兼（结果将是好与坏的混合）、以及平（不会产生特别好或者坏的结果）。

GM投掷一次@Check[flat|dc:6|showDC:all|traits:secret]检定。失败时，结果总是“平”。这使得它人无法判断“平”的结果究竟是否准确。若有任何人在另一次施法过程中询问的问题与首次卜筮术具有相同的主题，那么GM要使用与首次施法相同的秘密检定结果。不过，在情况改变时，也有可能得到不同的结果。

Blur.name: 朦胧术 Blur
Blur.description: 目标的形态变得模糊不清。它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}。由于该效果的原理，目标的位置仍然是显然的，目标不能使用该隐蔽来躲藏或潜行。

Detect Thoughts.name: Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description:
You sense the presence of thinking creatures around you. You detect the presence or absence of thoughts from conscious creatures that have Intelligence modifiers of –3 or higher. You can choose to ignore the thoughts of creatures you're familiar with so they don't interfere with your detection of other thoughts. The spell can penetrate some barriers, but 3 feet of dirt or wood, 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of metal, a thin sheet of lead, or any force barrier blocks it. Creatures who are immune to mental effects are immune to detection by this spell.

Heightened (4th) You detect the number of thinking minds and whether or not the creatures are telepathic. Creatures with telepathy have louder thoughts than creatures who don't have telepathy and might be able to sense your intrusion, at the GM's discretion.

See the Unseen (Constant).name: See the Unseen (Constant)
See the Unseen (Constant).description:
你的目光穿透了幻术，发现了隐形生物和魂灵。你能看到@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}生物，就如同它们并未隐形一般，然而它们的体征仍然很模糊，使得它们具有@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}并且难以被识别。你还能看到虚体生物，比如幽灵，你能通过透视物体的内部来看到虚体生物，在物体表面下10尺内的此类生物会显现为经过分层的模糊轮廓。对细节更强的洞察力还让你在作出不相信幻术的检定时，获得+2状态加值。

升阶（5环级） 持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：识破无形}

Bane.name: Bane
Bane.description:
你将疑虑充满敌人的心智。在区域的敌人必须成功通过一次意志豁免，只要在区域内，在攻击骰上即会承受-1状态减值。第二轮以后每轮一次，你可以维持该法术将弥漫的半径增加10尺，并令区域内尚未受到影响的敌人尝试额外一次豁免骰。

绝望术可以反制@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.XSujb7EsSwKl19Uu]{祝福术 Bless}。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.UTLp7omqsiC36bso]{法术效果：绝望术}

Daze.name: 晕眩术 Daze
Daze.description:
你侵入目标的精神，利用精神冲击令目标晕眩。该冲击造成1d6心灵伤害，具有基础意志豁免。如果目标在豁免中大失败，它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 该伤害增加1d6。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Eldritch Lance.name: Eldritch Lance
Eldritch Lance.description:
You condense a beam of mind-assaulting eldritch energy from the dark spaces between the stars and fire it at a target. Make a ranged spell attack roll against the target's AC. If you hit, you deal 2d6 mental damage. On a critical success, you deal double damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Enfeeble.name: 衰弱术 Enfeeble
Enfeeble.description:
你抽走目标的力量，基于其强韧豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}，直到你的下个回合开始。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 2}，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 3}，持续1分钟

Fear.name: 恐惧术 Fear
Fear.description:
你将恐惧植入目标；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}.

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}.

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 3} 并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing} 1轮.

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Mind Skewer.name: Mind Skewer
Mind Skewer.description:
You overload a creature's mind with a glut of psychic information or divine judgments. The mental onslaught deals 2d6 mental damage. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Telekinetic Hand.name: 念动之手 Telekinetic Hand
Telekinetic Hand.description:
你创造出一只漂浮着的魔法手掌，它可以隐形或者宛如幽灵，它能抓住目标物体并向着任意方向缓慢漂浮至多20尺。当你维持法术时，你能够将物体移动额外20尺。若物体位于空中之时法术结束，那么该物体便会坠落。

升阶（3环级） 你能以一个1负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至60尺，而且你能以一个1负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

升阶（7环级） 法术射程增加至60尺，而且你能以一个2负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

Void Warp.name: 虚能噬 Void Warp
Void Warp.description:
你唤来虚能伤害生命力量。该目标承受2d4虚能伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免. 如果该生物在豁免中大失败，他也会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}直到你得下个回合开始。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d4。

Ichor Spray.name: Ichor Spray
Ichor Spray.description:
Trigger The ichor lord is dealt piercing or slashing damage

Effect Hallucinogenic ichor spurts from the ichor lord's wound, dealing @Damage[1d6[mental]|options:area-damage] damage to non-orocoran creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] centered on the ichor lord (@Check[will|dc:28|basic] save).

Hallucinate.name: Hallucinate
Hallucinate.description:
An orocoran's stomach fluids are laced with hallucinogens due to their consumption of the ichor-like birthing fluids expelled by Aucturn during the hatching of the Newborn.

A creature hit with the projectile vomit must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:28] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round (1d4 rounds on a critical failure).

Ichor Wellspring.name: Ichor Wellspring
Ichor Wellspring.description:
Requirements The ichor lord is touching solid ground

Frequency once per hour

Effect With a psychic cry to the Newborn, the ichor lord tears open the earth, causing a geyser of hallucinogenic ichor to burst from the ground within 100 feet. This geyser occupies a 50-foot-tall cylinder with a 10-foot radius base. The base of this geyser must be on the ground or a similar solid surface, and the geyser must be oriented vertically. Each creature in the area takes @Damage[4d6[bludgeoning],4d6[mental]|options:area-damage]{4d6 bludgeoning damage and 4d6 mental damage}, with a @Check[reflex|dc:28] save. A creature pushed into the air by the geyser can't be pushed beyond the top of the geyser. After being pushed into the air, a creature falls unless it's flying, is in zero gravity, or has some other means of staying aloft in its current environment, taking falling damage as normal.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and isn't pushed into the air.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is pushed 20 feet into the air.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is pushed 40 feet into the air. The geyser continues to flow for 1 minute, gently raining ichor in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] centered on the geyser's base. An orocoran in the area of this rain can drink the ichor once per round as a single action with the manipulate trait; if they do, they become invigorated, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to damage rolls and resistance 5 to physical damage until the beginning of their next turn.

Lick Wounds.name: Lick Wounds
Lick Wounds.description:
Frequency once per round

Requirements A creature within reach of the orocoran's proboscis is taking persistent bleed damage

Effect The orocoran flicks out their proboscis and sups on the flowing blood of their enemy. The orocoran regains Hit Points equal to the target's persistent bleed value.

Ichor Lord.publicNotes:
Orocoran ichor lords are blessed by the Newborn—ichor flows through their veins, and they can conjure short-lived fonts of ichor. Most gather desperate orocorans around them, controlling their brethren through access to ichor.

Native to the now-destroyed planet of Aucturn, orocorans are foul and desperate creatures, cast adrift in space as they yearn to consume once more the essence of the Newborn god or fragments of the womb it gestated within. They're irritable, violent, and utterly anguished.

While some orocorans have broken free of their addiction and regained their clarity of mind and sense of self, the orocorans presented here are those who still rely on Aucturn's eldritch fluids.

Vracinea.name: Vracinea

Invasive Spores.name: Invasive Spores
Invasive Spores.description:
10 feet. A vracinea constantly exudes sweet-smelling spores. Any creature that enters or starts its turn in the area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:18] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and immune to the vracinea's aura for 24 hours.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round.

Critical Failure As success, plus the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 round.

Blossom Lure.name: Blossom Lure
Blossom Lure.description:
The vracinea's violet blossoms emit a magical glow that compels all onlookers to approach. Each non-vracinea creature within a @Template[type:emanation|distance:120] must attempt a @Check[will|dc:21] save to avoid the lure. The effect lasts for 1 round, but the vracinea can Sustain this ability on subsequent rounds, extending the duration by 1 round for all affected creatures. Once a creature succeeds at any save against Blossom Lure, that creature is temporarily immune to Blossom Lure for 24 hours.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature must spend each of its actions to move closer to the vracinea as expediently as possible while avoiding obvious dangers. If a lured creature is adjacent to the vracinea, it stays still and doesn't act. If a lured creature takes damage from any source or is targeted by an enemy with an attack or hostile effect, the creature is freed from this effect at the end of the current turn.

Critical Failure As failure, but if damaged, attacked, or targeted, the creature attempts a new save at the start of its next turn, rather than being automatically freed at the end of the current turn.

Feeding Frenzy.name: 觅食狂热 Feeding Frenzy
Feeding Frenzy.description: The vracinea makes up to three jaws Strikes, each against a different target. These attacks count against the vracinea's multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after the vracinea makes all its attacks.

Vracinea.publicNotes: The vracinea is a large, shambling, multi-mawed plant, originally native to Castrovel but now found on many more planets. Slow and clumsy, it prefers to lure animals and other protein-rich prey with its blossoms. It then seeks to make a quick kill while the prey is befuddled by its spores. Though the paralytic effect of a vracinea's spores isn't potent at great distances, when these spores catch the wind, they help the plant spread to new habitats. A vracinea is a particularly cunning and territorial hunter that knows how to use local hazards. It's skilled at hiding its body in the underbrush, extending just its blossoms to lure in prey.

Corpse Fleet Recruiter.name: Corpse Fleet Recruiter

Bind Undead.name: 束缚死灵 Bind Undead
Bind Undead.description:
你通过短短一个魔法律令，获得了对目标的掌控。其获得仆从特征。如果你或者一个盟友对目标使用任何敌对动作，法术终止。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.rVkUzqS4rpZp9LS3]{法术效果：束缚死灵}

Entropy Strike.name: Entropy Strike
Entropy Strike.description:
You unleash a ray of entropy that rapidly and indiscriminately decays matter. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes 5d8 void damage, or it takes 2d6 persistent acid damage and is glitching 1 if it has the tech trait. On a critical hit, double the damage, and if the creature has the tech trait, it's glitching 2 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1 die.

Irradiate.name: 辐射 Irradiate
Irradiate.description:
You rapidly destabilize and decay the atoms around you to create a burst of magically enhanced mild radiation. Creatures in the area must attempt a Fortitude save against mild radiation sickness. This magical radiation uses your spell DC in place of the radiation's normal Fortitude DC, has an immediate onset, and the interval between each stage is 1 round. Technology doesn't gain the glitching condition from the radiation created by this spell.

Heightened (5th) The radiation increases to severe.

Heightened (7th) The radiation increases to extreme.

Heightened (9th) The radiation increases to incredible.

Vampiric Feast.name: 吸血鬼之宴 Vampiric Feast
Vampiric Feast.description:
你的接触从目标身上抽出生命之血，以强化自身。你对目标造成6d6虚能伤害。你获得等于目标承受的虚能伤害（在抗力及类似效果生效后）一半的临时生命值。你在1分钟后失去任何剩余的临时生命值。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d6。

Create Undead (doesn't require secondary.name: Create Undead (doesn't require secondary casters)
Create Undead (doesn't require secondary.description:
你将目标转化为不死生物，该不死生物的等级最高为创造生物仪式表内允许的等级。该仪式具有多个版本，每个版本都对应着特定种类的不死生物（一个版本对应所有丧尸、一个版本对应骷髅、一个版本对应食尸鬼，等等），而且唤起稀有不死生物的仪式同样也是稀有。部分形式的不死生物，比如巫妖，是使用自身独具的独特方式来形成的，无法使用某个版本的唤起死灵来创造。

大成功 目标变为对应类型的不死生物。若它的等级至少比你低4级，那么你可以把它化为仆从。这会赋予它仆从特征，意味着它在你下令之后能够使用两个动作，对其下令是具有听觉和专注特征的单动作。你最多能同时具有4个仆从在自己的控制之下。如果它具有智能且没有成为仆从，并且由于你唤起了它，它对你的态度会变为乐于帮助，不过它仍然是一名可怖且邪恶的生物。若它不具有智能并且没有成为仆从，你可以给它下达单次命令。它会一心不二地专注于该目标，并无视你所下达的任何后续命令。

成功同大成功，不过具有智能（intelligent）且没有成为仆从的不死生物对你的态度仅仅是友善，未能成为仆从的无智能不死生物会离开你（除非你主动对其发起攻击）。它会袭击周边区域而非服从你的命令。

失败 你无法将该生物转化为不死生物。

大失败 你将该生物转化为不死生物，但是它的灵魂被你那肮脏的死灵法术所折磨，这个生物满溢着对你的憎恨。它会试图消灭你。

表:创造生物仪式

Darkness.name: 黑暗术 Darkness
Darkness.description:
你创造一片黑暗的帷幕，光线无法穿透，并且光源无法在区域中发光。光线无法进入该区域，并且任何非魔法光源，例如火炬或者提灯，在区域中不会发出任何光线，即使其光照可能到达黑暗术之外也是如此。这也会压制等于或低于你的黑暗术环级的魔法光亮。光线无法穿透，所以在区域中的生物无法看到外面。对于外面，这看起来如同一团纯粹黑暗的球。

升阶（4环级） 即使具有黑暗视觉的生物（但不包括高等黑暗视觉）也几乎无法看穿这黑暗。它们透过黑暗看到的生物视为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}。

Resist Energy.name: 抵抗能量伤害 Resist Energy
Resist Energy.description:
元素护盾保护一个生物免受某一种类型能量的伤害。选择酸蚀，寒冷，电击，火焰或者音波伤害。目标和其装备获得对你所选择伤害类型的抗力5。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.con2Hzt47JjpuUej]{法术效果：抵抗能量伤害}

升阶（4环级） 该抗力增加到10，并且你能以至多两个生物为目标。

升阶（7环级） 该抗力增加到15，并且你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Caustic Blast.name: 酸液喷溅 Caustic Blast
Caustic Blast.description:
你发射一团立即爆发的酸液，泼溅到周围生物上。区域中的生物承受1d8酸蚀伤害，这有一次基础反射豁免；在大失败时，该生物也会承受@Damage[(1+floor((@item.rank -1)/2))[persistent,acid]]伤害。

升阶（+2） 该初始伤害增加1d8，并且持续伤害增加1。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Electric Arc.name: 电弧击 Electric Arc
Electric Arc.description:
一段电弧从一个目标跳跃到另一个目标。每个目标承受2d4电击伤害，这有一次基础反射豁免。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d4。

Grim Tendrils.name: 邪影触须 Grim Tendrils
Grim Tendrils.description:
由黑暗组成的触须从你的指尖喷涌而出。你对在射线上的活物造成2d4虚能伤害和@Damage[(@item.level)[bleed]]伤害。每个射线上的活物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半虚能伤害，并且不受持续流血伤害。

失败 该生物承受完整伤害。

大失败 该生物承受双倍虚能伤害和双倍持续流血伤害。

升阶（+1） 该虚能伤害增加2d4，持续流血伤害增加1。

Harm.name: 伤害术 Harm
Harm.description:
你引导虚能，以伤害活物或者治疗不死生物。如果目标是活物，你对其造成1d8虚能伤害，并且它可以进行基础强韧豁免。如果目标是自愿不死生物，你回复这个数量的生命值。你在施放该法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标，范围，区域和其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 （专注） 该法术的射程为30尺。如果你在治疗一个不死生物，回复的生命值增加8。

3 （专注） 你在@Template[emanation|distance:30]内释放虚能。这会以区域中所有活物和不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗或者伤害的量增加1d8，2动作版本的额外治疗增加8。

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你专注于目标物体，拓展神智，以感受魔法灵光。当你完成施法后，你得知该物品是否具有魔法。你或者你共有了灵光情报的人在对该物品@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic}时获得+2环境加值。如果该物体是幻象，仅当该效果的环级低于你的阅读灵光环级时你才能发现此事实。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.J6OhRNSN23KzOPRL]{Spell Effect: Read Aura}

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多10个物体为目标。

升阶（8环级） 你能以任意数量物体为目标。

Summon Undead.name: 召唤亡灵 Summon Undead
Summon Undead.description:
你召唤一个具有不死生物特征的生物为你而战，其等级为-1。

升阶 如@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.journals.JournalEntry.S55aqwWIzpQRFhcq.JournalEntryPage.8gcp880pEWZ9VPnF]{召唤 summon}特征列出。

Void Warp.name: 虚能噬 Void Warp
Void Warp.description:
你唤来虚能伤害生命力量。该目标承受2d4虚能伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免. 如果该生物在豁免中大失败，他也会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{力竭 Enfeebled 1}直到你得下个回合开始。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d4。

Integrated Shock Pad.name: Integrated Shock Pad
Integrated Shock Pad.description:
Upgrades: 1

This flexible nanocarbon circuit can be installed as an upgrade into gloves, kneepads, or similar appendage protectors to emit a powerful electric shock when forcefully applied to a target.

Integrated Zero Pistol.name: Integrated Zero Pistol
Integrated Zero Pistol.description:
Upgrades: 1

Zero pistols use transparent canisters of supercooled liquid as ammunition.

Seize Control.name: Seize Control
Seize Control.description: 20 feet. Mindless undead that begin their turn in the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:22|options:area-effect] save; on a failure, the Corpse Fleet recruiter seizes control of that undead. It gains the minion trait.

Corpse Bomb.name: Corpse Bomb
Corpse Bomb.description: The Corpse Fleet recruiter detonates one mindless undead minion under their control, causing it to explode in a @Template[burst|distance:15]{15-foot-radius burst}, dealing @Damage[4d6[slashing],4d6[void]|options:area-damage]{4d6 slashing damage and 4d6 void damage} to creatures in the area (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic|options:area-effect] save).

Efficient Commands.name: Efficient Commands
Efficient Commands.description: The Corpse Fleet recruiter Sustains each spell they cast to create minions and Commands any number of their minions.

Rapid Recruitment.name: Rapid Recruitment
Rapid Recruitment.description:
Frequency once per day

Requirements A formerly living creature that died within the last round is within 10 feet

Effect The Corpse Fleet recruiter immediately performs the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.c3b6LdLlQDPngNIb]{Create Undead} ritual, as if it were a spell with a casting time of 2 actions and the Corpse Fleet recruiter rolled a critical success on the ritual.

Corpse Fleet Recruiter.publicNotes:
Corpse Fleet recruiters are powerful necromancers capable of maintaining control of mindless undead, creating new undead, and turning their magic against the living.

The Corpse Fleet is an army made up of undead supremacists who refuse to bow to the will of the living. Founded by defectors from the Eoxian navy, the Corpse Fleet aims to shatter Pact Worlds unity and liberate Eox from the influence of the living and those bone sages who sided with them. Unyielding and utterly ruthless, the Corpse Fleet deals in death and destruction, feeding on the living and exploiting the dead.

Diatha.name: Diatha

Detonate.name: Detonate
Detonate.description:
Trigger The diatha takes acid, electricity, fire, piercing, slashing, or sonic damage

Requirements The diatha has 5 or fewer Hit Points

Effect The diatha dies, its body combusting in a flash of flame. All creatures in a 5-foot-radius emanation take @Damage[1d6[fire]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:16|basic] save).

Hydrocarbon Slick.name: Hydrocarbon Slick
Hydrocarbon Slick.description:
If a diatha dies before it can detonate, its body rapidly decomposes into a slick of highly volatile hydrocarbons. Any effect that deals acid, electricity, or fire damage in an area that includes the square where the diatha died, or targets a creature in that square, causes a small explosion and consumes the slick.

All creatures in the square and in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5] take @Damage[1d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:16|basic] save). The slick evaporates after 10 minutes if it isn't ignited.

Explosive Charge.name: Explosive Charge
Explosive Charge.description:
Requirements The diatha has 5 or fewer Hit Points

Effect The diatha Strides twice and makes a melee Strike at the end of that movement. After the Strike, the diatha uses Detonate.

Diatha.publicNotes:
Often called "boom bugs" or "exploding slugs," diathas are invertebrates that store nutrients as hydrocarbon chains rather than fat deposits. Threatened diathas secrete hormones that prime their energy stores to combust, detonating themselves to drive off or kill predators. Even if several diathas sacrifice themselves this way, their hive rarely suffers thanks to their rapid reproductive cycle.

Diathas are hardy scavengers that can convert almost any carbon-based molecules into energy. Originally, diathas consumed biowaste in underground warrens, but their appetite for hydrocarbon-based fuels and industrial runoff drew them into contact with modernized civilizations, where they quickly adapted to urban environments. Though some entrepreneurs try to use these creatures as an organic means of converting plastic waste into petrol products, most see diathas as vermin that do far more harm than good when allowed to propagate.

Diathas can easily stow away in the nooks and crannies of starships, and interstellar travelers often don't notice them until it's too late. Because they can digest almost any carbon-containing matter, diathas that colonize new worlds can adapt to a wide range of biomes and persist as a threat to native species for generations. Efforts to eradicate invasive diathas carry substantial risks to the exterminators and the environment they're trying to protect, as the explosive vermin use literal scorched earth tactics to protect their hives. To make matters worse, diathas are hermaphroditic and can grow new hives from a single organism if they have sufficient food sources to multiply. As a result, the Pact Worlds and Veskarium maintain strict quarantine measures for vessels suspected of carrying diatha infestations.

As diathas age, their stored internal gases allow them to become buoyant. These "elder" diathas instinctively take prominent roles as scouts and guards for other diathas. To create an elder diatha, apply the aerial and elite adjustments to a diatha, or increase its level using the guidelines from GM Core.

Irradiated Undead Plant.name: Irradiated Undead Plant

Meltdown.name: Meltdown
Meltdown.description:
Trigger The irradiated undead plant is reduced to 0 Hit Points by energy damage of any kind

Effect The energy acts as a catalyst for a nuclear reaction, causing the plant to explode and dealing @Damage[3d6[poison]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] with a @Check[reflex|dc:16|basic] save.

Radioactive Remains.name: Radioactive Remains
Radioactive Remains.description: 20 feet. A creature entering or starting its turn inside the aura is exposed to mild radiation.

Seedpod.name: Seedpod
Seedpod.description: When a irradiated undead plant Strikes a creature, some of its contaminated seeds stick to the target. The irradiated undead plant gains the Sprout action. An affected creature can remove this seedpod as an Interact action.

Sprout.name: Sprout
Sprout.description:
Requirements One or more creatures within 60 feet of the irradiated undead plant are currently host to at least one seedpod

Effect The irradiated undead plant pulses with energy, causing the seedpods to sprout vines. Creatures hosting a seedpod must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:16] save.

Critical Success No effect.

Success The creature takes @Damage[1d6[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage.

Failure The creature takes @Damage[2d6[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature takes @Damage[2d6[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage, is slowed 2 for 1 round, and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} until it [[/act escape dc=16]]{Escapes}. Until it Escapes, the creature is a new source of the irradiated undead plant's radioactive remains aura with a @Template[type:emanation|distance:5].

Irradiated Undead Plant.publicNotes:
Flora are often the first victims of industrialization, dying petal by petal and blade of grass at a time before anybody even notices a loss of habitat. When nuclear fallout corrupts the hardiest species of vegetation, sometimes their irradiated seeds inexplicably bloom into new, unliving specimens.

To survive in the unforgiving expanse of space, creatures must be naturally adapted or take protective measures. While the dead rarely need such precautions against these threats, sometimes radiation can animate a corpse (or several) to a state of undeath!

Scientists and religious scholars alike debate whether a specific type of radiation is to blame for this phenomenon that spontaneously triggers unlife, but all agree on the dangers such irradiated creatures pose. Many types of radiation could be the cause: intense bursts of cosmic radiation emitted by the stars, magically enhanced radioactive isotopes found in a planet's or moon's crust, or even the advent of new energy sources in a society (or its radioactive waste) contaminating the land. Regardless of their specific origin, irradiated undead all pose the same threat—they emit ionizing radiation that ravages everything around them.

Wyspiria.name: Wyspiria

X-Ray Vision.name: X-Ray Vision
X-Ray Vision.description: You empower yourself to see through most materials and walls within 60 feet. Your sight is blocked by 2 feet of wood or plastic, 1 foot of stone, 2 inches of common metal, or any amount of lead or any starmetal, and you can only see in black and white.

Chrono Push.name: Chrono Push
Chrono Push.description:
You push a creature across the battlefield so hard it slides through time. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, you knock the target back 15 feet in a straight line (30 feet on a critical hit). If the pushed creature makes contact with a solid barrier or another creature, its movement ends. At the end of this movement, the creature reenters the flow of time with a burst of temporal energy. The target and creatures now adjacent to the target take 7d8 force damage with a basic Reflex save.

Heightened (+1) The force damage increases by 1d8.

Overload Systems.name: Overload Systems
Overload Systems.description:
You flood the area with a wave of electrical interference. You deal 7d8 electricity damage to creatures in the area. Each creature in the area must attempt a Reflex save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage, and any of its items with the tech trait become glitching 1 for 1 minute or until the condition is removed.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, and any of its items with the tech trait become glitching 2 for 1 minute or until the condition is removed.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Truespeech (constant).name: Truespeech (constant)
Truespeech (constant).description:
无论什么语言，目标都可以理解其所有的词语，并且向其他生物用该语言交流。当处于一群各异的生物中时，每次目标将要说话，他可以选择一个生物，并使用一种该生物理解的语言来讲述，即使该目标不知道这语言具体是什么。

升阶（7环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Translocate (at will).name: Translocate (at will)
