Translocate (at will).description:
你立即将自身以及自己正在穿戴和持有的物品从当前空间转移走，移动至法术射程内你能看到的未被占据的空间。如果这将会带着其他生物与你一同移动——即便你把该生物放置在异次元容器中——你就会失去该法术。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至1英里。你不需要看到目的地，只要你曾经去过目的地，并且知晓该地点与你相对的位置以及距离即可。之后你会在1小时内临时免疫该法术。

Discharge.name: Discharge
Discharge.description:
You ignite a sudden spark of electricity that surges into a technological creature or object. You de-energize an item with the tech trait or disrupt a creature with the tech trait, with effects based on the target being a creature or object.

  • Creature If your target is a creature with the tech trait, it attempts a Will save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}; on a critical failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}.
  • Object If you target an attended object, the creature with the object attempts a Will save. On a success, the object loses half of its maximum charges. On a failure, or if you target an unattended object, the object loses all its remaining charges.

Haste.name: 加速术 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法强化了目标，令其行动迅速。它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}状态，并且每轮可以使用该额外动作以打击或者行走。

升阶（7环级） 你能以至多6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速术}

Holographic Memory.name: Holographic Memory
Holographic Memory.description:
You reach into the target's mind, extract a specific memory you have some awareness of, and project it into a hologram. Alternatively, when casting this spell, you can choose to pull a random memory left to the GM's discretion. The holographic memory can be no longer than 5 minutes; if the extracted memory is longer than this, the hologram simply ends at that point. The hologram includes audio as well as visual components, but it doesn't contain haptic, olfactory, or other components. The hologram typically plays a memory that takes place in a single scene, though it can cut to multiple scenes if they're accurate to the memory and its length allows. The hologram plays the memory exactly as the target experienced it and from the target's perspective, so it often lacks context.

This spell can target any living, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}, or deceased sentient creature with an Intelligence modifier of –3 or higher. If the target is deceased, it can't have been dead for longer than 1 week, or this spell fails; once a corpse has been subjected to holographic memory by any caster, any subsequent castings of holographic memory fail.

If the target is unwilling to share this memory, it can attempt a Will save to resist this spell.

Slow.name: 缓慢术 Slow
Slow.description:
你令目标周围的时间膨胀，令其行动缓慢。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1} ，持续1轮。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 2}，持续1分钟。

升阶（6环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Time's Edge.name: Time's Edge
Time's Edge.description:
You refract latent energy from the Dimension of Time into your current plane in the form of a massive blade. The blade deals 5d6 slashing damage to all creatures in the area as it causes time to pass rapidly in a thin slice of their bodies. Creatures in the area must attempt a Fortitude save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Caustic Conversion.name: Caustic Conversion
Caustic Conversion.description:
You launch a torrent of magical nanites that begin dissolving your target. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, you deal 3d8 acid damage plus 1d6 persistent acid damage. On a critical hit, double the initial damage, but not the persistent damage.

Heightened (+2) The initial damage increases by 2d8, and the persistent acid damage increases by 1d6.

Detect Thoughts.name: Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description:
You sense the presence of thinking creatures around you. You detect the presence or absence of thoughts from conscious creatures that have Intelligence modifiers of –3 or higher. You can choose to ignore the thoughts of creatures you're familiar with so they don't interfere with your detection of other thoughts. The spell can penetrate some barriers, but 3 feet of dirt or wood, 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of metal, a thin sheet of lead, or any force barrier blocks it. Creatures who are immune to mental effects are immune to detection by this spell.

Heightened (4th) You detect the number of thinking minds and whether or not the creatures are telepathic. Creatures with telepathy have louder thoughts than creatures who don't have telepathy and might be able to sense your intrusion, at the GM's discretion.

Inject Nanobots.name: Inject Nanobots
Inject Nanobots.description:
You inject magical nanobots into a creature. Make a melee spell attack roll. On a hit, the target takes 4d6 acid damage. On a critical hit, the target takes double damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round as nanobots swarm through the target's biological or mechanical systems.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Skim Data (at will).name: Skim Data (at will)
Skim Data (at will).description:
You touch one object and concentrate on a dataset contained within it, such as a story, message, file, infosphere site, audio recording, or video. You understand the gist of the dataset and can quickly locate the most relevant pages or sections to your search. If the dataset is written or otherwise communicated in a language you don't know, or you attempt to gain information from a computer you don't have access to (such as one with a password you don't know), the spell fails.

If you Cast this Spell as part of a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.t5nBkpjroaq7QBGK]{Research} activity, you treat a critical failure as a failure instead.

Analyze Target.name: Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Delete.name: Delete
Delete.description:
You delete data from a device or object with a flamboyant magical gesture. This data might be handwritten, printed, or digital. You delete up to 1,500 words' worth of text, one page of content, or one display screen worth of text or other visual information. Non-magical writing in or on an unattended or held object is automatically deleted. Attempt a counteract check to delete digital or magical writing. If you fail to delete writing that's part of a hazard, you trigger the hazard. This can't be used to delete the contents of a spellbook or similar means of storing magical formulas or spells.

If you target an attended tech item with the tracking trait, attempt a counteract check. On a success, the item becomes glitching 1. A creature holding the item can Interact to restart the software, reducing the glitching value by 1.

Heightened (7th) You can delete all the data stored locally on a single device or book, or all the data on a device or book related to a specific name, topic, or category.

Implant Data.name: Implant Data
Implant Data.description:
You reprogram a computer or device to display a chosen piece of data when accessed. You can implant up to one piece of data per spell rank. A piece of data can be a simple fact, such as a creature or object's location or physical description; an image of a creature or object; or a simple statement of no more than 300 characters. When the target computer or device is accessed, this implanted data is the first data the accessing creature gains, regardless of what data the creature is looking for. Implanted data doesn't prevent a creature from accessing other information stored on a device, change how the device functions, or otherwise inhibit the device from functioning. If this spell's duration ends before a creature accesses the implanted data, the information vanishes.

Heightened (3rd) The duration is one year.

Heightened (6th) The duration is unlimited.

Mending.name: 修复术 Mending
Mending.description:
你修复目标物品。你回复目标每法术环级5点生命值，并且如果修复达到了物品的破损阈值，会移除 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6dNUvdb1dhToNDj3]{破损 Broken} 状态。你无法代替丢失的组成部分，或者修复已经完全损毁的物体。

升阶（2环级） 你能以1负载或者更低的非魔法物品为目标。

升阶（3环级） 你能以2负载或者更低的非魔法物品为目标，或者1负载或者更低的魔法物品为目标。

Seek the Stars.name: Seek the Stars
Seek the Stars.description:
In your mind's eye, you chart a path through the cosmos. If you're in Pact Worlds space, you immediately know which direction to travel in order to reach the Starstone on Absalom Station. If you're outside the Pact System, you know the direction to the nearest Drift beacon or the Starstone.

Heightened (7th) You can instead know the direction to a familiar location, such as a world or way station you've visited.

Wisp Ally.name: Wisp Ally
Wisp Ally.description:
You summon a Tiny bouncing wisp of light that easily distracts even the most determined of combatants. The wisp floats near your target. A wisp doesn't take up space, grant flanking, or have any other attributes a creature would. The wisp generates bright light in a 10-foot radius. When you Cast the Spell and each time you Sustain the spell, your wisp attempts to distract your target, which must succeed at a Will save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your next turn. A creature who critically succeeds becomes immune to wisp ally for 1 hour.

Heightened (+1) You create one additional wisp, allowing you to choose a different target. Each wisp you create must have a different target, and all of them attempt to distract their targets at the same time when you cast or Sustain this spell.

Arc Network.name: Arc Network
Arc Network.description: The wyspiria can communicate through items and creatures with the tech trait, projecting sound from and speaking through the item or creature's voice, speakers, or other audio output. In addition, the excuba can use any item or creature with the tech trait within their digital telepathy aura as the point of origin for their spells and abilities when calculating range, distance, line of effect, and area of effect.

Slip Drive.name: Slip Drive
Slip Drive.description: An wyspiria has an internal biomechanical Drift engine, allowing them to function as a Drift engine for a starship or vehicle they pilot as a 1-minute activity. An excuba can enter or exit the Drift themself as a 1-minute activity. When an excuba gets a critical failure on a Piloting check to Navigate or Plot a Course through the Drift, they get a failure instead.

Techsense.name: Techsense
Techsense.description: The wyspiria senses creatures and objects with the tech trait as a precise sense within the listed range.

Digital Telepathy.name: Digital Telepathy
Digital Telepathy.description: 100 feet. A wyspiria can communicate telepathically with any item or creature with the tech trait within their aura as well as with other technologically telepathic creatures (such as those with shortwave and similar abilities). This ability also allows the spectra to remotely attempt Computers checks within their aura.

Borrow Time.name: 预借时间 Borrow Time
Borrow Time.description:
Frequency once per minute

Trigger The wyspiria's turn begins

Effect The wyspiria pulls potential energy from their future self to use in the present. The wyspiria becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} this turn and can use the extra action only for Fly, Stride, and Strike actions. At the end of the wyspiria's turn, they become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of their next turn.

Connect.name: Connect
Connect.description: When a wyspiria Grabs a creature with a tentacle Strike, they automatically plug one of their many cord-like appendages into it. The sudden connection feeds the creature a stream of information and fabricated sensory data, making them @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} unless they succeed at a @Check[will|dc:30] save. If the wyspiria moves, they bring the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} creature along with them. The wyspiria doesn't need to use additional actions to keep the creature grabbed; the creature remains grabbed as long as it's connected. The grabbed creature can attempt to [[/act escape dc=30]] as normal. The wyspiria can connect with up to 10 creatures simultaneously.

Overload Connections.name: Overload Connections
Overload Connections.description:
Requirements At least one creature is connected to the wyspiria's tentacles

Effect The wyspiria maintains their connection. All connected creatures must attempt a @Check[will|dc:30] save.

Critical Success No effect.

Success The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Critical Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 round.

Piercing Signal.name: Piercing Signal
Piercing Signal.description: The wyspiria emits a series of synthesized squeals. Each creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:20] takes @Damage[6d6[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage and @Damage[6d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:30|basic] save) and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} for 1 minute on a failure (or 10 minutes on a critical failure). While a creature is deafened in this way, it also can't understand telepathic communication or any message conveyed by a tech device—for example, the target perceives text on comm units or other digital displays as scrambled text. The wyspiria can't use Piercing Signal again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Piercing Signal]]{1d4 rounds}.

Wyspiria.publicNotes:
Whether they were created by the god Triune, the arc spectra Facilian, or by the Drift itself, wyspirias are a new evolution of spectra first encountered within the last few decades. Metaphysicians often explain wyspirias in contrast against iridias as spectra emissaries; where iridias travel the galaxy to share gifts of technology and information, wyspirias instead come to mortal worlds on a mission to collect and preserve mortal art and knowledge, storing it within themselves or bringing it back to the Drift for reasons as of yet unknown.

Wyspirias' glass-like bodies include a cascade of tentacle-like cords descending from their waists, which they use to plug themselves directly into both people and machines. Because their tentacles can resemble the outstretched roots of a small, floating tree, the librarian spectra are sometimes known as "trees of knowledge." They use their networks to transfer data and share emotional or sensory experiences between participants.

Though accounts of wyspirias appearing on mortal worlds are extremely rare, they've been known to sometimes involve themselves as mediators between warring civilizations. They work to ease tense negotiations at peace talks by connecting the opposing delegates to one another, enabling various parties to experience each other's perspectives. It's widely believed that spectra only dispatch wyspirias to intervene in mortal conflicts when a war could result in the loss of important information, prevent the discovery of future innovations, or interfere with the Drift itself.

In the Great Beyond, time is measured not in hundreds, thousands, or millions of years, but rather in eons—in iterations of reality itself. Only rising to prominence within the last three centuries alongside the advent and proliferation of Drift technology, spectra have thrived in a burgeoning niche of the otherwise stagnant zeitgeist of the Great Beyond.

Though their origins and objectives remain shrouded in mystery, encounters with spectra revolve around new technological discoveries, sharing the knowledge of faster-than-light travel, and protecting the Drift. No one knows if spectra existed before the Drift, but their connection to the hyperspace plane is indisputable. Prominent metaphysicians believe spectra were created as amalgams of raw quintessence pulled into the Drift, just as the Drift itself grows from pieces of the Multiverse. If this is true, spectra's interest in the proliferation of Drift technology takes a subtle sinister turn, as each new Drift engine serves to harvest the Great Beyond and all its denizens for the growth of the Drift and spectra themselves.

Animated Firearm.name: Animated Firearm

Unreliable Tech.name: Unreliable Tech
Unreliable Tech.description: Once an animated firearm is reduced to less than half its Hit Points, or immediately upon being damaged by a critical hit, it becomes permanently @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1} until its Hit Points are fully restored (such as by being Repaired).

Weapon Mode.name: Weapon Mode
Weapon Mode.description: In the hands of its creator, an animated firearm is a commercial laser pistol. The creator can Interact to release the firearm into an adjacent space to act on its own, or to retrieve it from an adjacent space and use it as a weapon.

Stun.name: Stun
Stun.description:
A creature that takes damage from the animated firearm's stun gun must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:15] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2} on a critical failure).

On a critical hit, the target creature uses the outcome one degree of success worse than the result of its roll. On a success, the target is immune to stun for 1 minute.

Animated Firearm.publicNotes:
Animated firearms make for great training aids but can just as easily defend goods and possessions from intruders or serve as hidden sentries.

Objects can be animated in multiple ways for a variety of functions. Since ancient times, weapons and armor have been given life as guardians and sentries through magic or ritual.

Sihedron Guard Thunderstriker.name: Sihedron Guard Thunderstriker

Discharge.name: Discharge
Discharge.description:
You ignite a sudden spark of electricity that surges into a technological creature or object. You de-energize an item with the tech trait or disrupt a creature with the tech trait, with effects based on the target being a creature or object.

  • Creature If your target is a creature with the tech trait, it attempts a Will save. On a failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 1}; on a critical failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{Glitching 2}.
  • Object If you target an attended object, the creature with the object attempts a Will save. On a success, the object loses half of its maximum charges. On a failure, or if you target an unattended object, the object loses all its remaining charges.

Entropy Strike.name: Entropy Strike
Entropy Strike.description:
You unleash a ray of entropy that rapidly and indiscriminately decays matter. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes 5d8 void damage, or it takes 2d6 persistent acid damage and is glitching 1 if it has the tech trait. On a critical hit, double the damage, and if the creature has the tech trait, it's glitching 2 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1 die.

Acid Grip.name: 强酸爪 Acid Grip
Acid Grip.description:
长有利爪的手突然出现，抓住并以魔法的强酸灼烧目标。目标承受2d8酸蚀伤害，以及@Damage[floor(@item.level/2)d6[persistent,acid]]伤害，基于其反射豁免。由于此法术承受持续伤害的生物在速度上获得-10尺状态减值。@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.6TGcfVyzzVHEo7ke]{Spell Effect: Acid Grip}

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功该生物承受一半伤害，并且不承受持续伤害，飞爪可以按照你的选择往一个方向移动它至多5尺。

失败 该生物承受完整伤害和持续伤害，飞爪可以按照你的选择往一个方向移动它至多10尺。

大失败 该生物承受双倍伤害和完整持续伤害，飞爪可以按照你的选择往一个方向移动它至多20尺。

升阶（+2） 初始伤害增加2d8、持续酸蚀伤害增加1d6。

Blur.name: 朦胧术 Blur
Blur.description: 目标的形态变得模糊不清。它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}。由于该效果的原理，目标的位置仍然是显然的，目标不能使用该隐蔽来躲藏或潜行。

Analyze Target.name: Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Command.name: 命令术 Command
Command.description:
你喊出一句难以被忽视的命令。你可以命令目标接近你，逃离你（如同获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing}状态），扔下持有物，俯卧@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，或者站立在原地。它不能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.A72nHGUtNXgY5Ey9]{延后 Delay}或者使用任何反应动作，直到它服从你的命令为止。法术效果基于目标的意志豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 作为该生物下个回合的第一个动作，其必须用一个单动作来完成你的命令。

大失败 目标必须使用其下个回合的全部动作来完成你的命令。

升阶（5环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Grease.name: 油腻术 Grease
Grease.description:
你创造一片油，选择区域或是目标。

  • 区域 [4个连续的5尺方格] 区域中的所有坚实地面覆盖上一层油。在油滑的表面上站立的生物必须尝试成功通过一次对抗你法术DC的反射或者特技检定，否则@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。在法术持续时间内，使用动作移动到油滑表面上的生物必须尝试一次反射豁免或者特技检定来@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.M76ycLAqHoAgbcej]{Balance}。快步或者爬行的生物无需尝试检定或者豁免。
  • 目标 [一个1负载或者更低的物体] 如果你对无主物品施放该法术，任何尝试捡起该物体的人必须成功尝试一次对抗你法术DC的特技检定或者反射豁免才能如此做。如果你以被持有的物品为目标，拥有该物品的生物必须尝试一次特技检定或者反射豁免。失败时，持握者或者持用者在使用该物体的所有检定上承受-2环境减值；在大失败时，持握者或者持用者会掉落该物品。该物品会掉落在一个由GM选择的相邻方格内。如果你对一个穿戴物品施放该法术，穿戴者在对抗擒拿他的强韧豁免上获得+2环境加值。

Overheat.name: Overheat
Overheat.description:
You vent heat toward a nearby target. You deal 2d6 fire damage to the target. On a failed save, the target's held equipment becomes hot to the touch for the next round. Unless the target drops its currently held equipment at the start of its turn, it takes @Damage[(3*@item.rank)[fire]] damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6. Increase the damage of touching affected objects by 3.

Ricochet.name: Ricochet
Ricochet.description:
A spinning disk or smooth orb of shimmering steel leaps from one target to another. You deal 2d4 bludgeoning or slashing damage (with a basic Reflex save).

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Shield.name: Shield
Shield.description:
你举起一面力场构成的魔法护盾。这视同你使用了举起盾牌动作，赋予你在AC上的+1环境加值，直到你的下个回合开始，但这里不需要手来使用。

当该法术生效时，你可以使用你的魔法护盾来进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡 Shield Block}反应动作。该盾牌具有硬度5。你可以使用该法术的反应动作来减少任何来自法术或者魔法效果的伤害，即使这不造成物理伤害。在你使用盾牌格挡后，该法术结束，并且你无法在10分钟内再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾术免疫}

升阶（+2） 该盾牌的硬度增加5。

Sure Strike.name: 料敌机先 Sure Strike
Sure Strike.description:
在你的回合结束前，你下一次尝试攻击骰时，骰两次并使用较好的结果。该攻击会忽视对攻击骰的环境减值，以及其他任何目标@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}所导致的纯骰检定。然后你临时免疫料敌机先10分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{Spell Effect: Sure Strike}

Telekinetic Projectile.name: 念动射弹 Telekinetic Projectile
Telekinetic Projectile.description:
你向目标射出区域中一个未固定的，无主的，1负载1以下的物体。对目标尝试一次法术攻击骰。如果你命中，你造成2d6的钝击，穿刺，或者挥砍伤害（对应于你所扔出的物体）。射出物体的特殊特征或者魔法特性不会影响该攻击或者伤害。

大成功 你造成双倍伤害。

成功 你造成完整伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d6。

Frag Grenade (Tactical).name: Frag Grenade (Tactical)
Frag Grenade (Tactical).description:
Activate 1 Area Fire

Critical @Damage[1d4[bleed]]

These fragmentary grenades explode in a cloud of shrapnel and deal 2d8 piercing damage in a @Template[burst|distance:10] with a @Check[reflex|against:class|basic] save.

Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Tactical).name: Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Tactical)
Undermounted Grenade Launcher (Tactical).description:
This bracket-mounted grenade launcher is most often advertised for use with fragmentation grenades, but can efficiently deploy utility ordinances, such as smoke grenades and flashbangs. Unlike a dedicated grenade launcher, it takes 10 minutes to load an undermounted grenade launcher, reassembling the grenade into ammunition by mounting it on a specialized reusable firing cap. Once a grenade has been loaded, it can only be safely removed by disassembling the entire grenade, destroying it in the process.

This grenade launcher has a range of 30 feet and the tracking +1 trait.

Activate—Launch 1 (attack)

Effect You launch the loaded grenade.

Spell Gem of Thunderstrike (Rank 3).name: Spell Gem of Thunderstrike (Rank 3)
Spell Gem of Thunderstrike (Rank 3).description:
@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.zDJS8E66UI0himqV]{Thunderstrike}

These latticed gemstones are suspended in a silicon casing and encoded with the magical script necessary to cast a single, specific spell. Casting a spell from a spell gem requires holding the gem in one hand and activating it with a Cast a Spell activity using the normal number of actions for that spell. The spell must appear on your spell list. Because you're the one Casting the Spell, use your spell attack modifier and spell DC. The spell must be of your spellcasting tradition. The spell in a spell gem can be cast only once, and the spell gem is destroyed as part of the casting. Spell gems can't contain cantrips or rituals. The traits for this item vary based on the spell it contains.

Activate Cast a Spell

Effect You Cast the Spell at the indicated rank.

Launch.name: Launch
Launch.description: undermounted frag grenade (@Template[type:burst|distance:10], consumable, range 30 feet, tech, tracking +1), Damage @Damage[2d8[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:23|basic] save; @Damage[1d4[persistent,bleed]|options:area-damage] damage on critical failure)

Navigational Spellshape.name: Navigational Spellshape
Navigational Spellshape.description: The aeon guard Flies using their jetpack, tracing arcane sigils through the air with their motion to empower their spells. If the next action the aeon guard uses is to Cast a Spell that has a range, increase that spell's range by 30 feet. In addition, if the spell requires an attack roll or a Reflex save, any targets of the spell that have lesser cover reduce the bonuses they gain from cover by 1 against the spell.

Sihedron Guard Thunderstriker.publicNotes: Sihedron Guard thunderstrikers, so named for one of their most common forms of attack, serve as air support for units of Aeon and Sihedron Guards. They bombard enemies with magic and explosives to force their targets out of defensive positions and into firing range for the rest of their squad. They also frequently execute extraction missions, whether getting an important asset to safety or capturing an enemy for interrogation.

Empathnid.name: Empathnid

Emotionsense.name: Emotionsense
Emotionsense.description: This is a precise sense against creatures under an emotion effect or in the grips of overwhelming emotions (at the GM's discretion). Against other creatures, this is an imprecise sense. Creatures immune to emotion or mental effects or under the effects of a calm spell are undetectable by emotionsense.

Moral Support.name: Moral Support
Moral Support.description: Allies sharing the same space as the empathnid receive a +1 circumstance bonus on saving throws against emotion and mental effects.

Stabilizing Antivenom.name: Stabilizing Antivenom
Stabilizing Antivenom.description:
Frequency once per day

Requirements The empathnid is sharing a space with a creature with the dying condition

Effect The empathnid injects its proto-venom into the creature. That creature loses the dying condition, though it remains @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} at 0 Hit Points.

Empathnid.publicNotes:
Empathnids take a liking to those who show them genuine empathy. While they usually avoid combat, empathnids jump into action if their friends are threatened.

Empathnids have tremendous empathy for other creatures. The fact that the 8-inch spidery creatures come in a variety of colors and have a lifesaving venom likely explains why they're frequently used as companions or pets across the Pact Worlds.

Hardlight Scamp.name: Hardlight Scamp

Blur.name: 朦胧术 Blur
Blur.description: 目标的形态变得模糊不清。它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}。由于该效果的原理，目标的位置仍然是显然的，目标不能使用该隐蔽来躲藏或潜行。

Figment.name: 虚构幻术 Figment
Figment.description:
你创造出简单的声音或图像的幻术。声音会为法术添加听觉特征，且不能包含能被理解的单词或复杂的音乐。图像会为法术添加视觉特征，但是它不能大于5尺边长的立方体，且在15尺的距离内观察会发现它的构造明显很粗糙且缺乏细节。当你施放或维持该法术时，你能尝试用幻术让人@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{分神 Create a Diversion}，这会为你的欺骗检定提供+2环境加值。若对某个生物进行的此尝试失败了，该生物就不会相信虚构幻术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{法术效果：虚构幻术}

Ricochet.name: Ricochet
Ricochet.description:
A spinning disk or smooth orb of shimmering steel leaps from one target to another. You deal 2d4 bludgeoning or slashing damage (with a basic Reflex save).

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Freeze.name: Freeze
Freeze.description: The hardlight scamp holds perfectly still so it appears as a normal hologram and becomes hidden. A hardlight scamp can Freeze even while being observed and counts as being @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Holospark.name: Holospark
Holospark.description: The hardlight scamp shoots sparks at a creature within 60 feet. The target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:17] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round (1 minute on a critical failure).

Hardlight Scamp.publicNotes:
These creatures typically resemble the ad or media they were born from, though they often also resemble bat-like elemental scamps, thus earning their name.

Unlike normal holograms, hardlight life-forms are tangible, living entities.

Atlapak.name: Atlapak

Aerial Buoyancy.name: Aerial Buoyancy
Aerial Buoyancy.description: The atlapak can "swim" through the air in a thick atmosphere by inflating its lightweight body. Its fly Speed is reduced by half in a normal atmosphere, and it loses its fly Speed entirely while in an environment with a thin atmosphere or no atmosphere.

Cavitation Blast.name: Cavitation Blast
Cavitation Blast.description:
The atlapak makes a sonic snap Strike with a +1 circumstance bonus to its attack roll. The range increment for this Strike increases to 125 feet, and the Strike ignores up to 5 Hardness, or 250 feet and 10 Hardness in a thick atmosphere.

On a critical hit, the target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:23] or @Check[fortitude|dc:25] save in a thick atmosphere.

Success The target is unaffected.

Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Dense Atmosphere Dependent.name: Dense Atmosphere Dependent
Dense Atmosphere Dependent.description: An atlapak's sonic snap is most effective in thick atmosphere or underwater. In normal or thin atmosphere, the range increments of its Cavitation Blast and sonic snap Strike are reduced by half, its Cavitation Blast ignores only up to 5 Hardness, and the DC for its Cavitation Blast decreases by 2. An atlapak's sonic snap Strike can't function in environments with no atmosphere.

Atlapak.publicNotes:
Atlapaks are aquatic ambush predators renowned for their ability to create a sonic pulse that can stun or kill targets from hundreds of feet away. These enormous arthropods have banded shells, three compound eyes on movable stalks, a dexterous right claw for grasping and tearing, and an oversized, highly specialized left claw that generates a cavitation bubble when it snaps shut, which then implodes with crushing force. The atlapak uses plates on its carapace to direct the resulting sonic burst toward prey with uncanny accuracy.

Despite their animalistic intelligence, atlapaks have an instinctive understanding of ballistics and fluid dynamics. Their antennae detect subtle changes in currents and fluid density, allowing them to detect moving targets from a great distance and calibrate their cavitation blasts accordingly. Their compound eyes detect multiple wavelengths of light and provide incredible depth perception comparable to advanced sniper scopes.

Atlapaks prefer sheltered burrows that provide commanding views, such as coral reefs or low hills where they can conceal themselves and pick off prey at a distance. Though they typically stay in the silt of their underwater lairs, atlapaks can range far to mate. Historically, a spawning atlapak sticks fertilized eggs onto migrating megafauna that carry their offspring to new environs with unclaimed territory and resources. In the modern era, this behavior has led to eggs being stuck to the hulls of ships, where they can survive even in humid terrestrial environments. Juvenile atlapaks sometimes haunt a jungle or coast before returning to the safety of the ocean.

Atlapaks can grow up to 10 feet long, while juveniles are typically at least 5 feet long. Their predatory instincts kick in almost immediately after birth.

Cosmic Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).name: Cosmic Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster)

Eclipse Burst.name: 噬星爆发 Eclipse Burst
Eclipse Burst.description:
一个冰寒漆黑的球体在区域中爆炸，对区域中的生物造成8d10寒冷伤害，以及对活物8d4额外虚能伤害。在区域中的每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。

如果该球体覆盖了一个魔法光源的区域，或者影响了一个会受到魔法光照影响的生物，噬星会尝试反制光亮效果。

大成功 该生物或者物体不受影响。

成功 该生物或者物体承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物或者物体承受完整伤害。

大失败 该生物或者物体承受双倍伤害。如果它是生物，他会因这黑暗而 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲 Blinded}，持续时间无限。

升阶（+1） 该寒冷伤害增加1d10，并且对活物的虚能伤害增加1d4。

Sunburst.name: 阳炎爆 Sunburst
Sunburst.description:
强力而耀眼的球状日光在区域中爆开，对该区域中的生物造成8d10火焰伤害，以及对不死生物造成额外@Damage[(@item.level+1)d10[vitality]]伤害。在该区域中的每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受完整伤害。

大失败 该生物承受完整伤害，并且永久 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲 Blinded} 。

如果阳炎爆的球状区域与魔法黑暗的区域部分重叠，则会尝试反制该黑暗效果。

升阶（+1） 该火焰伤害增加1d10，并且对不死生物的命能伤害增加1d10。

Repulsion.name: 排斥术 Repulsion
Repulsion.description:
你创造一个令生物无法接近你的灵光。当施放该法术时，你可以令区域为任何你所选择的半径，至多40尺。当你施放该法术时位于区域中的生物，以及在法术生效时进入该区域的生物必须尝试一次意志豁免。生物尝试过该豁免后，对于这次施放的排斥术总使用相同的结果。仅当生物自愿向你移动时，任何对其的移动限制才会生效。例如，如果你移动靠近一个生物，它不需要走远。

大成功 该生物的移动不受影响。

成功 该生物移动靠近你时，将区域中的每一格视为困难地形。

失败 在该区域中，该生物无法移动靠近你。

Truesight.name: 真景术 Truesight
Truesight.description: 你可以看见60尺内的事物的本来面貌。GM秘密骰反制检定，对抗区域中的所有幻术或者变形效果，但这只会决定你是否能看破它（例如，如果该检定成功对抗了一个变形法术，你可以看见该生物的本来形态，但你不会结束该变形法术）。

X-Ray Vision.name: X-Ray Vision
X-Ray Vision.description: You empower yourself to see through most materials and walls within 60 feet. Your sight is blocked by 2 feet of wood or plastic, 1 foot of stone, 2 inches of common metal, or any amount of lead or any starmetal, and you can only see in black and white.

Banishment.name: 放逐术 Banishment
Banishment.description:
你将目标送回其原属位面。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。你可以在施放该法术的过程中花费一个额外行动，为该法术添加一个消耗，令该生物在其豁免上承受-2环境减值。此消耗必须是专门收集的一些属于该生物的禁忌（anathema）的物品。如果你施放该法术时未处于你的原属位面，该法术失败。

大成功 该生物成功抵抗被放逐，同时你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}.

成功 该生物成功抵抗被放逐。

失败 目标被放逐。

大失败 该生物被放逐，并且在一周内无法通过任何办法回到被放逐前的位面。

升阶（9环级） 你能以至多10个生物作为目标。额外的消耗影响那些构成禁忌（anathema）的目标。

Sending.name: 短讯术 Sending
Sending.description: 你向该生物发送一段25词或者更短的精神信息，并且它能够立即回复一段由他所编纂的25词或者更短的信息。

Truespeech (constant).name: Truespeech (constant)
Truespeech (constant).description:
无论什么语言，目标都可以理解其所有的词语，并且向其他生物用该语言交流。当处于一群各异的生物中时，每次目标将要说话，他可以选择一个生物，并使用一种该生物理解的语言来讲述，即使该目标不知道这语言具体是什么。

升阶（7环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Planar Tether.name: 次元拴绳 Planar Tether
Planar Tether.description:
你将目标固定到其当前位面。当目标受到次元拴绳影响时，该法术会尝试反制任何传送效果，以及任何移动目标到另一个位面的效果。次元拴绳的持续时间由目标的意志豁免决定。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 该持续时间为1分钟。

失败 该持续时间为10分钟。

大失败 该持续时间为1小时。

Heroism.name: 英雄气概 Heroism
Heroism.description:
你解放了目标内在的英勇，赋予其在攻击骰，察觉检定，豁免骰和技能检定上的+1状态加值。

升阶（6环级） 该状态加值增加到+2。

升阶（9环级） 该状态加值增加到+3。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.l9HRQggofFGIxEse]{法术效果：英雄气概}

Life Seal (at will).name: Life Seal (at will)
Life Seal (at will).description:
Trigger A creature within range enters an environment that would be harmful to it.

A shimmering bubble envelops the target's body, allowing it to breathe normally in a vacuum or other unsafe environment and protecting it from severe temperatures and radiation.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 5 additional creatures to gain protection against the environment the triggering creature entered. The spell lasts for 8 hours and also protects against extreme temperatures and radiation.

Heightened (10th) You can target up to 10 additional creatures to gain protection against the environment the triggering creature entered. The spell lasts until your next daily preparations and also protects against incredible temperatures and radiation.

Calm.name: 安定心神 Calm
Calm.description:
你令区域内的生物强制冷静，令它们进入平和的状态；每个生物必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 对沉静的渴求令该生物在攻击骰上承受-1状态减值。

失败 任何会影响该生物的情绪效果会被压制，并且该生物无法进行敌对行为。如果该目标成为任何其他生物敌对行为的目标，它不再受到安定心神的影响。

大失败 如同失败，但是敌对行为不会结束该效果。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Qr5rgoZvI4KmFY0N]{法术效果：安定心神}

Cleanse Affliction.name: 净化苦难 Cleanse Affliction
Cleanse Affliction.description:
温和的恢复魔法消除毒素和更糟糕的疾害。选择目标的一个苦难，例如诅咒、疾病、或者毒素。如果它已经超过阶段1，减少1个阶段。直到某一次苦难被完全治愈之前，对于这次苦难，这种减少只能生效一次。尽管这种减少不能再次发生，升阶版本的该法术每次施法都能尝试反制它。

升阶（3环级） 如果苦难是疾病或者毒素，尝试反制它。

升阶（4环级） 如果苦难是诅咒、疾病或者毒素，尝试反制它。

Clear Mind.name: 清神醒脑 Clear Mind
Clear Mind.description:
You drive mental contamination from the target's mind. Attempt to counteract an effect of your choice imposing one of these conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied}. If you failed to counteract the effect but you would have if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed. This spell can't counteract or suppress conditions that are part of curses, diseases, or a natural state of the target.

Heightened (4th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (6th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (8th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} to the list of conditions.

Environmental Endurance.name: 忍受环境 Environmental Endurance
Environmental Endurance.description:
你保护目标对抗危险气温。选择严寒或炎热。目标不受你选择的气温的影响，但这对极寒和极热无效。

升阶（3环级） 目标受到保护，免遭严寒或炎热影响。

升阶（5环级） 目标受到保护，免遭严寒、炎热、极寒和极热影响。

Resist Energy.name: 抵抗能量伤害 Resist Energy
Resist Energy.description:
元素护盾保护一个生物免受某一种类型能量的伤害。选择酸蚀，寒冷，电击，火焰或者音波伤害。目标和其装备获得对你所选择伤害类型的抗力5。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.con2Hzt47JjpuUej]{法术效果：抵抗能量伤害}

升阶（4环级） 该抗力增加到10，并且你能以至多两个生物为目标。

升阶（7环级） 该抗力增加到15，并且你能以至多五个生物为目标。

See the Unseen.name: 识破无形 See the Unseen
See the Unseen.description:
你的目光穿透了幻术，发现了隐形生物和魂灵。你能看到@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}生物，就如同它们并未隐形一般，然而它们的体征仍然很模糊，使得它们具有@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}并且难以被识别。你还能看到虚体生物，比如幽灵，你能通过透视物体的内部来看到虚体生物，在物体表面下10尺内的此类生物会显现为经过分层的模糊轮廓。对细节更强的洞察力还让你在作出不相信幻术的检定时，获得+2状态加值。

升阶（5环级） 持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：识破无形}

Status.name: 关照术 Status
Status.description:
只要你和目标处于相同的位面，并且均活着，你就会一直知晓其当前状态。你知晓目标和你相对的方向，与你的距离，以及任何正影响其的状态。

升阶（4环级） 该法术的射程增加到30尺，并且你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Translate.name: 通译语言 Translate
Translate.description:
在你施放该法术时，目标会理解其正听到或者阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会令其能够理解密文，使用隐喻表达的含义，或者类似的内容（由GM所判定）。如果目标能够听见数种语言并且了解该情况，它能选择要理解的那种语言；否则，随机选择这种语言。

升阶（3环级） 该目标也能使用该语言交流。

升阶（4环级） 你能以至多10个生物作为目标，并且这些目标也能使用该语言交流。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Forbidding Ward.name: 严厉护卫 Forbidding Ward
Forbidding Ward.description:
你保护一个盟友，以抵御目标敌人的攻击和敌对法术。目标盟友在对抗目标敌人的攻击，法术和其他效果上对护甲等级获得+1状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.ctMxYPGEpstvhW9C]{法术效果：严厉护卫}

升阶（6环级） 该状态加值增加到+2。

Guidance.name: 神导术 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你请求超自然存在的引导，赋予目标在持续时间结束前的一次攻击骰，察觉检定，豁免骰，或者技能检定上获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择是否使用该加值。如果目标使用该加值，该法术结束。无论怎样结束，该目标接下来会暂时免疫1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：神导术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：神导术免疫}

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导命能，以治疗活物或者伤害不死生物。如果目标是自愿活物 ，你回复这个数量的生命值。如果目标是不死生物，你对其造成1d8命能伤害，并且它可以进行基础强韧豁免。你在施放该法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标，范围，区域和其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 （专注） 该法术的射程为30尺。如果你在治疗一个活物，回复的生命值增加8。

3 （专注） 你在@Template[emanation|distance:30]内释放命能。这会以区域中所有活物和不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗或者伤害的量增加1d8，两个动作版本的额外治疗增加8。

Infuse Vitality.name: 灌注命能 Infuse Vitality
Infuse Vitality.description:
你使用命能增强攻击。目标的数量等于你施放该法术时花费的动作数量。每个目标的无武装和武器打击额外造成1d4命能伤害。（该伤害通常只会伤害不死生物）。如果你具有圣洁（holy）特征，你可以将该特征附加到受到该法术影响的打击上。

升阶（3环级） 该伤害增加到2d4。

升阶（5环级） 该伤害增加到3d4。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.X7RD0JRxhJV9u2LC]{法术效果：灌注命能}

Reorient.name: Reorient
Reorient.description: Applying a combination of vital energy and acupressure, you help the target regain its footing. The target loses the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} condition if it has it. The target becomes immune to the off-guard condition until the start of your next turn, even if the condition would be circumstantially applied, such as by being flanked or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. The target is then immune to reorient for 10 minutes.

Sanctuary.name: 庇护术 Sanctuary
Sanctuary.description:
你引动防护能量，保护一个生物抵御攻击。尝试攻击该目标的生物必须每次尝试一次意志豁免骰。如果目标使用敌对动作，该法术结束。

大成功 庇护术结束。

成功 生物可以尝试其攻击，以及该轮中的其他对该目标的任何其他攻击。

失败 目标无法攻击，并且该动作被浪费。它在该轮中无法继续对目标尝试攻击。

大失败 该目标浪费该动作，并且在庇护术剩余持续时间中均无法尝试攻击目标。

Spirit Link.name: 灵魂链接 Spirit Link
Spirit Link.description:
你和其他生物建立了一条灵魂链接，令你代为承受其苦痛。当你施放该法术，以及在你回合开始时，如果目标生命值低于其最大生命值，它回复2生命值（或者其当前生命值和最大生命值的差值，如果这更低）。你失去等于目标回复量的生命值。

这是一种基于灵魂的转移，所以没有任何效果会增加目标获得的生命值或者减少你失去的生命值。这种转移也会忽略你或者目标所拥有的任何临时生命值。由于该效果中没有任何命能或者虚能作用，灵魂链接在你或者目标为不死生物时也生效。在持续时间中，你不会从再生或者快速治疗中受益。你可以解消该法术，并且一旦你为0生命值，灵魂链接自动结束。

升阶（+1） 每次转移的生命值增加2。

Stabilize.name: 稳定伤势 Stabilize
Stabilize.description: 生命能量将目标从鬼门关拉回。目标失去 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死 Dying} 状态，但它仍然 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识 Unconscious}，并为0生命值。

+2 status to all saves vs. divine.name: +2 status to all saves vs. divine

Attunement Aura.name: Attunement Aura
Attunement Aura.description: 60 feet. All allied creatures in the aura gain a +5-foot status bonus to Speeds (if the dragon is photon-attuned), or all enemies take a –5-foot status penalty to Speeds (if the dragon is graviton-attuned).

Cosmic Attunement.name: Cosmic Attunement
Cosmic Attunement.description:
The cosmic dragon is always attuned to an underlying stellar force: either photons or gravitons. They can swap attunement as a free action once at the start of their turn in combat and is otherwise attuned to whichever force they choose at any time outside of combat. The dragon's melee Strikes deal an additional @Damage[2d6[fire]] damage while they're photon-attuned and an additional @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage plus Knockdown while they're graviton-attuned. The damage of their cosmic blast Strike is likewise determined by their current attunement, as are the effects of some of their other abilities. The dragon can choose to exclude any creatures from any effect of the aura or action that uses the aura.

The dragon can always sense the distance and direction to the nearest Drift beacon and to the Starstone on Absalom Station.

Stellar Breath.name: Stellar Breath
Stellar Breath.description: The dragon unleashes divine power like that from the core of a star or black hole, dealing @Damage[10d10[spirit]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:40] (@Check[will|dc:34|basic] save). The dragon can't use Stellar Breath for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Stellar Mote.name: Stellar Mote
Stellar Mote.description: The dragon conjures a mote of stellar energy that shares their current attunement. They direct the mote to a square within 90 feet. While the mote is deployed, the dragon's attunement aura also emanates from that square, with the same emanation radius. The dragon can Sustain to move the mote up to 90 feet or to recall the mote from any distance. The mote is made of cosmic energy, doesn't occupy a space, and can't be targeted or destroyed by any effect.

Stellar Pulse.name: Stellar Pulse
Stellar Pulse.description:
The dragon imposes an effect on creatures within their attunement aura. The effect is based on the dragon's current attunement. The dragon can't use Stellar Pulse again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Stellar Pulse]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Graviton Each creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:34] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round.

  • Photon Each creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} and can use the extra action only to Stride or Strike.

Cosmic Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).publicNotes: These majestic dragons embody the stellar forces that underly and balance all that exists in the universe. Cosmic dragons are wise, social, and patient beings, accepting of all whom they come across; they see all creatures as equal components of the universe and are just as likely to be found discussing astrophysics in the company of scholars as they are to be found lamenting the twists and turns of fate in the company of the downtrodden. Most cosmic dragons can change their shape, though they usually only do so to make other creatures comfortable. They detest deception and always introduce themselves as dragons even while in another form.

Contingency.name: 触发术 Contingency
Contingency.description:
你准备好一个法术，其可以在之后被触发。当施放触发术时，你可以施放另一个4环级或者更低的法术，施法时间不超过3个动作。这个伴随的法术必须是影响你的法术。你必须在设定触发术时，为该法术决定任何需要决定的选项，例如选择抵抗能量的伤害类型。在施放时，选择一个该法术会被施放的触发条件，限制如同准备动作的触发条件。当触发术被施放后，你可以如同具有该触发条件的准备动作一般，令伴随法术生效。该法术只影响你，即使它通常可以影响更多生物。如果你定义了复杂的条件，触发可能会失败，这由GM决定。如果你施放触发术，新的触发术会取代旧的。

升阶（8环级） 你可以选择5环级或者更低的法术。

升阶（9环级） 你可以选择6环级或者更低的法术。

升阶（10环级） 你可以选择7环级或者更低的法术。

Retrocognition.name: 回溯过去 Retrocognition
Retrocognition.description:
你开启神识以接受心灵回响，并获得过去在你所在位置发生的事情的印象。回溯过去会显示从前一天到法术持续时间前一分钟所发生事件的心灵印象，然后会显示再前一天到再前一分钟，以此类推。这些回响并不会如图像一般展现，但是会展示一些表现此时的情绪和对过去情况的晦涩暗示的印象。如果你通过一个印象看到了痛苦或混乱的事件，你必须通过一个DC30甚至50的意志豁免，由该时间的严重程度决定，否则该法术结束。GM决定该时间是否痛苦，并决定该DC。

升阶（8环级） 你每分钟专注会获得在之前一年发生的事件的印象，而不是之前一天的，但细节非常模糊，令你更难从所有事件中找到最为重要的那个。

升阶（9环级） 你每分钟专注会获得在之前一世纪发生的事件的印象，而不是之前一天的，但细节非常模糊，令你更难从所有事件中找到最为重要的那个。

True Target.name: 洞烛机先 True Target
True Target.description:
你深入后续数秒的可能未来，以此了解敌人可能避免伤害的各种手段，并该未来的影像投射在你的身周。指定一个生物。在洞烛机先持续时间中，每个目标对此生物进行的第一次攻击骰，攻击者骰两次并使用较好结果。该攻击者也会忽视对攻击骰的环境减值，以及其他任何指定的生物由于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}所导致的纯骰检定。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.HuvucQ5nfpuVWNrw]{Spell Effect: True Target}

Call Spirit.name: 呼唤精魂 Call Spirit
Call Spirit.description:
你掀开了彼世与此世的界限，将精魂（spirit）从其安息之地唤起。你必须呼唤精魂的名字，而且必须准备与精魂相关的物件，比如它生前的随身物品、衣服、或者取自它尸体的残骸。不愿回应你的呼唤的精魂能够尝试1次意志豁免来拒绝；豁免大成功时，另一个骗子精魂会装做你所呼唤的精魂来回应呼唤。如果精魂生前没有见过你，那么它抵抗呼唤的意志豁免DC会降低2点。无论如何，精魂会出现在你面前，其缥缈的外观就如同你想要呼唤的生物一样。在持续时间内的每一分钟，你都能够问精魂一个问题。它会以自己喜欢的方式回答，甚至可以拒绝回答。若精魂不在来世（比如它现在是不死生物）的话，大失败之外的其他结果都会使用仪式失败的效果。

大成功 精魂会十分配合你，哪怕它具有足够的理由来欺骗你，也会在欺骗检定中承受-2的环境减值。

成功 你能够呼唤精魂。

失败 你未能呼唤精魂。

大失败 一个或更多的邪恶精魂（evil spirits）出现并对你发起攻击。

Truespeech (constant).name: Truespeech (constant)
Truespeech (constant).description:
无论什么语言，目标都可以理解其所有的词语，并且向其他生物用该语言交流。当处于一群各异的生物中时，每次目标将要说话，他可以选择一个生物，并使用一种该生物理解的语言来讲述，即使该目标不知道这语言具体是什么。

升阶（7环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Read Omens.name: 阅读机运 Read Omens
Read Omens.description: 你窥视未来。选择一个会在1周内发生的特定目的，事件，或者活动。你会获得一段晦涩的线索或者建议，它通常是诗歌或者预言，并且会在选择的事件中帮助到你。

Talking Corpse.name: 死者交谈 Talking Corpse
Talking Corpse.description:
你赋予目标尸体生命的要素，令其能够回答三个你向它提出的问题。该法术会唤起身躯的潜在记忆，而不是唤回目标已经死去的灵魂，所以该法术需要该尸体基本完好才能运作。尸体受到的损伤越多，其回答的笼统与拼凑程度也就越大，并且它必须要有嘴和喉咙才有可能说话。如果任何人在一周内已经对该尸体施放了该法术，该法术会自动失败。该尸体可以尝试一次意志豁免来抵抗回答该问题，使用其原本生物在死亡时的数据，并且有下列效果。

大成功 目标可以撒谎或者拒绝回答你的问题，并且该目标的灵魂会对你作祟24小时，不断干扰你，令你在此期间无法获得任何休息。

成功 目标可以提供错误的信息，或者拒绝回答你的问题。

失败 目标必须如实回答问题，但它的回答可以是简短的，谜语般的，重复的。它仍然可以误导你，或者尝试拖延时间，以令在你问完所有问题之前法术持续时间耗尽。

大失败 如同失败，但是目标的答案会更加直接，很少重复，但仍然如同谜语。在它欺骗和误导你的欺骗检定上承受-2状态减值。

Translocate.name: 次元移位 Translocate
Translocate.description:
你立即将自身以及自己正在穿戴和持有的物品从当前空间转移走，移动至法术射程内你能看到的未被占据的空间。如果这将会带着其他生物与你一同移动——即便你把该生物放置在异次元容器中——你就会失去该法术。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至1英里。你不需要看到目的地，只要你曾经去过目的地，并且知晓该地点与你相对的位置以及距离即可。之后你会在1小时内临时免疫该法术。

Haste.name: 加速术 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法强化了目标，令其行动迅速。它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}状态，并且每轮可以使用该额外动作以打击或者行走。

升阶（7环级） 你能以至多6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速术}

Slow.name: 缓慢术 Slow
Slow.description:
你令目标周围的时间膨胀，令其行动缓慢。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1} ，持续1轮。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 2}，持续1分钟。

升阶（6环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Augury.name: 卜筮术 Augury
Augury.description:
你能够粗略地窥见未来。在施放该法术期间，询问特定行动方式的结果。法术能够至多未来30分钟内的结果，并使用后述结果揭示出GM得出的最有可能的猜想：吉、凶、兼（结果将是好与坏的混合）、以及平（不会产生特别好或者坏的结果）。

GM投掷一次@Check[flat|dc:6|showDC:all|traits:secret]检定。失败时，结果总是“平”。这使得它人无法判断“平”的结果究竟是否准确。若有任何人在另一次施法过程中询问的问题与首次卜筮术具有相同的主题，那么GM要使用与首次施法相同的秘密检定结果。不过，在情况改变时，也有可能得到不同的结果。

Blur.name: 朦胧术 Blur
Blur.description: 目标的形态变得模糊不清。它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}。由于该效果的原理，目标的位置仍然是显然的，目标不能使用该隐蔽来躲藏或潜行。

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description: 你干扰法术或者效果中的魔法力量。尝试一次反制检定，对抗目标。如果你成功对抗一个法术效果，你将其反制。如果你成功对抗一个魔法物品，该物品成为该类型的普通物品，持续10分钟。这不会改变物体的非魔法性质。如果目标是一件神器或者类似的物品，你自动失败。

See the Unseen.name: 识破无形 See the Unseen
See the Unseen.description:
你的目光穿透了幻术，发现了隐形生物和魂灵。你能看到@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}生物，就如同它们并未隐形一般，然而它们的体征仍然很模糊，使得它们具有@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}并且难以被识别。你还能看到虚体生物，比如幽灵，你能通过透视物体的内部来看到虚体生物，在物体表面下10尺内的此类生物会显现为经过分层的模糊轮廓。对细节更强的洞察力还让你在作出不相信幻术的检定时，获得+2状态加值。

升阶（5环级） 持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：识破无形}

See the Unseen (constant).name: See the Unseen (constant)
See the Unseen (constant).description:
你的目光穿透了幻术，发现了隐形生物和魂灵。你能看到@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}生物，就如同它们并未隐形一般，然而它们的体征仍然很模糊，使得它们具有@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}并且难以被识别。你还能看到虚体生物，比如幽灵，你能通过透视物体的内部来看到虚体生物，在物体表面下10尺内的此类生物会显现为经过分层的模糊轮廓。对细节更强的洞察力还让你在作出不相信幻术的检定时，获得+2状态加值。

升阶（5环级） 持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：识破无形}

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Divine Lance.name: 圣枪术 Divine Lance
Divine Lance.description:
你施放一道神圣能量的射线。对目标尝试一次远程法术攻击，对抗目标的AC。命中时，该目标承受2d4精魂伤害（在重击时造成双倍伤害）。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d4。

Injury Echo.name: Injury Echo
Injury Echo.description:
You manifest an injury from the future or past to harm a creature in the present. Choose bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage. The target takes 1d8 of the selected damage type with a basic Will save. If the target fails its save and then takes the same type of damage before the end of your next turn, it takes an additional @Damage[ceil((@item.level)/2)d4[persistent,bleed]] damage.

Heightened (+2) The initial damage increases by 1d8, and the persistent damage on a failure increases by 1d4.

Shield.name: Shield
Shield.description:
你举起一面力场构成的魔法护盾。这视同你使用了举起盾牌动作，赋予你在AC上的+1环境加值，直到你的下个回合开始，但这里不需要手来使用。

当该法术生效时，你可以使用你的魔法护盾来进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡 Shield Block}反应动作。该盾牌具有硬度5。你可以使用该法术的反应动作来减少任何来自法术或者魔法效果的伤害，即使这不造成物理伤害。在你使用盾牌格挡后，该法术结束，并且你无法在10分钟内再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾术免疫}

升阶（+2） 该盾牌的硬度增加5。

Second Skin.name: 着甲如肤 Second Skin
Second Skin.description:
Upgrades: 0

Soft but resilient fabric contours perfectly to the wearer's body, offering basic protection without sacrificing comfort. Second skin is commonly worn underneath casual clothing.

Change Shape.name: 变身 Change Shape
Change Shape.description: A temporai can take the appearance of any Small, Medium, or Large humanoid. This doesn't change their Speed or their attack and damage modifiers with their Strikes, but it might change the damage type their Strikes deal.

Multidexterous.name: Multidexterous
Multidexterous.description: A temporai can Switch Hands as a free action.

Out of Time.name: Out of Time
Out of Time.description:
The temporai turns their gaze to a single target within 120 feet, forcing upon it all the fragments of time it has shed. The target takes @Damage[12d8[mental]] damage and must attempt a @Check[will|dc:34] save. Regardless of the result, the target then becomes temporarily immune to Out of Time for 1 day.

Critical Success The target takes no damage.

Success The target takes half damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1}, or increases these conditions by 1.

Failure As success, but full damage and the conditions' value is 2.

Critical Failure As success, but double damage and the conditions' value is 3.

Sands of Time.name: Sands of Time
Sands of Time.description: With a flick of their wrist, the temporai disperses a wave of time-altering sand, dealing @Damage[15d6[spirit]|options:area-damage] damage to all creatures in a @Template[type:cone|distance:60] (@Check[fortitude|dc:34|basic] save). Creatures that fail their save are additionally slowed for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}. The temporai can't use Sands of Time again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Sands of Time]]{1d4 rounds}.

Sense Fate.name: Sense Fate
Sense Fate.description: A temporai always rolls a 20 for initiative

Shepherd's Touch.name: Shepherd's Touch
Shepherd's Touch.description: An erabryth's Strikes have the benefit of a ghost killer upgrade and deal an extra 5d6 void damage to living creatures or 5d6 vitality damage to undead.

Vorthuul.name: Vorthuul

Crushing Gravity.name: Crushing Gravity
Crushing Gravity.description: 5 feet. A vorthuul is surrounded by the crushing gravitational forces of a black hole. A creature that enters or begins its turn in the aura takes @Damage[3d6[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:26|basic] save).

Event Horizon.name: Event Horizon
Event Horizon.description: A vorthuul naturally draws in light. The DC of the flat check to target a vorthuul @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} or hidden due to dim light or darkness is reduced by 2. A vorthuul takes a –2 circumstance penalty to AC and saving throws against light effects and to AC against attacks from weapons in the laser group.

Quantum Duality.name: Quantum Duality
Quantum Duality.description:
Vorthuuls exist in two states: one in perfect tranquility, the other in perpetual agony. The vorthuul gains bonuses depending on the dominant state. They decide which is dominant as a free action when they roll initiative.

  • Absolute Tranquility The vorthuul gains a +1 status bonus to saves against emotion effects and resistance 10 to mental damage.

  • Everburning Agony The vorthuul gains a +1 status bonus to saves against vitality effects and resistance 10 to fire damage.

Gravity Maelstrom.name: Gravity Maelstrom
Gravity Maelstrom.description:
Frequency once per hour

Effect The vorthuul intensifies their gravitational pull for 1 minute, increasing the radius of their crushing gravity aura to 20 feet. Additionally, while this aura is expanded, creatures moving in any direction other than directly toward the vorthuul treat squares in the aura as difficult terrain.

Quantum Agony.name: Quantum Agony
Quantum Agony.description:
Frequency once per round

Requirements The vorthuul is in absolute tranquility state

Effect The vorthuul enters everburning agony in torrents of anguish. Each creature in the vorthuul's crushing gravity aura must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:28] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure).

Quantum Tranquility.name: Quantum Tranquility
Quantum Tranquility.description:
Frequency once per round

Requirements The vorthuul is in everburning agony state

Effect The vorthuul enters absolute tranquility in a wave of oppressive stillness. Each creature in the vorthuul's crushing gravity aura must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:28] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round (or slowed 1 for 3 rounds on a critical failure).

Singularity Pocket.name: Singularity Pocket
Singularity Pocket.description: The vorthuul forces their physical and psychological torment upon a creature they touch. The target must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:28] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 minute ([[/act escape dc=28]]). As long as it's immobilized in this way, it takes @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage and @Damage[1d6[mental]] damage at the end of each of its turns. Creatures that Escape become temporarily immune to this vorthuul's Singularity Pocket for 24 hours.

Vorthuul.publicNotes: Vorthuuls are undead beings with two overlapping yet incongruous forms: a distorted spirit shrieking in unending torment and a pitch-black skeleton overflowing with serenity. One form might seem more real than the other, only for the opposite to be true the next moment.

Wastewither.name: Wastewither

Toxic Exhaust.name: Toxic Exhaust
Toxic Exhaust.description: 15 feet. A poisonous mist lingers around the wastewither. When a creature enters or starts its turn in the aura, it must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:23] save. If the creature fails, it's @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until it leaves the aura. Environmental protections or an appropriate spell provides a +2 circumstance bonus to saves against the aura.

Acid Rain.name: Acid Rain
Acid Rain.description: The wastewither vaporizes into a cloud and rains down acid drops. The wastewither Flies up to twice their Speed. Any creature the wastewither passes over takes @Damage[9d8[acid]] damage with a @Check[fortitude|dc:23|basic] save. A wastewither can't use Acid Rain again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Acid Rain]]{1d4 rounds}.

Contaminated Sludge.name: Contaminated Sludge
Contaminated Sludge.description:
Frequency once per day

Effect All terrain in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] becomes difficult terrain for 1 minute. All creatures that enter or begin their turn in the affected area must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:23] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}. This drained value is cumulative, to a maximum of @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 4}.

Wastewither.publicNotes:
When left untreated for too long, standing industrial wastewater attracts wastewithers from the elemental Plane of Water as it evaporates. Wastewithers contaminate everything they touch, turning solid ground and clean water into sludge. Many corporate dumping sites and toxic spills attract or spawn wastewithers, whose mere presence further contaminates the ecosystem.

Elementals are energetic intrusions from the primal planes of existence. They take many forms, from mindless eddies in the wind or water to complex entities capable of wielding primal magic. The advent of space travel and the progress of technology have allowed even more living embodiments of the elements to manifest in the Universe.

Natural events like wildfires, solar storms, and floods can unleash hordes of unruly elementals on a planet or into a region of space. Sometimes, a gathering of powerful elementals causes a natural disaster on an epic scale, like an off-the-charts solar flare that fries a planet's power grid or a ceaseless storm swirling in a gas giant's atmosphere.

Robotic Tactical War Machine.name: Robotic Tactical War Machine

Interstellar Comms.name: Interstellar Comms
Interstellar Comms.description: A remote war machine maintains a constant data link with its pilot, using its pilot's languages and skill modifiers for any unlisted skill. In addition, the pilot can speak through the data link using the remote war machine as a mouthpiece.

Notch Position.name: Notch Position
Notch Position.description:
Trigger An enemy Strides

Requirements The remote war machine is outside the target's reach

Effect The remote war machine Strides up to its Speed in the same direction as the target until the target stops moving or the war machine has moved its full Speed.

Radio Silence.name: Radio Silence
Radio Silence.description: 60 feet. Non-allied comm units and other computers don't function within the remote war machine's aura unless their operator succeeds at a @Check[computers|against:stealth|rollerRole:target] check against the war machine's Stealth DC as an Interact action.

Attack Pattern Beta.name: Attack Pattern Beta
Attack Pattern Beta.description: The remote war machine makes a Strike against a target, then Steps or Strides and makes a Strike against another target within range. Both Strikes count toward its multiple attack penalty, but its multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after it makes both Strikes.

Robotic Tactical War Machine.publicNotes:
Multifold Industries, in collaboration with Zeizerer Munitions, created one of the earliest robotic remote war machines. Given the code name "tashtari," the machine was engineered for swift deployment to the battlefield. The tashtari can support a strike force at range while disrupting enemy communications on the field.

The incursion began with a series of probes detected by anacites on Aballon. Strange machines with blazing sensors and articulated tentacles appeared out of nowhere, ripping through infrastructure seemingly at random and collecting intelligence all around Pact Worlds space. Panic spread fast, but since the machines always vanished without a trace, or exploded when captured, the sightings couldn't be confirmed or identified. Rumors began to circulate that the machines were a form of biotech never encountered before. Soon the Stewards became formally involved, shuttering the incidents behind the adamantine partition of top security clearance.

In Sarenith of 325 ag, after dozens of military operations failed to engage the elusive probes, a wing of fighters dispatched from the Idari finally got lucky and disabled one of the machines before it could self-destruct. Coaxed into giving up some of its secrets by top Pact Worlds scientists, the biotech vessel became the prototype for the "home grown" remote war machines that are currently being tested for use in combat. The replicas aren't alive but are built using robotic construction templates since the core of the original biotech design has proven too complicated to reverse engineer with Pact technology.

Remote war machines are proxies that can be controlled from a great distance. The original biotech war machines connect to the pilot's mind through a psychic link or unknown radio frequency. Robotic remote war machines connect to a computer via data link, allowing the pilot to control their proxy using a keyboard, virtual reality rig, or even a vidgame controller.

Corzad.name: Corzad

Fungal Symbiosis.name: Fungal Symbiosis
Fungal Symbiosis.description: A corzad's Strikes deal an extra 1d4 damage to targets within 20 feet of at least two of the corzad's allies.

Spore Tide.name: Spore Tide
Spore Tide.description: The corzad dissolves into a mass of slimy spores and Strides twice, ignoring difficult terrain and other creatures. This movement doesn't trigger reactions. Any creature in the corzad's path must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:15|options:area-effect,inflicts:sickened] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}. The corzad re-forms at the end of this movement.

Corzad.publicNotes:
Packs of wolflike corzads act as the eyes and mouths of the corzadai fungal colony.

Corzadais spawned from the broken remains of Aucturn. Explosively launched into space, these fungal colonies are held together by mysterious forces. Their strange fruiting bodies have taken on numerous shapes, of which two have been more commonly seen in the Pact Worlds than others: corzads and corzadors.

Supenga Pup.name: Supenga Pup

Slowing Enzyme.name: Slowing Enzyme
Slowing Enzyme.description:
Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:20]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 –10-foot status penalty to all Speeds (1 round)

Stage 2 –10-foot status penalty to all Speeds and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (2 rounds)

Stage 3 –20-foot status penalty to all Speeds and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} (1 round)

Spinning Charge.name: Spinning Charge
Spinning Charge.description: The supenga pup curls into a ball and launches itself forward. It Strides up to twice its Speed in a straight line. If it ends this movement adjacent to an enemy, it bashes into that enemy, dealing @Damage[(3d8+3)[bludgeoning]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:22|basic] save). A creature that critically fails this save is knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}.

Supenga Pup.publicNotes:
Supengas reproduce by fruiting, a process that can take months in a harsh desert environment. Pups often spend years learning to survive before they are ready to strike out on their own—or are kicked out.

When rains grow sparse in this succulent's native habitat, it turns to another source for liquid: blood. The supenga has adapted to a world of scarcity and takes advantage of any chance to hunt using its sharp leaves and paralyzing toxin.

Sterieid Queen.name: Sterieid Queen

Speak with Stones.name: 岩石交谈 Speak with Stones
Speak with Stones.description:
你能向自然或人造的石材提出问题和得到回答。尽管石材并不具有智能，但你会与石材之中的自然之灵沟通，它们的性格受到石材种类的影响，而对于人造石材来说，则是受石材自身所属的建筑类别影响。石材看待事物的视角、感知能力、以及知识赋予了它与人类截然不同的世界观，以至于它会认为相同的细节并不重要。石材大多都能够回答曾经碰触过它们的生物的相关内容、以及它们下方或后方究竟隐藏着什么。

升阶（6环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Wall of Stone.name: 石墙术 Wall of Stone
Wall of Stone.description:
你塑造一面岩石墙壁。你创造一个至多120尺长，20尺高1寸厚的石墙。你可以塑形石墙的路径，将墙壁的每5尺放在方格之间的边界上。该墙壁无需竖直，所以举例而言，你可以用其塑造一座桥，或者一组阶梯。你必须将该墙创造在连续的开放空间中，令其边界不会穿过任何生物或者物体，否则你会失去该法术。

每一段10尺乘10尺的墙壁具有AC10，硬度14，以及50生命值，并且它免疫重击，寒冷伤害，以及精准伤害。一段被摧毁的墙壁可以移动通过，但是因此留下的碎石会令其变成困难地形。

升阶（+2） 每一段墙的生命值增加15。

Wave of Warning.name: Wave of Warning
Wave of Warning.description:
You deter enemies with a wave of hostile intent. The target takes 7d8 nonlethal mental damage, and the target must attempt a Will save. The psychic energy then arcs to another creature within 30 feet of the first target, jumps to another creature within 30 feet of that target, and so on. You can end the wave at any point. You can't target the same creature more than once, and you must have line of effect to all targets. Roll the damage only once, and apply it to each target (halving or doubling as appropriate for its saving throw outcome).

Critical Success The target creature is unaffected, and the wave ends with that target.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d8.

Cairn Form.name: Cairn Form
Cairn Form.description:
Your target's skin becomes a thick carapace of solid stone, granting resistance 5 to physical damage, except adamantine. The target gains a fist unarmed attack that deals 2d6 bludgeoning damage. The target uses their highest weapon or unarmed attack proficiency with these attacks, and if they have weapon specialization or greater weapon specialization, they add this damage as well. On a critical hit with one of these unarmed attacks, the creature struck must succeed at a Fortitude save against the target's class DC or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} for 1 round.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.v724q5Xi7KPPnLQ3]{Spell Effect: Cairn Form}

Heightened (6th) The resistance increases to 10, and the damage dealt by the attacks increases to 3d6.

Heightened (10th) The resistance increases to 20, and the damage dealt by the attacks increases to 4d6.

Shape Stone.name: 塑石术 Shape Stone
Shape Stone.description:
你将目标石块变成你选择的粗糙形状。该塑形过程十分粗糙，无法制造复杂的组件，细致的细节，可动部分，或者其他类似的东西。当你塑形一个石头时，站在其上的生物必须尝试一次反射豁免或者特技检定。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 目标在石头上@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。

大失败 该生物从石头上摔落（如可能）并且倒地着地。

Earthbind.name: 地缚术 Earthbind
Earthbind.description:
你使用大地的重量以干扰目标的飞行能力，其效果基于强韧豁免。如果该生物安全到达地面，它不会承受坠落伤害。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标安全坠落至多120尺。

失败 目标安全坠落至多120尺。如果它碰到地面，它1轮内不能飞行，浮空或者以其他方式离开地面。

大失败 目标安全坠落至多120尺。如果它碰到地面，它1分钟内不能飞行，浮空或者以其他方式离开地面。

Electrotether.name: Electrotether
Electrotether.description:
You supercharge the targets' electromagnetism and pull them with a tether of lightning. Make a ranged spell attack against each target. If you attack two targets, both attacks count toward your multiple attack penalty, but it doesn't increase until after both attacks. The targets each take 4d8 electricity damage and are pulled 5 feet closer to you, or 10 feet closer on a critical hit. If both attacks hit, you can choose to move the creatures closer to one another instead of closer to you. Moving a target into a barrier, creature, or obstacle causes the target to stop before entering that space.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Life Seal.name: Life Seal
Life Seal.description:
Trigger A creature within range enters an environment that would be harmful to it.

A shimmering bubble envelops the target's body, allowing it to breathe normally in a vacuum or other unsafe environment and protecting it from severe temperatures and radiation.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 5 additional creatures to gain protection against the environment the triggering creature entered. The spell lasts for 8 hours and also protects against extreme temperatures and radiation.

Heightened (10th) You can target up to 10 additional creatures to gain protection against the environment the triggering creature entered. The spell lasts until your next daily preparations and also protects against incredible temperatures and radiation.

One with Stone.name: 融身化石 One with Stone
One with Stone.description:
你能选择变化为一块石头或者与石头融合。在变形后，你不能移动，也不能影响任何石头之外的任何事物，但你能够施法，前提是这些法术不需要石头外侧的效果线。你能解消该法术。

  • 与石头融合 法术持续时间为10分钟。当你施法时，你必须碰触一块体积足够容纳你和你的随身物品的石头，否则法术会被打断。在融入之后，你能听到、但不能看到这块石头外侧发生的事情。当你身处石头之内时，若石头承受伤害，你就会被驱逐至石头之外，并且承受10d6点伤害。魔法持续时间结束也会把你驱逐出去，但是不会造成伤害。当你离开石头之时，法术便会结束。
  • 变为石头 法术持续时间为8小时。你变为一块大型石头——通常是一颗树。察觉检定无法揭示出你的真实本质，但是成功通过自然或生存检定对抗你的法术DC，能够揭示出你化身的石头对于该地区来说是一种怪异的新出现的存在。当你处于该形态时，能够使用正常的感官观察自身周遭的一切事物。作为一块石头，你的AC为23，只有状态加值、状态减值、环境加值和环境减值影响你。你在反射豁免中投掷出的任何成功和大成功都被视同为失败。

Caustic Conversion.name: Caustic Conversion
Caustic Conversion.description:
You launch a torrent of magical nanites that begin dissolving your target. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, you deal 3d8 acid damage plus 1d6 persistent acid damage. On a critical hit, double the initial damage, but not the persistent damage.

Heightened (+2) The initial damage increases by 2d8, and the persistent acid damage increases by 1d6.

Shatter.name: 粉碎音波 Shatter
Shatter.description:
高频音波攻击击碎附近的一件物体。你对该物体造成2d10音波伤害，如果物体的硬度为4或者更低，忽视该硬度。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d10，法术所能忽视的硬度增加2。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Glow Up.name: Glow Up
Glow Up.description:
You create an illusion that causes the target to appear more charming and genteel to observers. The spell accentuates the target's appearance, clothing, voice, and mannerisms according to what an observer finds appealing. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item removed from the creature returns to its true appearance.

The target gains a +1 status bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and lets the target add its level to Diplomacy checks if untrained. In addition, the target can attempt a Diplomacy check to Gather Information in only 10 minutes. You can Dismiss this spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.hOp5ybOzyJlECU6B]{Spell Effect: Glow Up}

Heightened (+2) The bonus increases by 1, to a maximum of +4 at 7th rank.

Guidance.name: 神导术 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你请求超自然存在的引导，赋予目标在持续时间结束前的一次攻击骰，察觉检定，豁免骰，或者技能检定上获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择是否使用该加值。如果目标使用该加值，该法术结束。无论怎样结束，该目标接下来会暂时免疫1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：神导术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：神导术免疫}

Prestidigitation.name: 魔法伎俩 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法帮你完成杂物。只要你维持该法术，你就可以产生简单的魔法效果。每当你维持该法术时，你可以选择四个选项中的一个。

  • 烹饪 为1磅非活物材料冷却，加热，或者调味。
  • 抬起 将一件轻负载或者更低的无主物品缓慢抬离地面。
  • 创造 创造一个负载可忽略的临时物体，它由凝结的魔法物质组成。该物体看起来粗糙且非常脆弱——它无法被用做工具，武器，法器或法术开销。
  • 整理 为一件轻负载或者更低的物体染色，清洁，或者弄脏它。你可以通过10轮专注来影响一件1负载的物体，对于更大的物体为每负载1分钟。

魔法伎俩无法造成伤害或者负面效果。对一件物体的任何改变（在上述内容之外的）只会在你仍维持该法术时持续。

Pummeling Rubble.name: 碎石猛击 Pummeling Rubble
Pummeling Rubble.description:
一排大石头从你前方的空中飞过。该碎石对区域中每个生物造成2d4钝击伤害 。每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受完整伤害，并且被推离你5尺。

大失败 该生物承受双倍伤害，并且被推离你10尺。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d4。

Scan Environment.name: Scan Environment
Scan Environment.description:
You analyze the natural environment in the area within 1 mile, learning general information about the atmosphere, biomes, and gravity. You forecast the weather for the next hour, including the direction it will come from; learn which atmospheres, biomes, and gravity are in the area, as well as the direction and distance to those elements; and learn if anything in the area presents an environmental hazard, including cold or heat dangers (at what temperature range), radiation (at what severity), smoke effects, and underwater conditions. This is enough to detect large effects that span spaces over 30 feet in diameter only. You gain a general sense of where and how far away these dangers are.

Heightened (+1) The scanned area increases in radius by 1 mile.

Seek the Stars.name: Seek the Stars
Seek the Stars.description:
In your mind's eye, you chart a path through the cosmos. If you're in Pact Worlds space, you immediately know which direction to travel in order to reach the Starstone on Absalom Station. If you're outside the Pact System, you know the direction to the nearest Drift beacon or the Starstone.

Heightened (7th) You can instead know the direction to a familiar location, such as a world or way station you've visited.

Stumble.name: Stumble
Stumble.description:
A burst of microgravity causes a tremor around the target, pulling it toward the ground. The target must attempt a Reflex save.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 10 feet downward.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 20 feet downward.

Heightened (+1) If the target falls, it falls an additional 5 feet on a failure and 10 feet on a critical failure.

Astronomical Ties.name: Astronomical Ties
Astronomical Ties.description:
A nymph queen is intrinsically tied to a specific celestial body, such as a supergiant star for a heliad queen.

As long as the queen is healthy, her territory thrives, and she can attempt to [[/r 1d20+21 #Counteract]] counteract spells and rituals that alter its physical properties with a counteract rank of 5.

If a nymph queen is injured or unhealthy, however, her celestial body also weakens: asteroids wobble out of orbit, stars dim, and the gravity of black holes diminishes. Restoring the nymph queen returns her celestial body to its equilibrium.

Debris Field.name: Debris Field
Debris Field.description:
Trigger The sterieid takes physical damage

Effect Shards of rocky debris fly off the sterieid's body, dealing @Damage[3d12[bludgeoning]] damage to all adjacent creatures (@Check[reflex|dc:29|basic] save) and giving the sterieid the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} condition until the end of their next turn.

Icy Nimbus.name: Icy Nimbus
Icy Nimbus.description: 20 feet. A sterieid's body radiates an icy chill.
