Creatures entering or starting their turns in the aura take @Damage[3d6[cold]] damage (@Check[fortitude|dc:29|basic] save); a creature that critically fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until the start of its next turn as it grows sluggish from the cold.

Broadcast Allure.name: Broadcast Allure
Broadcast Allure.description:
The nymph queen magically superimposes her image on all technological items capable of displaying it, such as datapads or comm units, within planetary range. Alternatively, she can send this image to any comm address or addresses that she knows.

Each creature that can see the image must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:29] or have their attitude toward her improve by one step (two steps on a critical failure).

Affected creatures' attitudes revert to their previous level if the nymph queen uses a hostile action against them or their allies.

Celestial Step.name: Celestial Step
Celestial Step.description: A nymph queen can traverse her celestial body near-instantaneously. A nymph queen can use Celestial Step to teleport to any area on or within her territory, vanishing into its surface and reemerging at her intended destination.

Change Shape.name: 变身 Change Shape
Change Shape.description: Nymph queens can transform between their original form, which looks much like a typical nymph of their kind, and any Small or Medium humanoid form, typically choosing a version of their natural form with the appearance of the chosen species.

Fan Mail.name: Fan Mail
Fan Mail.description:
A nymph queen can inspire a single intelligent creature by sending them a motivational video or text message. As long as the creature keeps the message saved and remains in good standing with the nymph queen, they gain a +1 status bonus to all Crafting, Performance, and Lore checks related to art or performance.

As a 1-action Interact action, the creature can play or view the message to bolster their spirits. Doing so allows the creature to attempt a [[/r 1d20+21 #Counteract]] counteract check against a single emotion effect affecting them.

When the nymph queen's message is used in this way, it becomes a mundane video or text afterward.

Sterieid Queen.publicNotes:
The largest asteroids, some many miles across, are home to sterieid queens. As these asteroids more likely have a semblance of atmosphere, sterieid queens are accustomed to sharing their territory with other inhabitants and generally don't mind so long as they and the environment are treated with respect.

Nymphs are beautiful fey who appear as humanoids with elven features. They generally take female forms, but nymphs of all genders and presentations exist. While many nymphs live on planets and act as protectors of natural ponds, forests, caves, and cliffsides, other nymphs—often called space nymphs—are known for their association with celestial bodies. Like their planet-bound kin, space nymphs guard their bonded territories from exploitation or harm.

As admirers of the arts, nymphs are especially friendly toward creatives, and offering to depict a nymph in story, picture, or song is a sure way to win their favor—unless the nymph doesn't like the final result and lashes out at the artist for insulting them with a mediocre product. Vidcasting and livestreaming are popular pastimes among more sociable nymphs, whether to show off their remote environments or find audiences for performances. Some nymphs entice movie crews to film in their territories, with two provisos: first, that the production not damage the environment, and second, that the nymph receive a prominent role in the film.

Unless their territories are threatened, most space nymphs are friendly or indifferent to mortals, but they have long memories. Anyone visiting a space nymph's territory would be wise to research that nymph's grudges, past encounters with mortals, or any recent events in the area that might color the nymph's perspective of those traveling near their home.

A mortal who demonstrates the right attitude and abilities, such as by protecting a stellar body from destruction or creating an especially beautiful work of art, might draw a space nymph's attention. From time to time, space nymphs will offer their services as mentors to solarians or mystics, though they seldom seek pupils on their own. Space nymphs rarely enter into more than one such arrangement at a time and typically only make commitments that promise to last decades or centuries, so they're extremely selective in their choice of mentee.

Abysium Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster).name: Abysium Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster)

Atomic Blast.name: Atomic Blast
Atomic Blast.description:
You magically split an atom, creating an explosion with radioactive fallout. All creatures in the area take 5d12 bludgeoning damage and 5d12 fire damage, and they're exposed to extreme radiation that uses your spellcasting DC as the @Check[fortitude]{Fortitude DC} for radiation sickness incurred by exposure to this radiation. The onset and frequency of this magical radiation is 1 round, and the area remains radioactive for 10 minutes.

Critical Success The target is unaffected by the initial damage.

Success The target takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 minute.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure As failure, and the target takes double damage.

Earthquake.name: 地震术 Earthquake
Earthquake.description:
你震撼大地，将生物绊入裂谷，并且摧毁建筑。在特定环境中，GM可能会增加额外的效果。悬崖可能会崩塌，造成生物坠落，湖可能会由于其下方的裂隙而干涸，剩下一片流沙陷阱。

  • 震撼大地 地面成为困难地形，其上的生物在攻击骰，AC以及技能检定上承受-2环境减值。@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.09rtx50laDw68FGT]{Spell Effect: Earthquake (Shaking Ground)}
  • 裂隙 每个在地面上的生物必须在其回合开始时尝试一次反射豁免，以站稳脚步来避免坠落到脚下裂开的40尺深的缝隙中。这些裂隙是永久的，攀爬其侧面需要@Check[athletics|dc:15|traits:action:climb]检定。
  • 崩塌 建筑物和顶棚可能会崩塌。GM为每个建筑骰一次纯骰检定（坚固建筑@Check[flat|dc:16]，常规建筑和多数自然结构@Check[flat|dc:14]，粗劣建筑@Check[flat|dc:9]，GM均可按合适调整其高低）。崩塌对每个处于崩塌中的生物造成11d6钝击伤害，尝试一次基础反射豁免。除非它大成功，否则会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，并且如果大失败会坠入裂隙。

升阶（10环级） 你可以创造一个范围巨大的足以摧毁一个聚居地的地震。射程增加到半英里，范围为四分之一英里爆发。

Gravity Field.name: Gravity Field
Gravity Field.description:
Bending the laws of the Universe to your will, you increase the forces of gravity in an area. All flying creatures in the area descend 40 feet. The entire area is greater difficult terrain for Flying and Climbing creatures, and difficult terrain for creatures on the ground. Any creature pulled to the ground by a gravity field takes bludgeoning damage as though it had fallen.

Gravity in the area increases by one step (for example, zero-g becomes low gravity, low gravity becomes standard, standard gravity becomes high gravity, and high gravity becomes extreme gravity).

Energy Aegis.name: 辟能圣盾 Energy Aegis
Energy Aegis.description:
你使用长效的强力能量护盾保护目标。目标获得对酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰、力场、音波、命能、以及虚能伤害的抗力5。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.4Lo2qb5PmavSsLNk]{法术效果：辟能圣盾}

升阶（9环级） 该抗力提升到10。

Wall of Steel.name: Wall of Steel
Wall of Steel.description:
You shape a wall of solid steel. You create a 4-inch-thick wall of steel up to 120 feet long and 20 feet high. You can shape the wall's path, placing each 5 feet of the wall on the border between squares. The wall doesn't need to stand vertically, so you can use it to form a bridge or set of stairs, for example. You must conjure the wall in an unbroken open space so its edges don't pass through any creatures or objects, or the spell is lost.

Each 10-foot-by-10-foot section of the wall has AC 10, Hardness 18, and 60 Hit Points, and it's immune to critical hits and precision damage. A destroyed section of the wall can be moved through, but the rubble created from it is difficult terrain.

Heightened (+1) The Hit Points of each section of the wall increase by 15.

Rocket Dash.name: Rocket Dash
Rocket Dash.description:
You emit a rocket of flame from behind you and blast forward. You move in a straight line up to twice your Speed; you can move through spaces occupied by creatures, and the movement doesn't trigger reactions. Creatures in the area take 6d12 fire damage with a basic Reflex save. On a critical failure, a creature also takes 2d6 persistent fire damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for 1 round. You reappear at the end of the line.

Heightened (+2) The fire damage increases by 2d12, and the persistent fire damage on a critical failure increases by 1d6.

Slice Reality.name: Slice Reality
Slice Reality.description:
You slice through reality, forming a chasm of life-draining entropy in a straight line 20 feet high, 120 feet long, and 2 inches thick. The chasm provides cover. The chasm deals 7d8 void damage to each creature that's in the chasm's space when it's created, that attempts to pass through the chasm, or that ends its turn inside the chasm, with a basic Reflex save. A creature that succeeds at this save when the chasm is created is pushed to the nearest space on the side of its choice. Creatures trying to move through the chasm fail to do so if they critically fail the save, ending their movement next to the chasm.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Wall of Plasma.name: Wall of Plasma
Wall of Plasma.description:
You shape a wall of crackling plasma that burns creatures passing through it. You create either a 5-foot-thick wall of plasma in a straight line up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high, or a 5-foot-thick, 10-foot-radius ring of plasma with the same height. The wall stands vertically in either form; if you wish, the wall can be of a shorter length or height. Everything on each side of the wall is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from creatures on the opposite side. Any creature that crosses the wall or is occupying the wall's area at the start of its turn takes 4d6 fire damage and 2d6 persistent electricity damage.

Heightened (+1) The persistent electricity damage increases by 1d6.

X-Ray Vision.name: X-Ray Vision
X-Ray Vision.description: You empower yourself to see through most materials and walls within 60 feet. Your sight is blocked by 2 feet of wood or plastic, 1 foot of stone, 2 inches of common metal, or any amount of lead or any starmetal, and you can only see in black and white.

Control Machine.name: Control Machine
Control Machine.description:
You take control of a technological creature or object and command it telepathically. If you issue an obviously self-destructive order to a sapient target, the target doesn't act until you issue a new order. The effect depends on its Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} as it fights off your commands.

Failure You control the target. It gains the controlled condition, but it can attempt a Will save at the end of each of its turns. On a success, the spell ends.

Critical Failure As a failure, but the target receives a new save only if it's sapient and you give it a new order that's against its nature, such as killing its allies.

Heightened (10th) The duration is unlimited.

Overload Systems.name: Overload Systems
Overload Systems.description:
You flood the area with a wave of electrical interference. You deal 7d8 electricity damage to creatures in the area. Each creature in the area must attempt a Reflex save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage, and any of its items with the tech trait become glitching 1 for 1 minute or until the condition is removed.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage, and any of its items with the tech trait become glitching 2 for 1 minute or until the condition is removed.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Toxic Cloud.name: 毒云术 Toxic Cloud
Toxic Cloud.description:
你创造一团有毒云雾。该效果如同@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{迷雾术 Mist}一般，除了该区域会每轮远离你10尺。在该区域中开始回合的生物承受6d8毒素伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d8。

Confusion.name: 困惑术 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你使用奇怪的能量波动扰乱了目标的思维，令其随机行动。法术效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解消该法术。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标胡言乱语，并且获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑 Confused}1分钟。在其每个回合结束，它能尝试一次新豁免来结束困惑术。

大失败 目标困惑1分钟，并且没有提前结束的豁免。

升阶（8环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Fire Shield (Constant).name: Fire Shield (Constant)
Fire Shield (Constant).description:
你创造出1面由火焰构成的盾牌悬停在空中。只要盾牌存在，它的热量就会让你获得5点寒冷抗力，使你免疫环境中的寒以及严寒。你能如同使用普通盾牌一般对火焰护盾使用举起盾牌动作并使得AC获得+1环境加值。你也能使用火焰护盾进行盾牌格挡反应动作，它具有10点硬度、免疫火焰、以及40点生命值（不具有破损阈值），其硬度在对抗具有水特征的效果时减半。若你盾牌格挡一次近战攻击，且该次攻击是非武装攻击或者由相邻攻击者作出的话，攻击者承受2d6点火焰伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.1RsScTvNdGD9zGWe]{法术效果：火焰护盾}

升阶（+2） 寒冷抗力增加5点，生命值增加10点，火焰伤害增加1d6点。

Translocate.name: 次元移位 Translocate
Translocate.description:
你立即将自身以及自己正在穿戴和持有的物品从当前空间转移走，移动至法术射程内你能看到的未被占据的空间。如果这将会带着其他生物与你一同移动——即便你把该生物放置在异次元容器中——你就会失去该法术。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至1英里。你不需要看到目的地，只要你曾经去过目的地，并且知晓该地点与你相对的位置以及距离即可。之后你会在1小时内临时免疫该法术。

Unfettered Movement.name: 行动无碍 Unfettered Movement
Unfettered Movement.description:
你驱散可能影响一个生物的阻碍。当处于该法术效果中时，法术目标忽视会赋予其速度环境减值的效果。当法术目标尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}一个令其@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}的效果时，它自动成功，除非该效果是魔法性的，并且其环级比行动无碍更高。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.CdAyAiMGESvgNQtz]{Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement}

Vapor Form.name: 汽化形体 Vapor Form
Vapor Form.description:
目标变化成气体形态。在此状态下，目标形态不定。它失去所有AC上的物品加值，以及从护甲得到的所有其他效果和加值，并且使用其熟练度调整值用于无武装防御。它对物理伤害获得抗力8，并且免疫精准伤害。它无法施放法术，启动物品，或者使用具有攻击或者操作特征的动作。它获得10尺飞行速度，并且可以钻过超小型的裂隙。目标可以解消该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.sILRkGTwoBywy0BU]{法术效果：汽化形体}

Blindness.name: 目盲术 Blindness
Blindness.description:
你令目标目盲。法术效果由目标的强韧豁免决定。目标会暂时免疫1分钟。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标直到其下个回合结束前 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲 Blinded}。

失败 目标目盲1分钟。

大失败 目标永久目盲。

Fireball.name: 火球术 Fireball
Fireball.description:
在你指定的位置爆发出咆哮的烈焰，造成6d6火焰伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d6。

Haste.name: 加速术 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法强化了目标，令其行动迅速。它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}状态，并且每轮可以使用该额外动作以打击或者行走。

升阶（7环级） 你能以至多6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速术}

Slow.name: 缓慢术 Slow
Slow.description:
你令目标周围的时间膨胀，令其行动缓慢。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1} ，持续1轮。

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 1}，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{缓慢 Slowed 2}，持续1分钟。

升阶（6环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Mist.name: 迷雾术 Mist
Mist.description: 你唤来一团迷雾。在雾中的所有生物获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}，并且在雾外的所有生物对其内的生物获得隐蔽。你可以解消这团云雾。

See the Unseen.name: 识破无形 See the Unseen
See the Unseen.description:
你的目光穿透了幻术，发现了隐形生物和魂灵。你能看到@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}生物，就如同它们并未隐形一般，然而它们的体征仍然很模糊，使得它们具有@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}并且难以被识别。你还能看到虚体生物，比如幽灵，你能通过透视物体的内部来看到虚体生物，在物体表面下10尺内的此类生物会显现为经过分层的模糊轮廓。对细节更强的洞察力还让你在作出不相信幻术的检定时，获得+2状态加值。

升阶（5环级） 持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：识破无形}

Sound Body.name: 身健体康 Sound Body
Sound Body.description:
You send a surge of healing energy to restore the target's body. Attempt to counteract an effect of your choice imposing one of these conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened}. If you didn't counteract the effect, but you would have if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed.

This spell can't counteract or suppress curses, diseases, or conditions that are part of the target's normal state.

Heightened (4th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (8th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} to the list of conditions.

Analyze Target.name: Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Caustic Blast.name: 酸液喷溅 Caustic Blast
Caustic Blast.description:
你发射一团立即爆发的酸液，泼溅到周围生物上。区域中的生物承受1d8酸蚀伤害，这有一次基础反射豁免；在大失败时，该生物也会承受@Damage[(1+floor((@item.rank -1)/2))[persistent,acid]]伤害。

升阶（+2） 该初始伤害增加1d8，并且持续伤害增加1。

Command.name: 命令术 Command
Command.description:
你喊出一句难以被忽视的命令。你可以命令目标接近你，逃离你（如同获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing}状态），扔下持有物，俯卧@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，或者站立在原地。它不能@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.A72nHGUtNXgY5Ey9]{延后 Delay}或者使用任何反应动作，直到它服从你的命令为止。法术效果基于目标的意志豁免。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 作为该生物下个回合的第一个动作，其必须用一个单动作来完成你的命令。

大失败 目标必须使用其下个回合的全部动作来完成你的命令。

升阶（5环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Grease.name: 油腻术 Grease
Grease.description:
你创造一片油，选择区域或是目标。

  • 区域 [4个连续的5尺方格] 区域中的所有坚实地面覆盖上一层油。在油滑的表面上站立的生物必须尝试成功通过一次对抗你法术DC的反射或者特技检定，否则@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}。在法术持续时间内，使用动作移动到油滑表面上的生物必须尝试一次反射豁免或者特技检定来@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.M76ycLAqHoAgbcej]{Balance}。快步或者爬行的生物无需尝试检定或者豁免。
  • 目标 [一个1负载或者更低的物体] 如果你对无主物品施放该法术，任何尝试捡起该物体的人必须成功尝试一次对抗你法术DC的特技检定或者反射豁免才能如此做。如果你以被持有的物品为目标，拥有该物品的生物必须尝试一次特技检定或者反射豁免。失败时，持握者或者持用者在使用该物体的所有检定上承受-2环境减值；在大失败时，持握者或者持用者会掉落该物品。该物品会掉落在一个由GM选择的相邻方格内。如果你对一个穿戴物品施放该法术，穿戴者在对抗擒拿他的强韧豁免上获得+2环境加值。

Ignition.name: 引火术 Ignition
Ignition.description:
你打个响指并指向一个目标，后者便开始燃烧。作出一次法术攻击检定对抗目标的AC，命中时造成2d4点火焰伤害。若目标位于你的近战触及范围内，你能选择用火焰进行一次近战法术攻击以取代远程法术攻击，这会使得法术的所有伤害骰提升至d6骰子。

大成功 目标承受双倍伤害以及1d4点持续火焰伤害。

成功 目标承受全额伤害。

升阶（+1） 起始伤害增加1d4点，重击的持续火焰伤害增加1d4点。

@Damage[(@item.rank)d4[persistent,fire]]{按等级计算的持续火焰伤害}

@Damage[(@item.rank)d6[persistent,fire]]{按等级计算的持续火焰伤害（近战）}

Measure.name: Measure
Measure.description:
You learn the approximate measurements (length, width, depth, height, and weight) of creatures and objects you can observe in the area. If an object or creature extends out of the area, you learn only the measurements within the area, but nothing about what you can't observe. For example, you can't determine the thickness or weight of a wall you can observe only one side of, or the depth of water that extends beyond the spell's range. Each time you Sustain the spell, you learn the exact measurements of one creature or object in the area, including imprecisions or anomalies that might indicate structural weakness. Magically altered targets give you information that reflects what you observe rather than accurate measurements.

Heightened (+1) Extend the range of measure by 100 feet.

Prestidigitation.name: 魔法伎俩 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法帮你完成杂物。只要你维持该法术，你就可以产生简单的魔法效果。每当你维持该法术时，你可以选择四个选项中的一个。

  • 烹饪 为1磅非活物材料冷却，加热，或者调味。
  • 抬起 将一件轻负载或者更低的无主物品缓慢抬离地面。
  • 创造 创造一个负载可忽略的临时物体，它由凝结的魔法物质组成。该物体看起来粗糙且非常脆弱——它无法被用做工具，武器，法器或法术开销。
  • 整理 为一件轻负载或者更低的物体染色，清洁，或者弄脏它。你可以通过10轮专注来影响一件1负载的物体，对于更大的物体为每负载1分钟。

魔法伎俩无法造成伤害或者负面效果。对一件物体的任何改变（在上述内容之外的）只会在你仍维持该法术时持续。

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你专注于目标物体，拓展神智，以感受魔法灵光。当你完成施法后，你得知该物品是否具有魔法。你或者你共有了灵光情报的人在对该物品@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic}时获得+2环境加值。如果该物体是幻象，仅当该效果的环级低于你的阅读灵光环级时你才能发现此事实。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.J6OhRNSN23KzOPRL]{Spell Effect: Read Aura}

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多10个物体为目标。

升阶（8环级） 你能以任意数量物体为目标。

Sleep.name: 睡眠术 Sleep
Sleep.description:
区域中的每个生物垂头歪脑昏昏欲睡。由于该法术@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious}的生物不会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}，也不会松开其持握的东西。该法术不会令生物无法通过察觉醒来，并因此限制其在战斗中的能力。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物在察觉检定上承受-1状态减值，持续1轮。

失败 该生物失去意识。如果它在1分钟后仍然失去意识，它自动醒来。

大失败 该生物失去意识。如果它在1小时候仍然失去意识，它自动醒来。

升阶（4环级） 目标在失败时失去意识1轮，在大失败时失去意识1分钟。它们会倒地，并松开其持握的东西，并且它们无法尝试察觉检定以醒来。当持续时间结束时，该生物会正常睡着，而不是自动醒来。

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Radioactive Aura.name: Radioactive Aura
Radioactive Aura.description: 90 feet. A creature that enters the radioactive aura must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:37] save against incredible radiation sickness. It's then temporarily immune to radioactive aura for 10 minutes.

Abysium Maelstrom.name: Abysium Maelstrom
Abysium Maelstrom.description: If the next action the dragon uses is Radiation Breath, the radiation becomes supercharged with arcane power. Each creature that fails its save against Radiation Breath takes @Damage[4d6[persistent,force]] damage as the supercharged radiation tears it apart from within. Each creature that critically fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} as long as it has this persistent force damage.

Control Radiation.name: Control Radiation
Control Radiation.description: Abysium dragons have ultimate control over the radioactive energy that grows within their bodies. Any time an abysium dragon deals fire or poison damage, they can choose whether that damage is magical, and they can change any amount of the fire damage to poison (or any amount of poison damage to fire).

Radiation Breath.name: Radiation Breath
Radiation Breath.description: The dragon breathes a blast of caustic superheated gas that deals @Damage[10d6[fire],5d12[persistent,poison]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:60] (@Check[fortitude|dc:40|basic|options:area-effect] save). They can't use Radiation Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Radiation Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Recharge with Radiation.name: Recharge with Radiation
Recharge with Radiation.description:
Frequency once per day

Requirements The dragon is within 60 feet of a source of incredible radiation other than any abysium dragon

Effect The dragon draws on the source of radiation, regaining all their expended spontaneous spell slots.

Abysium Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster).publicNotes: Drawing on radiation as both a force of destruction and a source of energy, abysium dragons are tied to the radioactive starmetal of the same name. These dragons grow deposits of pure abysium in their bodies, becoming more radioactive as they age, causing aggression, agitation, and even loneliness since not many creatures can long survive the company of an aging abysium dragon. Abysium dragons frequently turn to pursuits such as augmentation and weapon crafting (to take advantage of their innate power source) and the construction of robots (to keep them company). This work drives abysium dragons to seek out sturdy, radiation-resistant materials they can use for crafting, and they often spend years at a time scouring small moons and asteroids in search of precious materials.
Abysium Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster).allSaves: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Emissar Angel.name: Emissar Angel

Detect Thoughts.name: Detect Thoughts
Detect Thoughts.description:
You sense the presence of thinking creatures around you. You detect the presence or absence of thoughts from conscious creatures that have Intelligence modifiers of –3 or higher. You can choose to ignore the thoughts of creatures you're familiar with so they don't interfere with your detection of other thoughts. The spell can penetrate some barriers, but 3 feet of dirt or wood, 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of metal, a thin sheet of lead, or any force barrier blocks it. Creatures who are immune to mental effects are immune to detection by this spell.

Heightened (4th) You detect the number of thinking minds and whether or not the creatures are telepathic. Creatures with telepathy have louder thoughts than creatures who don't have telepathy and might be able to sense your intrusion, at the GM's discretion.

Doom Scroll.name: Doom Scroll
Doom Scroll.description:
You magically broadcast grim news onto nearby devices, holo projectors, screens, and other displays (including comm units on armor). Creatures in the area who can see one or more displays must attempt a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the display.

Failure The creature is fascinated by the display and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} (even if the fascination ends).

Critical Failure The creature is fascinated by the display, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1} (even if the fascination ends).

Vibe Check.name: Vibe Check
Vibe Check.description:
You share a mood by psychically projecting an intense emotion into a creature's mind. The target attempts a Will save. On a failure, the target experiences your choice of the following emotions, but if you pick anger or joy this spell gains the incapacitation trait.

  • Anger On its next turn, the target spends its first action to attack the nearest creature, even if it's an ally.
  • Joy The target can't take any hostile actions.
  • Fear The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.
  • Sorrow The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and bursts into tears.

Heightened (4th) The spell affects all creatures in a 20-foot burst. Each creature must be affected by the same emotion.

Analyze Target.name: Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Angelic Messenger.name: 天界信使 Angelic Messenger
Angelic Messenger.description:
你把自身传送至天界位面或者宇宙中中可以找到你的主人的信徒的世界里。你的等级不能高于天界信使的法术环级的两倍。

大成功 同成功，不过即便你之前从未到访过该位面或世界，也可以出现在天界信使的正确预定目标面前。

成功 你抵达目标位面或世界，但前提是你到访过该位面或世界；若你之前从未到访过该位面或世界，则会抵达天界信使的正确预定目标周围[[/r 10d10 #Miles Off]]英里内的随机地点。

失败 你未能成功旅行。

大失败 你意外旅行到了错误的位面，且很可能是危险的位面。

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导命能，以治疗活物或者伤害不死生物。如果目标是自愿活物 ，你回复这个数量的生命值。如果目标是不死生物，你对其造成1d8命能伤害，并且它可以进行基础强韧豁免。你在施放该法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标，范围，区域和其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 （专注） 该法术的射程为30尺。如果你在治疗一个活物，回复的生命值增加8。

3 （专注） 你在@Template[emanation|distance:30]内释放命能。这会以区域中所有活物和不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗或者伤害的量增加1d8，两个动作版本的额外治疗增加8。

Message.name: 传讯术 Message
Message.description:
你无声地念出言语，这段言语会直接送到目标耳中，而不是从你的嘴中念出。其他人听起来顶多是你与它们正常说话，但法术目标会如同正站在你身边一般听到你的言语。目标可以通过一个反应动作做出一段简要回应，或者根据其意愿，也可以通过其下个回合的自由动作来回应，但它如此做时必须能看见你，并且在射程内。如果它做出回应，它的回应会直接送达你的耳中，如同最初的信息一般。

升阶（3环级） 法术的射程增加到500尺。

Motivating Ringtone.name: Motivating Ringtone
Motivating Ringtone.description:
You cause the target comm unit to play a cosmically composed personal theme song specific to its owner. The creature who owns the target comm unit regains 1d8+4 Hit Points when you Cast the Spell, a +5-foot status bonus to all Speeds, and a +1 status bonus to saves against fear effects for the duration as long as the comm unit continues to play the ringtone.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.NmhqKZyMgQSHbyHj]{Spell Effect: Motivating Ringtone}

Heightened (+1) The amount of healing increases by 1d8+4.

Reorient.name: Reorient
Reorient.description: Applying a combination of vital energy and acupressure, you help the target regain its footing. The target loses the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} condition if it has it. The target becomes immune to the off-guard condition until the start of your next turn, even if the condition would be circumstantially applied, such as by being flanked or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. The target is then immune to reorient for 10 minutes.

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Mental.name: +1 Status to All Saves vs. Mental

Encouraging Hope.name: Encouraging Hope
Encouraging Hope.description: 30 feet. Allies within the angel's aura gain a +1 status bonus to all saves against emotion and mental effects. Enemies in the area take a –1 status penalty to all saves against emotion and mental effects.

Morale Boost.name: Morale Boost
Morale Boost.description: The emissar angel urges their allies to hustle for the cause. Until the beginning of the emissar's next turn, the emissar and their allies within 100 feet that can sense the angel gain a +5-foot status bonus to their Speeds.

Spin Doctor.name: Spin Doctor
Spin Doctor.description: The emissar commands an ally within 30 feet to ignore a harmful effect and keep fighting. The target gains 2d10 temporary Hit Points for 1 minute and suppresses one condition that's currently affecting it for the next [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}, chosen from the following list: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}, frightened, or stupefied. The target is then temporarily immune to Spin Doctor for 1 hour.

Emissar Angel.publicNotes:
Emissars, or propaganda angels, are a divine embodiment of radical hope and the celestial answer to information warfare. Some emissars spring from the sainted souls of revolutionary leaders or celebrities who used their platforms to help people in life, having been transformed into a celestial in their afterlife. Others spontaneously form out of the condensed faith and desires of a movement or ideal.

Emissar angels take on the role of celestial spin doctors and political organizers, inspiring their allies to rally together and keep pushing toward a goal even when defeat seems inevitable. Emissars often support mortal causes that align with their own beliefs and goals, and while they always hope to change hearts with an inspiring speech or an act of radical kindness, emissars aren't afraid to fight for what they believe in—no matter the cost to themselves. As soon as a battle ends, their first priority is caring for their allies and saving any enemies who might be swayed to join the cause. While their allies usually appreciate their unshakable hope and upbeat attitude, their opponents resent what can be construed as the emissars' toxic positivity and comforting lies.

While many angels in modern times ascended from mortal souls across the cosmos, these celestial beings were among the first creatures to exist in all the cosmos. Warriors and messengers of the gods, they're utterly devoted to their cause, whether that be destroying evil or spreading a deity's message across the galaxy.
Emissar Angel.allSaves: +1 status bonus vs. emotion and mental

Oscriss.name: Oscriss

Event Horizon.name: Event Horizon
Event Horizon.description:
You unleash the power of a supermassive black hole. All creatures in the area take 6d10 bludgeoning and 6d10 void damage. Event horizon ignores up to 10 resistance creatures in the area have to bludgeoning, and up to 10 resistance they have to void. Each creature attempts a Reflex save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} until the end of its next turn.

Failure The creature takes full damage, is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 3} until the end of its next turn, and slowed 1 for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage, is slowed 3 until the end of its next turn, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} for 1 minute.

Slice Reality.name: Slice Reality
Slice Reality.description:
You slice through reality, forming a chasm of life-draining entropy in a straight line 20 feet high, 120 feet long, and 2 inches thick. The chasm provides cover. The chasm deals 7d8 void damage to each creature that's in the chasm's space when it's created, that attempts to pass through the chasm, or that ends its turn inside the chasm, with a basic Reflex save. A creature that succeeds at this save when the chasm is created is pushed to the nearest space on the side of its choice. Creatures trying to move through the chasm fail to do so if they critically fail the save, ending their movement next to the chasm.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Slice Reality (At Will).name: Slice Reality (At Will)
Slice Reality (At Will).description:
You slice through reality, forming a chasm of life-draining entropy in a straight line 20 feet high, 120 feet long, and 2 inches thick. The chasm provides cover. The chasm deals 7d8 void damage to each creature that's in the chasm's space when it's created, that attempts to pass through the chasm, or that ends its turn inside the chasm, with a basic Reflex save. A creature that succeeds at this save when the chasm is created is pushed to the nearest space on the side of its choice. Creatures trying to move through the chasm fail to do so if they critically fail the save, ending their movement next to the chasm.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Truesight (Constant).name: Truesight (Constant)
Truesight (Constant).description: 你可以看见60尺内的事物的本来面貌。GM秘密骰反制检定，对抗区域中的所有幻术或者变形效果，但这只会决定你是否能看破它（例如，如果该检定成功对抗了一个变形法术，你可以看见该生物的本来形态，但你不会结束该变形法术）。

Translocate (At Will).name: Translocate (At Will)
Translocate (At Will).description:
你立即将自身以及自己正在穿戴和持有的物品从当前空间转移走，移动至法术射程内你能看到的未被占据的空间。如果这将会带着其他生物与你一同移动——即便你把该生物放置在异次元容器中——你就会失去该法术。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至1英里。你不需要看到目的地，只要你曾经去过目的地，并且知晓该地点与你相对的位置以及距离即可。之后你会在1小时内临时免疫该法术。

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Transposition.name: Transposition
Transposition.description:
Trigger A creature takes any move action within 15 feet of the oscriss

Effect The oscriss teleports into an unoccupied space within 30 feet.

Two-Dimensional Thinking.name: Two-Dimensional Thinking
Two-Dimensional Thinking.description:
An oscriss is designed for fighting two-dimensional foes. If more than one enemy has the oscriss within reach, they count as flanking regardless of their actual position. An oscriss made @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} by flanking foes takes a –3 circumstance penalty to AC (instead of the usual –2).

An oscriss has weakness 15 against melee attacks benefiting from flanking, and whenever a creature scores a critical hit with a melee Strike against the oscriss while flanking them, the oscriss becomes glitching 1.

If the oscriss is already glitching, they instead become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} until the end of their next turn.

Amputating Strikes.name: Amputating Strikes
Amputating Strikes.description:
When an oscriss scores a critical hit with their relativity saw or bifurcating beam Strike, the target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:44] save.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature takes an additional @Damage[2d10[slashing]] damage.

Critical Failure The creature takes an additional @Damage[4d10[slashing]] damage and loses one limb (arm, leg, or a similar ambulatory limb such as a tentacle, randomly determined by the GM).

Dimensional Pounce.name: Dimensional Pounce
Dimensional Pounce.description: The oscriss Strides up to their Speed or casts translocate; at the end of that movement, the oscriss Strikes. If the oscriss began this action hidden, they remain hidden until after this ability's Strike.

Passing Through.name: Passing Through
Passing Through.description: The oscriss ignores all non-magical difficult terrain and greater difficult terrain.

Pause Pulse.name: Pause Pulse
Pause Pulse.description:
The oscriss releases a pulse of temporal energy in a @Template[type:burst|distance:30] that deals @Damage[10d8[force]|options:area-damage] damage to creatures in the area with a @Check[reflex|dc:44] save. The oscriss can't use Pause Pulse again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Pause Pulse]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is slowed 1 for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is slowed 1 for 1 minute and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 2}.

Secondary Target.name: Secondary Target
Secondary Target.description:
Frequency once per round;

Effect The designates a creature within 100 feet to be the secondary target of their attacks until the end of the oscriss's next turn.

Whenever the oscriss makes a Strike against a different creature, they can make the same Strike against their secondary target as a free action, using the same multiple attack penalty as the attack against the initial target. The initial and secondary Strikes count as one attack for the purposes of increasing the oscriss's multiple attack penalty.

Whirling Assault.name: Whirling Assault
Whirling Assault.description: The oscriss Strikes with their relativity saw six times.

Oscriss.publicNotes:
The menacing war machines known as the oscriss are found only in the ancient sites associated with the First Ones. Resembling two stacked pyramids with a white energy core of unknown composition, oscriss infuriate foes by routinely teleporting across the battlefield. Found wandering alone throughout Aballon's First One cities, the war machines were later identified in locations outside the Pact Worlds, lending credence to theories of the First Ones' expansion efforts throughout the cosmos.

The oscriss defy proper engagement, staying far away from their foes and unleashing coruscating beams of energy that slice off the limbs of those unlucky enough to engage with them. They meticulously render their foes apart at extreme range using pinpoint accuracy. If pressured into a close-range engagement, they can unleash a blast of chronal energy to slow their attackers and allow themselves the time to better reposition and continue their dismembering bombardment.

Like other constructs of the First Ones, these guardians refuse to communicate and defy almost all attempts to override or hack their programming. Some of the galaxy's finest minds have managed to temporarily overcome the intricate programming within the oscriss, though such intrusions are quickly detected and repelled, indicating that an evolving intelligence dwells within each of the strange machines.

When engaged at multiple vectors, it becomes easy to overwhelm an oscriss's detection grid and reactions. Anacite scholars propose that the constructs were fashioned to battle foes who engaged strictly in two-dimensional warfare, and while the oscriss themselves are exceptionally capable of acting in three dimensions, they battle as though their foes could engage them only in two.

It's speculated that the unique tactics and weapons employed by the oscriss are intended to deal with one specific threat: the planashars of the Planashar Dominion. The planashars hail from a different reality known as the Infinite Loop that has only two dimensions. They've recently slowly begun invading the galaxy, taking on the title of Those Who Converge and attacking Aballonian First Ones cities and the solar settlement of Noma. That the oscriss are intended to battle them only provides more evidence of some connection between the planashars and the First Ones.

Because the oscriss are accustomed to fighting beings that exist only in two-dimensional space, they're vulnerable to tactics involving three dimensions—attacking from multiple angles, for example. While an oscriss doesn't entirely understand such tactics, they can sense when they're being outmaneuvered with three-dimensional thinking and use their potent teleportation abilities to move into a less vulnerable position at every opportunity.
Oscriss.allSaves: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Robotic Elite War Machine.name: Robotic Elite War Machine

Constant Pulse Radar.name: Constant Pulse Radar
Constant Pulse Radar.description: The war machine can detect all creatures and objects within 100 feet of itself, treating @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{Invisible}, and unobserved creatures as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Interstellar Comms.name: Interstellar Comms
Interstellar Comms.description: A remote war machine maintains a constant data link with its pilot, using its pilot's languages and skill modifiers for any unlisted skill. In addition, the pilot can speak through the data link using the remote war machine as a mouthpiece.

Notch Position.name: Notch Position
Notch Position.description:
Trigger An enemy Strides

Requirements The remote war machine is outside the target's reach

Effect The remote war machine Strides up to its Speed in the same direction as the target until the target stops moving or the war machine has moved its full Speed.

Aquatic Armaments.name: Aquatic Armaments
Aquatic Armaments.description: The superior war machine's ranged Strikes are launched with such high velocity that they can be used underwater without penalty.

BVR Engagement.name: BVR Engagement
BVR Engagement.description: The remote war machine makes a ranged Strike at a target as though its weapon had double its normal range. This Strike ignores all forms of concealment and cover.

Hypersonic Burst.name: Hypersonic Burst
Hypersonic Burst.description: The war machine Steps or Strides twice. The war machine gains a +10-foot circumstance bonus to its Speed during these moves.

Robotic Elite War Machine.publicNotes:
The pinnacle of current robotic Pact Worlds military technology, the "aurovak" war machine was developed by a group of elven, formian, and lashunta engineers working together under a new united Castrovelian initiative.

The incursion began with a series of probes detected by anacites on Aballon. Strange machines with blazing sensors and articulated tentacles appeared out of nowhere, ripping through infrastructure seemingly at random and collecting intelligence all around Pact Worlds space. Panic spread fast, but since the machines always vanished without a trace, or exploded when captured, the sightings couldn't be confirmed or identified. Rumors began to circulate that the machines were a form of biotech never encountered before. Soon the Stewards became formally involved, shuttering the incidents behind the adamantine partition of top security clearance.

In Sarenith of 325 ag, after dozens of military operations failed to engage the elusive probes, a wing of fighters dispatched from the Idari finally got lucky and disabled one of the machines before it could self-destruct. Coaxed into giving up some of its secrets by top Pact Worlds scientists, the biotech vessel became the prototype for the "home grown" remote war machines that are currently being tested for use in combat. The replicas aren't alive but are built using robotic construction templates since the core of the original biotech design has proven too complicated to reverse engineer with Pact technology.

Remote war machines are proxies that can be controlled from a great distance. The original biotech war machines connect to the pilot's mind through a psychic link or unknown radio frequency. Robotic remote war machines connect to a computer via data link, allowing the pilot to control their proxy using a keyboard, virtual reality rig, or even a vidgame controller.

Collapsing Structure.name: Collapsing Structure

Demolish.name: Demolish
Demolish.description:
Trigger The kyokor (or other kaiju) applies any amount of force to the structure

Effect The building trembles. The floors of the building and the streets within 30 feet of the building become difficult terrain; creatures on this difficult terrain take a –2 circumstance penalty to attack rolls, AC, and skill checks. The hazard rolls initiative.

Collapsing Structure.disable: @Check[athletics|dc:43] (master), @Check[civil-engineering-lore|dc:43] (master), or @Check[crafting|dc:43] (master) check to brace the structure to reduce the risk of collapse until the end of the creature's next turn. The DC of the flat check for this round (see Routine) is increased by 4 on a success, or by 8 on a critical success. Increasing the flat check DC to 21 or higher stabilizes the structure, ending this hazard.
Collapsing Structure.hazarddescription:
The kyokor (or other kaiju) grazes a structure, severely compromising the building's stability and possibly causing it to collapse.

When a kyokor passes by or through a settlement—or even attacks!—it leaves a trail of destruction that can be represented by the following hazards.

Terrifying, skyscraper-sized beasts roam the wastelands of Daimalko. Called colossi by the population, these monsters erupted from deep within the earth to stomp cities into dust, decimating the population and destroying every surface civilization on the planet in a terrifying Awakening. Kyokors are among the most dreaded colossi. There's no hope of defeating one without a valko—a war machine created by Daimalko's stubborn survivors to fight the colossi.
Collapsing Structure.reset: The building becomes susceptible to Demolish again [[/gmr 1d6 #rounds]]{1d6 rounds} after it's stabilized.
Collapsing Structure.routine: (1 action) The GM rolls a @Check[flat|dc:9] to determine if the building collapses, increasing the DC as listed in Disable. On a success, dust and debris fall within the building and 30 feet around it, providing concealment and dealing @Damage[6d6[bludgeoning]] damage to [[/gmr 1d4 #Targets]] randomly chosen targets (@Check[reflex|dc:35|basic] save); on a critical failure, a creature is also knocked @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. On a critical success on the flat check, the effect is the same, but the debris deals @Damage[12d6[bludgeoning]] damage to [[/gmr 2d4 #Targets]] randomly chosen targets instead (@Check[reflex|dc:35|basic] save); on a critical failure, a creature is knocked prone and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained} by rubble until freed ([[/act force-open dc=38]]; [[/act escape dc=35]]).
Collapsing Structure.stealthdetails: (master) to notice cracks forming in the walls of the structure as the kyokor (or another kaiju) approaches.

Daipex.name: Daipex

Demonic Pact.name: 恶魔协定 Demonic Pact
Demonic Pact.description:
你能呼唤其他恶魔来帮忙，其等级为1个2级或更低等级的恶魔、2个0级或更低等级的恶魔、或者3个-1级或更低等级的恶魔。

大成功 你成功呼唤恶魔到来。它们渴望完成这项任务，因此不会寻求回报。

成功 你成功呼唤恶魔到来。它们并不渴望完成这项任务，因此会要求你提供回报。

失败 你没能呼唤任何恶魔。

大失败 恶魔因为你的打扰而愤怒。它们在你面前现身，但会立即对你发动攻击。

升阶（+1） 每个选项中你能呼唤的恶魔等级增加2级。

Arm Cannon.name: Arm Cannon
Arm Cannon.description: A daipex's powerful arms can be fused into one or more cannons. These arm cannons also can't be Disarmed or Released. The daipex takes a –4 circumstance penalty to any action that requires fine motor control.

Char Miasma.name: Char Miasma
Char Miasma.description: 5 feet. The heat from a daipex's arm cannons burns the intestines fed into the grafted weapons as ammunition. A creature that enters or begins its turn in the aura must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:23|options:area-effect,inflicts:sickened] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Misfire Vulnerability.name: Misfire Vulnerability
Misfire Vulnerability.description: A daipex is full of unceasing rage and despises it when they can't deal damage. When a daipex critically fails a Strike or when a creature critically succeeds at its save against Hail of Bullets, the daipex takes @Damage[3d6[mental]] damage.

Hail of Bullets.name: Hail of Bullets
Hail of Bullets.description: The daipex fires a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] of bullets, dealing @Damage[6d10[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:26|basic] save) to creatures in the area. The daipex is pushed 10 feet in the opposite direction and can't use Hail of Bullets again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Hail of Bullets]]{1d4 rounds}.

Rain of Bullets.name: Rain of Bullets
Rain of Bullets.description:
Frequency once per round

Effect The daipex makes two arm cannon Strikes against a single target. The daipex's multiple attack penalty is applied normally. If both Strikes hit, combine their damage for the purpose of resistances and weaknesses.

Recoil.name: Recoil
Recoil.description: A daipex's relatively small legs can't withstand their arm cannon's kickback. When a daipex makes an arm cannon Strike, they're pushed 5 feet in the opposite direction of the Strike's target. The daipex can take a –2 circumstance penalty to the Strike to avoid this forced movement.

Daipex.publicNotes:
Daipexes are formed from souls of sinful mortals whose lives were consumed by rage and indiscriminate violence. Their hulking figures consist primarily of a pair of chain guns merged into the flesh of their large arms. By comparison, their legs are disproportionately small and incapable of bracing completely against the force of their attacks. Daipexes only use their legs when necessary and otherwise rely on their arms to move about to reduce the strain on their leg muscles.

Daipexes carry about the entrails of their prey, sometimes dangling loops of intestines from their necks or simply dragging it along the ground. They feed these organs into their arms and, by flexing their muscles there, condense the putrid flesh into ammunition that can then be fired directly from their bodies. While they often have enough ammunition to fire off their arm weapons for hours, in the rare instances that they run out of ammunition mid-combat, they either retrieve more from corpses on the battlefield or sacrifice their own flesh in the name of victory.

All mortal creatures have souls that are usually judged in the Boneyard after their demise. The souls of individuals who lived sinful lives—usually by hurting others or acting selfishly—are sent to the Outer Rifts, where they eventually coalesce into demons. These fiends care for nothing but the corruption of mortal life to ensure that the ranks of their fellow demons never wane.

Heliad.name: Heliad

Wall of Plasma.name: Wall of Plasma
Wall of Plasma.description:
You shape a wall of crackling plasma that burns creatures passing through it. You create either a 5-foot-thick wall of plasma in a straight line up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high, or a 5-foot-thick, 10-foot-radius ring of plasma with the same height. The wall stands vertically in either form; if you wish, the wall can be of a shorter length or height. Everything on each side of the wall is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from creatures on the opposite side. Any creature that crosses the wall or is occupying the wall's area at the start of its turn takes 4d6 fire damage and 2d6 persistent electricity damage.

Heightened (+1) The persistent electricity damage increases by 1d6.

Fire Shield.name: 火焰护盾 Fire Shield
Fire Shield.description:
你创造出1面由火焰构成的盾牌悬停在空中。只要盾牌存在，它的热量就会让你获得5点寒冷抗力，使你免疫环境中的寒以及严寒。你能如同使用普通盾牌一般对火焰护盾使用举起盾牌动作并使得AC获得+1环境加值。你也能使用火焰护盾进行盾牌格挡反应动作，它具有10点硬度、免疫火焰、以及40点生命值（不具有破损阈值），其硬度在对抗具有水特征的效果时减半。若你盾牌格挡一次近战攻击，且该次攻击是非武装攻击或者由相邻攻击者作出的话，攻击者承受2d6点火焰伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.1RsScTvNdGD9zGWe]{法术效果：火焰护盾}

升阶（+2） 寒冷抗力增加5点，生命值增加10点，火焰伤害增加1d6点。

Fireball.name: 火球术 Fireball
Fireball.description:
在你指定的位置爆发出咆哮的烈焰，造成6d6火焰伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d6。

Blazing Bolt.name: 灼热火矢 Blazing Bolt
Blazing Bolt.description:
你发射出热能与火焰构成的射线。进行一次法术攻击检定对抗单个生物。命中时，目标承受2d6点火焰伤害，重击时，目标承受双倍伤害。

你在施放该法术时使用的每个额外动作，都能够对一个不同的目标发射出1道额外射线，至多为3个动作对3个不同目标发射3道射线。这些攻击均会增加你的多重攻击减值，但是直至你作出所有灼热火矢的法术攻击检定之前都不会增加你的多重攻击减值。若你花费2个或更多动作施放该法术，命中时的伤害增加至4d6点火焰伤害，它仍会在重击时造成双倍伤害。

升阶（+1） 单动作版本的目标承受的伤害增加1d6点，双动作或三动作对每个目标的伤害增加2d6点。

Charm.name: 魅惑术 Charm
Charm.description:
在目标看来，你的言语甜蜜动听，你的形象笼罩在梦幻般的光晕中。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免，如果你或者你的盟友最近威胁它或者对它进行了敌对行为，会获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。如果你对目标使用任何敌对动作，法术终止。当该法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己被魅惑了，除非它和你的友好关系，或者你说服它去做的事情与其期望发生冲突。这也即是说你可以通过常规的方法说服目标继续作为你的朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且意识到你尝试魅惑它。

成功 该目标不受影响，但是认为你的法术是某种无害的东西，而不是魅惑术，除非它能识别该法术（通常通过辨识法术（Identifying Spells））。

失败 目标对你的态度变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友好 Friendly}）。如果已经是友好，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于帮助 Helpful}。它不能对你做出敌对行为。

大失败 目标变为乐于帮助并且不能对你做出敌对行为。

升阶（4环级） 该法术持续时间为持续到下次你进行你的日常准备。

升阶（8环级） 该法术持续时间为持续到下次你进行你的日常准备，并且你能以至多10个生物作为目标。

Glow Up.name: Glow Up
Glow Up.description:
You create an illusion that causes the target to appear more charming and genteel to observers. The spell accentuates the target's appearance, clothing, voice, and mannerisms according to what an observer finds appealing. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item removed from the creature returns to its true appearance.

The target gains a +1 status bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and lets the target add its level to Diplomacy checks if untrained. In addition, the target can attempt a Diplomacy check to Gather Information in only 10 minutes. You can Dismiss this spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.hOp5ybOzyJlECU6B]{Spell Effect: Glow Up}

Heightened (+2) The bonus increases by 1, to a maximum of +4 at 7th rank.

Light.name: Light
Light.description:
你创造一个光球，它发出由你选择的颜色的光芒，在20尺半径内产生明亮光照（以及接下来的20尺产生昏暗光照）。如果你在一个自愿的生物身上施法，你可以将光球连结到该生物，这使得光球会跟随该生物一起移动。你可以维持法术以移动光球至多60尺，作为这个移动的一部分，你可以将光球连结到一个生物或是从一个生物上解除连结。

你可以解消该法术。如果你在你已经有4个光亮术激活时施放该法术的话，你必须结束一个已存在的法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光亮术}

升阶（4环级） 光球在60尺半径内产生明亮光照（并在接下来的60尺产生昏暗光照）。

Overheat.name: Overheat
Overheat.description:
You vent heat toward a nearby target. You deal 2d6 fire damage to the target. On a failed save, the target's held equipment becomes hot to the touch for the next round. Unless the target drops its currently held equipment at the start of its turn, it takes @Damage[(3*@item.rank)[fire]] damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6. Increase the damage of touching affected objects by 3.

Sense Transponder.name: Sense Transponder
Sense Transponder.description: While on their bonded celestial body, a nymph can sense approaching starships within a day's travel from the celestial body. This doesn't give them any information about the ship, its occupants, or its exact position. The nymph can send a message to the ship as if using a personal comm unit.

Radiant Gaze.name: Radiant Gaze
Radiant Gaze.description:
30 feet. A heliad's eyes blaze like a sun. When a creature enters or starts its turn in the aura, it must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:24] save. The heliad can deactivate or activate this aura by using a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the start of its next turn.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} until the start of its next turn.

Solar-Dependent.name: Solar-Dependent
Solar-Dependent.description: A heliad is mystically bonded to a single protostar or small dwarf star. If they're away from their bonded star for more than 24 hours, they become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} and must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:24] save each additional 24 hours or increase their drained value by 1. A heliad can perform a 24-hour ritual to bond themself to a new star.

Supernova.name: Supernova
Supernova.description:
Trigger The heliad dies

Effect The heliad's body explodes into brilliant, luminous flame. Each creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] takes @Damage[6d8[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:24|basic] save). Creatures that critically fail are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 minute.

Heliad.publicNotes:
Denizens of stars throughout the galaxy, heliads tend to be sociable and friendly, but most have mercurial tempers befitting their fiery homes. Heliads reside among still-coalescing protostars or smaller dwarf stars. Though not mortal, they follow a "life cycle" mirroring that of their star, growing in power as their star burns hotter and matures, then gradually weakening as the star burns out.

Many heliads take a keen interest in their star's entire system, eagerly following news, gossip, and activities of its planets' residents, if any, or travelers passing through. They view the arrival of visitors with excitement and frequently broadcast messages offering hospitality to those who venture near their stars. To host such visitors, heliads often build lodgings within special protective bubbles for creatures who couldn't otherwise survive the environment.

Nymphs are beautiful fey who appear as humanoids with elven features. They generally take female forms, but nymphs of all genders and presentations exist. While many nymphs live on planets and act as protectors of natural ponds, forests, caves, and cliffsides, other nymphs—often called space nymphs—are known for their association with celestial bodies. Like their planet-bound kin, space nymphs guard their bonded territories from exploitation or harm.

As admirers of the arts, nymphs are especially friendly toward creatives, and offering to depict a nymph in story, picture, or song is a sure way to win their favor—unless the nymph doesn't like the final result and lashes out at the artist for insulting them with a mediocre product. Vidcasting and livestreaming are popular pastimes among more sociable nymphs, whether to show off their remote environments or find audiences for performances. Some nymphs entice movie crews to film in their territories, with two provisos: first, that the production not damage the environment, and second, that the nymph receive a prominent role in the film.

Unless their territories are threatened, most space nymphs are friendly or indifferent to mortals, but they have long memories. Anyone visiting a space nymph's territory would be wise to research that nymph's grudges, past encounters with mortals, or any recent events in the area that might color the nymph's perspective of those traveling near their home.

A mortal who demonstrates the right attitude and abilities, such as by protecting a stellar body from destruction or creating an especially beautiful work of art, might draw a space nymph's attention. From time to time, space nymphs will offer their services as mentors to solarians or mystics, though they seldom seek pupils on their own. Space nymphs rarely enter into more than one such arrangement at a time and typically only make commitments that promise to last decades or centuries, so they're extremely selective in their choice of mentee.

Tergaiator.name: Tergaiator

Meteoric Death Drop.name: Meteoric Death Drop
Meteoric Death Drop.description:
Frequency once per day

Requirements The tergaiator has a creature @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}

Effect The tergaiator launches themself and their victim high up in the air before crashing down. The creature takes @Damage[5d8[bludgeoning]] damage and @Damage[1d6[fire]] damage with a @Check[fortitude|dc:30|basic] save. On a failure, the creature also falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} in an unoccupied adjacent square of the tergaiator's choice; on a critical failure, the creature is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}. After using Meteoric Death Drop, reduce the tergaiator's size by one category, their reach by 5 feet, and their Strike damage by 2 for 1 day.

Orbital Lariat.name: Orbital Lariat
Orbital Lariat.description:
Frequency once per minute

Effect The tergaiator hurtles toward their foes, using the momentum to launch a spinning flurry of attacks with outstretched arms. They Stride and make a melee Strike against any number of creatures within reach at the end of their movement. Each Strike applies to the tergaiator's multiple attack penalty, but the multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after they make all of their attacks. After making these attacks, the tergaiator is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} until the start of their next turn.

Tergaiator.publicNotes:
Amid space's asteroid belts and atop their rocky exteriors rest the homes of these massive, competition-loving elementals. Tergaiators augment their bodies with pieces of asteroid as they wrestle and jump around. They thrive off the nutrients within asteroids and fight to protect their homes from being excessively farmed by greedy mining ventures.

Elementals are energetic intrusions from the primal planes of existence. They take many forms, from mindless eddies in the wind or water to complex entities capable of wielding primal magic. The advent of space travel and the progress of technology have allowed even more living embodiments of the elements to manifest in the Universe.

Natural events like wildfires, solar storms, and floods can unleash hordes of unruly elementals on a planet or into a region of space. Sometimes, a gathering of powerful elementals causes a natural disaster on an epic scale, like an off-the-charts solar flare that fries a planet's power grid or a ceaseless storm swirling in a gas giant's atmosphere.

Orocoran.name: Orocoran

Augury.name: 卜筮术 Augury
Augury.description:
你能够粗略地窥见未来。在施放该法术期间，询问特定行动方式的结果。法术能够至多未来30分钟内的结果，并使用后述结果揭示出GM得出的最有可能的猜想：吉、凶、兼（结果将是好与坏的混合）、以及平（不会产生特别好或者坏的结果）。

GM投掷一次@Check[flat|dc:6|showDC:all|traits:secret]检定。失败时，结果总是“平”。这使得它人无法判断“平”的结果究竟是否准确。若有任何人在另一次施法过程中询问的问题与首次卜筮术具有相同的主题，那么GM要使用与首次施法相同的秘密检定结果。不过，在情况改变时，也有可能得到不同的结果。

Daze.name: 晕眩术 Daze
Daze.description:
你侵入目标的精神，利用精神冲击令目标晕眩。该冲击造成1d6心灵伤害，具有基础意志豁免。如果目标在豁免中大失败，它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 该伤害增加1d6。

Hallucinate.name: Hallucinate
Hallucinate.description:
An orocoran's stomach fluids are laced with hallucinogens due to their consumption of the ichor-like birthing fluids expelled by Aucturn during the hatching of the Newborn.

A creature hit with the projectile vomit must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:24] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round ([[/r 1d4]] rounds on a critical failure).

Lick Wounds.name: Lick Wounds
Lick Wounds.description:
Frequency once per round

Requirements A creature within reach of the orocoran's proboscis is taking persistent bleed damage

Effect The orocoran flicks out their proboscis and sups on the flowing blood of their enemy. The orocoran regains Hit Points equal to the target's persistent bleed value.

Spew Vomit.name: Spew Vomit
Spew Vomit.description: The orocoran spews vomit in a @Template[type:cone|distance:15], dealing @Damage[3d6[acid]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[will|dc:24|basic] save). Creatures that fail their save are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round ([[/r 1d4]] rounds on a critical failure). This confusion is a mental effect.

Orocoran.publicNotes:
Most orocorans latch onto the shards of Aucturn that were cast through space or scattered throughout the Gelid Edge, consuming what fragments of the Newborn's womb they can and attacking anyone who happens upon them in a wild feeding frenzy. Orocorans act with especially intense and unrelenting violence toward anyone trying to harvest or relocate aucturnite.

Native to the now-destroyed planet of Aucturn, orocorans are foul and desperate creatures, cast adrift in space as they yearn to consume once more the essence of the Newborn god or fragments of the womb it gestated within. They're irritable, violent, and utterly anguished.

While some orocorans have broken free of their addiction and regained their clarity of mind and sense of self, the orocorans presented here are those who still rely on Aucturn's eldritch fluids.

Supenga Titan.name: Supenga Titan

Siphon Blood.name: Siphon Blood
Siphon Blood.description:
Requirements A @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} living creature is within the supenga titan's reach

Effect The supenga titan absorbs the creature's blood with its spines. This requires an @Check[athletics|against:fortitude] check against the creature's Fortitude DC if the creature is grabbed but is otherwise automatic. The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}, and the supenga titan regains @Damage[21[healing]] Hit Points.

Slowing Enzyme.name: Slowing Enzyme
Slowing Enzyme.description:
Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:36]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 –10-foot status penalty to all Speeds (1 round)

Stage 2 –10-foot status penalty to all Speeds and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (2 rounds)

Stage 3 –20-foot status penalty to all Speeds and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} (1 round)

Spine Volley.name: Spine Volley
Spine Volley.description: The supenga titan makes up to four spine Strikes, each against a different target. The supenga titan's multiple attack penalty doesn't increase until after it makes all the attacks.

Supenga Titan.publicNotes:
These toxic titans can drain a living creature's blood in moments.

When rains grow sparse in this succulent's native habitat, it turns to another source for liquid: blood. The supenga has adapted to a world of scarcity and takes advantage of any chance to hunt using its sharp leaves and paralyzing toxin.

Presulea Midwife.name: Presulea Midwife

Soul Surge.name: Soul Surge
Soul Surge.description:
You channel your life force into a spear of energy. You lose 6 Hit Points or, if you're in a bond with a vitality network that has at least 12 Hit Points, you can reduce the vitality bond's Hit Points by 12 instead. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, you deal 6d6 spirit damage. On a critical hit, the target takes double damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage dealt by 2d6 and the Hit Points lost by 2 (or by 4 if you spend Hit Points from a vitality network).

Verdant Code.name: Verdant Code
Verdant Code.description: You cause flowering vines or other plant matter to grow from an unattended tech object. Plant matter explodes from the target object, filling all squares within a 20-foot burst. Whenever a creature starts its turn in the area, it takes 2d6 piercing damage (basic Reflex save). On a critical failure, the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round or until it Escapes against your spell DC. The growth covers the object, requiring a creature to succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5] to physically access the object for the spell's duration.

Cellular Stimulant.name: Cellular Stimulant
Cellular Stimulant.description:
You vitalize and stimulate the target at a cellular level, giving it a temporary burst of energy that unfortunately takes an exhausting toll. The target gains the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} condition and can use the extra action to Stride or Strike. After that round ends, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.HL2l2VRSaQHu9lUw]{Fatigued} until it can rest for 10 minutes.

Heightened (6th) You can target up to six creatures by using 2 actions to Cast this Spell.

Eldritch Lance.name: Eldritch Lance
Eldritch Lance.description:
You condense a beam of mind-assaulting eldritch energy from the dark spaces between the stars and fire it at a target. Make a ranged spell attack roll against the target's AC. If you hit, you deal 2d6 mental damage. On a critical success, you deal double damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d6.

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导命能，以治疗活物或者伤害不死生物。如果目标是自愿活物 ，你回复这个数量的生命值。如果目标是不死生物，你对其造成1d8命能伤害，并且它可以进行基础强韧豁免。你在施放该法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标，范围，区域和其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 （专注） 该法术的射程为30尺。如果你在治疗一个活物，回复的生命值增加8。

3 （专注） 你在@Template[emanation|distance:30]内释放命能。这会以区域中所有活物和不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗或者伤害的量增加1d8，两个动作版本的额外治疗增加8。

Reorient.name: Reorient
Reorient.description: Applying a combination of vital energy and acupressure, you help the target regain its footing. The target loses the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} condition if it has it. The target becomes immune to the off-guard condition until the start of your next turn, even if the condition would be circumstantially applied, such as by being flanked or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. The target is then immune to reorient for 10 minutes.

Nourishing Aura.name: Nourishing Aura
Nourishing Aura.description: 100 feet. Presulea can sense the presence of any living creature inside their nourishing aura. This functions as an imprecise sense. Any spells with the healing or vitality trait are automatically heightened one rank (up to rank 4) if the caster is within the aura. Presulea treats a creature that casts such a spell as though they can always see it for 1 hour following the casting, ignoring the effects of any cover, concealment, invisibility, or similar effects.

Vital Siphon.name: Vital Siphon
Vital Siphon.description:
Frequency once every 10 minutes

Trigger A creature within their nourishing aura uses an effect with the healing trait

Effect Presulea siphons half the amount that would be healed (rounded down) to heal themself or an ally within their aura instead of the original target.

Return to Aucturn.name: Return to Aucturn
Return to Aucturn.description: Presulea teleports to the location of any aucturnite fragment within a planetary range. Presulea automatically uses this ability as a free action when reduced to 0 Hit Points as long as a piece of aucturnite is within range, reforming their body and recovering completely over the next 24 hours.

Presulea Midwife.publicNotes:
Presulea's mortal existence ended in self-sacrifice to feed the Newborn. Presulea was remade as a quivering mound of rampant growths and pumping organs that shimmer with vital energy.

Thirteen mortal Midwives attended the Newborn's birth and were transformed into eldritch beings by the nascent outer god's awakening. A Midwife always regenerates an identical new form so long as even a single speck of aucturnite—the name for the frozen chunks of planetcenta that once surrounded the Newborn—exists on this plane.

There are 13 types of Midwives, but their true numbers are unknown. Whether their names come from the mortal servants whose souls were the kindling for the Midwives' creation or have some other significance to the Newborn, also remains a mystery.

Each Midwife identifies themself by how they cared for the Newborn: if they swaddled, fed, carried, held, watched, warded, blessed, or performed other acts of nurturing for the outer god. The Midwives are powerful beings capable of transdimensional travel. They might be encountered in liminal spaces, such as the Drift or the Ghost Levels of Absalom Station, or they might be found among the clouds of aucturnite debris in the Gelid Edge. Their incomprehensible actions always advance the Newborn's inscrutable agenda—or their own.

The most well-known encounter the Pact Worlds have had with the Midwives took place in the immediate aftermath of the Newborn's birth. Amnieka, who swaddled the Newborn and has a hood of writhing tentacles around their visage, attacked Absalom Station directly, causing a massive power surge that threatened the lives of everyone on board. Chaos ensued, but a group of adventurers—who happened to be in the right elevator at the right time—found themselves in the station's Ghost Levels, where they thwarted Amnieka and prevented the Midwife from draining the station's reactors. The Midwives haven't acted so directly since that incident, but many suspect it's only a matter of time, and no one knows just how powerful the others might be.

Moonflower.name: Moonflower

Pod Prison.name: Pod Prison
Pod Prison.description:
Trigger The moonflower has swallowed a creature

Effect The swallowed creature is wrapped in a tight cocoon and extruded from the moonflower's body into an adjacent square. The creature continues to be Swallowed Whole. It can't use Acrobatics to Escape a pod, but other creatures can attempt to Rupture the pod. The cocooned creature takes half damage from any damage dealt to the cocoon. Once the cocoon is Ruptured, it deflates and decays.

Pod Spawn.name: Pod Spawn
Pod Spawn.description: If a Small or larger creature dies within a Pod Prison, the pod transforms into an adult moonflower with full Hit Points after [[/gmr 1d4 #hours]]{1d4 hours} of growth. The newly formed moonflower has its own consciousness, but some aspect of its trunk or blossoms typically resemble the creature that died within. The dead creature's equipment remains inside the new moonflower and can be retrieved if the moonflower is slain.

Light Pulse.name: Light Pulse
Light Pulse.description:
The moonflower releases a pulse of bright light. Each non-moonflower creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:50] must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:23] save. The moonflower can't use Light Pulse again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Light Pulse]]{1d4 rounds}.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Moonflower.publicNotes:
These enormous plants have thick, knotted trunks festooned with fanged blossoms. A gaping mouth opens from the top of the trunk, capable of swallowing most creatures smaller than the moonflower. Moonflowers can move slowly and attack with their powerful roots, but they usually dig deeply into the surrounding ground and remain stationary to ambush prey.

Though moonflowers can't speak in the conventional sense, they communicate telepathically with other moonflowers. Those who manage to intercept a moonflower's telepathic communications are assaulted by visions of primeval jungles ruled over by titanic plant life. Whether this vision is a genetic memory or a dream of the future shared by all moonflowers is unknown.

Moonflowers first sprouted on a long-dead planet, but their proliferation throughout the galaxy has been perpetuated by both random dispersal and sinister intent. Moonflower groves thrive on Castrovel and other worlds with undisturbed wilderness.

Biotech Advanced War Machine.name: Biotech Advanced War Machine

Interstellar Comms.name: Interstellar Comms
Interstellar Comms.description: A remote war machine maintains a constant data link with its pilot, using its pilot's languages and skill modifiers for any unlisted skill. In addition, the pilot can speak through the data link using the remote war machine as a mouthpiece.

Corpse Flower.name: Corpse Flower
Corpse Flower.description:
Trigger The war machine would be reduced to 0 Hit Points

Effect The war machine self-destructs, dealing @Damage[8d6[electricity]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic|options:area-effect] save) to all creatures in a 60-foot radius. For 1 minute after this ability is used, any creature that touches the war machine's remains is exposed to incredible radiation sickness.

Thermal Shadow.name: Thermal Shadow
Thermal Shadow.description: 10 feet. The war machine collects and reflects thermal energy to mask its presence. Any creatures targeting the war machine from outside the aura treats it as if it were @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} unless they possess scent or a non-visual–based sense.

Hypersonic Burst.name: Hypersonic Burst
Hypersonic Burst.description: The war machine Steps or Strides twice. The war machine gains a +10-foot circumstance bonus to its Speed during these moves.

Transmit Memory.name: Transmit Memory
Transmit Memory.description: When a war machine makes an aurora beam Strike against a creature, it absorbs one of the target's memories and remotely transmits the information to its pilot. The target must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:25|options:inflicts:stupefied] saving throw or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1}.

Biotech Advanced War Machine.publicNotes:
Strong and ferocious, code name "thermatrod" is designed to maximize carnage and destruction on a battlefield. In contrast, the "vracinea" is among the weakest of the unidentified biotech war machines observed in the Pact Worlds. Sleek and stealthy, it darts in and out of enemy defenses while transmitting data to its pilot before departing. If discovered, the vracinea consumes itself to destroy records of the data it was carrying.

The incursion began with a series of probes detected by anacites on Aballon. Strange machines with blazing sensors and articulated tentacles appeared out of nowhere, ripping through infrastructure seemingly at random and collecting intelligence all around Pact Worlds space. Panic spread fast, but since the machines always vanished without a trace, or exploded when captured, the sightings couldn't be confirmed or identified.
