Rumors began to circulate that the machines were a form of biotech never encountered before. Soon the Stewards became formally involved, shuttering the incidents behind the adamantine partition of top security clearance.

In Sarenith of 325 ag, after dozens of military operations failed to engage the elusive probes, a wing of fighters dispatched from the Idari finally got lucky and disabled one of the machines before it could self-destruct. Coaxed into giving up some of its secrets by top Pact Worlds scientists, the biotech vessel became the prototype for the "home grown" remote war machines that are currently being tested for use in combat. The replicas aren't alive but are built using robotic construction templates since the core of the original biotech design has proven too complicated to reverse engineer with Pact technology.

Remote war machines are proxies that can be controlled from a great distance. The original biotech war machines connect to the pilot's mind through a psychic link or unknown radio frequency. Robotic remote war machines connect to a computer via data link, allowing the pilot to control their proxy using a keyboard, virtual reality rig, or even a vidgame controller.

Koruvi Endling.name: Koruvi Endling

Techsense.name: Techsense
Techsense.description: A koruvi endling can sense the presence of creatures and objects with the tech trait as a precise sense at the listed range.

Rejuvenation.name: 复苏 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description: When an endling is destroyed, it reforms after [[/gmr 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the area where it first emerged, fully healed. An endling can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the spirit from resting, such as an act of decolonization, ecological restoration, or curing the disease responsible for its extinction.

Koruvi Endling.publicNotes:
Koruvis were diminutive ungulates inhabiting Calen-5, a wet arboreal world. When a Veskarium mining company discovered rare starmetals on Calen-5, a mining boom destroyed the planet's equatorial rainforests and drove koruvis to extinction. Years after, settlers reported mysterious property damage, along with sightings of ghostly beasts that furiously dismantle any technology they encounter.

Every species follows a natural arc as it emerges and evolves: rising, thriving, declining, and falling into extinction. When extremely unnatural ends to these paths occur—when unexpected predation, industrialization, or alien pathogens wipe out a population—endlings are born. These spectral members of extinct species typically develop as "answers" to their eradication. Xenobiologists differ on what creates endlings, unable to confirm whether the creatures are a species' last collective sorrow made manifest or just vengeful individual spirits—the last lights to go out.

Heliad Queen.name: Heliad Queen

Energy Aegis.name: 辟能圣盾 Energy Aegis
Energy Aegis.description:
你使用长效的强力能量护盾保护目标。目标获得对酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰、力场、音波、命能、以及虚能伤害的抗力5。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.4Lo2qb5PmavSsLNk]{法术效果：辟能圣盾}

升阶（9环级） 该抗力提升到10。

Sunburst.name: 阳炎爆 Sunburst
Sunburst.description:
强力而耀眼的球状日光在区域中爆开，对该区域中的生物造成8d10火焰伤害，以及对不死生物造成额外@Damage[(@item.level+1)d10[vitality]]伤害。在该区域中的每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受完整伤害。

大失败 该生物承受完整伤害，并且永久 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲 Blinded} 。

如果阳炎爆的球状区域与魔法黑暗的区域部分重叠，则会尝试反制该黑暗效果。

升阶（+1） 该火焰伤害增加1d10，并且对不死生物的命能伤害增加1d10。

Field of Life.name: 生命力场 Field of Life
Field of Life.description:
命能形成的场充满该区域，为其中的生物赋予温暖和活力。每个在该区域中开始回合的活物回复1d8生命值，并且任何在该区域中开始回合的不死生物承受1d8命能伤害。

升阶（8环级） 该治疗与伤害提升到1d10。

升阶（9环级） 该治疗与伤害提升到1d12。

Wall of Plasma.name: Wall of Plasma
Wall of Plasma.description:
You shape a wall of crackling plasma that burns creatures passing through it. You create either a 5-foot-thick wall of plasma in a straight line up to 60 feet long and 10 feet high, or a 5-foot-thick, 10-foot-radius ring of plasma with the same height. The wall stands vertically in either form; if you wish, the wall can be of a shorter length or height. Everything on each side of the wall is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} from creatures on the opposite side. Any creature that crosses the wall or is occupying the wall's area at the start of its turn takes 4d6 fire damage and 2d6 persistent electricity damage.

Heightened (+1) The persistent electricity damage increases by 1d6.

Elemental Form.name: 元素形态 Elemental Form
Elemental Form.description:
你唤来位面的能量，转变为中性元素战斗形态。当你施放该法术时，选择一个列出的元素。处于该形态时，你获得对应的特征以及元素特征。在该战斗形态中你有手，并且能进行操作行动。你可以解消该法术。

你获得后续数据和能力，无论你选择哪种战斗形态：

  • AC=19+你的等级。忽略你的护甲检定减值和速度减值。
  • 10临时生命值。
  • 黑暗视觉。
  • 一个或多个由你选择的战斗形态决定的无武装近战攻击，这是你仅能使用的打击。你对这些攻击受训。你的攻击调整值为+18、你的伤害加值为+9。这些基于敏捷（气，火或者金）或者基于力量（土，水或者木）。如果你对应的无武装攻击调整值更高，你能改为使用该调整值。
  • 特技（气，火或者金）或者运动（土，水或者木）调整值+20；如果你本身的调整值更高，忽略该改变。

你也会根据你选择的元素类型获得特定能力：

  • 气 Air
    • 飞行 80尺，移动不会触发反应动作;
    • 近战 1 暴风, 伤害 1d4 钝击
  • 土 Earth
    • 速度20尺，掘地 20尺;
    • 近战 1 巨石, 伤害 2d10 钝击
  • 火 Fire
    • 速度 50尺； 火焰抗力 10，对寒冷和水弱点5;
    • 近战 1 触须 , 伤害 1d8 火焰加1d4持续火焰伤害
  • 金 Metal
    • 速度 40尺, 飞行 20尺;
    • 近战 1 利刃（多用穿刺）, 伤害 1d8挥砍加上1d4电击
  • 水 Water
    • 速度20尺，游泳 60尺； 火焰抗力 5;
    • 近战 1 波浪, 伤害 1d12 钝击并且你可以在命中后立即花费一个动作，通过一次成功的 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞 Shove}来推离目标5尺。
  • 木 Wood
    • 速度 20尺, 攀爬 30尺;
    • 近战 1 树枝, 伤害 2d10钝击

升阶（6环级） 你的战斗形态为大型，并且你的攻击具有10尺触及。你必须有空间扩大体型，否则你会失去法术。你改为获得AC=22+你的等级、15临时生命、攻击调整值+23、伤害加值+13、以及特技或者运动+23。

升阶（7环级） 你的战斗形态为超大型，并且你的攻击具有15尺触及。你必须有空间扩大体型，否则你会失去法术。你改为获得AC=22+你的等级、20临时生命、攻击调整值+25、伤害加值+11并且伤害骰子翻倍（包括持续伤害），以及特技或者运动+25。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Qp0dlhJaCzXIx73r]{法术效果：元素形态}

Creation.name: 造物术 Creation
Creation.description:
你使用魔法能量创造一个临时的物体。它必须由土质或者植物质材料（例如木头、纸、砖块、或者石头）组成，并且为5立方尺或更小。该物体不能需求复杂的工艺，或者复杂的活动机构，并且无法作为消耗或者类似的作用，并且不能由昂贵材料，或者稀有度在罕见以上的材料组成。它显然是临时创造的，因此无法被卖出或者确实的礼物。该法术获得你制造物品的特征，通常是土（earth）、植物（plant）、或者木（wood）

升阶（5环级） 该物品是金属制，并且可以包括常见矿物，例如长石或者水晶。该法术会获得金属（metal）特征，如果被用来创造金属物体。

Fire Shield.name: 火焰护盾 Fire Shield
Fire Shield.description:
你创造出1面由火焰构成的盾牌悬停在空中。只要盾牌存在，它的热量就会让你获得5点寒冷抗力，使你免疫环境中的寒以及严寒。你能如同使用普通盾牌一般对火焰护盾使用举起盾牌动作并使得AC获得+1环境加值。你也能使用火焰护盾进行盾牌格挡反应动作，它具有10点硬度、免疫火焰、以及40点生命值（不具有破损阈值），其硬度在对抗具有水特征的效果时减半。若你盾牌格挡一次近战攻击，且该次攻击是非武装攻击或者由相邻攻击者作出的话，攻击者承受2d6点火焰伤害。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.1RsScTvNdGD9zGWe]{法术效果：火焰护盾}

升阶（+2） 寒冷抗力增加5点，生命值增加10点，火焰伤害增加1d6点。

Wall of Fire.name: 火墙术 Wall of Fire
Wall of Fire.description:
你令一面熊熊燃烧的火墙拔地而起，其能灼烧穿越墙体的生物。你可以创造5尺厚的直线形火墙，至多60尺长，10尺高；或是高度相同，但5尺厚，10尺半径的环状火墙。该墙体无论哪种形态均以竖直姿态矗立；只要你愿意，所创造墙体的长度与高度均可以更短。火墙一侧的任何事物对于另一侧的生物而言均为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}。任何穿过该墙体，或者在其回合开始时占据墙体区域的生物承受4d6点火焰伤害。

升阶（+1）该火焰伤害增加1d6。

Electrotether.name: Electrotether
Electrotether.description:
You supercharge the targets' electromagnetism and pull them with a tether of lightning. Make a ranged spell attack against each target. If you attack two targets, both attacks count toward your multiple attack penalty, but it doesn't increase until after both attacks. The targets each take 4d8 electricity damage and are pulled 5 feet closer to you, or 10 feet closer on a critical hit. If both attacks hit, you can choose to move the creatures closer to one another instead of closer to you. Moving a target into a barrier, creature, or obstacle causes the target to stop before entering that space.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Enthrall.name: 注目术 Enthrall
Enthrall.description:
你的言语令目标迷魂。你在施法和持续时间中持续演说或者歌唱。注意到你的演说或者歌唱的目标可能会失去注意力；每个目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。如果目标的信仰，族裔，政治观念对立，或者其他它不远认同你的说法的情况，GM可能赋予一个环境加值（最大为+4）。

在你维持法术时，每个进入射程的生物必须尝试一次豁免。如果你在演说，注目术获得语言特征。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且注意到你尝试使用魔法。

成功 目标不必注意，但是也没发现你在使用魔法（他也许发现其他人被注目术影响）。

失败 目标对你@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{迷魂 Fascinated}。当它发现其不认同的行为或者说法时，它可以尝试另一次意志豁免。如果它成功，他不再迷魂，并且暂时免疫1小时。如果目标成为敌对行为的目标，或者其他生物对其尝试交涉或者威吓，迷魂会立即结束。

大失败 如同失败，但是目标不会在其不认同你时尝试豁免以结束迷魂。

Fireball.name: 火球术 Fireball
Fireball.description:
在你指定的位置爆发出咆哮的烈焰，造成6d6火焰伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d6。

Irradiate.name: 辐射 Irradiate
Irradiate.description:
You rapidly destabilize and decay the atoms around you to create a burst of magically enhanced mild radiation. Creatures in the area must attempt a Fortitude save against mild radiation sickness. This magical radiation uses your spell DC in place of the radiation's normal Fortitude DC, has an immediate onset, and the interval between each stage is 1 round. Technology doesn't gain the glitching condition from the radiation created by this spell.

Heightened (5th) The radiation increases to severe.

Heightened (7th) The radiation increases to extreme.

Heightened (9th) The radiation increases to incredible.

Blazing Bolt.name: 灼热火矢 Blazing Bolt
Blazing Bolt.description:
你发射出热能与火焰构成的射线。进行一次法术攻击检定对抗单个生物。命中时，目标承受2d6点火焰伤害，重击时，目标承受双倍伤害。

你在施放该法术时使用的每个额外动作，都能够对一个不同的目标发射出1道额外射线，至多为3个动作对3个不同目标发射3道射线。这些攻击均会增加你的多重攻击减值，但是直至你作出所有灼热火矢的法术攻击检定之前都不会增加你的多重攻击减值。若你花费2个或更多动作施放该法术，命中时的伤害增加至4d6点火焰伤害，它仍会在重击时造成双倍伤害。

升阶（+1） 单动作版本的目标承受的伤害增加1d6点，双动作或三动作对每个目标的伤害增加2d6点。

Everlight.name: 永亮术 Everlight
Everlight.description:
你触摸的宝石发出如同火炬的光芒，在20尺半径内产生明亮光照（以及接下来的20尺产生昏暗光照）。如果宝石破损，该法术立即结束。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.hpbCDbDOoVyhOmck]{法术效果：永亮术}

Soul Surge.name: Soul Surge
Soul Surge.description:
You channel your life force into a spear of energy. You lose 6 Hit Points or, if you're in a bond with a vitality network that has at least 12 Hit Points, you can reduce the vitality bond's Hit Points by 12 instead. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, you deal 6d6 spirit damage. On a critical hit, the target takes double damage and becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1}.

Heightened (+1) Increase the damage dealt by 2d6 and the Hit Points lost by 2 (or by 4 if you spend Hit Points from a vitality network).

Breathe Fire.name: 燃烧之息 Breathe Fire
Breathe Fire.description:
一团火焰从你的口中喷出。你对区域内的每个生物造成2d6火焰伤害，基础反射豁免。

升阶（+1） 伤害增加2d6点。

Charm.name: 魅惑术 Charm
Charm.description:
在目标看来，你的言语甜蜜动听，你的形象笼罩在梦幻般的光晕中。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免，如果你或者你的盟友最近威胁它或者对它进行了敌对行为，会获得+4环境加值。

你可以解消该法术。如果你对目标使用任何敌对动作，法术终止。当该法术结束时，目标不一定会意识到自己被魅惑了，除非它和你的友好关系，或者你说服它去做的事情与其期望发生冲突。这也即是说你可以通过常规的方法说服目标继续作为你的朋友。

大成功 目标不受影响，并且意识到你尝试魅惑它。

成功 该目标不受影响，但是认为你的法术是某种无害的东西，而不是魅惑术，除非它能识别该法术（通常通过辨识法术（Identifying Spells））。

失败 目标对你的态度变为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.v66R7FdOf11l94im]{友好 Friendly}）。如果已经是友好，则变为 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.v44P3WUcU1j0115l]{乐于帮助 Helpful}。它不能对你做出敌对行为。

大失败 目标变为乐于帮助并且不能对你做出敌对行为。

升阶（4环级） 该法术持续时间为持续到下次你进行你的日常准备。

升阶（8环级） 该法术持续时间为持续到下次你进行你的日常准备，并且你能以至多10个生物作为目标。

Glow Up.name: Glow Up
Glow Up.description:
You create an illusion that causes the target to appear more charming and genteel to observers. The spell accentuates the target's appearance, clothing, voice, and mannerisms according to what an observer finds appealing. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item removed from the creature returns to its true appearance.

The target gains a +1 status bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and lets the target add its level to Diplomacy checks if untrained. In addition, the target can attempt a Diplomacy check to Gather Information in only 10 minutes. You can Dismiss this spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.hOp5ybOzyJlECU6B]{Spell Effect: Glow Up}

Heightened (+2) The bonus increases by 1, to a maximum of +4 at 7th rank.

Guidance.name: 神导术 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你请求超自然存在的引导，赋予目标在持续时间结束前的一次攻击骰，察觉检定，豁免骰，或者技能检定上获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择是否使用该加值。如果目标使用该加值，该法术结束。无论怎样结束，该目标接下来会暂时免疫1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：神导术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：神导术免疫}

Ignition.name: 引火术 Ignition
Ignition.description:
你打个响指并指向一个目标，后者便开始燃烧。作出一次法术攻击检定对抗目标的AC，命中时造成2d4点火焰伤害。若目标位于你的近战触及范围内，你能选择用火焰进行一次近战法术攻击以取代远程法术攻击，这会使得法术的所有伤害骰提升至d6骰子。

大成功 目标承受双倍伤害以及1d4点持续火焰伤害。

成功 目标承受全额伤害。

升阶（+1） 起始伤害增加1d4点，重击的持续火焰伤害增加1d4点。

@Damage[(@item.rank)d4[persistent,fire]]{按等级计算的持续火焰伤害}

@Damage[(@item.rank)d6[persistent,fire]]{按等级计算的持续火焰伤害（近战）}

Light.name: Light
Light.description:
你创造一个光球，它发出由你选择的颜色的光芒，在20尺半径内产生明亮光照（以及接下来的20尺产生昏暗光照）。如果你在一个自愿的生物身上施法，你可以将光球连结到该生物，这使得光球会跟随该生物一起移动。你可以维持法术以移动光球至多60尺，作为这个移动的一部分，你可以将光球连结到一个生物或是从一个生物上解除连结。

你可以解消该法术。如果你在你已经有4个光亮术激活时施放该法术的话，你必须结束一个已存在的法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.cVVZXNbV0nElVOPZ]{法术效果：光亮术}

升阶（4环级） 光球在60尺半径内产生明亮光照（并在接下来的60尺产生昏暗光照）。

Overheat.name: Overheat
Overheat.description:
You vent heat toward a nearby target. You deal 2d6 fire damage to the target. On a failed save, the target's held equipment becomes hot to the touch for the next round. Unless the target drops its currently held equipment at the start of its turn, it takes @Damage[(3*@item.rank)[fire]] damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6. Increase the damage of touching affected objects by 3.

Prestidigitation.name: 魔法伎俩 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法帮你完成杂物。只要你维持该法术，你就可以产生简单的魔法效果。每当你维持该法术时，你可以选择四个选项中的一个。

  • 烹饪 为1磅非活物材料冷却，加热，或者调味。
  • 抬起 将一件轻负载或者更低的无主物品缓慢抬离地面。
  • 创造 创造一个负载可忽略的临时物体，它由凝结的魔法物质组成。该物体看起来粗糙且非常脆弱——它无法被用做工具，武器，法器或法术开销。
  • 整理 为一件轻负载或者更低的物体染色，清洁，或者弄脏它。你可以通过10轮专注来影响一件1负载的物体，对于更大的物体为每负载1分钟。

魔法伎俩无法造成伤害或者负面效果。对一件物体的任何改变（在上述内容之外的）只会在你仍维持该法术时持续。

Sense Transponder.name: Sense Transponder
Sense Transponder.description: While on their bonded celestial body, a nymph can sense approaching starships within a day's travel from the celestial body. This doesn't give them any information about the ship, its occupants, or its exact position. The nymph can send a message to the ship as if using a personal comm unit.

Astronomical Ties.name: Astronomical Ties
Astronomical Ties.description:
A nymph queen is intrinsically tied to a specific celestial body, such as a supergiant star for a heliad queen.

As long as the queen is healthy, her territory thrives, and she can attempt to [[/r 1d20+26 #Counteract]] counteract spells and rituals that alter its physical properties with a counteract rank of 7.

If a nymph queen is injured or unhealthy, however, her celestial body also weakens: asteroids wobble out of orbit, stars dim, and the gravity of black holes diminishes. Restoring the nymph queen returns her celestial body to its equilibrium.

Radiant Gaze.name: Radiant Gaze
Radiant Gaze.description:
60 feet. A heliad's eyes blaze like a sun. When a creature enters or starts its turn in the aura, it must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:34] save. The heliad can deactivate or activate this aura by using a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} until the start of its next turn.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} until the start of its next turn.

Supernova.name: Supernova
Supernova.description:
Trigger The heliad queen dies

Effect The heliad's body explodes into brilliant, luminous flame. Each creature in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:10] takes @Damage[12d8[fire]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:34|basic] save). Creatures that critically fail are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 minute.

Broadcast Allure.name: Broadcast Allure
Broadcast Allure.description:
The nymph queen magically superimposes her image on all technological items capable of displaying it, such as datapads or comm units, within planetary range. Alternatively, she can send this image to any comm address or addresses that she knows.

Each creature that can see the image must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:34] or have their attitude toward her improve by one step (two steps on a critical failure).

Affected creatures' attitudes revert to their previous level if the nymph queen uses a hostile action against them or their allies.

Celestial Step.name: Celestial Step
Celestial Step.description: A nymph queen can traverse her celestial body near-instantaneously. A nymph queen can use Celestial Step to teleport to any area on or within her territory, vanishing into its surface and reemerging at her intended destination.

Change Shape.name: 变身 Change Shape
Change Shape.description: Nymph queens can transform between their original form, which looks much like a typical nymph of their kind, and any Small or Medium humanoid form, typically choosing a version of their natural form with the appearance of the chosen species.

Fan Mail.name: Fan Mail
Fan Mail.description:
A nymph queen can inspire a single intelligent creature by sending them a motivational video or text message. As long as the creature keeps the message saved and remains in good standing with the nymph queen, they gain a +1 status bonus to all Crafting, Performance, and Lore checks related to art or performance.

As a 1-action Interact action, the creature can play or view the message to bolster their spirits. Doing so allows the creature to attempt a [[/r 1d20+26 #Counteract]] counteract check against a single emotion effect affecting them.

When the nymph queen's message is used in this way, it becomes a mundane video or text afterward.

Heliad Queen.publicNotes:
Heliad queens live on the largest dwarf stars, mature stars, and supergiants. They take great pride in the luminosity of their stars, often bedecking themselves in clothing specially designed to refract light to show off their home's brilliance.

Nymphs are beautiful fey who appear as humanoids with elven features. They generally take female forms, but nymphs of all genders and presentations exist. While many nymphs live on planets and act as protectors of natural ponds, forests, caves, and cliffsides, other nymphs—often called space nymphs—are known for their association with celestial bodies. Like their planet-bound kin, space nymphs guard their bonded territories from exploitation or harm.

As admirers of the arts, nymphs are especially friendly toward creatives, and offering to depict a nymph in story, picture, or song is a sure way to win their favor—unless the nymph doesn't like the final result and lashes out at the artist for insulting them with a mediocre product. Vidcasting and livestreaming are popular pastimes among more sociable nymphs, whether to show off their remote environments or find audiences for performances. Some nymphs entice movie crews to film in their territories, with two provisos: first, that the production not damage the environment, and second, that the nymph receive a prominent role in the film.

Unless their territories are threatened, most space nymphs are friendly or indifferent to mortals, but they have long memories. Anyone visiting a space nymph's territory would be wise to research that nymph's grudges, past encounters with mortals, or any recent events in the area that might color the nymph's perspective of those traveling near their home.

A mortal who demonstrates the right attitude and abilities, such as by protecting a stellar body from destruction or creating an especially beautiful work of art, might draw a space nymph's attention. From time to time, space nymphs will offer their services as mentors to solarians or mystics, though they seldom seek pupils on their own. Space nymphs rarely enter into more than one such arrangement at a time and typically only make commitments that promise to last decades or centuries, so they're extremely selective in their choice of mentee.

Draiclipsed.name: Draiclipsed

Infrared Vision.name: Infrared Vision
Infrared Vision.description: A draiclipsed can detect infrared radiation (such as that given off by warm-blooded creatures) as an imprecise sense at the listed range.

Eclipse Shroud.name: Eclipse Shroud
Eclipse Shroud.description: 15 feet. A draiclipsed absorbs light and is perpetually surrounded by shifting shadows and lengthening darkness. Light in the area decreases by one step (for example, bright light becomes dim light).

Consume Light.name: Consume Light
Consume Light.description: The draiclipsed opens their mouth and sucks in a magical light, consuming it to fuel their own powers. The draiclipsed attempts a counteract check against one magical light effect within 60 feet ([[/r 1d20+15 #Counteract]]{+15} counteract modifier). If successful, the draiclipsed becomes ringed in diffuse light, becoming photonic for the next 24 hours. While a draiclipsed is photonic, they're @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Cull the Betrayers.name: Cull the Betrayers
Cull the Betrayers.description: Whenever a draiclipsed would deal void damage to an undead or other creature with void healing, that void damage becomes cold damage instead.

Darkness Falls.name: Darkness Falls
Darkness Falls.description:
Requirements The draiclipsed is photonic

Effect The draiclipsed releases the light they've consumed in a blast of corrupted electromagnetic energy, dealing 3d8 electricity and @Damage[3d8[void]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:24|basic] save). The draiclipsed is no longer photonic.

Gathering Darkness.name: Gathering Darkness
Gathering Darkness.description: If at least one other draiclipsed is within the draiclipsed's eclipse shroud, the draiclipsed's Strikes deal an additional @Damage[1d8[void]] damage.

Draiclipsed.publicNotes:
Draiclipsed are the undead heralds of the Insatiable Eclipse, an ancient and terrifying tzitzimitl warlord buried when the Blackmoon fell on Eox and recently awakened by the Newborn. The Insatiable Eclipse amasses its forces, including legions of draiclipsed, to retake Eox, a world he feels has fallen to decadence and frivolity, whose disgraceful leaders have made the blasphemous decision to ally with the living.

Draiclipsed are canny skeletal undead whose pitch-black bones absorb light, allowing them to cast deep shadows. They can also consume magical light, using the absorbed photons to obscure their form before unleashing it in a blast of electromagnetic energy. Utterly loyal to their creator and liege, draiclipsed are trained for open warfare and even more dangerous when fighting alongside one another.

Corzador.name: Corzador

Follicle Germination.name: Follicle Germination
Follicle Germination.description:
Hundreds of wirelike nerve endings erupt from the corzador's head in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. Each non-corzadai in the area must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:18|options:area-effect] save or be instantly observed by all corzadais within 100 feet. Corzadais in the area gain a +1 circumstance bonus to attack and damage rolls against the detected creatures as long as the targets remain in the emanation. The corzador's emanation remains in effect until it takes a move action to leave its current space.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.Bw1u0YIbG0ZV1CIR]{Effect: Follicle Germination}

Shrieking Utricle.name: Shrieking Utricle
Shrieking Utricle.description:
Trigger A non-corzadai creature moves within the corzador's active Follicle Germination

Effect The corzador emits a high-pitched shriek. All non-corzadai creatures within the corzador's Follicle Emanation take @Damage[2d8[sonic]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[fortitude|dc:18|basic|options:area-effect] save.

Corzador.publicNotes:
Vaguely humanoid corzadors herd corzad packs as they carry out their grim tasks.

Corzadais spawned from the broken remains of Aucturn. Explosively launched into space, these fungal colonies are held together by mysterious forces. Their strange fruiting bodies have taken on numerous shapes, of which two have been more commonly seen in the Pact Worlds than others: corzads and corzadors.

Ulgaazan Nyssholora.name: Ulgaazan Nyssholora

Telepathy Sense.name: Telepathy Sense
Telepathy Sense.description: A nyssholora senses all creatures that have telepathy, limited telepathy, or a similar ability, such as a mystic's bond, as an imprecise sense at the listed range. This sense works through walls and other obstacles.

Sonic Snarl.name: Sonic Snarl
Sonic Snarl.description:
Trigger A creature fails or critically fails a melee Strike against the nyssholora

Effect The nyssholora snarls at the triggering creature, dealing @Damage[(3d6+6)[sonic]] damage.

Crunch.name: 嘎吱嘎吱 Crunch
Crunch.description:
Frequency once per round

Requirements A creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed} in the nyssholora's jaws

Effect The nyssholora chomps down on the creature, dealing @Damage[(2d12+16)[piercing]] damage.

Discordant Bellow.name: Discordant Bellow
Discordant Bellow.description: The nyssholora unleashes a blast of discordant sound that deal @Damage[18d6[sonic]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:60] (@Check[reflex|dc:38|basic] save). Objects and constructs in the area are treated as if they had half as much Hardness as usual. Creatures that critically fail their saving throw are also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round. The nyssholora can't use Discordant Bellow again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Discordant Bellow]]{1d4 rounds}.

Phasic Flurry.name: Phasic Flurry
Phasic Flurry.description: The nyssholora Strides up to its Speed then makes a phasic blade Strike against each creature within reach. Each attack counts toward the nyssholora's multiple attack penalty, but the penalty doesn't increase until after all the attacks.

Phasic Strike.name: Phasic Strike
Phasic Strike.description: A nyssholora's phasic blade Strike treats any object or construct it hits as if the target had half as much Hardness as usual.

Ulgaazan Nyssholora.publicNotes:
The largest nyssholora ever recorded was Ulgaaza the Ageless, a mythical creature so old and so massive it was said to dwarf mountains. Today, any nyssholora that reaches epic proportions is called "Ulgaazan," though even these mighty beasts pale in comparison to their namesake.

Incredibly ferocious, nyssholoras are dinosaur-like creatures that number among the most dangerous and feared apex predators on the planet of Castrovel. These walking weapons brandish lethal biology: a massive maw lined with twin rows of razor-sharp teeth, scythe-shaped phasic blade forearms that vibrate at ultrasonic speeds, and a scourge-like tail capable of absorbing electricity from the surrounding atmosphere. Yet, nyssholoras are also cunning and perceptive—a frill of tentacles that crowns their head detect telepathic signals, making it impossible for the local formians and lashuntas to escape their notice. Their phasic blades can cut through walls and vehicles as easily as underbrush, ensuring prey have nowhere safe to hide.

Spined Renkroda.name: Spined Renkroda

Spine Deflection.name: Spine Deflection
Spine Deflection.description:
Requirements The spined renkroda's spines are bristled

Trigger The spined renkroda would be hit by a ranged Strike, but the damage hasn't been rolled yet

Effect The spined renkroda twists its body, deflecting part of the attack with its spines, and gains resistance 10 to the triggering damage. Its spines are no longer bristled.

Bristle.name: 炸毛 Bristle
Bristle.description: The spined renkroda bristles its spines and adopts a defensive posture, gaining a +2 circumstance bonus to AC until it uses a move action, uses Spine Deflection, or makes any Strike other than a spine Strike. Any creature that attempts a melee attack against the spined renkroda takes @Damage[3d6[piercing]] damage, regardless of whether the attack hits.

Spine Barrage.name: Spine Barrage
Spine Barrage.description: The spined renkroda makes three ranged spine Strikes.

Terrifying Roar.name: Terrifying Roar
Terrifying Roar.description:
The spined renkroda bellows ferociously. Each non-renkroda creature within 60 feet must attempt a @Check[will|dc:32] save. The creature is then temporarily immune for 10 minutes.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1}.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2}.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 3}.

Spined Renkroda.publicNotes:
Thickly built and burly, spined renkrodas live on open plains, mesas, and plateaus. Unlike most renkrodas, their frill is a deadly weapon, lined with hundreds of foot-long spines that serve as an excellent defense—and a deadly weapon.

Renkrodas are a family of large dinosaur-like predators native to the planet Castrovel. They've spread beyond the jungle planet's boundaries thanks to smugglers, poachers, and ultra-wealthy big-game hunters. Bipedal and strong with long necks and decorative spines, renkrodas are best known for their terrifying roars, which they bellow frequently as a form of long-range communication and to scare away other predators and scavengers. Over a dozen species of renkrodas exist, each specially adapted to their environment or ecological niche.

Dread Empathnid.name: Dread Empathnid

Emotionsense.name: Emotionsense
Emotionsense.description: This is a precise sense against creatures under an emotion effect or in the grips of overwhelming emotions (at the GM's discretion). Against other creatures, this is an imprecise sense. Creatures immune to emotion or mental effects or under the effects of a calm spell are undetectable by emotionsense.

Dread Venom.name: Dread Venom
Dread Venom.description:
Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:18]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[mental]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 2d6 mental and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 As stage 2, plus @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1} (1 round)

Mental Mire.name: Mental Mire
Mental Mire.description: A non-flying creature damaged by the dread empathnid's psychic web Strike or psychic burst is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}, stuck to the ground or nearest adjacent surface until it [[/act escape dc=18]]{Escapes}. A flying creature must instead succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:18] save or fall 20 feet (or 40 feet on a critical failure).

Dread Empathnid.publicNotes:
Dread empathnids are deadly hunters native to jungle planets. They thrive on populated worlds, and their preferred prey are intelligent humanoids. Drawn to negative emotions, dread empathnids absorb the terror of their dying victims and infuse their webbing with these horrific experiences.

Empathnids have tremendous empathy for other creatures. The fact that the 8-inch spidery creatures come in a variety of colors and have a lifesaving venom likely explains why they're frequently used as companions or pets across the Pact Worlds.

Mycelium Network.name: Mycelium Network
Mycelium Network.description: Psychic fungi are connected to a network of psychic filaments bonding all psychic fungi from the same colony. This network grants the harvester the ability to detect creatures capable of thought within 30 feet of a bonded psychic fungus up to 1,000 feet away as an imprecise sense.

Release Spores.name: 释放孢子 Release Spores
Release Spores.description:
Trigger The harvester is reduced to 0 Hit Points

Effect The harvester releases a cloud of spores in a @Template[type:burst|distance:10] centered on a corner of its own space that lasts for 1 round. Each creature that's in the cloud or enters it is exposed to befuddling spores. If this reaction was triggered by damage from a melee attack, the triggering creature uses the outcome one degree of success worse than the result of its roll for its Fortitude save (two degrees worse if it was a jaws Strike or other Strike with the creature's mouth).

Befuddling Spores.name: Befuddling Spores
Befuddling Spores.description:
Plants and fungi are immune

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:21]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3} (1 round)

Stage 4 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4} (1 round)

Drain Brain.name: Drain Brain
Drain Brain.description: The elder psychic fungus consumes the fluids and psychic essences from the brain of a creature within 10 feet that has been dead for no more than 1 minute. The elder psychic fungus regains the use of their highest-ranked spent innate spell. The creature is considered to have died due to a death effect.

Lore (all subcategories of all creatures.name: Lore (all subcategories of all creatures trained in Lore skills within 1 mile)

Elindrian Celebrant.name: Elindrian Celebrant

Husk Mind.name: Husk Mind
Husk Mind.description:
Elindrians can communicate nearly instantaneously via a primal bond similar to a formian hive mind. While within telepathic range of at least one other elindrian with husk mind, an elindrian acolyte gains a +2 circumstance bonus to initiative rolls, Perception checks, and saving throws against mental effects. If one elindrian is aware of a combatant, all members of the husk mind within range are aware of it.

The elindrian's husk mind is integrated with their scent; for purposes of detecting other elindrians, formians, undead, or corpses, their scent is a precise sense, rather than imprecise.

An elindrian always knows the precise distance and direction to the Terror of Ukulam, so long as they're on the same plane of existence.

Pain Bond.name: Pain Bond
Pain Bond.description: A celebrant's painsaw is powered by the heart of another celebrant. If a celebrant is within 30 feet of a painsaw that contains their heart when the painsaw Strikes a creature, the celebrant regains a number of Hit Points equal to their level (typically 4). It's taboo for a celebrant to wield a painsaw made from their own heart or a heart from any celebrant whose death they didn't witness (or cause) themself. A painsaw otherwise functions in all ways like a painglaive but doesn't function with normal batteries. A single celebrant heart functions as a tactical battery when used with a painsaw; it recharges if the celebrant spends 10 minutes in the presence of an elindrian queen.

Elindrian Celebrant.publicNotes:
These elindrian warriors relish violence. Their only motivation seems to be spreading pain, which they themselves are immune to; their nerve endings developed in such a way that they can't feel pain at all, experiencing it in some way that causes them little to no suffering. As long as there's an elindrian queen nearby to revive them, celebrants spend most of their time battling one another, honing their capability to do violence until a better target comes along.

The people known as elindrians vanished eons ago into desolate husk-hives beneath the surface of the planet Castrovel. Until recently, they were creatures of legend, existing only in the most obscure formian histories. Now, scholars on Castrovel desperately search for additional records about elindrians, their origins, and—most importantly—the truth about their connection to the terrifying ooze-like creature that recently descended from their moon, Elindrae. One theory is that elindrians share some primal bond with the ooze-thing called the Terror of Ukulam, and perhaps both originate from Elindrae—other theories claim that elindrians created the ooze in the first place or that they're distant cousins to formians, corrupted by the Terror long ago.

Void Zombie.name: Void Zombie

Salt Water Vulnerability.name: Salt Water Vulnerability
Salt Water Vulnerability.description: Salt water quickly attacks a larval akata's cells as a strong acid. If the void zombie is fully immersed in salt water, it takes @Damage[4d6[acid]] damage from the water immediately and at the end of each of its turns as long as it remains immersed. Its weakness to salt water applies to this damage. On any round in which the void zombie takes damage due to its salt water weakness, the larval akata withdraws to hide within the host's body and renders the void zombie @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1}.

Feed on Blood.name: Feed on Blood
Feed on Blood.description:
Requirements The void zombie's previous action was a successful feeding tendril Strike against a living creature

Effect The void zombie drains blood from the required creature using its feeding tendril. The void zombie regains @Damage[4[healing]] Hit Points, and the creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained 1} until it receives healing of any kind or amount.

Void Zombie.publicNotes:
When an akata bites a humanoid, it infests them with microscopic, parasitic larvae. Those who perish from this parasitization, a condition known as void death, rise again as void zombies. While they resemble a typical rotting corpse, an elongated bluish-gray feeding tendril extends from their shattered lower jaw. When the immature akata within the body senses potential prey, this tendril often undulates and writhes with nauseating eagerness.

Once the host body dies, the larvae feed on each other until the strongest makes its way to the victim's brain. After several hours of rapid gestation, it attaches to the brain and infuses it with a mote of necromantic energy. This process leaves the larva ravenous, driving it to consume the blood of living creatures. Void zombies tend to last several weeks as the larva grows, but eventually its host compels it to seek out a safe, secluded place where it can disgorge the larva for one last surge of growth before the host body goes inert. Several hours later, a fully formed akata emerges from the frothing puddle, typically consuming the corpse as its first meal.

In general, akatas leave void zombies alone, and the larval parasites attempt to spread out to avoid competing for food. In a confined and undisturbed space, void zombies stand completely still to conserve energy. The juvenile akatas within become dormant and feed on the host body's tissue until they either reach maturity or sense a viable food source. Given the void zombie's relatively short existence, those who stumble upon a previous attack might find the void zombies already devoured or discarded and an eerie colony of silent, glassy cocoons full of ravenous hibernating akatas instead.

Void zombies tend to ignore other undead, but they become inexplicably aggressive when confronted with other creatures that are infested by parasites or otherwise controlled or influenced by external forces. Many have tried experimenting with void zombie behavior by forcing them to confront, for example, a rendworm host or a creature under the thrall of a spellcaster. Most such experiments end inconclusively at best, and many have ended in disaster.

Pachinyam.name: Pachinyam

Dusting.name: Dusting
Dusting.description: The pachinyam shakes it thick fur and releases a cloud of dust and dander in a @Template[type:burst|distance:5] radius centered on a corner of one of its squares that functions as a mist spell. This dust cloud blocks electronic communication to and from anyone inside the cloud. Any item with the tech trait becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{glitching 1} if it's inside the dust cloud. The pachinyam can't use this ability again until they take a dust bath as a 3-action activity with the move trait.

Pachinyam.publicNotes:
A single pachinyam isn't much of a threat but can be a nuisance around those who rely on technology. Some pachinyam owners take extra time to play with their pets after their daily dust baths, especially before entering a starship or other facility where an unexpected cloud of dust could have catastrophic consequences.

These dusty, long-eared fluffy burrowing rodents are native to Daimalko and emerged alongside the colossi during the Awakening 200 years ago. They were initially heralded as potential pets and affectionately referred to as "dust bunnies," but the survivors of the Awakening soon found the species were as dangerous as the colossi rampaging across the planet.

While one or two pachinyams behave as calm herbivores, they reproduce rapidly. When the pachinyam population reaches a tipping point, they become vicious predators. Their dust's ability to disrupt both visual and telecommunications makes it challenging for settlements to warn or organize against them. Outside civilization, the pachinyam population is kept in check by their swarms' instinctually drive to be near colossi despite the obvious danger. Some also hypothesize that the scent of a pachinyam swarm's dust cloud attracts hungry colossi.

Jinchori Endling.name: Jinchori Endling

Huntersight.name: Huntersight
Huntersight.description: A jinchori can sense the presence of any creature wielding weapons as a precise sense at the listed range.

Rejuvenation.name: 复苏 Rejuvenation
Rejuvenation.description: When an endling is destroyed, it reforms after [[/gmr 2d4 #days]]{2d4 days} within the area where it first emerged, fully healed. An endling can be permanently destroyed only if someone determines the reason for its existence and sets right whatever prevents the spirit from resting, such as an act of decolonization, ecological restoration, or curing the disease responsible for its extinction.

Noxious Breath.name: Noxious Breath
Noxious Breath.description: The jinchori endling floods the air with toxic fumes, dealing @Damage[4d12[poison]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[fortitude|dc:22|basic] save). A creature that fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure). The jinchori can't use Noxious Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Noxious Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Jinchori Endling.publicNotes:
Jinchoris were sinuous quadrupedal reptiles that dug tunnel systems through the desert world of Priori-8. Their iridescent scales grew into dense armored plates, protecting them from the hunters who sought their brilliant frills as fashion accessories. Poachers started flooding jinchori tunnels with poison gas in a method that proved all too effective and wiped the species out. Years after, visitors to Priori-8 spy gleaming wyrms stalking them through caves and tunnels, and poachers die choking on spectral poison.

Every species follows a natural arc as it emerges and evolves: rising, thriving, declining, and falling into extinction. When extremely unnatural ends to these paths occur—when unexpected predation, industrialization, or alien pathogens wipe out a population—endlings are born. These spectral members of extinct species typically develop as "answers" to their eradication. Xenobiologists differ on what creates endlings, unable to confirm whether the creatures are a species' last collective sorrow made manifest or just vengeful individual spirits—the last lights to go out.

Pachinyam Swarm.name: Pachinyam Swarm

Dust.name: Dust
Dust.description: 30 feet. The pachinyam swarm shakes it thick fur and releases a cloud of dust and dander in a 30-foot radius burst centered on a corner of one of its squares that functions as a mist spell. This dust cloud blocks electronic communication to and from anyone inside the cloud. Any item with the tech trait becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6A2QDy8wRGCVQsSd]{glitching 1} if it's inside the dust cloud.

Swarming Bites.name: Swarming Bites
Swarming Bites.description: Each enemy in the swarm's space takes @Damage[2d8[piercing]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:20|basic] save). Creatures that fail this save are @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} on a critical failure). While within a pachinyam's dust cloud and sickened, the creature is also suppressed until it leaves the cloud or recovers from the sickened condition.

Pachinyam Swarm.publicNotes:
Pachinyam swarms can release a cloud of billowing dust as individual rodents constantly reapply dust to their comrades.

These dusty, long-eared fluffy burrowing rodents are native to Daimalko and emerged alongside the colossi during the Awakening 200 years ago. They were initially heralded as potential pets and affectionately referred to as "dust bunnies," but the survivors of the Awakening soon found the species were as dangerous as the colossi rampaging across the planet.

While one or two pachinyams behave as calm herbivores, they reproduce rapidly. When the pachinyam population reaches a tipping point, they become vicious predators. Their dust's ability to disrupt both visual and telecommunications makes it challenging for settlements to warn or organize against them. Outside civilization, the pachinyam population is kept in check by their swarms' instinctually drive to be near colossi despite the obvious danger. Some also hypothesize that the scent of a pachinyam swarm's dust cloud attracts hungry colossi.

Jinsul Trooper.name: Jinsul Trooper

Strider Leap.name: Strider Leap
Strider Leap.description: The jinsul Strides and then performs a [[/act long-jump]]. They can Stride less than 10 feet and not automatically fail their check to Long Jump.

Jinsul Trooper.publicNotes:
The lowest ranked jinsuls in a warband are the subordinate troopers. These jinsuls prove themselves by hurtling toward the enemy, discharging weapons, and closing with their vicious leg blades. Those troopers who survive long enough are recognized and promoted through the harsh jinsul military lifestyle.

Jinsuls are a warlike species scattered across the Vast. Six-legged creatures with a bulbous body covered in eyes, jinsuls have notable segments of chitin along with a set of upper forelimbs for using equipment. They long ago lived in the region of space known as the Scoured Stars but eventually departed and settled on the harsh world of Rax. In recent years, the divine herald Dhurus unified the jinsuls into a cohesive force known as the Jinsul Hierocracy, which briefly retook the Scoured Stars. A joint alliance between several species and members of the Starfinder Society defeated Dhurus and scattered the jinsuls back into the Vast.

With countless bases and fleets operating in deep space, jinsuls mostly act as raiders, scavenging for equipment and testing their mettle against other species. Indoctrinated to view themselves as a superior species, with only other inhabitants of the Scoured Stars having any value, jinsuls prefer to engage in short-ranged combat with their foes.

Jinsuls aren't numerous enough to fill every need on the many ships and starbases they control across the galaxy. Instead, they rely on robots and automated computer systems (always commanded by at least one jinsul officer) to keep their space stations running efficiently. These systems are programmed to be just as deadly and ruthless as jinsuls themselves; even the most innocuous automated system or robot, like a garbage collector, might wield deadly weapons or contain vicious technomagical countermeasures.

Rendworm.name: Rendworm

Infest.name: Infest
Infest.description: The rendworm crawls into an orifice of a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} living creature with which it shares a space. The rendworm immediately dies and spreads itself through the creature's bloodstream, exposing it to rendworm infestation.

Numbing Toxin.name: Numbing Toxin
Numbing Toxin.description:
Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[cold]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[cold]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d6[cold]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} (1 round)

Rendworm Infestation.name: Rendworm Infestation
Rendworm Infestation.description:
Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:19]

Onset 1 day

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} (1 day)

Stage 2 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} and stupefied 1 (1 day)

Stage 3 target becomes a rendworm host

Rendworm.publicNotes: A parasitic creature from the edge of the Pact Worlds, the rendworm has a sinuous, undulating body and fine quills that run in a frill down its back. Blue gray in color, it blends in with the frigid surroundings of its home territory, making it easy to overlook when setting up campsites. The short-lived creature needs a living host for its reproductive cycle and uses a chilling neurotoxin to paralyze, infect, and spread.

Abysium Dragon (Young).name: Abysium Dragon (Young)

Toxic Cloud.name: 毒云术 Toxic Cloud
Toxic Cloud.description:
你创造一团有毒云雾。该效果如同@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.9XHmC2JgTUIQ1CCm]{迷雾术 Mist}一般，除了该区域会每轮远离你10尺。在该区域中开始回合的生物承受6d8毒素伤害，这有一次基础强韧豁免。你可以解消该法术。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d8。

Unfettered Movement.name: 行动无碍 Unfettered Movement
Unfettered Movement.description:
你驱散可能影响一个生物的阻碍。当处于该法术效果中时，法术目标忽视会赋予其速度环境减值的效果。当法术目标尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}一个令其@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}的效果时，它自动成功，除非该效果是魔法性的，并且其环级比行动无碍更高。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.CdAyAiMGESvgNQtz]{Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement}

Fireball.name: 火球术 Fireball
Fireball.description:
在你指定的位置爆发出咆哮的烈焰，造成6d6火焰伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加2d6。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Ignition.name: 引火术 Ignition
Ignition.description:
你打个响指并指向一个目标，后者便开始燃烧。作出一次法术攻击检定对抗目标的AC，命中时造成2d4点火焰伤害。若目标位于你的近战触及范围内，你能选择用火焰进行一次近战法术攻击以取代远程法术攻击，这会使得法术的所有伤害骰提升至d6骰子。

大成功 目标承受双倍伤害以及1d4点持续火焰伤害。

成功 目标承受全额伤害。

升阶（+1） 起始伤害增加1d4点，重击的持续火焰伤害增加1d4点。

@Damage[(@item.rank)d4[persistent,fire]]{按等级计算的持续火焰伤害}

@Damage[(@item.rank)d6[persistent,fire]]{按等级计算的持续火焰伤害（近战）}

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Radioactive Aura.name: Radioactive Aura
Radioactive Aura.description: 90 feet. A creature that enters the radioactive aura must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:25] save against severe radiation sickness. It's then temporarily immune to radioactive aura for 10 minutes.

Control Radiation.name: Control Radiation
Control Radiation.description: Abysium dragons have ultimate control over the radioactive energy that grows within their bodies. Any time an abysium dragon deals fire or poison damage, they can choose whether that damage is magical, and they can change any amount of the fire damage to poison (or any amount of poison damage to fire).

Draconic Frenzy.name: 龙之狂怒 Draconic Frenzy
Draconic Frenzy.description: The dragon makes two claw Strikes and one tail Strike in any order.

Draconic Momentum.name: Draconic Momentum
Draconic Momentum.description: The dragon recharges their Radiation Breath whenever they score a critical hit with a Strike.

Radiation Breath.name: Radiation Breath
Radiation Breath.description: The dragon breathes a blast of caustic superheated gas that deals @Damage[5d6[fire],3d12[persistent,poison]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[fortitude|dc:28|basic|options:area-effect] save). They can't use Radiation Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Radiation Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Abysium Dragon (Young).publicNotes: Drawing on radiation as both a force of destruction and a source of energy, abysium dragons are tied to the radioactive starmetal of the same name. These dragons grow deposits of pure abysium in their bodies, becoming more radioactive as they age, causing aggression, agitation, and even loneliness since not many creatures can long survive the company of an aging abysium dragon. Abysium dragons frequently turn to pursuits such as augmentation and weapon crafting (to take advantage of their innate power source) and the construction of robots (to keep them company). This work drives abysium dragons to seek out sturdy, radiation-resistant materials they can use for crafting, and they often spend years at a time scouring small moons and asteroids in search of precious materials.
Abysium Dragon (Young).allSaves: +1 status bonus to all saves vs. magic

Surnoch.name: Surnoch

Tail Smash.name: Tail Smash
Tail Smash.description: The surnoch's tail smash has a burst centered on a corner of its space. It's excluded from the burst.

Corrosive Spines.name: Corrosive Spines
Corrosive Spines.description: With impressive control, the surnoch can launch its spines in a tight grouping over a great distance. All creatures in a @Template[type:line|distance:30] take @Damage[8d8[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage with a @Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] save. On a failure, the creature also takes @Damage[1d8[persistent,acid]|options:area-damage] damage (or @Damage[2d8[persistent,acid]|options:area-damage] damage on a critical failure). The surnoch can't use Corrosive Spines again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Corrosive Spines]]{1d4 rounds}.

Surnoch's Kiss.name: Surnoch's Kiss
Surnoch's Kiss.description:
Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:25]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 3} (1 round)

Tunneling Expert.name: Tunneling Expert
Tunneling Expert.description: Surnochs have adapted to move swiftly underground. When burrowing, a surnoch worm leaves a tunnel behind itself. When moving through a previously created surnoch tunnel, it gains a +10-foot status bonus to its Speed.

Surnoch.publicNotes:
Surnochs inhabit lifeless asteroids and small moons throughout the cosmos. A surnoch's mouth is deep, funnel-like, and lined with numerous rows of sharp, pointed teeth, which allow it to grind matter down as it chews and melts its way through rock and stone. Surnochs have an innate sense of which minerals their bodies require most and can find these minerals even through miles of rocks. Surnochs excrete condensed forms of these minerals, leaving tunnels full of strange alloys and gem-quality materials in their wake.

When multiple surnochs gather together, their appetites synchronize, causing them to hunt for specific minerals en masse. The worms rain destruction on whole regions until their need is sated, then suddenly turn on each other in a show of dominance.

"Space worm" is a nonscientific term for a xenobiologically complex clade of invertebrate animals and beasts that make their home in the vastness of space. Some, like the diaspora and dust worms, show signs of intelligence and are directly related to each other. Others, like the surnoch, evolved separately, with their origins completely unknown to science.

Void Ooze.name: Void Ooze

Vitality Siphon.name: Vitality Siphon
Vitality Siphon.description: 20 feet. A creature attempting to restore Hit Points with a magical effect to one or more creatures inside the aura must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:25] save for each target or else the magic heals the void ooze instead. If a creature gains the dying condition while inside the aura, the ooze regains @Damage[10[healing]] Hit Points.

Numb Senses.name: Numb Senses
Numb Senses.description:
A living creature hit by a void ooze's pseudopod Strike must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:25] save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened} until the end of the creature's next turn (@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} and deafened on a critical failure).

This numbs all of the creature's perceptive senses (such as smell, taste, and touch), applying the dazzled and blinded conditions' effects to other precise senses the creature might have.

Shades Linger.name: Shades Linger
Shades Linger.description: The void ooze unleashes a pulse of magical darkness in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30]. Nonmagical light is automatically extinguished for 1 minute. The ooze also attempts to counteract any 3rd-rank or lower magical light effect in this area (counteract rank 3, counteract modifier [[/r 1d20+17 #Counteract]]{+17}).

Void Ooze.publicNotes:
A scourge to spacefarers across the galaxy and beyond, void oozes slip into the Universe from the Netherworld. These creatures float through space in eternal hibernation until they land on a planetoid or spaceship, awoken by the subtle signs of life. Entire colonies can form overnight from a single ooze lucky enough to find a battlefield, consuming the deceased and wounded in no man's land before spreading to consume the camps of war-weary soldiers.

Oozes of many types lurk in dark and abandoned places across the galaxy, emerging only to satiate their appetites and threaten adventurers, explorers, and hapless workers alike.

Akashic Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).name: Akashic Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster)

Interplanar Teleport (at will; self only.name: Interplanar Teleport (at will; self only; to and from Akashic Record and the Universe only)
Interplanar Teleport (at will; self only.description:
需求 你具有目标位面的位面密钥用于给法术定位

你和你的盟友跨越位面之间的屏障进行旅行。目标移动至其他位面，比如火元素位面、幽界、或者外层裂隙。你必须知晓目标位面的存在，而且需要使用由该位面的物质制作的魔法位面密钥来给法术定位。就如同跨界传送这个法术本身一样，大多数著名位面的位面密钥具有罕见稀有度，而鲜为人知的位面及半位面通常具有稀有、甚至有可能时独特稀有度的位面密钥。

该法术极其不精准，你会出现在目标之一（由你选择）上一次造访该位面时的位置周边，误差为1d20 x 25英里。若所有目标都是初次造访某个特定位面，你们就会出现在该位面的随机位置。跨界传送不会提供返回的手段，不过除非发生了什么另外情况，否则再次施放跨界传送能让你返回自身之前身处的位面。

Truesight.name: 真景术 Truesight
Truesight.description: 你可以看见60尺内的事物的本来面貌。GM秘密骰反制检定，对抗区域中的所有幻术或者变形效果，但这只会决定你是否能看破它（例如，如果该检定成功对抗了一个变形法术，你可以看见该生物的本来形态，但你不会结束该变形法术）。

Scouting Eye.name: 探视魔眼 Scouting Eye
Scouting Eye.description:
你在你能看见的500尺范围内，创造一个@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}的、漂浮的、直径1英寸的眼睛。它如你通常的视觉感官，能看见所有的方向，并且会持续将其所见传送给你。

每轮你第一次维持该法术时，你可以移动该眼睛30尺，且只看见眼睛前方的事物，或者移动其10尺，但能看到周围所有方向的事物。眼睛移动离开你能到达的距离没有限制，但是当你和眼睛不再处于相同的位面时，法术立即结束。你如果你想通过眼睛尝试察觉检定，你可以通过眼睛尝试搜索动作。对眼睛造成的任何伤害会摧毁它并结束该法术。

Subjective Reality.name: Subjective Reality
Subjective Reality.description:
You alter your perceptions to convince yourself that another creature or object is an illusion. Choose one object or creature you can perceive within range. For you, the target becomes transparent and doesn't create sound, smell, or other sensory output. You can move through the target, and the target can move through you. You gain resistance to all damage originating from the target equal to your level. If you are targeted by or are in the area of one of the target's abilities or effects, the target must succeed at a @Check[flat|dc:5], and if it fails, you're unaffected by the ability or effect. You're immune to all of the target's auditory, linguistic, and scent-based attacks and effects. Your attacks deal no damage to the target, and the target is immune to your spells and other effects. You and the target can affect one another indirectly, such as through a Strike from a minion or through the environment affected by a witchwarper's quantum field. When this spell ends, the target becomes immune to subjective reality for 24 hours.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.4P2rPLVKjSpUbOWI]{Spell Effect: Subjective Reality}

Truespeech.name: Truespeech
Truespeech.description:
无论什么语言，目标都可以理解其所有的词语，并且向其他生物用该语言交流。当处于一群各异的生物中时，每次目标将要说话，他可以选择一个生物，并使用一种该生物理解的语言来讲述，即使该目标不知道这语言具体是什么。

升阶（7环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Clairvoyance.name: 鹰眼术 Clairvoyance
Clairvoyance.description: 你在射程内创造出一个@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}的悬浮眼睛（它甚至可以在你的视觉线或者效果线之外）。这只眼睛不能移动，但是你可以从该处看到所有方向，如同使用你通常的视觉感官。

Confusion.name: 困惑术 Confusion
Confusion.description:
你使用奇怪的能量波动扰乱了目标的思维，令其随机行动。法术效果由目标的意志豁免决定。你可以解消该法术。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标胡言乱语，并且获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{困惑 Confused}1分钟。在其每个回合结束，它能尝试一次新豁免来结束困惑术。

大失败 目标困惑1分钟，并且没有提前结束的豁免。

升阶（8环级） 你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Eldritch Wrath.name: Eldritch Wrath
Eldritch Wrath.description:
You channel the bizarre powers that exist beyond the outer reaches of the universe, dealing 3d12 mental damage to each creature in the area as phantasmal claws, jaws, and tentacles lash out at each target. Each creature in the area must attempt a Will save. The area is difficult terrain for any creature sickened by the effects of this spell.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Critical Failure The creature takes double damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 2}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d12.

Weight of Ages.name: Weight of Ages
Weight of Ages.description:
You burden a creature's body and mind with the pains and sorrows of a lifetime. The target takes 3d8 bludgeoning damage and 3d8 mental damage and must attempt a Will saving throw.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes half damage.

Failure The target takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{Encumbered} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The target takes double damage and is encumbered for 1 minute.

Heightened (+1) The mental damage increases by 2d8.

Clairaudience.name: 锐耳术 Clairaudience
Clairaudience.description: 你在射程内创造出一个@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}的悬浮耳朵（它甚至可以在你的视觉线或者效果线之外）。它不能移动，但是你可以通过该耳朵听到声音，如同你通常的听觉感官。

Haste.name: 加速术 Haste
Haste.description:
魔法强化了目标，令其行动迅速。它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened}状态，并且每轮可以使用该额外动作以打击或者行走。

升阶（7环级） 你能以至多6个生物为目标。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.ElkXovNrHB0Doi6O]{法术效果：加速术}

Hypercognition.name: 极化认知 Hypercognition
Hypercognition.description: 你高速分类整理与你当前情况相关的信息。如施放该法术的一部分，你可以立即使用6个回忆知识动作。对于这些动作，你不能使用任何在你回忆知识时触发的特殊能力，反应动作，或者自由动作。

Mind Reading.name: 读心术 Mind Reading
Mind Reading.description:
你通过一次短暂的心灵接触来尝试阅读目标的想法。它必须尝试一次意志豁免。目标会暂时免疫你的读心术1小时。

大成功 目标得知当施放该法术时你模糊的表层想法。

成功 你得知目标的智力调整值是高于，等于，还是低于你。

失败 你得知当施放该法术时目标模糊的表层想法，并且你得知目标的智力是高于，等于，还是低于你。

大失败 如失败，并且在法术持续时间中，你可以维持该法术来再次侦测目标的表层想法。目标不会获得另外的豁免。

Humanoid Form.name: 类人形态 Humanoid Form
Humanoid Form.description:
你将自身变成某种中型或者小型类人生物的外观，例如矮人、精灵、地精、半身人、人类或者兽人。处于该形态时，包含你本来的其他特征，并获得类人特征，以及其他与该生物类型相关的特征（例如地精或者人类）。如果该变形减少了你的体型，他也会对应减少你的触及（通常减少到5尺）。该变形不会改变你的任何数据，并且你不会获得你变形为的类人形态的任何特殊能力。你仍然可以穿戴和使用你的装备，它会改变大小来适应你的新形态（仅如果需要）。如果物品离开你，它会回到本来的大小。

类人形态 赋予你在假装成所选择族裔的欺骗检定上+4状态加值，并且你会加上你的等级，即使你未受训，但是你不能让你看起来像某个特定的人。如果你想要乔装某个个人，你仍然需要制造伪装，但GM不会将族裔不同计入你的欺骗检定DC中。你可以解消该法术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.B9Hzt4ki8eqlXxyh]{Spell Effect: Humanoid Form}

升阶（3环级） 如果你变作的形态有，则你获得黑暗视觉或者昏暗视觉。

升阶（5环级） 你可以变为大型类人生物的外形。这会增加你的体型，你获得变巨术的效果。

Stupefy.name: 愚者之思 Stupefy
Stupefy.description:
你令目标精神迟钝，基于其意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 1}，持续1分钟。

失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 2}，持续1分钟。

大失败 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{呆滞 Stupefied 3}，持续1分钟。

Translate.name: 通译语言 Translate
Translate.description:
在你施放该法术时，目标会理解其正听到或者阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会令其能够理解密文，使用隐喻表达的含义，或者类似的内容（由GM所判定）。如果目标能够听见数种语言并且了解该情况，它能选择要理解的那种语言；否则，随机选择这种语言。

升阶（3环级） 该目标也能使用该语言交流。

升阶（4环级） 你能以至多10个生物作为目标，并且这些目标也能使用该语言交流。

Akashic Download (at will).name: Akashic Download (at will)
Akashic Download (at will).description:
You execute a psychic search of the Akashic Record for information about a specific topic and magically transfer this data to your comm unit or computer. When you Cast this Spell, choose any skill in which you're trained that has the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} action.

Any time during the duration, you can consult your comm unit while attempting a Recall Knowledge check using your chosen skill. This check gains a +1 status bonus. Checking your comm unit is part of the action to Recall Knowledge. You must be holding the comm unit to do so. The comm unit instantly compiles and displays snippets and selections from various media relevant to the topic, which grants you the bonus. If you roll a critical failure on this check, you get a failure instead. If the check is successful and the subject is a creature, you gain additional information or context about the creature. Once you reference the comm unit, the spell ends. When the spell ends, your access to the Akashic Record ends, and all the information you downloaded returns to the Akashic Record.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.h1i8c47U0IOrMrHJ]{Spell Effect: Akashic Download}

Heightened (3rd) You can reference your comm unit three times before the spell ends.

Analyze Target.name: Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Daze.name: 晕眩术 Daze
Daze.description:
你侵入目标的精神，利用精神冲击令目标晕眩。该冲击造成1d6心灵伤害，具有基础意志豁免。如果目标在豁免中大失败，它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 该伤害增加1d6。

Delete.name: Delete
Delete.description:
You delete data from a device or object with a flamboyant magical gesture. This data might be handwritten, printed, or digital. You delete up to 1,500 words' worth of text, one page of content, or one display screen worth of text or other visual information. Non-magical writing in or on an unattended or held object is automatically deleted. Attempt a counteract check to delete digital or magical writing. If you fail to delete writing that's part of a hazard, you trigger the hazard. This can't be used to delete the contents of a spellbook or similar means of storing magical formulas or spells.

If you target an attended tech item with the tracking trait, attempt a counteract check. On a success, the item becomes glitching 1. A creature holding the item can Interact to restart the software, reducing the glitching value by 1.

Heightened (7th) You can delete all the data stored locally on a single device or book, or all the data on a device or book related to a specific name, topic, or category.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Disguise Magic.name: 伪装灵光 Disguise Magic
Disguise Magic.description:
你改变一个物品或者魔法的灵光会如何作用于侦测魔法（Detect Magic）这类效果。你可以完全隐藏灵光，让一个物品看起来是普通物品或者更低等级的物品，或者让一个法术看起来是相同获得更低环级的常见法术。你可以解消该法术。使用比伪装灵光更高环级的@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.gpzpAAAJ1Lza2JVl]{侦测魔法 Detect Magic}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.OhD2Z6rIGGD5ocZA]{阅读灵光 Read Aura}可以通过使用对应该法术的技能（奥术为奥法，神术为宗教，异能为神秘，原能为自然）来尝试不相信幻觉。相同的施法者的进一步的不相信尝试会得到与初次检定相同的结果。

升阶（2环级） 你可以对一个生物施放该法术，伪装其身上所有的物品和魔法效果。

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你专注于目标物体，拓展神智，以感受魔法灵光。当你完成施法后，你得知该物品是否具有魔法。你或者你共有了灵光情报的人在对该物品@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic}时获得+2环境加值。如果该物体是幻象，仅当该效果的环级低于你的阅读灵光环级时你才能发现此事实。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.J6OhRNSN23KzOPRL]{Spell Effect: Read Aura}

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多10个物体为目标。

升阶（8环级） 你能以任意数量物体为目标。

Shield.name: Shield
Shield.description:
你举起一面力场构成的魔法护盾。这视同你使用了举起盾牌动作，赋予你在AC上的+1环境加值，直到你的下个回合开始，但这里不需要手来使用。

当该法术生效时，你可以使用你的魔法护盾来进行 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.jM72TjJ965jocBV8]{盾牌格挡 Shield Block}反应动作。该盾牌具有硬度5。你可以使用该法术的反应动作来减少任何来自法术或者魔法效果的伤害，即使这不造成物理伤害。在你使用盾牌格挡后，该法术结束，并且你无法在10分钟内再次施放它。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Jemq5UknGdMO7b73]{法术效果：护盾术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.QF6RDlCoTvkVHRo4]{效果：护盾术免疫}

升阶（+2） 该盾牌的硬度增加5。

Sure Strike.name: 料敌机先 Sure Strike
Sure Strike.description:
在你的回合结束前，你下一次尝试攻击骰时，骰两次并使用较好的结果。该攻击会忽视对攻击骰的环境减值，以及其他任何目标@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}所导致的纯骰检定。然后你临时免疫料敌机先10分钟。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.fpGDAz2v5PG0zUSl]{Spell Effect: Sure Strike}

Akashic Eye.name: Akashic Eye
Akashic Eye.description: Instead of using their own memories, an Akashic dragon can ascertain information from the Akashic Records. This gives it the Akashic Record Lore skill, which it can use to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} of any kind.

+2 Status to All Saves vs. Occult.name: +2 Status to All Saves vs. Occult

Akashic Interference.name: Akashic Interference
Akashic Interference.description:
90 feet. The swirl of constant uploads and downloads near the Akashic dragon make attempts to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} unpredictable. A creature other than an akashic dragon that enters or begins its turn in the area must attempt a @Check[will|dc:28] save. Regardless of the result of the saving throw, the creature is temporarily immune to this dragon's Akashic interference for 1 minute.

Critical Success For 1 round, when the creature attempts to Recall Knowledge, it gains a +3 status bonus to its check.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure For 1 round, when the creature attempts to Recall Knowledge, it takes a –3 status penalty to its check.

Critical Failure As failure, but the effect lasts 1 minute.

Deflecting Lasers.name: Deflecting Lasers
Deflecting Lasers.description:
Trigger The dragon is critically hit by an attack

Effect The Akashic dragon raises a web of deflecting lasers using the eyes embedded all over their body, gaining resistance 15 to all damage against the triggering attack and absorbing some of the blow's energy, recharging their Akashic Barrage. If the Akashic dragon has succeeded at a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} check against the creature in the last minute, they gain resistance 20 instead.

Akashic Adaptability.name: Akashic Adaptability
Akashic Adaptability.description: The Akashic dragon can activate magic and tech items with the Cast a Spell activation of any tradition as if the spells they contain were occult spells.

Akashic Barrage.name: Akashic Barrage
Akashic Barrage.description: The dragon condenses cutting truths and fiery revelations from the Akashic Record into sizzling laser fire that they project as a cone from their primary eye to assail their foes. This deals @Damage[14d6[fire]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:33|basic|options:area-effect,inflicts:stupefied] save). If a creature critically fails its Reflex save against Akashic Barrage and the Akashic dragon has succeeded at a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about the creature in the last minute, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round. The dragon can't use Akashic Barrage again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Akashic Barrage]]{1d4 rounds}.

Records of the Enemy.name: Records of the Enemy
Records of the Enemy.description: The first time each encounter the Akashic dragon hits and deals damage to a creature with their jaws Strike, they receive information about the creature as if they'd succeeded at a check to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about that creature.

Shocking Revelation.name: Shocking Revelation
Shocking Revelation.description:
Requirements The dragon has successfully Recalled Knowledge about an enemy within 90 feet within the last minute

Effect The dragon utters a shocking truth about the creature that even it might not know, causing it and its allies to hesitate or act erratically. Every enemy within 90 feet that can hear the secret must attempt a @Check[will|dc:31|options:area-effect,inflicts:slowed,inflicts:confused] save. Each creature is then immune to Shocking Revelation for 24 hours.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 1} for 1 round.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed 2} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round.

Akashic Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).publicNotes: Though rarely encountered outside their crumbling, relic-filled lairs, Akashic dragons occasionally live in hubs of knowledge, such as bustling space stations or cities. These dragons, bestowed with a direct connection to the Akashic Record, are arrogant curators of knowledge, assuming (often correctly) that no other being could possibly have a deeper understanding of the universe's secrets. Akashic dragons spend extensive time in the Akashic Record, often emerging after what they perceive as many days while mere hours have passed for the rest of the galaxy.
Akashic Dragon (Adult, Spellcaster).allSaves: +2 status to all saves vs. occult

Zitteroc.name: Zitteroc

Poison Sense.name: Poison Sense
Poison Sense.description: A zitteroc can detect poison as an imprecise sense at the listed range, including poisonous substances, poisoned creatures, and creatures with attacks that inflict poison.

Sickening Death.name: Sickening Death
Sickening Death.description:
Frequency once per day

Trigger The zitteroc takes damage

Effect The zitteroc releases a spray of acid in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:15], dealing @Damage[4d4[acid]|options:area-damage] damage to each creature in the area (@Check[reflex|dc:18|basic] save), then uses Still as a Corpse.

Shimmer Hide.name: Shimmer Hide
Shimmer Hide.description:
Frequency once per round

Effect The zitteroc focuses on shifting its hide pattern to match its surroundings. The zitteroc becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} to creatures more than 15 feet away from it until the start of its next turn.

Siphon Poison.name: Siphon Poison
Siphon Poison.description:
Requirements The zitteroc's last action was a successful mandibles Strike

Effect The zitteroc siphons poison from the struck target's bloodstream. If the target is afflicted by a poison or possesses a natural poison, the zitteroc consumes that poison to empower its own abilities. The poison effect is suppressed on the target for 1 round, or the target can't use its natural poison until the end of its next turn. Until the end of the zitteroc's next turn, the zitteroc increases its acid damage die size for its mandibles and acid spit Strikes, and Sickening Death, by one step (typically to d6s).

Still as a Corpse.name: Still as a Corpse
Still as a Corpse.description: Until the next time it acts, the zitteroc appears to be dead. It has an automatic result of 21 on @Check[deception] checks and DCs to pass as a dead zitteroc.

Zitteroc.publicNotes:
Zitterocs are vicious reptilians native to the Kazmurg's Absurdity world of Azhan Prime. Due to the native Azhans' propensity for trading, these creatures have made their way across the cosmos and found new homes in the galaxy's various wetlands. Zitterocs are renowned across the galaxy for their ability to innately detect and somehow ignore even the most virulent poisons. They can siphon such poisons from targets and convert them into a fuel source for their digestive acids. Even after this siphoning process, trace amounts of poison can be found within a zitteroc, and the fresh bodies of zitterocs are often a cornucopia of medicinal substances for biotechnicians and pharmaceutical experts.

At maturity, a zitteroc stands only 2 to 3 feet tall, with a length roughly double that size. They possess a sickly blue hide that shimmers like an oil slick and can take on the rough properties of its surroundings with concentration. Additionally, they can feign a sickening death when threatened by hunters or more dangerous predators. These typically docile carnivores can become vicious when they run out of abundant food from less threatening animals, at which point they make their way into the fringes of civilization.

Obrhinnshee.name: Obrhinnshee

Enhance Weapon.name: Enhance Weapon
Enhance Weapon.description:
You infuse the weapon with magic allowing it to safely operate beyond its normal parameters. If the target is a commercial or tactical weapon, it becomes an advanced weapon, gaining a +1 item bonus to attack rolls and increasing the number of weapon damage dice to two.

Heightened (6th) If the target is a commercial, tactical, advanced, or superior weapon, it becomes an elite weapon, gaining a +2 item bonus to attack rolls and increasing the number of weapon damage dice to three.

Heightened (9th) The target becomes a paragon weapon, gaining a +3 to item bonus to attack rolls and increasing the number of weapon damage dice to four.

Glow Up.name: Glow Up
Glow Up.description:
You create an illusion that causes the target to appear more charming and genteel to observers. The spell accentuates the target's appearance, clothing, voice, and mannerisms according to what an observer finds appealing. Held items are unaffected, and any worn item removed from the creature returns to its true appearance.

The target gains a +1 status bonus to Diplomacy checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.OX4fy22hQgUHDr0q]{Make an Impression} and lets the target add its level to Diplomacy checks if untrained. In addition, the target can attempt a Diplomacy check to Gather Information in only 10 minutes. You can Dismiss this spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.hOp5ybOzyJlECU6B]{Spell Effect: Glow Up}

Heightened (+2) The bonus increases by 1, to a maximum of +4 at 7th rank.

Prestidigitation.name: 魔法伎俩 Prestidigitation
Prestidigitation.description:
最简单的魔法帮你完成杂物。只要你维持该法术，你就可以产生简单的魔法效果。每当你维持该法术时，你可以选择四个选项中的一个。

  • 烹饪 为1磅非活物材料冷却，加热，或者调味。
  • 抬起 将一件轻负载或者更低的无主物品缓慢抬离地面。
  • 创造 创造一个负载可忽略的临时物体，它由凝结的魔法物质组成。该物体看起来粗糙且非常脆弱——它无法被用做工具，武器，法器或法术开销。
