Truesight (constant).description: 你可以看见60尺内的事物的本来面貌。GM秘密骰反制检定，对抗区域中的所有幻术或者变形效果，但这只会决定你是否能看破它（例如，如果该检定成功对抗了一个变形法术，你可以看见该生物的本来形态，但你不会结束该变形法术）。

Control Machine (at will).name: Control Machine (at will)
Control Machine (at will).description:
You take control of a technological creature or object and command it telepathically. If you issue an obviously self-destructive order to a sapient target, the target doesn't act until you issue a new order. The effect depends on its Will save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1} as it fights off your commands.

Failure You control the target. It gains the controlled condition, but it can attempt a Will save at the end of each of its turns. On a success, the spell ends.

Critical Failure As a failure, but the target receives a new save only if it's sapient and you give it a new order that's against its nature, such as killing its allies.

Heightened (10th) The duration is unlimited.

Unfettered Movement (constant).name: Unfettered Movement (constant)
Unfettered Movement (constant).description:
你驱散可能影响一个生物的阻碍。当处于该法术效果中时，法术目标忽视会赋予其速度环境减值的效果。当法术目标尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape}一个令其@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.kWc1fhmv9LBiTuei]{Grabbed}或者@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VcDeM8A5oI6VqhbM]{Restrained}的效果时，它自动成功，除非该效果是魔法性的，并且其环级比行动无碍更高。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.CdAyAiMGESvgNQtz]{Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement}

Electrotether (at will).name: Electrotether (at will)
Electrotether (at will).description:
You supercharge the targets' electromagnetism and pull them with a tether of lightning. Make a ranged spell attack against each target. If you attack two targets, both attacks count toward your multiple attack penalty, but it doesn't increase until after both attacks. The targets each take 4d8 electricity damage and are pulled 5 feet closer to you, or 10 feet closer on a critical hit. If both attacks hit, you can choose to move the creatures closer to one another instead of closer to you. Moving a target into a barrier, creature, or obstacle causes the target to stop before entering that space.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d8.

Dispel Magic (at will).name: Dispel Magic (at will)
Dispel Magic (at will).description: 你干扰法术或者效果中的魔法力量。尝试一次反制检定，对抗目标。如果你成功对抗一个法术效果，你将其反制。如果你成功对抗一个魔法物品，该物品成为该类型的普通物品，持续10分钟。这不会改变物体的非魔法性质。如果目标是一件神器或者类似的物品，你自动失败。

Analyze Target.name: Analyze Target
Analyze Target.description:
You focus on the target, gathering data as magical holograms display information. When the casting is complete, you learn biometric information about the target, including its fingerprints, medical conditions, and other basic physiological information. You or anyone you advise about the analysis gains a +1 status bonus to checks to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.AJstokjdG6iDjVjE]{Impersonate} the creature, to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1kGNdIIhuglAjIp9]{Treat Wounds} on the creature, and to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.1OagaWtBpVXExToo]{Recall Knowledge} about it. If the target is illusory or under the effects of illusion magic, you detect this only if the effect's rank is lower than the rank of your analyze target spell.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.7r6mw8H87SUaj9Tq]{Spell Effect: Analyze Target}

Heightened (3rd) The status bonus increases to +2, and you can target up to 10 creatures.

Heightened (6th) The status bonus increases to +3, and you can target any number of creatures.

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Implant Data.name: Implant Data
Implant Data.description:
You reprogram a computer or device to display a chosen piece of data when accessed. You can implant up to one piece of data per spell rank. A piece of data can be a simple fact, such as a creature or object's location or physical description; an image of a creature or object; or a simple statement of no more than 300 characters. When the target computer or device is accessed, this implanted data is the first data the accessing creature gains, regardless of what data the creature is looking for. Implanted data doesn't prevent a creature from accessing other information stored on a device, change how the device functions, or otherwise inhibit the device from functioning. If this spell's duration ends before a creature accesses the implanted data, the information vanishes.

Heightened (3rd) The duration is one year.

Heightened (6th) The duration is unlimited.

Read Aura.name: 阅读灵光 Read Aura
Read Aura.description:
你专注于目标物体，拓展神智，以感受魔法灵光。当你完成施法后，你得知该物品是否具有魔法。你或者你共有了灵光情报的人在对该物品@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.eReSHVEPCsdkSL4G]{Identify Magic}时获得+2环境加值。如果该物体是幻象，仅当该效果的环级低于你的阅读灵光环级时你才能发现此事实。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.J6OhRNSN23KzOPRL]{Spell Effect: Read Aura}

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多10个物体为目标。

升阶（8环级） 你能以任意数量物体为目标。

Seek the Stars.name: Seek the Stars
Seek the Stars.description:
In your mind's eye, you chart a path through the cosmos. If you're in Pact Worlds space, you immediately know which direction to travel in order to reach the Starstone on Absalom Station. If you're outside the Pact System, you know the direction to the nearest Drift beacon or the Starstone.

Heightened (7th) You can instead know the direction to a familiar location, such as a world or way station you've visited.

Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement.name: 法术效果：行动无碍 Unfettered Movement
Spell Effect: Unfettered Movement.description:
效果来自@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.aqRYNoSvxsVfqglH]{Unfettered Movement}

你无视环境对你速度的减值。

Mutable Form.name: Mutable Form
Mutable Form.description: The illumantula is a grouping of tiny tech bits that project energy between themselves, though the illumantula functions as single creature. The illumantula's size gives its space while being fully dispersed, though it can take actions to change its size. The illumantula can occupy the same space as other creatures and must do so to use some of its actions.

Reactive Unmaking.name: Reactive Unmaking
Reactive Unmaking.description:
Trigger A creature moves within the illumantula's space or uses a manipulate action, move action, or ranged attack within 100 feet of the illumantula

Effect The illumantula attempts a ranged Strike against the triggering creature. If the attack is a critical hit and the trigger was a manipulate action, the illumantula disrupts that action. This Strike doesn't count toward the illumantula's multiple attack penalty, and its multiple attack penalty doesn't apply to this Strike.

Relativity Field.name: Relativity Field
Relativity Field.description: Creatures sharing a space with the illumantula can't use any actions or abilities with the fortune trait. A creature beginning its turn within the illumantula's space can't use actions or ability with the fortune trait until the end of their turn. The illumantula has weakness 10 against any ability or action affected by the fortune trait that successfully damages it.

Energy Bombardment.name: Energy Bombardment
Energy Bombardment.description: The illumantula releases coordinated blasts from each of its constituent bits at creatures within its form. Each enemy in the illumantula's space takes @Damage[12d8[electricity]] damage (@Check[reflex|dc:49|basic] save). A creature that fails its save is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round (or 1 minute on a critical failure). The blinding is a visual effect.

Reform.name: Reform
Reform.description:
Frequency once per round

Effect The illumantula changes its size to either Huge, Large or Medium as desired. When changing size in this manner, the illumantula can determine what direction its new space takes up or what portion of its existing space is removed. This movement doesn't trigger reactions.

Unreality Engine.name: Unreality Engine
Unreality Engine.description: When the illumantula scores a critical hit with a transreality beam Strike, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed 1}, or increases its doomed value by 1 if it was already doomed.

Illumantula.publicNotes:
Though it only recently appeared in the shattered red deserts of the planet Akiton, the so-called illumantula has already become the stuff of local legend and folklore. Emerging shortly after the crash of the mysterious First Ones vessel now only known as the Wreck of the Returned, the illumantula was so named by the shobhad desert guides who first encountered the creature and compared it to the deadly spiders of the Akitonian glaciers. Other Pact Worlds citizens have taken to the name, as the closest descriptive title for the being has simply been "a spider made of light."

Content—for now—to spend its days wandering the Wreck of the Returned and the immediately surrounding area, the illumantula has only had a handful of meaningful engagements since its appearance. The first was against a group of Hellknights of the Order of the Eclipse, where the illumantula systematically unmade 80 of their best-trained troops in under two minutes. Only weeks after the engagement, a group of Stewards attempting to enter the Wreck of the Returned were discovered and engaged at the periphery of the illumantula's patrol path. Only two of 12 commandos managed to escape, and their accounts of the illumantula and its powers are contradictory, leaving the Stewards unable to make effective plans for further encounters.

A strict quarantine has been set up to match the illumantula's patrol path, as calculated by the meticulous anacites of Investigation Site A01. The Aballonian constructs know the being to be related to the First Ones and dedicate their time to finding a means of communicating with the swarm of technological bits that patrol the outer wastes of the crashed starship. So far, they've had no success, and they've sent out an urgent call for linguistics and computers experts from across the Pact Worlds to travel to Akiton and aid their research.

Where the anacites continue their experiments, scholars of Eloritu have uncovered a disturbing connection between the illumantula and the concept of alternate realities. Somehow, the actions of the illumantula produce fixed points in reality, where the unique powers of creatures with greater connections to the multiverse are somehow stymied or forced to adhere to the illumantula's will. The reason for this phenomenon remains a mystery, though one the anacites seem blissfully ignorant to explore.

The appearance of the illumantula has led to the belief that it's a protector for the ancient technology of the mysterious First Ones. Similarities between the illumantula's technological bits and extracted data from Aballon have all but confirmed this theory. However, the association begs the question: is there just one illumantula, or is it merely one of many such highly advanced guardian constructs for the First Ones, a species who might be beyond anything the Pact Worlds could contend with?

Cosmic Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster).name: Cosmic Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster)

Call Cosmos.name: Call Cosmos
Call Cosmos.description:
You reach into the void and call down a vertical column of dangerous cosmic material that rains destruction upon creatures in the area and shrouds the terrain around it in a swirl of stardust. This matter is made up of bits of burning stars and chunks of frozen comets, and it deals 5d12 cold damage and 5d12 fire damage to every creature in the area when you Cast the Spell. For the spell's duration, the cosmic material reduces visibility and mobility, making the area greater difficult terrain and making everything seen within or through the area @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}.

Heightened (10th) The cold and fire damage each increase by 2d12.

Foresight.name: Foresight
Foresight.description:
你获得一种能知晓法术目标即将遇到的危险的第六感。如果对于法术目标你选择一个生物而不是自身，你会创造一个精神链接；通过该链接你能告知目标危险将至。该链接是一个心灵效果。由于该法术需要你处理大量的信息，你无法令超过一个预警术同时生效。再次施放预警术会结束之前的预警术。当预警术生效时，目标在其先攻骰上获得+2状态加值，并且对 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{无踪 Undetected} 生物或者被夹击时不视为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{Undetected}。除此之外，你获得下列反应动作： @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.VOEWhPQfN3lvHivK]{预警 Foresight}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.X9Na6IK8FSPcTuoc]{法术效果：预警术}

Singularity Seed.name: Singularity Seed
Singularity Seed.description:
A tiny particle of incredibly dense mass magically blossoms into a gravitational singularity that pulls creatures toward it and spatially compresses any creatures that are moved into it. You create a singularity in a 5-foot square that is unoccupied by any creatures. All creatures and unsecured objects in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:50] around the singularity are moved toward the singularity when the spell is cast, depending on their Reflex save (see below). Creatures and objects are moved starting with those closest to the singularity, so they might block the path of other creatures and objects that are pulled in later.

Creatures' spaces can overlap in the square that contains the singularity. A creature or object that enters the singularity or ends its turn there takes 10d10 bludgeoning damage with no saving throw. While in the singularity, a creature can take no actions except to attempt to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{Escape} against your Spell DC. When the spell ends, the singularity disappears, and overlapping creatures are moved to the closest unoccupied space, as determined by the GM.

Squares in the emanation are difficult terrain for creatures moving away from the singularity, and creatures moving toward the singularity can move 10 feet for each 5 feet of movement they spend.

A creature needs to attempt a Reflex save if it's in the area when the spell is cast and when it ends its turn in the area.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature is pulled 10 feet toward the singularity.

Failure The creature is pulled 20 feet toward the singularity.

Critical Failure The creature is pulled 30 feet toward the singularity.

Eclipse Burst.name: 噬星爆发 Eclipse Burst
Eclipse Burst.description:
一个冰寒漆黑的球体在区域中爆炸，对区域中的生物造成8d10寒冷伤害，以及对活物8d4额外虚能伤害。在区域中的每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。

如果该球体覆盖了一个魔法光源的区域，或者影响了一个会受到魔法光照影响的生物，噬星会尝试反制光亮效果。

大成功 该生物或者物体不受影响。

成功 该生物或者物体承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物或者物体承受完整伤害。

大失败 该生物或者物体承受双倍伤害。如果它是生物，他会因这黑暗而 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲 Blinded}，持续时间无限。

升阶（+1） 该寒冷伤害增加1d10，并且对活物的虚能伤害增加1d4。

Energy Aegis.name: 辟能圣盾 Energy Aegis
Energy Aegis.description:
你使用长效的强力能量护盾保护目标。目标获得对酸蚀、寒冷、电击、火焰、力场、音波、命能、以及虚能伤害的抗力5。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.4Lo2qb5PmavSsLNk]{法术效果：辟能圣盾}

升阶（9环级） 该抗力提升到10。

Interplanar Teleport.name: 跨界传送 Interplanar Teleport
Interplanar Teleport.description:
需求 你具有目标位面的位面密钥用于给法术定位

你和你的盟友跨越位面之间的屏障进行旅行。目标移动至其他位面，比如火元素位面、幽界、或者外层裂隙。你必须知晓目标位面的存在，而且需要使用由该位面的物质制作的魔法位面密钥来给法术定位。就如同跨界传送这个法术本身一样，大多数著名位面的位面密钥具有罕见稀有度，而鲜为人知的位面及半位面通常具有稀有、甚至有可能时独特稀有度的位面密钥。

该法术极其不精准，你会出现在目标之一（由你选择）上一次造访该位面时的位置周边，误差为1d20 x 25英里。若所有目标都是初次造访某个特定位面，你们就会出现在该位面的随机位置。跨界传送不会提供返回的手段，不过除非发生了什么另外情况，否则再次施放跨界传送能让你返回自身之前身处的位面。

Sunburst.name: 阳炎爆 Sunburst
Sunburst.description:
强力而耀眼的球状日光在区域中爆开，对该区域中的生物造成8d10火焰伤害，以及对不死生物造成额外@Damage[(@item.level+1)d10[vitality]]伤害。在该区域中的每个生物必须尝试一次反射豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物承受一半伤害。

失败 该生物承受完整伤害。

大失败 该生物承受完整伤害，并且永久 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{目盲 Blinded} 。

如果阳炎爆的球状区域与魔法黑暗的区域部分重叠，则会尝试反制该黑暗效果。

升阶（+1） 该火焰伤害增加1d10，并且对不死生物的命能伤害增加1d10。

Repulsion.name: 排斥术 Repulsion
Repulsion.description:
你创造一个令生物无法接近你的灵光。当施放该法术时，你可以令区域为任何你所选择的半径，至多40尺。当你施放该法术时位于区域中的生物，以及在法术生效时进入该区域的生物必须尝试一次意志豁免。生物尝试过该豁免后，对于这次施放的排斥术总使用相同的结果。仅当生物自愿向你移动时，任何对其的移动限制才会生效。例如，如果你移动靠近一个生物，它不需要走远。

大成功 该生物的移动不受影响。

成功 该生物移动靠近你时，将区域中的每一格视为困难地形。

失败 在该区域中，该生物无法移动靠近你。

Teleport.name: 传送术 Teleport
Teleport.description:
你和目标会立即传送到射程内的任何位置，只要你能通过该地点到你起始地点的相对位置，以及其外观（或者典型特征）来精确定位该地点。关于该地点外观的错误的知识会令法术失败，但它也可能导致传送到非预想地点或者造成其他由GM决定的事故。传送术在距离很远时无法保证精确。目标会在距离目标地大约总旅行距离1%的地方出现，其偏移方向由GM决定。对于短途旅行，这种误差可以忽略，但是对于长距旅行这可能达到1英里。

升阶（7环级） 你和其他目标可以传送到1000英里内的任何地点。

升阶（8环级） 你和其他目标可以传送到同一星球上的任何地点。如果你旅行超过1000英里，你只会偏移目标10英里。

升阶（9环级） 你和其他目标可以传送到同一行星系中任何其他行星上的任意地点。若你对该地点的位置和外观有准确的知识，你会到达该星球上偏移目标100英里的位置。

升阶（10环级） 如9环级版本，但是你和其他目标可以旅行到同一恒星系中的任何行星上。

Truesight.name: 真景术 Truesight
Truesight.description: 你可以看见60尺内的事物的本来面貌。GM秘密骰反制检定，对抗区域中的所有幻术或者变形效果，但这只会决定你是否能看破它（例如，如果该检定成功对抗了一个变形法术，你可以看见该生物的本来形态，但你不会结束该变形法术）。

X-Ray Vision.name: X-Ray Vision
X-Ray Vision.description: You empower yourself to see through most materials and walls within 60 feet. Your sight is blocked by 2 feet of wood or plastic, 1 foot of stone, 2 inches of common metal, or any amount of lead or any starmetal, and you can only see in black and white.

Banishment.name: 放逐术 Banishment
Banishment.description:
你将目标送回其原属位面。目标必须尝试一次意志豁免。你可以在施放该法术的过程中花费一个额外行动，为该法术添加一个消耗，令该生物在其豁免上承受-2环境减值。此消耗必须是专门收集的一些属于该生物的禁忌（anathema）的物品。如果你施放该法术时未处于你的原属位面，该法术失败。

大成功 该生物成功抵抗被放逐，同时你获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}.

成功 该生物成功抵抗被放逐。

失败 目标被放逐。

大失败 该生物被放逐，并且在一周内无法通过任何办法回到被放逐前的位面。

升阶（9环级） 你能以至多10个生物作为目标。额外的消耗影响那些构成禁忌（anathema）的目标。

Sending.name: 短讯术 Sending
Sending.description: 你向该生物发送一段25词或者更短的精神信息，并且它能够立即回复一段由他所编纂的25词或者更短的信息。

Truespeech (constant).name: Truespeech (constant)
Truespeech (constant).description:
无论什么语言，目标都可以理解其所有的词语，并且向其他生物用该语言交流。当处于一群各异的生物中时，每次目标将要说话，他可以选择一个生物，并使用一种该生物理解的语言来讲述，即使该目标不知道这语言具体是什么。

升阶（7环级） 持续时间为8小时。

Planar Tether.name: 次元拴绳 Planar Tether
Planar Tether.description:
你将目标固定到其当前位面。当目标受到次元拴绳影响时，该法术会尝试反制任何传送效果，以及任何移动目标到另一个位面的效果。次元拴绳的持续时间由目标的意志豁免决定。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 该持续时间为1分钟。

失败 该持续时间为10分钟。

大失败 该持续时间为1小时。

Heroism.name: 英雄气概 Heroism
Heroism.description:
你解放了目标内在的英勇，赋予其在攻击骰，察觉检定，豁免骰和技能检定上的+1状态加值。

升阶（6环级） 该状态加值增加到+2。

升阶（9环级） 该状态加值增加到+3。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.l9HRQggofFGIxEse]{法术效果：英雄气概}

Life Seal (at will).name: Life Seal (at will)
Life Seal (at will).description:
Trigger A creature within range enters an environment that would be harmful to it.

A shimmering bubble envelops the target's body, allowing it to breathe normally in a vacuum or other unsafe environment and protecting it from severe temperatures and radiation.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 5 additional creatures to gain protection against the environment the triggering creature entered. The spell lasts for 8 hours and also protects against extreme temperatures and radiation.

Heightened (10th) You can target up to 10 additional creatures to gain protection against the environment the triggering creature entered. The spell lasts until your next daily preparations and also protects against incredible temperatures and radiation.

Calm.name: 安定心神 Calm
Calm.description:
你令区域内的生物强制冷静，令它们进入平和的状态；每个生物必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 对沉静的渴求令该生物在攻击骰上承受-1状态减值。

失败 任何会影响该生物的情绪效果会被压制，并且该生物无法进行敌对行为。如果该目标成为任何其他生物敌对行为的目标，它不再受到安定心神的影响。

大失败 如同失败，但是敌对行为不会结束该效果。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.Qr5rgoZvI4KmFY0N]{法术效果：安定心神}

Cleanse Affliction.name: 净化苦难 Cleanse Affliction
Cleanse Affliction.description:
温和的恢复魔法消除毒素和更糟糕的疾害。选择目标的一个苦难，例如诅咒、疾病、或者毒素。如果它已经超过阶段1，减少1个阶段。直到某一次苦难被完全治愈之前，对于这次苦难，这种减少只能生效一次。尽管这种减少不能再次发生，升阶版本的该法术每次施法都能尝试反制它。

升阶（3环级） 如果苦难是疾病或者毒素，尝试反制它。

升阶（4环级） 如果苦难是诅咒、疾病或者毒素，尝试反制它。

Clear Mind.name: 清神醒脑 Clear Mind
Clear Mind.description:
You drive mental contamination from the target's mind. Attempt to counteract an effect of your choice imposing one of these conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{Fleeing}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{Frightened}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied}. If you failed to counteract the effect but you would have if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed. This spell can't counteract or suppress conditions that are part of curses, diseases, or a natural state of the target.

Heightened (4th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9qGBRpbX9NEwtAAr]{Controlled}, and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (6th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.3uh1r86TzbQvosxv]{Doomed} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (8th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} to the list of conditions.

Dispel Magic.name: 解除魔法 Dispel Magic
Dispel Magic.description: 你干扰法术或者效果中的魔法力量。尝试一次反制检定，对抗目标。如果你成功对抗一个法术效果，你将其反制。如果你成功对抗一个魔法物品，该物品成为该类型的普通物品，持续10分钟。这不会改变物体的非魔法性质。如果目标是一件神器或者类似的物品，你自动失败。

Environmental Endurance.name: 忍受环境 Environmental Endurance
Environmental Endurance.description:
你保护目标对抗危险气温。选择严寒或炎热。目标不受你选择的气温的影响，但这对极寒和极热无效。

升阶（3环级） 目标受到保护，免遭严寒或炎热影响。

升阶（5环级） 目标受到保护，免遭严寒、炎热、极寒和极热影响。

Resist Energy.name: 抵抗能量伤害 Resist Energy
Resist Energy.description:
元素护盾保护一个生物免受某一种类型能量的伤害。选择酸蚀，寒冷，电击，火焰或者音波伤害。目标和其装备获得对你所选择伤害类型的抗力5。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.con2Hzt47JjpuUej]{法术效果：抵抗能量伤害}

升阶（4环级） 该抗力增加到10，并且你能以至多两个生物为目标。

升阶（7环级） 该抗力增加到15，并且你能以至多五个生物为目标。

See the Unseen.name: 识破无形 See the Unseen
See the Unseen.description:
你的目光穿透了幻术，发现了隐形生物和魂灵。你能看到@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}生物，就如同它们并未隐形一般，然而它们的体征仍然很模糊，使得它们具有@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}并且难以被识别。你还能看到虚体生物，比如幽灵，你能通过透视物体的内部来看到虚体生物，在物体表面下10尺内的此类生物会显现为经过分层的模糊轮廓。对细节更强的洞察力还让你在作出不相信幻术的检定时，获得+2状态加值。

升阶（5环级） 持续时间为8小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.T5bk6UH7yuYog1Fp]{法术效果：识破无形}

Sound Body.name: 身健体康 Sound Body
Sound Body.description:
You send a surge of healing energy to restore the target's body. Attempt to counteract an effect of your choice imposing one of these conditions on the target: @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.9PR9y0bi4JPKnHPR]{Deafened}, @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled}, or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened}. If you didn't counteract the effect, but you would have if its counteract rank were 2 lower, instead suppress the effect until the beginning of your next turn. The effect's duration doesn't elapse while it's suppressed.

This spell can't counteract or suppress curses, diseases, or conditions that are part of the target's normal state.

Heightened (4th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.4D2KBtexWXa6oUMR]{Drained} and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.xYTAsEpcJE1Ccni3]{Slowed} to the list of conditions.

Heightened (8th) Add @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned} to the list of conditions.

Status.name: 关照术 Status
Status.description:
只要你和目标处于相同的位面，并且均活着，你就会一直知晓其当前状态。你知晓目标和你相对的方向，与你的距离，以及任何正影响其的状态。

升阶（4环级） 该法术的射程增加到30尺，并且你能以至多10个生物为目标。

Translate.name: 通译语言 Translate
Translate.description:
在你施放该法术时，目标会理解其正听到或者阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会令其能够理解密文，使用隐喻表达的含义，或者类似的内容（由GM所判定）。如果目标能够听见数种语言并且了解该情况，它能选择要理解的那种语言；否则，随机选择这种语言。

升阶（3环级） 该目标也能使用该语言交流。

升阶（4环级） 你能以至多10个生物作为目标，并且这些目标也能使用该语言交流。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Forbidding Ward.name: 严厉护卫 Forbidding Ward
Forbidding Ward.description:
你保护一个盟友，以抵御目标敌人的攻击和敌对法术。目标盟友在对抗目标敌人的攻击，法术和其他效果上对护甲等级获得+1状态加值。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.ctMxYPGEpstvhW9C]{法术效果：严厉护卫}

升阶（6环级） 该状态加值增加到+2。

Guidance.name: 神导术 Guidance
Guidance.description:
你请求超自然存在的引导，赋予目标在持续时间结束前的一次攻击骰，察觉检定，豁免骰，或者技能检定上获得+1状态加值。目标在掷骰前选择是否使用该加值。如果目标使用该加值，该法术结束。无论怎样结束，该目标接下来会暂时免疫1小时。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3qHKBDF7lrHw8jFK]{法术效果：神导术}

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.3LyOkV25p7wA181H]{效果：神导术免疫}

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导命能，以治疗活物或者伤害不死生物。如果目标是自愿活物 ，你回复这个数量的生命值。如果目标是不死生物，你对其造成1d8命能伤害，并且它可以进行基础强韧豁免。你在施放该法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标，范围，区域和其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 （专注） 该法术的射程为30尺。如果你在治疗一个活物，回复的生命值增加8。

3 （专注） 你在@Template[emanation|distance:30]内释放命能。这会以区域中所有活物和不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗或者伤害的量增加1d8，两个动作版本的额外治疗增加8。

Infuse Vitality.name: 灌注命能 Infuse Vitality
Infuse Vitality.description:
你使用命能增强攻击。目标的数量等于你施放该法术时花费的动作数量。每个目标的无武装和武器打击额外造成1d4命能伤害。（该伤害通常只会伤害不死生物）。如果你具有圣洁（holy）特征，你可以将该特征附加到受到该法术影响的打击上。

升阶（3环级） 该伤害增加到2d4。

升阶（5环级） 该伤害增加到3d4。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.X7RD0JRxhJV9u2LC]{法术效果：灌注命能}

Reorient.name: Reorient
Reorient.description: Applying a combination of vital energy and acupressure, you help the target regain its footing. The target loses the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} condition if it has it. The target becomes immune to the off-guard condition until the start of your next turn, even if the condition would be circumstantially applied, such as by being flanked or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. The target is then immune to reorient for 10 minutes.

Sanctuary.name: 庇护术 Sanctuary
Sanctuary.description:
你引动防护能量，保护一个生物抵御攻击。尝试攻击该目标的生物必须每次尝试一次意志豁免骰。如果目标使用敌对动作，该法术结束。

大成功 庇护术结束。

成功 生物可以尝试其攻击，以及该轮中的其他对该目标的任何其他攻击。

失败 目标无法攻击，并且该动作被浪费。它在该轮中无法继续对目标尝试攻击。

大失败 该目标浪费该动作，并且在庇护术剩余持续时间中均无法尝试攻击目标。

Spirit Link.name: 灵魂链接 Spirit Link
Spirit Link.description:
你和其他生物建立了一条灵魂链接，令你代为承受其苦痛。当你施放该法术，以及在你回合开始时，如果目标生命值低于其最大生命值，它回复2生命值（或者其当前生命值和最大生命值的差值，如果这更低）。你失去等于目标回复量的生命值。

这是一种基于灵魂的转移，所以没有任何效果会增加目标获得的生命值或者减少你失去的生命值。这种转移也会忽略你或者目标所拥有的任何临时生命值。由于该效果中没有任何命能或者虚能作用，灵魂链接在你或者目标为不死生物时也生效。在持续时间中，你不会从再生或者快速治疗中受益。你可以解消该法术，并且一旦你为0生命值，灵魂链接自动结束。

升阶（+1） 每次转移的生命值增加2。

Stabilize.name: 稳定伤势 Stabilize
Stabilize.description: 生命能量将目标从鬼门关拉回。目标失去 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yZRUzMqrMmfLu0V1]{濒死 Dying} 状态，但它仍然 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{失去意识 Unconscious}，并为0生命值。

+2 status to all saves vs. divine.name: +2 status to all saves vs. divine

Attunement Aura.name: Attunement Aura
Attunement Aura.description: 60 feet. All allied creatures in the aura gain a +5-foot status bonus to Speeds (if the dragon is photon-attuned), or all enemies take a –5-foot status penalty to Speeds (if the dragon is graviton-attuned).

Cosmic Attunement.name: Cosmic Attunement
Cosmic Attunement.description:
The cosmic dragon is always attuned to an underlying stellar force: either photons or gravitons. They can swap attunement as a free action once at the start of their turn in combat and is otherwise attuned to whichever force they choose at any time outside of combat. The dragon's melee Strikes deal an additional @Damage[2d6[fire]] damage while they're photon-attuned and an additional @Damage[1d6[bludgeoning]] damage plus Knockdown while they're graviton-attuned. The damage of their cosmic blast Strike is likewise determined by their current attunement, as are the effects of some of their other abilities. The dragon can choose to exclude any creatures from any effect of the aura or action that uses the aura.

The dragon can always sense the distance and direction to the nearest Drift beacon and to the Starstone on Absalom Station.

Stellar Breath.name: Stellar Breath
Stellar Breath.description: The dragon unleashes divine power like that from the core of a star or black hole, dealing @Damage[13d10[spirit]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:50] (@Check[will|dc:41|basic] save). The dragon can't use Stellar Breath for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Stellar Mote.name: Stellar Mote
Stellar Mote.description: The dragon conjures a mote of stellar energy that shares their current attunement. They direct the mote to a square within 90 feet. While the mote is deployed, the dragon's attunement aura also emanates from that square, with the same emanation radius. The dragon can Sustain to move the mote up to 90 feet or to recall the mote from any distance. The mote is made of cosmic energy, doesn't occupy a space, and can't be targeted or destroyed by any effect.

Stellar Pulse.name: Stellar Pulse
Stellar Pulse.description:
The dragon imposes an effect on creatures within their attunement aura. The dragon can choose either option for each creature, regardless of their current attunement. The dragon can't use Stellar Pulse again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Stellar Pulse]]{1d4 rounds}.

  • Graviton Each creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:41] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized} for 1 round.

  • Photon Each creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.nlCjDvLMf2EkV2dl]{Quickened} and can use the extra action only to Stride or Strike.

Cosmic Dragon (Ancient, Spellcaster).publicNotes: These majestic dragons embody the stellar forces that underly and balance all that exists in the universe. Cosmic dragons are wise, social, and patient beings, accepting of all whom they come across; they see all creatures as equal components of the universe and are just as likely to be found discussing astrophysics in the company of scholars as they are to be found lamenting the twists and turns of fate in the company of the downtrodden. Most cosmic dragons can change their shape, though they usually only do so to make other creatures comfortable. They detest deception and always introduce themselves as dragons even while in another form.

Haeshi-Shaa (Shaa Form).name: Haeshi-Shaa (Shaa Form)

Phantasmal Fleet.name: Phantasmal Fleet
Phantasmal Fleet.description: A menacing vision of a fleet of hostile starships fills the mind of each creature in the area. The ships appear to be 1,000 feet overhead bombarding the ground with laser fire. The vision deals 10d8 mental damage with a basic Will save. On a critical failure, the target also believes it's being pursued and moves to take cover. It must spend an action to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ust1jJSCZQUhBZIz]{Take Cover} on each of its turns, which may require it to first move to a new space or Drop Prone. It can attempt a new Will save at the end of each of its turns, and on a success, it disbelieves the phantasm and stops being forced to Take Cover.

Truesight.name: 真景术 Truesight
Truesight.description: 你可以看见60尺内的事物的本来面貌。GM秘密骰反制检定，对抗区域中的所有幻术或者变形效果，但这只会决定你是否能看破它（例如，如果该检定成功对抗了一个变形法术，你可以看见该生物的本来形态，但你不会结束该变形法术）。

Mind Probe (at will).name: Mind Probe (at will)
Mind Probe (at will).description:
你将你的精神投射入一个生物的精神以寻找信息。除非其通过一次成功豁免抵抗你，否则你可以获得目标的记忆与知识。

成功 目标不受影响。

失败 法术持续时间的每一轮中，你可以维持该法术来询问一个不同的问题，并尝试发现答案。对于每个问题，目标可以尝试一次欺骗检定，对抗你的法术DC；如果目标成功，你不会得知答案，并且当大成功时，目标会提供给你一个假的答案，并且你信以为真。在你向目标提问过一个问题后，再次提问该问题，即使通过另一次施放的精神质询，也会得到相同的结果。

大失败 如同失败，并且目标在对抗你的问题的欺骗检定上承受-4环境减值。

Synaptic Pulse.name: 神经脉冲 Synaptic Pulse
Synaptic Pulse.description:
你释放出爆发的精神脉冲，穿透区域中每个敌人的精神。每个该区域中的敌人必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 该生物不受影响。

成功 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

失败 该生物获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 2}。

大失败 该生物震慑，持续1轮。

Cleanse Affliction.name: 净化苦难 Cleanse Affliction
Cleanse Affliction.description:
温和的恢复魔法消除毒素和更糟糕的疾害。选择目标的一个苦难，例如诅咒、疾病、或者毒素。如果它已经超过阶段1，减少1个阶段。直到某一次苦难被完全治愈之前，对于这次苦难，这种减少只能生效一次。尽管这种减少不能再次发生，升阶版本的该法术每次施法都能尝试反制它。

升阶（3环级） 如果苦难是疾病或者毒素，尝试反制它。

升阶（4环级） 如果苦难是诅咒、疾病或者毒素，尝试反制它。

Fear (at will).name: Fear (at will)
Fear (at will).description:
你将恐惧植入目标；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}.

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}.

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 3} 并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing} 1轮.

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Heal.name: 治疗术 Heal
Heal.description:
你引导命能，以治疗活物或者伤害不死生物。如果目标是自愿活物 ，你回复这个数量的生命值。如果目标是不死生物，你对其造成1d8命能伤害，并且它可以进行基础强韧豁免。你在施放该法术时花费的动作数量决定其目标，范围，区域和其他参数。

1 该法术的射程为接触。

2 （专注） 该法术的射程为30尺。如果你在治疗一个活物，回复的生命值增加8。

3 （专注） 你在@Template[emanation|distance:30]内释放命能。这会以区域中所有活物和不死生物为目标。

升阶（+1） 治疗或者伤害的量增加1d8，两个动作版本的额外治疗增加8。

+1 Status to All Saves vs. Magic.name: 在所有对魔法的豁免上获得+1状态加值

Expand.name: Expand
Expand.description: The shaa spreads their matter thin, becoming Gargantuan and gaining a space and reach of 20 feet. The shaa can take only purely mental actions or use Thicken while in this state. A shaa can return to their normal size by spending a single action, which has the concentrate trait.

Thicken.name: Thicken
Thicken.description: The shaa agitates their molecules and becomes semitransparent and virtually impenetrable for 1 minute. In this form, the shaa isn't incorporeal, gains resistance 25 to all damage, and gains 150 temporary Hit Points for 1 minute. They can take no actions and are immovable. The shaa reverts to their natural form at the end of the duration.

Viral Vapor.name: Viral Vapor
Viral Vapor.description:
Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:37]

Stage 1 carrier (1 day)

Stage 2 the creature becomes partially vaporous and treats all other creatures as @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} (1 day)

Stage 3 the creature is incorporeal and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fBnFDH2MTzgFijKf]{Unconscious} (1 day)

Stage 4 the creature dies, and its body dissipates into fine particles

Haeshi-Shaa (Shaa Form).publicNotes:
While demonstrably more powerful while in shaa form, haeshi-shaas tend to spend this portion of their lives in careful contemplation. A shaa interrupted in their contemplation is a vengeful enemy indeed.

Haeshi-shaas are relatively new members of the Dominion of the Black. These long-lived creatures shift unpredictably between a liquid and a gaseous form in a mysterious cycle that lasts their entire lives. In their liquid haeshi form, they're a churning, chunky fluid, while in their vaporous shaa form, they're more akin to hazy brown fog. Regardless of their form, they hum with atonal harmonies that cause great discomfort in others.

Haeshi-shaas serve as a sort of priest caste for the Dominion of the Black, each form preaching a doctrine of entropy and annihilation, though with slightly different nuances between each form. Haeshis tend toward assertive, aggressive practices, while shaas are meditative, often spending many months or years in contemplation. Haeshi-shaas believe that the most perfect and divine state of any object or being is complete separation into its most basic, individual particles. They claim (dubiously) that they can see, even predict, the journey of all things as they travel toward this ultimate entropic end.

In truth, haeshi-shaas can't even predict when they'll shift into their alternate form. Some have tried to catalyze the change by seeking out specific types of life experience or knowledge, but despite the many claims to the contrary, there are no verified instances of a haeshi-shaa forcing the change. Most choose to simply await their next transformation, during which time they have many centuries to spread the Dominion's disturbing doctrines and pursue their inscrutable agendas.

Sapient Green Orb.name: Sapient Green Orb

Entropy Strike.name: Entropy Strike
Entropy Strike.description:
You unleash a ray of entropy that rapidly and indiscriminately decays matter. Make a ranged spell attack against the target's AC. On a hit, the target takes 5d8 void damage, or it takes 2d6 persistent acid damage and is glitching 1 if it has the tech trait. On a critical hit, double the damage, and if the creature has the tech trait, it's glitching 2 and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1 die.

Share Pain.name: Share Pain
Share Pain.description:
You telepathically share the sensation of agonizing pain with a creature. The target takes 3d12 mental damage and attempts a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The creature takes half damage.

Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} for 1 minute.

Critical Failure The creature takes full damage and is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} for 1 minute.

Heightened (6th) The spell targets up to four creatures and deals 6d12 mental damage.

Telekinetic Maneuver.name: 念动战技 Telekinetic Maneuver
Telekinetic Maneuver.description: 你通过一股猛烈的念动力移动一个敌人或者其携带的事物。你可以对目标尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Dt6B1slsBy8ipJu9]{卸武 Disarm}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.7blmbDrQFNfdT731]{推撞 Shove}、@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.lOE4yjUnETTdaf2T]{移位 Reposition}或@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.ge56Lu1xXVFYUnLP]{摔绊 Trip}，使用法术攻击骰，而不是运动检定。

Translate.name: 通译语言 Translate
Translate.description:
在你施放该法术时，目标会理解其正听到或者阅读的一种语言的含义。这不会令其能够理解密文，使用隐喻表达的含义，或者类似的内容（由GM所判定）。如果目标能够听见数种语言并且了解该情况，它能选择要理解的那种语言；否则，随机选择这种语言。

升阶（3环级） 该目标也能使用该语言交流。

升阶（4环级） 你能以至多10个生物作为目标，并且这些目标也能使用该语言交流。

Daze.name: 晕眩术 Daze
Daze.description:
你侵入目标的精神，利用精神冲击令目标晕眩。该冲击造成1d6心灵伤害，具有基础意志豁免。如果目标在豁免中大失败，它获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{震慑 Stunned 1}。

升阶（+2） 该伤害增加1d6。

Figment.name: 虚构幻术 Figment
Figment.description:
你创造出简单的声音或图像的幻术。声音会为法术添加听觉特征，且不能包含能被理解的单词或复杂的音乐。图像会为法术添加视觉特征，但是它不能大于5尺边长的立方体，且在15尺的距离内观察会发现它的构造明显很粗糙且缺乏细节。当你施放或维持该法术时，你能尝试用幻术让人@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{分神 Create a Diversion}，这会为你的欺骗检定提供+2环境加值。若对某个生物进行的此尝试失败了，该生物就不会相信虚构幻术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{法术效果：虚构幻术}

Mind Skewer.name: Mind Skewer
Mind Skewer.description:
You overload a creature's mind with a glut of psychic information or divine judgments. The mental onslaught deals 2d6 mental damage. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Seek the Stars.name: Seek the Stars
Seek the Stars.description:
In your mind's eye, you chart a path through the cosmos. If you're in Pact Worlds space, you immediately know which direction to travel in order to reach the Starstone on Absalom Station. If you're outside the Pact System, you know the direction to the nearest Drift beacon or the Starstone.

Heightened (7th) You can instead know the direction to a familiar location, such as a world or way station you've visited.

Telekinetic Hand.name: 念动之手 Telekinetic Hand
Telekinetic Hand.description:
你创造出一只漂浮着的魔法手掌，它可以隐形或者宛如幽灵，它能抓住目标物体并向着任意方向缓慢漂浮至多20尺。当你维持法术时，你能够将物体移动额外20尺。若物体位于空中之时法术结束，那么该物体便会坠落。

升阶（3环级） 你能以一个1负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

升阶（5环级） 法术射程增加至60尺，而且你能以一个1负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

升阶（7环级） 法术射程增加至60尺，而且你能以一个2负载或更轻的无主物体为目标。

Telekinetic Projectile.name: 念动射弹 Telekinetic Projectile
Telekinetic Projectile.description:
你向目标射出区域中一个未固定的，无主的，1负载1以下的物体。对目标尝试一次法术攻击骰。如果你命中，你造成2d6的钝击，穿刺，或者挥砍伤害（对应于你所扔出的物体）。射出物体的特殊特征或者魔法特性不会影响该攻击或者伤害。

大成功 你造成双倍伤害。

成功 你造成完整伤害。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d6。

Mistvision.name: Mistvision
Mistvision.description: A sapient green orb always ignores @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealment} caused by fog, smoke, and mist.

Bitter Mist.name: Bitter Mist
Bitter Mist.description:
Frequency once per minute

Effect The sapient green orb emits a green mist (as the spell) centered on themself. Sapient orbs can choose to emit transparent mist, granting no concealment. Any enemy that's in the mist when it appears, that enters the mist, or that ends its turn in the mist must attempt a @Check[will|dc:24] save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected and becomes temporarily immune for 24 hours.

Success The creature is unaffected.

Failure The creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature becomes confused for 1 round, then @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1}.

Excandescent Flash.name: Excandescent Flash
Excandescent Flash.description:
Frequency once per minute

Effect The sapient green orb momentarily increases their luminance to an aggressively bright spectrum. Each other creature within 20 feet that can see the sapient purple orb must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:24] saving throw or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}. On a critical failure, the target instead becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} for 1 round, then dazzled for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds}.

Sapient Green Orb.publicNotes:
Sapient green orbs only recently appeared in Pact Worlds space, and wherever they appear, purple orbs are nowhere to be found. While the history and relationship between these orbs is unclear, scholars have at least discerned they communicate using the same language and share similar physiology. Their behavior, on the other hand, is quite different from purple orbs; they shun contact with others, rarely make friends, and lie whenever possible, though they aren't especially good at deception, much in the same way purple orbs aren't especially good at diplomacy, despite their best efforts. Some scholars have begun to expect that these two types of orb are somehow enemies of one another, though no records of conflict between them exist, and no sapient orb seems eager to discuss the other type in depth. Green orbs' tendency to lie about most topics further complicates the study of sapient orbs and their apparent enmity.

Sapient green orbs are 3 feet in diameter, much like sapient purple orbs, but if asked about their size (or just about any other trait), they always state something slightly inaccurate—three-and-a-half feet, two feet and four inches—whatever they think will be more impressive or confusing for whoever they're addressing. The only trait they never lie about is their color (they all insist that every sapient green orb is exactly the same shade of green, which isn't quite true; there are slight variations). They'll gladly argue about the exact shade of green with anyone around. More than one person has theorized, after such an encounter, that sapient green orbs somehow draw sustenance from engaging others in pointless arguments, but it's more likely they don't need sustenance at all and simply enjoy such pursuits.

When a sapient green orb feels they're about to lose an argument, they typically resort to using Excandescent Flash, then fly away.

These enigmatic, orb-shaped beings seem to have no home world, organized society, traditions, or religion. Sightings of the orbs are sporadic—they briefly appear in large numbers, then vanish for a year or more, only to reappear in an entirely different region of space for a few months. Scholars and friends of the orbs have noticed that each time the orbs appear, their numbers have diminished.

Sapient orbs occasionally form permanent bonds, merging three to six orbs (always of the same type, as far as anyone knows) into a cluster called a luminant. Only sapient orbs at advanced stages of their life cycle can form such clusters, and the merge is permanent and irrevocable. Luminants are highly intelligent but far more reclusive than other sapient orbs, making it difficult to discern their motivations or purpose in sapient orb society.

Corchaaz.name: Corchaaz

Gravity Well.name: 重力井 Gravity Well
Gravity Well.description: 20 feet. The corchaaz's body pulls nearby creatures toward it with dense gravitational forces. A creature that ends it turn within the aura must succeed at a @Check[reflex|dc:20|options:area-effect,forced-movement,inflicts:prone] save or be pulled 10 feet toward the corchaaz (also landing @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone} on a critical failure).

Interstellar Raft.name: Interstellar Raft
Interstellar Raft.description:
A corchaaz can combine its gravitational forces with other willing corchaazes into an interstellar raft as an exploration activity that takes 10 minutes. While part of an interstellar raft, the corchaazes must remain within 100 feet of each other. Additionally, the raft members gain a 40-foot fly Speed and the cosmic trait (both of which they keep for 1 hour after this ability ends). An individual corchaaz can Dismiss the raft, which detaches all combined corchaazes. If half or more of the raft members die, the interstellar raft ends.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.bestiary-effects.Item.2UI9dt0QM2VEvpJV]{Effect: Interstellar Raft}

Copi Concealment.name: Copi Concealment
Copi Concealment.description: The corchaaz raises a gravitational barrier around its copi shell and gains @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealment} against all creatures for 1 round.

Graviton Grip.name: Graviton Grip
Graviton Grip.description:
The corchaaz attempts to lock a creature within 40 feet into place with gravitational forces. The target must attempt a @Check[fortitude|dc:20] save.

Critical Success The target is unaffected.

Success The target takes a –5-foot status penalty to its Speeds until the end of its next turn.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.dfCMdR4wnpbYNTix]{Stunned 1}.

Critical Failure The target is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.6uEgoh53GbXuHpTF]{Paralyzed} for 1 round.

Corchaaz.publicNotes:
The crab-like corchaazes of Tabrid Minor build their shells from copi, a coral-like polyp that also constitutes the bodies of humanoid copaxis. Copi contain hollows that collapse matter into dense stores, creating pressurized chambers that emulate black holes. Corchaazes break down copi with their claws and add the material to their shells, creating gravity wells on their bodies. Corchaazes are effectively immortal unless they die of injury or illness. Legend has it their shells continue to grow as they age—copaxi folk tales describe corchaazes as big as islands.

A coastal shelf collapse on Tabrid Minor in 322 ag destroyed the planet's major corchaaz spawning ground, but this wasn't the end for this hardy species. In 324 ag, a team of scientists in a nearby star system noticed wildly fluctuating gravimetric readings. Following the weird readings, the scientists discovered and tracked a group of corchaazes traveling along a local Drift lane. Corchaaz migrations were new, and many scientists were eager to study rafts, as the migratory groups were called. More corchaaz rafts showed up the following year in other systems, including the Ghavaniska and Pact Systems.

Shimmerstone Sentinel.name: Shimmerstone Sentinel

Emotion Sense.name: Emotion Sense
Emotion Sense.description: A shimmerstone sentinel can sense the emotions of creatures within the listed range as an imprecise sense. Emotion sense is a precise sense against creatures under an emotion effect. A creature under the effects of calm can't be noticed via emotion sense.

Absorb Aggression.name: Absorb Aggression
Absorb Aggression.description:
Trigger The shimmerstone sentinel is damaged by a creature that isn't immune to emotion effects and is within 60 feet

Effect The shimmerstone sentinel absorbs the negative emotions of its attacker, causing its shimmerstone to darken to cloudy red, and becomes emotionally charged.

Calming Presence.name: Calming Presence
Calming Presence.description: 20 feet. Shimmerstone sentinels exude an aura of calm. Each time a creature in the area attempts an offensive action, such as an attack or casting a spell, that creature must attempt a @Check[will|dc:29] save; on a failure, the action is disrupted. A creature that succeeds becomes temporarily immune to the shimmerstone sentinel's calming presence for 1 day.

Emotionally Charged.name: Emotionally Charged
Emotionally Charged.description: A shimmerstone sentinel that's emotionally charged deals an additional @Damage[1d8[mental]] damage with its Strikes. In addition, a creature damaged by an emotionally charged shimmerstone sentinel's fist or shimmer beam Strike is bombarded by emotion and must attempt a @Check[will|dc:32] save. On a critical failure, the creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round.

Inexorable March.name: Inexorable March
Inexorable March.description: The shimmerstone sentinel Strides up to its Speed, pushing back each creature whose space it moves into and damaging them if they try to stop its movement. A creature can bar the way by succeeding at a @Check[fortitude|dc:32] save. On a critical success, the resisting creature takes no damage; otherwise, it's damaged as if hit by the shimmerstone sentinel's fist.

Unleash Emotion.name: Unleash Emotion
Unleash Emotion.description:
Requirements The shimmerstone sentinel is emotionally charged

Effect The shimmerstone sentinel releases the negative emotions it absorbed in a @Template[type:emanation|distance:30] that affects the minds of nearby creatures. Creatures in the area take @Damage[7d6[mental]|options:area-damage] damage (@Check[will|dc:32|basic] save). On a failure, a creature becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round, or for [[/gmr 1d4 #rounds]]{1d4 rounds} on a critical failure. The shimmerstone sentinel is no longer emotionally charged.

Shimmerstone Sentinel.publicNotes: Powerful guardian constructs capable of manipulating and absorbing emotions, shimmerstone sentinels can turn an enemy's feelings against them. Shimmerstone sentinels are created from shimmerstone, an empathic mineral mined on the planet Vesk-8 that has a calming effect on those around it. Shimmerstone sentinels can absorb powerful emotions, which they infuse into their own bodies to empower their attacks.

Host Dragon (Young, Spellcaster).name: Host Dragon (Young, Spellcaster)

Earthbind.name: 地缚术 Earthbind
Earthbind.description:
你使用大地的重量以干扰目标的飞行能力，其效果基于强韧豁免。如果该生物安全到达地面，它不会承受坠落伤害。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标安全坠落至多120尺。

失败 目标安全坠落至多120尺。如果它碰到地面，它1轮内不能飞行，浮空或者以其他方式离开地面。

大失败 目标安全坠落至多120尺。如果它碰到地面，它1分钟内不能飞行，浮空或者以其他方式离开地面。

Life Seal.name: Life Seal
Life Seal.description:
Trigger A creature within range enters an environment that would be harmful to it.

A shimmering bubble envelops the target's body, allowing it to breathe normally in a vacuum or other unsafe environment and protecting it from severe temperatures and radiation.

Heightened (7th) You can target up to 5 additional creatures to gain protection against the environment the triggering creature entered. The spell lasts for 8 hours and also protects against extreme temperatures and radiation.

Heightened (10th) You can target up to 10 additional creatures to gain protection against the environment the triggering creature entered. The spell lasts until your next daily preparations and also protects against incredible temperatures and radiation.

Wall of Wind.name: 风墙术 Wall of Wind
Wall of Wind.description:
你创造一层会干扰所有通过事物的暴风墙。这面由旋风组成的墙有5尺厚，60尺长，30尺高。该墙为竖直的，但你可以指定其形态。虽然风墙会搅动空气，但不会阻碍视觉。该墙壁具有下列效果。

  • 来自物理远程攻击的弹药（例如箭，矢，投石索弹丸，以及其他类似大小的物体）无法穿过该墙。更大的远程武器的攻击，例如标枪，如果其路线通过该墙壁，则其在攻击骰上承受-2环境减值。重型远程武器和不创造实体物体的法术效果可以不受减值地通过该墙。
  • 该墙对尝试从地面通过它的生物为困难地形。气体，以及处于@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spells.Item.V8wXOsoejQhe6CyG]{Vapor Form}的生物，无法穿过墙壁。
  • 尝试使用移动动作飞过墙壁的生物必须尝试一次强韧豁免。

大成功 该生物本回合可以正常移动穿过该墙。

成功 该飞行生物本回合可以正常移动穿过该墙，但是该墙为困难地形。

失败 该墙阻挡飞行生物的移动，并且当前动作的剩余移动力被浪费。

大失败 如同失败，并且该生物会被推离该墙10尺。

Entangling Flora.name: 纠缠植被 Entangling Flora
Entangling Flora.description:
植物与菌类无法抑制地快速成长，缠绕生物。区域内的所有表面均为困难地形。对于每轮内在该区域内开始自身回合的生物，必须尝试1次反射豁免。失败时，其速度承受-10尺环境减值，直至离开该区域为止，大失败时，它还会@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}1轮。生物能够尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱 Escape}来移除这些效果。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.rjM25qfw5BKj9h97]{法术效果：纠缠植被}

Environmental Endurance.name: 忍受环境 Environmental Endurance
Environmental Endurance.description:
你保护目标对抗危险气温。选择严寒或炎热。目标不受你选择的气温的影响，但这对极寒和极热无效。

升阶（3环级） 目标受到保护，免遭严寒或炎热影响。

升阶（5环级） 目标受到保护，免遭严寒、炎热、极寒和极热影响。

Speak with Animals.name: 动物交谈 Speak with Animals
Speak with Animals.description: 你能向动物提问、得到动物的回答、以及对动物使用交涉技能。该法术不会让动物们变得比平时更加友善。狡猾动物的沟通表现得简短且模棱两可，而缺乏智能的动物通常会发表无意义的意见。

Water Breathing.name: 水中呼吸 Water Breathing
Water Breathing.description:
目标可以在水中呼吸。

升阶（3环级） 该持续时间增加到8小时。

升阶（4环级） 该持续时间增加到直到你的下次日常准备。

Ant Haul.name: 重负术 Ant Haul
Ant Haul.description:
你增强了目标的骨骼和肌肉系统，以承受更大的重量。目标可以比通常达到@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.D5mg6Tc7Jzrj6ro7]{Encumbered}额外携带3负载，最大不超过6负载。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.5yCL7InrJDHpaQjz]{Spell Effect: Ant Haul}

Caustic Blast.name: 酸液喷溅 Caustic Blast
Caustic Blast.description:
你发射一团立即爆发的酸液，泼溅到周围生物上。区域中的生物承受1d8酸蚀伤害，这有一次基础反射豁免；在大失败时，该生物也会承受@Damage[(1+floor((@item.rank -1)/2))[persistent,acid]]伤害。

升阶（+2） 该初始伤害增加1d8，并且持续伤害增加1。

Detect Magic.name: 侦测魔法 Detect Magic
Detect Magic.description:
你发出一股标记魔法存在的脉冲。你不会获得魔法存在或不存在以外的任何信息。你可以选择忽略你完全知晓的魔法，例如你或者你盟友的魔法物品以及持续法术。仅当幻术魔法的环级低于你的侦测魔法环级时，你才能侦测幻术魔法。但是，具有幻术灵光但是没有在外表上做伪装的物品（例如一瓶隐形药水），通常能够正常侦测。

升阶（3环级） 你能知晓法术侦测出的最强魔法效果的环级或等级，具体由GM决定。

升阶（4环级） 如3环级，你也能指出最高环级魔法的来源。如同一种模糊感官，你不会了解具体的位置，但是可以将来源锁定到5尺立方（或者最近的那个五尺立方，如果来源体积比这个区域更大）。

Detect Poison.name: 侦测毒素 Detect Poison
Detect Poison.description:
你可以侦测一个生物是否分泌毒素或者具有毒素，或者一件物体是否是毒素或者已经被下毒。你无法判断目标是否有多种毒素，也无法了解毒素的种类。特定的物质，例如铅或者酒精，是毒素，并会遮盖其他毒素。

升阶（2环级） 你会得知毒素的数量和类型。

Fear.name: 恐惧术 Fear
Fear.description:
你将恐惧植入目标；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}.

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}.

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 3} 并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing} 1轮.

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Seek the Stars.name: Seek the Stars
Seek the Stars.description:
In your mind's eye, you chart a path through the cosmos. If you're in Pact Worlds space, you immediately know which direction to travel in order to reach the Starstone on Absalom Station. If you're outside the Pact System, you know the direction to the nearest Drift beacon or the Starstone.

Heightened (7th) You can instead know the direction to a familiar location, such as a world or way station you've visited.

Stumble.name: Stumble
Stumble.description:
A burst of microgravity causes a tremor around the target, pulling it toward the ground. The target must attempt a Reflex save.

Failure The target becomes @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} for 1 round. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 10 feet downward.

Critical Failure The target falls @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.j91X7x0XSomq8d60]{Prone}. If the target was flying, swimming, or floating, it falls 20 feet downward.

Heightened (+1) If the target falls, it falls an additional 5 feet on a failure and 10 feet on a critical failure.

Tangle Vine.name: 绊足藤 Tangle Vine
Tangle Vine.description:
一条藤蔓凭空出现，从你手上弹射而出并捆绑在目标身上。尝试一次法术攻击检定对抗目标。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.TwtUIEyenrtAbeiX]{法术效果：绊足藤}

大成功 目标获得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.eIcWbB5o3pP6OIMe]{Immobilized}状态，并且其速度承受-10尺环境减值，持续1轮。它能尝试@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SkZAQRkLLkmBQNB9]{逃脱 Escape}对抗你的法术DC，来以此移除减值和禁足状态。

成功 目标速度承受-10尺环境减值，持续1轮。它能尝试逃脱对抗你的法术DC来移除减值。

失败 目标不受影响。

升阶（2环级） 效果持续2轮。

升阶（4环级） 效果持续1分钟。

Covered in Bugs.name: Covered in Bugs
Covered in Bugs.description:
Trigger The dragon critically fails a saving throw

Effect Swarming insects interfere with the effect, sacrificing themselves to protect their host's body and mind. The dragon attempts a @Check[flat|dc:17]. On a success, the dragon fails the saving throw instead of critically failing.

+2 status to all saves vs. mental.name: +2 status to all saves vs. mental

Excruciating Bites.name: Excruciating Bites
Excruciating Bites.description: A creature that takes damage from a host dragon's jaws Strike or is swallowed by the dragon is also bitten by hundreds of tiny insects; the creature must succeed at a @Check[fortitude|dc:25] save or be @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} for 1 round.

One with Swarms.name: One with Swarms
One with Swarms.description: The host dragon is immune to any attack made by a swarm of insects or similar creature (at the GM's discretion).

Swarm Breath.name: Swarm Breath
Swarm Breath.description: The dragon disgorges a swarm of biting insects that deals @Damage[6d8[piercing]|options:area-damage] damage in a @Template[type:cone|distance:30] (@Check[reflex|dc:25|basic] save). They can't use Swarm Breath again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Swarm Breath]]{1d4 rounds}.

Host Dragon (Young, Spellcaster).publicNotes: Innumerable insects follow these lumbering, ravenous dragons wherever they roam, swarming around them and living in the countless orifices along the host dragon's body. The dragon is both a part of the swarm itself and a part of the swarm's ecosystem—the swarm feeds on their body, and the dragon feeds on the swarm in a grotesque, centuries-long cycle that somehow results in the host dragon growing larger and more powerful even if they feed on no other substance in their lifetime. Host dragons draw their power from the primal instincts of insects and, despite their intelligence, often behave like the insects they gather to them. Host dragons despise answering questions and violently defy all attempts others make to understand their nature.

Clangit.name: Clangit

Invisibility.name: Invisibility
Invisibility.description:
扭曲光线的幻觉包复目标，令其变得@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.zJxUflt9np0q4yML]{隐形 Invisible}。这令该生物对所有生物 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.VRSef5y1LmL2Hkjf]{无踪} ，但生物可以尝试寻找目标，令其改为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.iU0fEDdBp3rXpTMC]{Hidden}。如果目标使用敌对动作，法术在敌对动作完成后结束。

升阶（4环级） 该法术持续1分钟，但目标使用敌对动作时该法术不会结束。

Adhere.name: Adhere
Adhere.description:
You create a molecular bond between an unattended object you touch (or an object you're holding) and another object or surface that object is touching. Pulling the object free of that surface requires a successful [[/act force-open]]{Athletics} check against your spell DC to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.SjmKHgI7a5Z9JzBx]{Force Open}.

If you instead touch one unoccupied 5-foot square, that surface becomes charged with adhering magic. That space becomes greater difficult terrain.

Electric Arc.name: 电弧击 Electric Arc
Electric Arc.description:
一段电弧从一个目标跳跃到另一个目标。每个目标承受2d4电击伤害，这有一次基础反射豁免。

升阶（+1） 该伤害增加1d4。

Figment.name: 虚构幻术 Figment
Figment.description:
你创造出简单的声音或图像的幻术。声音会为法术添加听觉特征，且不能包含能被理解的单词或复杂的音乐。图像会为法术添加视觉特征，但是它不能大于5尺边长的立方体，且在15尺的距离内观察会发现它的构造明显很粗糙且缺乏细节。当你施放或维持该法术时，你能尝试用幻术让人@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{分神 Create a Diversion}，这会为你的欺骗检定提供+2环境加值。若对某个生物进行的此尝试失败了，该生物就不会相信虚构幻术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{法术效果：虚构幻术}

Illusory Object.name: 幻象造物 Illusory Object
Illusory Object.description:
你创造一个固定物体的视觉幻象。该幻象必须能完全处于法术区域中。该物体会自然活动，但是不会发出声音或者产生气味。举例而言，幻象瀑布中会出现水并流下，但是它会是安静的。

当生物触摸幻像，或者使用@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.BlAOM2X92SI6HMtJ]{搜索 Seek}动作来检查它时，该生物可以尝试不相信你的幻术。

升阶（2环级） 你的幻象也会发出合适的声音，产生正常气味，并且摸起来也很正常。该法术获得听觉和嗅觉特征。持续时间增加到1小时。

升阶（5环级） 如2环级，但是持续时间为无限。

Overheat.name: Overheat
Overheat.description:
You vent heat toward a nearby target. You deal 2d6 fire damage to the target. On a failed save, the target's held equipment becomes hot to the touch for the next round. Unless the target drops its currently held equipment at the start of its turn, it takes @Damage[(3*@item.rank)[fire]] damage.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6. Increase the damage of touching affected objects by 3.

Recharge Weapon.name: Recharge Weapon
Recharge Weapon.description:
You touch a weapon with no remaining ammunition and recharge it with magical energy. The target gains ammunition or charges equal to its expend until the end of your next turn, allowing anyone holding the target to make one Strike with the weapon. This spell only recharges weapons that use ammunition with a cost of 10 credits or less.

Heightened (3rd) The target gains ammunition or charges equal to double its expend.

Heightened (6th) The target gains ammunition or charges equal to triple its expend.

Heightened (9th) The target gains ammunition or charges equal to quadruple its expend.

Mechanical Trickery.name: Mechanical Trickery
Mechanical Trickery.description: When a clangit has spent at least 1 hour exploring a ship or space station, the gremlin gains an innate sense of its inner workings and can remotely control mechanical infrastructure within 60 feet, performing simple actions such as opening and shutting airlocks and doors, opening heat vents, activating alarms, turning lights on and off, or tampering with gravity controls.

Tech Travel.name: Tech Travel
Tech Travel.description: The clangit enters adjacent mechanical infrastructure, such as a control panel or pipe network, and instantly emerges from another within 100 feet.

Clangit.publicNotes:
Clangits, or space station gremlins, know everything about the inner workings of their home stations and enjoy punishing or pranking the station's larger inhabitants who know less than they do. "Haunted" space stations and ships with mysterious power flickers, doors that randomly open and shut, equipment that malfunctions at just the wrong time, and frequent unexplainable accidents are probably the home of one or more clangits.

When they aren't playing pranks, some clangits monitor and repair the sensitive machinery keeping many older space stations afloat—a fact that has probably saved them from eradication on larger settlements like Absalom Station. Most clangits stand about 2 feet tall and weigh around 7 pounds—the perfect size for slipping through vents and squeezing down maintenance tunnels.

Gremlins have plagued the Universe with cruel tricks since long before the Gap, and they've fully adapted to a galaxy filled with technology. Whether meddling with a comm unit, a starship, or an entire space station, gremlins delight in ruination and chaos.

Yearling Arabuk.name: Yearling Arabuk

Snow Vision.name: Snow Vision
Snow Vision.description: Snow doesn't impair a yearling arabuk's vision; it ignores @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealment} from snowfall.

Glacial Stride.name: Glacial Stride
Glacial Stride.description: The arabuk Strides twice with a +10-foot circumstance bonus to Speed, ignoring difficult terrain caused by ice, snow, or other arctic conditions.

Yearling Arabuk.publicNotes:
Yearling arabuks collect in glarings. They're abandoned by their mothers days after birth, then adopted by a mature arabuk that raises them as a group.

Those traveling through Akiton's Winterlands risk stumbling on its apex predator: the carnivorous arabuk.

Kaukariki.name: Kaukariki

Kaukariki Venom.name: Kaukariki Venom
Kaukariki Venom.description:
Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:15]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[1d4[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[1d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.i3OJZU2nk64Df3xm]{Clumsy 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[2d4[poison]] damage and clumsy 2 (1 round)

Screaming Frenzy.name: Screaming Frenzy
Screaming Frenzy.description: The kaukariki starts a frenzy of screaming, involving other nearby kaukarikis. The kaukariki attempts a single Intimidation check to [[/act demoralize]] all enemies within 30 feet. Any other kaukariki within 30 feet can use its reaction to add a cumulative +1 circumstance bonus to this Demoralize attempt (to a maximum of +4). The kaukariki can't use this ability again for [[/gmr 1d4 #Recharge Screaming Frenzy]]{1d4 rounds}, and kaukarikis that used their reactions to grant a bonus count as having used their Screaming Frenzy ability.

Stone Barrage.name: Stone Barrage
Stone Barrage.description:
Requirements the kaukariki used Screaming Frenzy within the last round

Effect The kaukariki Throws Rocks four times, applying its multiple attack penalty normally.

Kaukariki.publicNotes:
The poison that laces the barbed tails of the sharp-eared kaukarikis gives them their local nickname, "stingbats." Thriving in the canopies of warm forests and living in small to large packs, often called clamors, kaukarikis sustain themselves primarily on a mix of toxic and semi-rotten fruit and the occasional venomous insect. While most of their food is poisonous to other creatures, kaukarikis have evolved to turn this poison into a defense mechanism. Their bodies will process poison and store it in a sac at the end of their tail under their stinger. They can then inject this newly created venom into hostile creatures that threaten their pack.

Kaukariki clamors are known to use their distinct vocalizations to ward off predators and would-be intruders. When one kaukariki detects a possible threat, they'll let out a trilling whoop, the sound that gives them their name. This signal alerts other nearby kaukarikis, who answer with cries of their own, the cacophony quickly growing in intensity and volume as kaukarikis leap from tree to tree shouting and shrieking. For most predators, the thought of the stinging tails at the other end of those screeches is enough to turn them away, with many clamors relying on this tactic as much as their stingers.

Tax-Class Civil Robot.name: Tax-Class Civil Robot

Integrated Commercial Pulsecaster Pistol.name: Integrated Commercial Pulsecaster Pistol
Integrated Commercial Pulsecaster Pistol.description:
Upgrades: 1

This imposing pistol fires a jolt of paralyzing electricity from its barrel. Its remaining charges are visible as glowing lines of energy radiating down its body. Pulsecaster pistols are often used by bounty hunters and law enforcement who need to keep their targets alive.

Integrated Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commer.name: Integrated Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commercial)
Integrated Infiltrator's Toolkit (Commer.description: You need an infiltrator's toolkit to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.2EE4aF4SZpYf0R6H]{Pick Locks} or @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.cYdz2grcOcRt4jk6]{Disable Devices} (of some types) using the Thievery skill.

Integrated Datapad (Commercial).name: Integrated Datapad (Commercial)
Integrated Datapad (Commercial).description: These ubiquitous handheld computers incorporate a comm unit, microphone, speaker, camera, infosphere browser, and data storage. They can store thousands of hours of recordings, play games, and perform simple computing functions, such as time tracking and notifications, word processing, calculations, data processing, streaming media, and broadcasting emergency alerts from local governments. In most societies, commercial datapads are relatively flimsy, designed to rapidly wear out or fall behind on the latest features and updates to encourage the consumer to replace it with a newer model. In contrast, higher-end datapads are made to last and often include a sturdier chassis and extra functions.

Integrated Hacking Toolkit (Commercial).name: Integrated Hacking Toolkit (Commercial)
Integrated Hacking Toolkit (Commercial).description: A hacking toolkit is required for Computers checks to Hack computers. You can use a hacking toolkit to access a computer without using a user interface, but this requires physical contact with the computer or contact via an infosphere or a similar linked network.

Reactive Disarm.name: Reactive Disarm
Reactive Disarm.description:
Trigger A creature within the robot's reach attempts a melee or ranged Strike against the tax-class civil robot with a held weapon

Effect The robot uses its gasping hook to attempt to [[/act disarm]] the triggering creature's weapon with a +1 circumstance bonus to its check.

Tax Collector.name: 收税员 Tax Collector
Tax Collector.description: A tax-class civil robot can be placated by paying the fees, fines, or taxes it seeks to collect by offering the robot a credstick with an Interact action. If the robot takes a target's equipment (see repossession), it will count half the equipment's value toward the total tax owed. A creature can attempt a 3-action activity to fool the robot by Hacking it using a hacking toolkit and succeeding at a @Check[computers|dc:18] or Accounting Lore check. Programmed to accept many forms of payment, the robot takes a –2 penalty to AC and saving throws against actions that use a Computers check, such as the Combat Hack skill feat.

Repossession.name: Repossession
Repossession.description: When a tax-class civil robot succeeds at a check to [[/act steal]] or critically succeeds at a check to [[/act disarm]] an item, it immediately picks up the item (if necessary) and stows it in a lockbox in the robot's frame. The robot can open the lockbox with a single Interact action without difficulty, but others must Pick the Lock (DC 18); a creature that attempts to do so while the tax-class civil robot is aware takes a –4 circumstance penalty to the check.

Tax-Class Civil Robot.publicNotes:
Robotic tax collectors are used to track down debtors with outstanding payments and harass them into paying what they owe. AbadarCorp was the first such entity to utilize the technology and owns, operates, and rents a majority of the tax-class civil robots in the Pact Worlds to this day. AbadarCorp takes a portion of the payment and monitors their robots to make sure the transaction is legal, adding to the perceived legitimacy of these devices and shame of being followed by one in public. The robots will usually leave once given a small portion of the payment, often enough to pay any late fees, fines, and the cost of using the robot just to remind the debtor of their obligations; they're often treated as a minor but embarrassing nuisance and paid to leave without any trouble. Robots repurposed by loan sharks are often accompanied by other agents and programmed to collect payment in full.

Civil robots can be found in almost any large settlement, employed by the local government. They aren't meant to function as keepers of the peace, but instead perform minor functions, such as collecting refuse, aiding citizens with information, or collecting taxes. However, they can still defend themselves against vandals if necessary.

Demolition-Class Assassin Robot.name: Demolition-Class Assassin Robot

Integrated Breaching Gun.name: Integrated Breaching Gun
Integrated Breaching Gun.description:
Upgrades: 1

This snub-nosed scattergun is commonly used to blast through doors and walls. Smaller than a reaction breacher, this scattergun is infamous for its mighty recoil.

Integrated tools appropriate for disguis.name: Integrated tools appropriate for disguise shell

Burn Protocol.name: Burn Protocol
Burn Protocol.description: The circuitry of an assassin robot self-destructs upon the robot's destruction, making tracing its owner extremely difficult. Add 10 to the DC of a Computers check to recover data from a destroyed assassin robot.

Breaching Rush.name: Breaching Rush
Breaching Rush.description: The demolition-class assassin robot attempts to close the distance between it and its target, removing all obstacles in its way. The robot makes a ranged Strike with its breaching gun against the [[/act force-open]] DC of a door or other obstacle. If successful, the obstacle gains the broken condition. The robot then Strides twice toward (and even through) the obstacle, but if the obstacle still bars the robot's movement, it stops adjacent to the obstacle and attempts an Athletics check to Force Open the obstacle with a +4 circumstance bonus.

Disguise Shell.name: Disguise Shell
Disguise Shell.description: The demolition-class assassin robot enters or leaves its disguised form. While in its disguised form, it loses the ability to make Strikes or use its Breaching Rush ability, but it becomes indistinguishable from a noncombatant robot or drone model that it's based on; it gets an automatic result of 33 on Deception checks and DCs to pass as a robot of that model. Damage to the robot can prevent this disguise from being effective at the GM's discretion.

Sneak Attack.name: 偷袭 Sneak Attack
Sneak Attack.description: The demolition-class assassin robot's Strikes deal an additional 2d6 precision damage to @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} creatures.

Target Tracking.name: Target Tracking
Target Tracking.description: The demolition-class assassin robot establishes a target lock on a creature it can see within 120 feet. The creature can't become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed} against the robot or [[/act create-a-diversion]] against the robot. This ability lasts until the robot loses line of sight with the target or the target otherwise becomes hidden.

Demolition-Class Assassin Robot.publicNotes:
Named for their tendency toward extreme violence and aggressiveness, demolition robots nevertheless start their mission with stealth being a priority. Outwardly, these robots conceal their true nature with an outer casing resembling that of industrial, civic, or even domestic robots and drones.

Once the target has been detected, all stealth flies out the window as these killer machines unfurl their weapons and sensory suite from hidden panels and rush toward the mark at full speed. With their encyclopedic data banks on the stress points and emergency release mechanisms of most doors, only the most solid barriers can hold them at bay for long.

In some societies, machines automate many processes. It only makes sense, then, that some would attempt to automate the act of murder. Most manufacturers would never admit to creating such designs, forcing wealthy figures to go through hidden channels to acquire units from secret facilities or unscrupulous manufacturers. Regardless of their origins, these robots can be programmed with a target and set loose, the owner assured that either their target will be dead or will be unable to prove who tried to kill them thanks to the unit's fried circuitry.

Driftdead Crasher.name: Driftdead Crasher

Void Whispers.name: Void Whispers
Void Whispers.description:
The target hears ominous sounds containing unspeakable mysteries from beyond the stars that disorient its mind. The target attempts a Will save.

Critical Success The creature is unaffected.

Success The target hears the strange whispers, becoming @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 1} for 1 round.

Failure The target begins to wander aimlessly, using each action to Step in a random direction. When it moves, the target takes the safest route and doesn't enter hazardous terrain. The spell has a duration of 1 minute or until a creature uses a hostile action against the target.

Critical Failure As failure, except the target babbles incoherently. Any creature that begins its turn within 20 feet of the target must attempt a Will saving throw. On a failure, it must use its first action on its next turn to Step in a random direction and becomes immune to this spell for 24 hours. This is an incapacitation effect.

Darkness.name: 黑暗术 Darkness
Darkness.description:
你创造一片黑暗的帷幕，光线无法穿透，并且光源无法在区域中发光。光线无法进入该区域，并且任何非魔法光源，例如火炬或者提灯，在区域中不会发出任何光线，即使其光照可能到达黑暗术之外也是如此。这也会压制等于或低于你的黑暗术环级的魔法光亮。光线无法穿透，所以在区域中的生物无法看到外面。对于外面，这看起来如同一团纯粹黑暗的球。

升阶（4环级） 即使具有黑暗视觉的生物（但不包括高等黑暗视觉）也几乎无法看穿这黑暗。它们透过黑暗看到的生物视为@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.DmAIPqOBomZ7H95W]{Concealed}。

Dream of Home.name: Dream of Home
Dream of Home.description: You draw on a creature's thoughts of home and the comfort it finds in that concept, overwhelming the creature with wistful memories of whatever home means to it. The target must succeed at a Will save or become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.AdPVz7rbaVSRxHFg]{Fascinated} by the memories.

Fear.name: 恐惧术 Fear
Fear.description:
你将恐惧植入目标；它必须尝试一次意志豁免。

大成功 目标不受影响。

成功 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 1}.

失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 2}.

大失败 目标获得 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.TBSHQspnbcqxsmjL]{惊惧 Frightened 3} 并且 @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.sDPxOjQ9kx2RZE8D]{逃跑 Fleeing} 1轮.

升阶（3环级） 你能以至多五个生物为目标。

Figment.name: 虚构幻术 Figment
Figment.description:
你创造出简单的声音或图像的幻术。声音会为法术添加听觉特征，且不能包含能被理解的单词或复杂的音乐。图像会为法术添加视觉特征，但是它不能大于5尺边长的立方体，且在15尺的距离内观察会发现它的构造明显很粗糙且缺乏细节。当你施放或维持该法术时，你能尝试用幻术让人@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.GkmbTGfg8KcgynOA]{分神 Create a Diversion}，这会为你的欺骗检定提供+2环境加值。若对某个生物进行的此尝试失败了，该生物就不会相信虚构幻术。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.2Hg3a06gZCSnUgSA]{法术效果：虚构幻术}

Frostbite.name: 冻伤术 Frostbite
Frostbite.description:
凛冽的寒气在目标周围凝聚，冻结其身体。目标受到2d4寒冷伤害，基础强韧豁免。大失败时，目标还会获得1点钝击弱点，持续到你下回合开始。

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.spell-effects.Item.DdqWMj7cuf4S1bgr]{法术效果：冻伤术}

升阶（+1） 伤害增加1d4点，大失败时获得的弱点增加1点。

Mind Skewer.name: Mind Skewer
Mind Skewer.description:
You overload a creature's mind with a glut of psychic information or divine judgments. The mental onslaught deals 2d6 mental damage. On a critical failure, the target is also @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 2d6.

Ricochet.name: Ricochet
Ricochet.description:
A spinning disk or smooth orb of shimmering steel leaps from one target to another. You deal 2d4 bludgeoning or slashing damage (with a basic Reflex save).

Heightened (+1) The damage increases by 1d4.

Seek the Stars.name: Seek the Stars
Seek the Stars.description:
In your mind's eye, you chart a path through the cosmos. If you're in Pact Worlds space, you immediately know which direction to travel in order to reach the Starstone on Absalom Station. If you're outside the Pact System, you know the direction to the nearest Drift beacon or the Starstone.

Heightened (7th) You can instead know the direction to a familiar location, such as a world or way station you've visited.

Drift Ambush.name: Drift Ambush
Drift Ambush.description:
Frequency once per round

Effect The driftdead teleports up to its Speed. If it's in the Drift, the distance a driftdead can teleport is doubled.

Inhabit Ship.name: Inhabit Ship
Inhabit Ship.description:
Frequency once per day

Effect The driftdead crasher possesses a starship it's onboard or adjacent to. While inhabiting a ship in this manner, the crasher imposes a –2 circumstance penalty to all Piloting checks attempted by the ship's pilot. If the target ship is currently piloted by a creature, the pilot can attempt a @Check[will|dc:18] save to resist the possession.

Starship Possession.name: Starship Possession
Starship Possession.description: While Inhabiting a Ship, the driftdead crasher extends its senses. It has vision anywhere within the ship and gains all-around vision while within the ship.

Voice of the Lost.name: Voice of the Lost
Voice of the Lost.description:
The driftdead crasher calls out in the voice of someone who was lost in the Drift. Each living creature within 30 feet must attempt a @Check[will|dc:18] save.

Success The creature is temporarily immune to this driftdead's Voice of the Lost for 1 minute.

Failure The creature is @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} for 1 round.

Critical Failure The creature is confused for 2 rounds and @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} for 1 round.

Driftdead Crasher.publicNotes:
While most driftdead are spirits inhabiting their own corpses, some souls get ejected from their shells at death. These wraiths desperately struggle to return to their bodies, following their fragmented memories down aimless paths—woe to the living who cross them.
